C: 「…你们去天衣五，在135:7372124,271:6372711的地方，有一栋废弃的大厦，走进去；一楼的窗台下边有一只完好的饮料罐，拿上它，等到星期三的上午11时12分，把罐子放在大厦的门口。卡芙卡会在2分钟后出现，有一定的可能性，她会查看那只罐子，你们趁机把这个球扔到她脚边。后边的事情，我来和她谈。\n——还有一定的可能性，卡芙卡也许不理会那只罐子；那样的话，你们只要扔掉球就可以了。你们会死，不过，人都是要死的；而你们想要的未来，我会把它变成现实。」\n——命运的奴隶所颁之通缉令
E: "...Go to Pteruges-V and locate an abandoned building at coordinates 135:7372124, 271:6372711. Enter it. There is an untouched canned drink under the window sill on the first floor. Take it. Wait until 11:12 AM on Wednesday and place the can at the entrance of the building. Kafka will appear 2 minutes later. There is a chance she will stop to investigate the can. Then, take the chance to throw this ball at her feet. I will take over and converse with her from there.\nThere is also a chance that Kafka will ignore the can. In that case, just throw the ball away. You will die, but death will come for everyone. As for the future that you yearn for - I will realize it."\n— Wanted Order by Destiny's Slave

C: 如果你熟稔贝城大小坊间传闻，那你一定不会错过《雪国冒险奇谭》；如果你又恰巧是它的狂热粉丝，那你绝对听说过「《雪国冒险奇谭》交流会」——时间地点不定，且只有收到邀请才能前往会场、一睹其真实风貌。 交流会的参与者只分作两类：享受创作的「生产者」与享受前者创意结晶的「消费者」。他们皆怀着对《雪国冒险奇谭》的真情实感，为贝城文学史上这座不朽丰碑添砖加瓦。 在那之中，又诞生了这样一位传奇人物——传说她是娇小的女性；传说她从未错过任何一场交流会；传说她总是佩戴面具；传说她曾为某绝版画册一掷千金；传说她也偶有产出，每次创作都会引发整个粉丝圈子的巨大轰动…… 「这么多传说，怎么不见与铁卫相关的……」 「看来…我伪装得确实不错呢，哼哼～」
E: If you're familiar with the street gossip of Belobog, then there's no way you could miss the Tale of the Winterlands. And if you're an avid Tale fan, then you'll definitely have heard of the fan meet. Its time and location are a secret, and attendance is by special invite only. Attendants are split into only two categories: Content creators, and the consumers who love the created content. They all have a genuine love for the Tale of the Winterlands, and do their bit to support this monumental masterpiece of Belobog literature. Among them, a new legend is born — It is said that she is a petite woman. It is said she never missed a single meet. It is said she always wore a mask. It is said she once spent a small fortune on a limited-edition artbook. It is said that when ever she creates something, her work would cause a huge sensation among the dedicated fan base... "That's a whole lot of rumors, yet none of them are related to the Silvermane Guards..." "Looks like... My skills of disguise really are fantastic after all. Teehee!"

C: 「想请教太卜大人，这星阵棋为何是棋枰四方，棋子浑圆？」 「取法天圆地方？古人文明未开化前，相信大地平坦。这星阵棋仿效的是列国逐鹿相争，一统大地的旧事，自然是方枰。至于棋子…那时的人相信天如穹盖浑圆，棋子仿效星辰流转，下应人事，自然是圆的。」 「不对，不对。」 「你未下的四十八手，我已预见了。景元，你要是想借提问让我分神，我劝你趁早歇歇。」 「哎，符卿怎么无端疑我？」 「别打岔，你接着说。」 「诚如符卿所说，棋是比喻，以局喻人。战争的规则写的明明白白，各子的行动早有定数，也不过是进退飞跳罢了。因此进退以方，这便是方枰的原因。至于棋子，先贤有云『用智如圆』，阵中各子皆有自己的心智，所以用了圆棋。」 「《玉沙巡拾》一书里提过星阵棋的来由，景元，我读书多，你莫要诳骗我！」 「云车左移三进四，将军。你输了，符卿。」 「等，等等！为什么刚刚的预视里没看到这一手？退、退回去重来。」 「棋子如人，各有心智。你我落子无悔，岂有重来的道理？哈哈，一司之首岂能混赖？」
E: "Master Diviner, why do we use a square board but round pieces for starchess?" "Perhaps it's based around the round sky and square earth? Ancient civilizations believed the earth was flat. This set is modeled after the old days of nation-states and imperial conquest over a singular planet, so naturally it's square. As for the pieces... People back then believed the sky was a round dome, and chess pieces spun around like stars in that dome to reflect in human lives. That's why they are also round." "No, no. That's incorrect." "I've already predicted your next forty-eight moves. Jing Yuan, if you want to distract me with questions, I urge you to stop." "Ah, how could you suspect such malice?" "Don't interrupt me. Keep talking." "It's true that chess is a metaphor and describes the human condition. The rules of war are clearly established, with each piece's actions fixed — advance, retreat, and jump. Advance or retreat is always in an orderly manner, which is why the board's square in its orderliness. As for the pieces, the sages said "use intellect with subtlety and suaveness." As each piece is meant to be sentient individuals, they are therefore circular." "The origins of starchess are covered in the Gleaned Pearls of Verdure. I've read lots, Jing Yuan — why are you brazenly lying to me!" "Cloud Knight moves to C3, taking your King. You lost, Lady Fu." "Hang on! How did I not see this in my predictions? B—Back up. Let me see that move again." "Chess pieces are like people. Each has its own sentience. There is no going back on the chessboard. How can anyone return to the past? Haha, how can the head of a Commission act like a sore loser?"

C: 棺材的一侧，白衣判官盯着合上的灵柩，目不稍瞬。看着妹妹入睡，曾是身为人类时的习惯。 她无法感知疼痛，内心也不会再有后悔。头颅中所封装的意识告诉她，看着妹妹入睡，是一份沉重的使命，一如她为自己做的事情。 推演业判，定夺生死乃是大事。这些事情只能交由与世疏离、但又保有血肉人心的书罪判官去做。金铁终究只是金铁。她能捕捉人类话语中微妙的声调变化，愁容间肌肉的紧蹙，但这些全然无法在她金石铸成的心识里掀起一丝波澜。没有什么法术能让钢铁与血肉同悲喜，而这正是妹妹能为十王司奉献的一切。 一名金人勾魂使踱步迎上前。「有新任务？」白衣判官转过脸。 「如果您想留下照拂寒鸦小姐，我可以通传其他判官执行使命。」 「不必了。吾不想辜负了她的心意。何况，吾与十王约定，每抓捕重犯一人，便有半日还阳的自由。她久居棺中，吾想将这份体验送给不见天日的她。」 「那么，请大人备妥法器，开始伏魔吧。」金人低首作揖。 白衣判官眉目不动，望向黑暗。不再跳动的心里只有一个念头，她希望妹妹能梦到一个温软的好梦—— 梦到自己身处蓝天下，一双灵巧的手将一枚花环戴在她的头上。
E: On one side of the coffin, a white-robed judge fixes her gaze upon the sealed coffin. Observing her sister's slumber had been routine during her human days. She can no longer feel pain or any regrets. The consciousness residing within her skull informs her that observing her sister's sleep is an arduous duty, similar to what she once did to herself. Making karmic judgments and delivering sentences are profound tasks, and such responsibilities must be exclusively entrusted to judges who have detached from the mortal world yet remain attuned to the emotions of people, unlike aurumatons. While she can discern subtle shifts in the tones of human words and detect the tightening of muscles upon sorrowful countenances, none of these can stir even the faintest ripple within her heart of forged steel, and no magic can bring back her emotions as a human. That is why her sister is needed for the Ten-Lords Commission. An Aurumaton Spectral Envoy approaches her. "A new task?" The white-robed judge turns to the envoy. "If you wish to remain and attend to Madam Hanya, I can ask other judges to undertake the task instead." "That won't be necessary. I don't wish to disappoint her. Furthermore, I've reached an agreement with the Ten Lords. For every malefactor I apprehend, I shall be granted the freedom to return to the mortal realm for half a day. She's been inside the coffin for too long, and I'd like to bestow such a chance for her to bask in the sun." "Then, please prepare your sacred vessels and commence the exorcism, Madam." The aurumaton bows in deference. The white-robed judge remains emotionless as she peers into the darkness. Within her heart that no longer beats, there resides a simple aspiration, that her sister will dream a tender and blissful dream... That she will dream of nimble hands gently crowning her head with a wreath.

C: 「亲爱的三月七： 见到你就像见到微露的晨光一样，令人期待。 也许是我太过心急，就这样出现在了你面前，还好信息素的传播让你误认为那只是一场幻觉。 上一次与你这样接近，还是在你试图查探过去的时候，和那时比，你似乎又成长了一些。 你与你的伙伴们——{NICKNAME}，丹恒，姬子，瓦尔特，还有那位骑士友人——齐心协力在战斗…那样的大家伙，连我也需稍稍费些力气呢♭ 记忆就是这么奇妙，不知不觉，你的旅途已经开始了这么久。 我仍记得无数贪婪的眼睛在闪烁的星痕后，窥视这具躯体，觊觎这份秘密。 即使我能撕裂追捕者的罗网，忆庭的棱光始终追逐身后，任何雨雾或泪珠，在那光影上都会被蒸发为一缕真空。 但去往哪里才能摆脱『过去』…摆脱『我』？ 是那早已失去情感的标本，无处寻觅的『纯美』吗？ 是那永远游弋，也永恒无归的『巡猎』吗？ 或是血泪交织，为人憎恨的『毁灭』？ …… 直到一束刺眼的灯光自远处射来，让眼前的视野几近曝光泛白。 但那瞬间确实启发了我。 ——你需要一个空白的『起点』。所以我闭上了眼睛。 现在我有机会告诉你了——那是来自列车的灯光。像一颗流星。 你的， 『长夜月』♭」 ——深藏心底的声音
E: "Dear March 7th, Meeting you is like seeing the first light of dawn, filling me with anticipation. Perhaps I was too eager, appearing before you like this, but thankfully the pheromones made you dismiss it as just an illusion. The last time we were this close was when you tried to explore the past. Compared to then, you seem to have grown a bit more. You and your companions—{NICKNAME}, Dan Heng, Himeko, Welt, and that knightly friend—fought together as one... Even I had to put in a bit of effort against such a formidable opponent ♭ Memory is such a wondrous thing... Before you knew it, your journey had already come this far. I still remember countless greedy eyes glinting behind the starlit trails, peering at this body, coveting this secret. Even though I could tear through the hunters' web, the prismatic light of the Garden always chased behind me... Any rain or tears would evaporate into a vacuum against that luminescence. But where can I escape from "the past"... escape from "myself"? Is it in those emotionless specimens, in the elusive Beauty? Is it in The Hunt that forever prowls, yet never finds its way home? Or in Destruction, where blood and tears intertwine, despised by all? ... Until a blinding beam of light shot in from afar, making my vision nearly white with overexposure. But that moment truly inspired me. You need a blank "starting point." So I closed my eyes. Now I can finally tell you. It was the light from the Express. Like a shooting star. Yours truly, 'Evernight' ♭" — A voice deep within

C: 开拓者：开拓记事
E: Trailblazer: Trailblaze Chronicle

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C: 幸运的是，丹恒的担忧似乎是多余的：希露瓦很快与你们统一战线，还提供了许多有价值的信息。\n现在的你们暂时安全，但很快又要深入险境…而这次的目的地还是全贝洛伯格铁卫最多的地方——裂界禁区前线。\n所谓不入虎穴焉得虎子，要想彻底解决眼下的危机，以身犯险也是在所难免的。
E: Luckily, Dan Heng's suspicions seem to be unfounded: Serval quickly sides with you and even provides a great deal of valuable information.\nYou are safe for the time being but will soon be waist-deep in danger again... This time, the destination is a place with the most Silvermane Guards in all of Belobog — the Fragmentum Frontline.\nNo risk, no reward, as they say. If you want to truly dismantle the crisis in front of you, being exposed to danger seems inevitable.

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶向星穹深处。\n不速之客卡芙卡向列车发出前往仙舟罗浮的邀约，但这份邀约的背后却潜藏着不怀好意的味道。你、三月七还有丹恒决心已定，心念一同——列车的方向绝不会轻易为外人左右。\n好啦，现在你可以回到观景车厢里，投出决定下一站的神圣一票了吧。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nIn a surprise move, Kafka invites the Express to visit the Xianzhou Luofu, but this invitation sounds ominous and could be a trap. March 7th, Dan Heng, and you have made up your minds and are of similar beliefs — The directions of the Express will not be altered by external forces.\nAlright, now you can return to the Parlor Car, and cast your hallowed vote for your next destination.

C: 符玄将卡芙卡解往太卜司，却要求你们暂作等候。罗浮仙舟正值多事之秋，谁人不是坐困围城？\n太卜司引路人的消息姗姗来迟，看来她此刻也被麻烦事缠身，与其枯等，不如动身寻她去。
E: Fu Xuan took Kafka to the Divination Commission but asked you to wait. The Xianzhou Luofu is in troubled times, and everyone feels trapped in place.\nThe Divination Commission's messenger is late. Perhaps she, too, is hindered by troublesome business. Maybe it's best to actively go and find her.

C: 另一边，你、罗刹、素裳三人随星槎流离，辗转来到一处人迹杳然的洞天。\n在寻找出路之时，你们目睹一位少女受魔阴身所困，危在旦夕。
E: On the other side, Luocha, Sushang, and you drift along on the starskiff and eventually arrive at an abandoned delve.\nAs the three of you look for the exit, you see a girl trapped by the mara-struck and in grave danger.

C: 建木重生，意味着罗浮上的星核所在已然明了。然而造成这一切的祸首却尚未露全貌。\n符玄受命率领云骑军监视毗邻「建木」的丹鼎司洞天。而你们，本着好用就往死里用…不是，本着能者多劳的原则，景元请你们往音信全无的工造司一探究竟，并借捷径赶往丹鼎司。
E: The revival of the Ambrosial Arbor makes the location of the Stellaron on the Luofu abundantly clear, but the culprit of this disaster remains obscure.\nFu Xuan is tasked to lead the Cloud Knights and keep watch over the Alchemy Commission delve next to the Ambrosial Arbor. As for you, based on the principle that a good tool should be used until it breaks — Errr, that the reward for hard work is more work! Jing Yuan asks you to find out what is happening in the radio-silent Artisanship Commission, and head to the Alchemy Commission via a shortcut.

C: 再见，卡卡瓦夏。
E: Farewell, Kakavasha.

C: 砂金似乎已在克劳克影视乐园中央的舞台上等候多时……\n…与这位疯狂的赌徒为全匹诺康尼带来一场震撼人心的完美共演吧。
E: Aventurine seems to have waited for quite some time on the stage in the center of Clock Studios Theme Park...\n...Join this crazed gambler for a perfect collaborative performance that will blow everyone in Penacony away.

C: 砂金似乎已在克劳克影视乐园中央的舞台上等候多时……\n…与这位疯狂的赌徒为全匹诺康尼带来一场震撼人心的完美共演吧。
E: Aventurine seems to have waited for quite some time on the stage in the center of Clock Studios Theme Park...\n...Join this crazed gambler for a perfect collaborative performance that will blow everyone in Penacony away.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 万事俱矣——是时候重返舞台，献上令世界激醒的最后安可了。
E: Everything is in place... It is time to return to the stage for the final encore that will jolt the world awake.

C: 对于托帕来说，匹诺康尼这个项目还未开始就已经结束了。钟表匠的遗产争夺、砂金的盛大死亡、星期日的成神野心…这些大事件全都与她擦肩而过。\n但现在，她却必须走到台前，完成与家族代表的谈判。托帕对此并无怨言——一来她是个专业人士；二来，她享受踢出这临门一脚的感觉。
E: For Topaz, the Penacony project was over before it even started. The struggle for Watchmaker's Legacy, Aventurine's memorable demise, Sunday's ambition to become a god... She had brushed up against all of these major events.\nBut now, she had to step forth and complete negotiations with The Family's rep. Topaz had no complaints about this... First of all, she is a professional, and second of all, she loves the feeling of shooting that game-winner.

C: 你费了好大工夫，才让被家族管控的迷因把你送到了这个鸟不拉屎的地方。这里没看到什么目标的线索，天气差得要命，但麦芽果汁还凑合。\n按理说，管事的得懂事，你看看他懂不懂事。
E: You spent a great amount of effort to get the meme controlled by The Family to send you to this dump. Not much here looks helpful, and the weather's been a nightmare, but hey, the malt juice ain't half bad.\nUsually, the folks in charge need to be able to read the air, and you're gonna verify that right now.

C: 这一点和现实世界极为相似——梦境开始向人们提出完全不合理的要求。\n对梦境进行调律，消除艾迪恩公园被扭曲的余音吧。
E: This is very reminiscent of the real world... The Dreamscape is starting to make completely unreasonable requests of people.\nTune the Dreamscape and eliminate the distorted Afterechoes of Aideen Park.

C: 正所谓春天种下一位停云，秋天就能收获一…似乎不是适合用在这里的道理，并且，这里也远不止一个谜题。「她」是怎样变成了「她们」，又是如何从死亡泅渡回现实当中？\n先聊聊这到底是怎么回事吧。
E: As the saying goes: Sow your Tingyun in spring for a healthy harvest in fall... That saying doesn't really seem to apply here, and there is more than one puzzle to be solved. How did "Tingyun" become "Tingyuns" and how did they traverse from death back to reality?\nSpeak to the others and find out what exactly is going on here.

C: 好一个不要笑挑战——我快笑得裂开了原来并非空谈。\n为了解决眼前的异状，先在附近和「停云们」谈谈吧，或许会有哪一位很好说话呢？
E: So much for a "try not to laugh" challenge... Turns out people can really split themselves from laughing.\nTo solve this anomaly at hand, go chat with these Tingyuns nearby. Maybe one of them will be easy to talk to?

C: 一个梦何以作为礼物相赠呢——对一些人来说，那是她们拥有的最美好的事物。\n在爱德华医生那里看看停云赠送给你的梦泡吧。
E: How can a dream be a gift? To some people, those are the most precious things they have.\nGo to Dr. Edward's and take a look at the dream bubble that Tingyun gifted you.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 借助{NICKNAME}的力量，白厄等人来到了命运重渊的往世——神谕的圣地「雅努萨波利斯」，并在这里见到了缇宝三人千年前的模样。
E: Through {NICKNAME}'s power, Phainon's group journeys to the past of the Abyss of Fate — the "Sanctum of Prophecy" Janusopolis, where they see the Tribbie trio as they were a thousand years ago.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n与神同行，登上神山。
E: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nTo walk with the gods, and ascend the holy mountain.

C: 来古士提出意愿，希望我能带他前往车厢坠毁处查勘。令我在意的是，他似乎有方法能对列车进行修复…
E: Lygus expressed a wish — he hoped I could escort him to the carriage crash site for an inspection. What catches my attention is he may know how to repair the Express...

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 回到创世涡心的{NICKNAME}与白厄一同归还了最后的火种，却未能按照预期中那样前往新世界，而是被来古士拉入了一场「沉浸式戏剧」之中。
E: Upon returning to the Vortex of Genesis, {NICKNAME} and Phainon returned the final Coreflame together, but rather than journeying to the new world as expected, they were pulled into an "Immersive Theater" by Lygus.

C: 「戏剧」的第二幕，是白厄与那位我们熟知的悬锋王子——万敌的初遇…
E: The second act of this "drama" is Phainon's first encounter with Mydei, the Kremnos prince we all know...

C:
你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
在那酣醉的迷梦中，山高而陡峻，你看见了自己。
相信我吧，后来的观众啊，他就在那山巅与众人欢歌。
残缺的黄金裔，还有畸形的半神们，他们同他歌唱，旋飞舞，脚跺地。
欧呵！恐惧令他的心震颤：神谕充满每一颗灵魂，狂喜而迷乱。
欧呵！请宽恕他们吧，卡厄斯兰那，请宽恕他们——你那无匹的烈焰令人胆寒！
就让他们歌唱不知疲倦的英雄，歌唱再创世，那酒与蜜奔腾之地。
歌唱他如何在星辰当中加增荣光，永恒之城如何轰然陨落。
奥赫玛人、悬锋城，还有他们所知的一切血脉如何毁灭。
至于卡厄斯兰那——他就在那酣醉的迷梦中，陡峭的山巅！
他用血点燃火焰，火焰点燃血，似太阳逼迫一切邪恶无法抵近。
山高而陡峻，他就在那里独自狂欢，起舞，永不停歇。
但一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
E:
Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
In that drunken dream, the mountains loomed high and steep — and there, you saw yourself.
Believe me, O future witness — he stood atop that peak, and the people sang with him in ecstasy.
The broken Chrysos Heirs, the twisted demigods — they sang, they spun, they stamped their feet upon the ground with him.
Hail! Terror struck his heart: Prophecy burned in every soul, wild with rapture and madness.
Hail! Spare them, Khaslana, spare them — your peerless flame sends chills down every spine!
Let them sing of the tireless heroes, sing of the Era Nova, sing of that land where wine and honey flow in torrents.
Let them sing how he wove new glory among the stars, and how the Eternal City crashed to dust.
How Okhemans, Castrum Kremnos, and every lineage they knew were destroyed.
As for Khaslana — He is still within the drunken dreams, upon the sheer and jagged peak!
There he lights flame with blood, and blood with flame, like a sun whose blaze banished all evil from its path.
The mountains rise cruel and steep. Yet still he dances there alone, wild and unceasing in his joy.
Yet all proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.
All proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.

C:
你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
在那酣醉的迷梦中，山高而陡峻，你看见了自己。
相信我吧，后来的观众啊，他就在那山巅与众人欢歌。
残缺的黄金裔，还有畸形的半神们，他们同他歌唱，旋飞舞，脚跺地。
欧呵！恐惧令他的心震颤：神谕充满每一颗灵魂，狂喜而迷乱。
欧呵！请宽恕他们吧，卡厄斯兰那，请宽恕他们——你那无匹的烈焰令人胆寒！
就让他们歌唱不知疲倦的英雄，歌唱再创世，那酒与蜜奔腾之地。
歌唱他如何在星辰当中加增荣光，永恒之城如何轰然陨落。
奥赫玛人、悬锋城，还有他们所知的一切血脉如何毁灭。
至于卡厄斯兰那——他就在那酣醉的迷梦中，陡峭的山巅！
他用血点燃火焰，火焰点燃血，似太阳逼迫一切邪恶无法抵近。
山高而陡峻，他就在那里独自狂欢，起舞，永不停歇。
但一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
E:
Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
In that drunken dream, the mountains loomed high and steep — and there, you saw yourself.
Believe me, O future witness — he stood atop that peak, and the people sang with him in ecstasy.
The broken Chrysos Heirs, the twisted demigods — they sang, they spun, they stamped their feet upon the ground with him.
Hail! Terror struck his heart: Prophecy burned in every soul, wild with rapture and madness.
Hail! Spare them, Khaslana, spare them — your peerless flame sends chills down every spine!
Let them sing of the tireless heroes, sing of the Era Nova, sing of that land where wine and honey flow in torrents.
Let them sing how he wove new glory among the stars, and how the Eternal City crashed to dust.
How Okhemans, Castrum Kremnos, and every lineage they knew were destroyed.
As for Khaslana — He is still within the drunken dreams, upon the sheer and jagged peak!
There he lights flame with blood, and blood with flame, like a sun whose blaze banished all evil from its path.
The mountains rise cruel and steep. Yet still he dances there alone, wild and unceasing in his joy.
Yet all proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.
All proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.

C: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
E: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

C: 神话已偏移了原定的轨迹，若命数是天上的巨星，那它的游离或会牵动太阳，也会牵动今夜的潮汐。\n你摸不到星，但可以站在潮汐里，感受波澜拍打你的脚踝。\n那是海在向你诉说它的忧虑。
E: The myth has drifted from its destined course. If fate is written in the stars, then their gravity pulls not just the sun, but the very tides at your feet.\nThe stars may be untouchable, but the tide isn't. Stand in its flow and feel how cosmic forces lap at your ankles.\nThat's the ocean whispering its worries, wave by wave, shore to soul.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C: 退场歌已经奏响，剧目将近尾声…但在此之前，沉默无言的观众将会为你献上掌声，庆贺你完成了这场悲剧，庆贺你将走向下一场悲剧。\n走向他渴望的悲剧。\n将观众逐出神话的剧场，或是让这场剧目成为万物的绝唱。
E: The music for the curtain call has begun to play, and the show nears its end... But before that, the silent audience will offer you their applause, celebrating your completion of this tragedy, commemorating your path toward the next tragedy.\nToward the tragedy he yearns for.\nEither banish the audience from this mythical theater, or let this performance become the swan song of all creation.

C: 在翁法罗斯经历的一切，在列车上又到底经过了多长呢？好像自己还是和星穹列车隔了一层，这究竟是怎么回事？\n总之，别忘记出发时大家的担忧，看看三月现在怎么样了。
E: How long has it really been since everything that happened in Amphoreus, and how much time has passed on the Express? It feels like there's still some kind of barrier between you and the Astral Express. What exactly is going on here?\nIn any case, don't forget everyone's concerns when you set out. Let's see how March is doing.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n这里的混乱的记忆越来越多，除了我的记忆，还有谁的记忆？
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe chaotic memories here keep growing. Besides mine, whose else could they be?

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n这里的混乱的记忆越来越多，除了我的记忆，竟然还有丹枫的记忆…？
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe chaotic memories here keep growing. Besides mine... Dan Feng's memories are here too?

C: 如今翁法罗斯被三重命途之一的「记忆」所裹挟，三月、{NICKNAME}…{F#她们}{M#他们}俩去向不明，能将他们带回的就只有我了。\n如今翁法罗斯迷雾重重，还有一位友人能为我拨云见日。
E: Now Amphoreus is ensnared by the Remembrance, one of the Three Paths, and March and {NICKNAME}... they are nowhere to be found. I'm the only one who can bring them back.\nAmphoreus is shrouded in mystery now, but I have a friend who can help me see through the fog.

C: 智械哥留下关于「墓碑」的注释作为遗言。种种迹象表明，德谬歌的确存在。该是与智械哥对峙的时候了，他的忌惮正是不容忽视的证据。
E: Old Intellitron left notes about the "tombstone" as his final message. All signs indicate that Demiurge does indeed exist. It's time to confront old Intellitron, for his apprehension is the undeniable proof.

C: 年迈的以斯帖授权你前去回收记录着奇景秘闻的录像带。
E: Esther authorizes you to retrieve the videotapes of wonders and secrets.

C: 阿德勒行为蹊跷，这背后似乎隐藏着更大的秘密，你决定跟着他，看看他究竟在做什么。
E: There appears to be a deeper secret behind Adler's strange behavior. You decide to tail him and see what he's getting up to.

C: 用相机扫描怪物，找到并击败藏有密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters. Find and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key

C: 你本想在一鼓作气，查询一下乔安的数据记录。但再次宕机的终端机阻止了你的计划，现在你不得不再去求助维修工程师……
E: You planned to check Joanne's record next, but the terminal crashed again. You have to ask for the engineer's help once more...

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 艾丝妲在眼前被冥火吞没生死未卜，首先得找出逃逸冥火的踪迹
E: Asta was swallowed up by infernal fire before your eyes. You must find traces of the escaped infernal fire first.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 杜老板实乃泡茶的奇才，你永远也想不到他究竟是怎么做出功效这么神奇的茶品……
E: Boss Du is truly a tea-brewing master. You simply cannot imagine how he creates brews with such miraculous effects...

C: 你接到了奥列格的信息，他希望你能去看看娜塔莎在忙些什么。\n她每天都在不知疲倦地照顾病人，奥列格希望你能帮她分担一些压力。
E: You receive a message from Oleg, who hopes you can visit Natasha and see what she's up to.\nEvery day, she works tirelessly to look after the patients, so Oleg hopes you can offer her some help.

C: 该做正事啦！虎克大人要找的宝贝就在铆钉镇矿区入口附近，希望不要出什么岔子。\n铆钉镇的居民们为了抵御怪物入侵设置了很多路障，小心谨慎地继续前进吧，争取早点儿忙完早点儿回去。
E: It's time to work! The treasure that Hook is looking for is near the mine entrance in Rivet Town.\nTo defend against the monsters, the residents here have set up many barricades. Advance ahead with caution. As soon as you get this over with, you can go back.

C: 即便知道自己可能拍不到地髓探针，虎克大人还是决定把探针还给拍卖会。走吧，她的决心已定。\n熊孩子总是随口就说一些无足轻重的谎言，但在这种时候，她的心还是像金子一样。
E: Although Hook knows she might not get the Geomarrow Probe, she decides to return it to the auction. You know that she has made up her mind.\nThis child may have told a few white lies over trivial matters, but she has a heart of gold.

C: 帕斯卡带领你与克拉拉来到了铆钉镇的废弃工作室「淬火工坊」。从帕斯卡破碎的词句中，你们拼凑出它行如此举动的部分动机。\n帕斯卡似乎是将此处当作了自己的「秘密基地」，并在这里日夜不停地维护整个铆钉镇。\n你发现了一些可疑的物件，但它们似乎并不能说明些什么——还是在这里继续调查吧。
E: Pascal led Clara and you to the abandoned workshop in Rivet Town, the Tempering Workshop. You piece together some of the motivation underlying Pascal's behavior from its broken speech.\nPascal seemed to have treated this place as its secret base and maintained the entire Rivet Town ceaselessly from here.\nYou find some suspicious objects, but they don't really explain much — Keep looking around for a bit longer.

C: 机械屋总给人以家的温暖感。而当你准备收拾行李、头也不回地离开这里时，这种温暖的感觉更是尤甚。\n不过这只是你的个人揣测…希露瓦是怎么想的？恐怕只有她自己清楚。\n但这毕竟与你无关，眼下还是先陪她一起收拾行李吧。
E: The workshop always felt as comforting as a home. As you prepare to pack up and leave here forever, this homely feeling is intensified.\nBut this is only your personal guess... What does Serval think? She is probably the only one who knows that.\nBut this has nothing to do with you. Just help her pack for now.

C: 向邓恩了解现场状况
E: Find out more about the on-site situation from Dunn

C: 丹枢对「龙蟠虬跃」的研究已经有结果了。她确实无愧于「天才丹士长」的称号，见识之广博令人叹服。\n将丹枢的研究报告转交给青镞吧，她现在一定很需要这份报告。
E: Dan Shu's study into the Draught of Draconic Surge managed to yield some information. She definitely deserves her title of being a genius chief alchemist, the breadth of her knowledge was jaw-droppingly vast.\nHand Dan Shu's report to Qingzu, she must need the report as quickly as possible.

C: 陶德在光印拓迹里找到了一些新思路，但光靠文字与照片资料，这显然不足以催生出一个成熟而完整的课题。他央求你带他偷偷潜入鳞渊境，在你的陪伴下，他将亲眼瞧瞧照片中的考古资料……
E: Todd got some new ideas from the Optical Markings, but text and photos alone are not enough to generate a mature and complete research topic. He begs you to secretly take him into Scalegorge Waterscape to see with his own eyes the archaeological sites in the photos...

C: 一封没有落款的信静静躺在列车的观景车厢里，无人知晓其到来，一如无人知晓何人会收下它。
E: A letter without a sender silently lies in the Express' Parlor Car. No one knows of its arrival, just like how no one knows who will receive it.

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 去海边完成放生仪式吧。话说事情到底是怎么演变到这一步的…算了，无所谓了。感恩行善，功德无量，药王慈怀。
E: Go to the coast to complete the release ceremony. Actually, how did things get to this point... Never mind. It doesn't matter. Be grateful and do good deeds, obtain immeasurable merit, mercy of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 在彦卿的陪同下，你们终于见到了景元，得知罗浮仙舟在建木灾异之后重开演武仪典的用意，更得知了来自朱明与曜青两座仙舟的将军前来观礼的消息。\n所谓来者不善，大概如是了。
E: Accompanied by Yanqing, you all finally gained a meeting with Jing Yuan, learning the purpose of the Wardance's revival after the Ambrosial Arbor crisis. You also learned of the generals of the Zhuming and Yaoqing coming forth to observe the ceremony.\nTheir motives were anything but earnest.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 在飞霄的提议下，众人放弃大张旗鼓的搜猎，转而揣度猎物的所思所求。而迴星港这个狼踪初现之地，会成为继续追索步离人的猎场。
E: Following Feixiao's advice, everybody abandons the large-scale hunt and begins to speculate about their prey's motives and agenda instead. As for Stargazer Navalia, the site where the wolves were first spotted, it shall become the hunting ground for the continued pursuit of the borisin.

C: 在飞霄的提议下，众人放弃大张旗鼓的搜猎，转而揣度猎物的所思所求。而迴星港这个狼踪初现之地，会成为继续追索步离人的猎场。
E: Following Feixiao's advice, everybody abandons the large-scale hunt and begins to speculate about their prey's motives and agenda instead. As for Stargazer Navalia, the site where the wolves were first spotted, it shall become the hunting ground for the continued pursuit of the borisin.

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 鳞渊境中潮水涌流不息，一如持明龙师的渴望。丹恒与灵砂的到来，将是决定潮流去向的关键。
E: The tide of Scalegorge Waterscape flows ceaselessly, just like the aspiration of the Vidyadhara Preceptors. The arrival of Dan Heng and Lingsha will be the key to deciding the direction of this flow.

C: 鳞渊境中潮水涌流不息，一如持明龙师的渴望。丹恒与灵砂的到来，将是决定潮流去向的关键。
E: The tide of Scalegorge Waterscape flows ceaselessly, just like the aspiration of the Vidyadhara Preceptors. The arrival of Dan Heng and Lingsha will be the key to deciding the direction of this flow.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 顺着记忆的场景，继续探索奥尔拉的过去吧。
E: Follow the scenes of this memory and keep exploring Orla's past.

C: 费歇尔现在就是「隐夜鸫」的家主，他来到流梦礁，是想找到奥尔拉。
E: Fischer is currently the head of the Nightgales. He arrived at Dreamflux Reef to look for Orla.

C: 猜猜看是谁回来了，原来是太卜司符玄大人啊。\n拍张纪念合照，不知道摆什么动作的时候，记得单手手指插兜…好吧，你用不着如此拘谨。
E: Guess who's back? Turns out it's Master Diviner Fu Xuan!\nWhen taking a commemorative picture, if you don't know what pose to do, then you can put one hand in your pocket... Scratch that. There's no need to be so formal.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nYou rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

C: 法政科的创始人古恩有事找你，他想让你来教导一名特殊的学生，授课的内容令你咂舌……
E: Gunn, the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, comes to you. He wants you to teach a special student, and you're going to teach her some unique lessons...

C: 在你的指导下，希拉就「如何做人」这件事取得了阶段性的成果。不过，你有些怀疑古恩能否接受这样的「学习成果」……
E: Sheila has made remarkable progress in acting human. But you're not sure if Gunn will be satisfied with the result...

C: 万事开头难，埃美丽有些露怯，还是用短信帮帮她吧。
E: Everything is difficult to start with. Emily is a little timid, so use text messages to build up her confidence.

C: 维修工程师初步估计是小机器人零件脱落的问题，帮他收集零件，回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer's initial estimate is that a loose part that fell off the meal-delivery robot. Collect the part for him and return to verify whether his guess is correct.

C: 为了尤利安筹划的「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，你得尽快把手里这箱物资送到大矿区去。
E: To help Julian with his Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, you must quickly deliver this box of supplies to the Great Mine.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n你打听到了和塔米拉有关的趣闻，快去把你的发现告诉塞琳吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nYou discovered a fun trivia about Tamila, so go and tell Celine right away.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知查威发布了委托，想要行使他的正当权益。帮帮查威！
E: You see that Chavez has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise his rightful rights. Go help Chavez!

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 地衡司收到居民在丹鼎司洞天里发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。\n广进根据异象的规律，在海滩上备好了饵食，希望借此找到引起异象的元凶……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission received reports that anomalies resembling cloudhymn magic have been spotted in the Alchemy Commission delve, and that invisible monsters were encountered within this phenomenon.\nBased on the patterns of anomalies, Guangjin has prepared bait on the beach in hopes of uncovering the true source behind the phenomenon.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 危难时刻，朋友会出手！厄琉斯决定问问市集热心的老板们，或许拼凑的碎片能引出线索。
E: Times of trouble are what friends are for! Aelius decides to ask the helpful shopkeepers in the market, in the hopes of piecing together a clue from the fragmentary information they can offer.

C: 现在，继续深入黎明云崖、向负世泰坦的所在进发吧。
E: Now, proceed further into Dawncloud toward the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往城郊雪原为冰封的反物质军团虚卒拍摄照片，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to take a picture of a frozen Antimatter Legion Voidranger at the Outlying Snow Plains to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，鲍里斯希望你为他演示如何使用棒球棍作战，以便他制作对应的复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Boris hopes that you could show him how you wield the baseball bat in combat to help him make a replica.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是列车中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something aboard the Express...

C: 西衍先生邀请你同去鳞渊境，在你战斗过的地方改编你的冒险传奇。算了，编就编吧，就当用评书给星穹列车打广告了。
E: Mr. Xiyan invites you to go to Scalegorge Waterscape together and edit your legend at the place you once fought. Alright. He can edit it to his heart's content. Just treat it as making an advertisement for the Astral Express.

C: 在西衍先生的故事当中，「龙尊大人」带着你辗转于罗浮各处，寻找锻造神兵利器的诸多材料…这下彻底变成喜闻乐见的寻宝故事了。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, the "high elder" takes you to many places in the Luofu to look for the various materials needed to forge the divine weapon... Now this is truly a stereotypical treasure-seeking adventure story.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说杜氏茶庄和商会建立合作关系。但杜老板此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Du's Teahouse to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boss Du has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 胸腔激荡，脚步也变得轻快。你将与另一个人展开角逐，唯有强大且好运的那方能够继续前进。
E: With your chest surging and your footwork brisk, you and your foe begin a struggle for victory. Only the one who is powerful and fortunate may continue onward.

C: 事发突然，寒鸦大人与你们一起梳理了藿藿可能的去向之后，发现了「温顺」的浮烟也许掌握着尾巴的线索，以此为饵蒙骗藿藿。\n你们没有十分的把握，但还是去会会这个奸诈的家伙吧。
E: Faced with the sudden incident, Madam Hanya goes through Huohuo's potential whereabouts with your group. You discover the seemingly "docile" Cirrus may hold a vital clue about Tail and has used it as bait to ensnare Huohuo.\nWhile you are not entirely certain, confronting the cunning heliobus seems to be the best course of action.

C: 岁阳封闭了藿藿的五感，换句话说，「同心火铃」也不好使了。幸好这个时候尾巴出现了。「用岁阳祛除岁阳」也是一种崭新的做法。\n就让尾巴大爷强行进入到幻障之中吧。
E: The heliobus has sealed Huohuo's five senses, rendering the "Harmonic Chime" ineffective. Thankfully, Tail appears at this time. "Using a heliobus to exorcise another heliobus" sure is a new way of exorcism.\nIt is time to let Mr. Tail break into the illusion.

C: 无论如何，你们已经完成了宝烛的旅程，它将何去何从，应该做出抉择了。\n做好准备后，就和三月七聊聊吧。
E: Regardless, you've concluded Arkeri's journey, and their path must now be decided.\nOnce you're prepared, it's time to chat with March 7th.

C: 特征很像黑塔与阮•梅的造物，主动向你寻求帮助，它们希望你能继续培育造物，加快研究速度，以满足它们的好奇心。\n造物又不用像科员们一样上班，你实在想不通它们为什么也要搞研究，有空多休息不好吗？
E: The creations that look very similar to Herta and Ruan Mei come to seek out your help. They hope you can keep on nurturing creations and speed up the research process to satisfy their curiosity.\nThe creations don't have to go to work like the researchers do, so you really have no idea why they want to perform research as well. Isn't it better to laze around?

C: 监狱的狱警们破坏了球笼航道，你必须手动调整路线将它们修复，不然就永远没法跟伙伴们汇合了。
E: The prison wardens have destroyed the Spheroid lane. You have to manually reroute the course to repair the lanes, or you'll never be able to reunite with your companions.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n拿到的碎片，似乎正好可以完成眼前的这幅拼图……
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nThe piece you've just found seems to fit the missing space of the jigsaw right in front of you...

C: 这地方待久了，恐怕对身体健康不好，还是先离开。
E: Staying too long in this place isn't great for your health. Better leave first.

C: 克劳克影视乐园的拍摄体验项目得到了升级，《狼之道》拥有了全新的拍摄内容，快去看看吧。\n虽然拍摄体验升级了，但你还是分不到片酬。
E: Clock Studios Theme Park's filming experience project got an upgrade and Way of the Wolf now has brand-new content for filming. Go and check it out.\nThe filming experience might have gotten an upgrade, but you're still not getting a share of the revenue.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄已经完成，去交差吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has concluded. Go show it to the client!

C: 按照爱德华医生提供的地址，你来到了那座「雕琢自原始梦境的城市」。但彼处并没有看起来像是「合作伙伴」的人，而只有一尊形态诡异的人偶。难道…这就是爱德华医生的「合作伙伴」？
E: According to the address given by Dr. Edward, you arrive at "the city chiseled from the Primordial Dreamscape." However, there is no one here that looks like a "collaborative partner." The only thing here is a bizarre puppet. Could this be... Dr. Edward's "partner"?

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n尾巴大爷说他能让斯科特洗心革面，他最好可以……
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nMr. Tail claims he can make Skott turn over a new leaf. We shall see about that...

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以方便让他定位，去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Aid the Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming, thus helping him to position and capture these scattered memoria.

C:
来到罗浮以后，我总觉得有什么压在身上，令我喘不过气。
最初，我以为是运动损伤。后来，又担心是不适应重力。最后，我终于为自己找到了病因——
我是贝洛伯格<unbreak>700</unbreak>年来第一位去天上打比赛的运动员。
我背负着我的整个故乡。
E:
I've felt there's a weight pressing down on me and making it hard to breathe ever since I arrived on the Luofu.
Initially, I thought it might have been an injury, then I was worried it might be my body not adapting to this gravity. At the end, I finally found the cause of the symptoms —
I'm the first athlete in Belobog in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years to go fight a competition in sky.
I'm carrying my entire home planet on my shoulders.

C: 接下来就是与铄金的决战了。\n卢卡坚定地相信，用自己的铁拳可以打碎一切无聊的「盘外招」。\n希望事情能像他预想的那样顺利。
E: The decisive battle against Shuojin is next.\nLuka firmly believes that his iron fist can shatter all pointless "dirty tricks."\nHopefully things will go as smoothly as he anticipates.

C: 完成「码放货物」困难模式III
E: Complete Inventory Arrangement Hard Mode III

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到「阮•梅」造物的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of Ruan Mei's creations' beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 在「派对车厢」中，似乎有一个列车长的专属空间。那里是做什么用的呢？去问问帕姆吧。
E: There seems to be an exclusive space for the conductor in the Party Car. What is that space for? Ask Pom-Pom.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 越是顺利的时候，越不能松懈，是时候整顿你的团队了！
E: The smoother things go, the less room there is for slacking off. It is time to motivate your team!

C: 「诡计」之半神以奖杯为赌注，向你发起了「豹豹碰碰大作战」的决斗挑战。\n小小飞贼无法理解金杯之重，和泡泡一起，教会她冠军究竟缘何成为冠军！
E: The demigod of Trickery has wagered the trophy and challenged you to a Seal Slammers duel.\nThat little thief cannot comprehend the true weight of the golden cup. Team up with Bubbles and show her why a champion is a champion!

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 开启了「货币战争」初级测试，是时候展现真正的技术了。
E: The beginner's test of Currency Wars has been initiated. Time to show what you're really made of.

C: 扫清障碍，继续向前
E: Clear the obstacles and continue forward

C: 尽快到达月台
E: Reach the railway platform as quickly as possible

C: 寻找裂界出口，逃脱追捕
E: Find a way to leave the Fragmentum and shake off the pursuers

C: 寻找栈桥控制终端的能源中枢
E: Find the energy hub of the gear bridge terminals

C: 准备好后与杰帕德对话，开启大门
E: When you are ready, talk to Gepard to open the gate

C: 击败裂界生物，穿越旧要塞残骸
E: Defeat the Fragmentum monsters and make your way through the wreckage of the ancient fort

C: 在陌生的大厅中寻找出路
E: Search for an exit in the unfamiliar lobby

C: 与心绪表盘重归完整的筑梦师对话
E: Speak with the Dreamweaver with a completed Emo Dial

C: 继续跟随黑天鹅，离开梦境中的酒店
E: Continue to follow Black Swan to leave the hotel in the Dreamscape

C: 寻找扭蛋蛋蛋蛋蛋机
E: Look for the capsule m—a—a—a—achine

C: 前往朝露公馆
E: Head to the Dewlight Pavilion

C: 跟上█ ██年幼█自█ █埃维金██ 男孩 █
E: Cat█h up ███th██You█g Avgin b█y

C: 跟上█ ██年幼█自█ █埃维金██ 男孩 █
E: Cat█h up ███th██You█g Avgin b█y

C: 前往大堂，会见公司代表
E: Go to the Lobby and meet with the IPC representative

C: （可选）调查一下房间里物品
E: (Optional) Examine the items inside the room

C: 和丹恒与三月七汇合
E: Reunite with Dan Heng and March 7th

C: 听听芭蕉花酱想说什么
E: Listen to what Nanabloom-chan has to share

C: 第一苦行！身如金刚！
E: The first trial! Steel your body like Vajra!

C: 让知更鸟准备开始派对吧
E: Tell Robin to be ready to kick off the party

C: 稍作休整
E: Take a rest

C: 听听白厄想说些什么
E: Listen to what Phainon has to say

C: 点燃火盆，完成试炼
E: Ignite the fire pit and complete the trial

C: 使铸魂雕像归位
E: Return the Soul-Forging Statue to its rightful place

C: 前往算力区
E: Go to the Computing Zone

C: 穿过「雅努斯密径」，进入神悟树庭
E: Pass the Janus's Hidden Passage and enter the Grove of Epiphany

C: 寻找缇里西庇俄丝
E: Look for Tribios

C: 与塞纳托斯一同前进
E: Move forward with Thanatos

C: 前往云石天宫
E: Go to the Marmoreal Palace

C: 阅读阿格莱雅的留言
E: Read Aglaea's message

C: 观看三月七的经历
E: Watch March 7th's experience

C: 与Saber告别
E: Say goodbye to Saber

C: 观察神谕圣地中的事变
E: Observe the incident at the Sanctum of Prophecy

C: （可选）与其他黄金裔享受宴会
E: (Optional) Enjoy the banquet with other Chrysos Heirs
