E: Way of Primaveral Blade: Cleanse

C: 无限期？
E: Indefinitely?

C: 根据我们的猜想，「星核」是某位星神播撒至各个世界的祸种。如果不拔除灾厄的源头，「开拓」也就无从谈起。
E: Our current theory is that Stellarons are seeds of disaster planted by a certain Aeon throughout the universe. We can't continue to trailblaze without removing the source of the disaster.

C: 帕姆去过雅利洛-Ⅵ吗？
E: Have you been to Jarilo-VI before, Pom-Pom?

C: 不要想太多啦，丹恒。
E: Try not to dwell on it, Dan Heng.

C: …这也是件麻烦的事。如果她所说属实，而我们又置若罔闻，「罗浮」上的人就会遭遇危险。
E: ...This is a difficult matter. If she is telling the truth and we turn a deaf ear, then those on the Luofu will be in great danger.

C: 我想在回家之前多看看其他的文明，也算是不浪费搭乘星穹列车的这段时光。
E: In any case, I do want to see some other civilizations before I go home. It'd be a crime to waste this opportunity on the Express.

C: 这座空间站遭到了反物质军团的袭击，我们是受艾丝妲站长的委托前来救援的。
E: This space station was just attacked by the Antimatter Legion. We came to help with the rescue at the request of Lead Researcher Asta.

C: 小三月，丹恒，辛苦你们啦。
E: March, Dan Heng, you've been through a lot.

C: 当然能呀，我还等着你呢——噢，你说的「回」是——噢，倒也不是不行。
E: Of course, I'll still be here waiting for you, eh... and the space station will be waiting for you. Returning... it's not impossible.

C: 首先有地方住；其次有人保护；再其次路途遥远，救命的机会比较多；最后，就算星核真炸了也害不了太多人。
E: First of all, you have somewhere to live. And you'd be under their protection. Also, it'll be a long trip, so you'll have more opportunities to find a way to save yourself from the Stellaron. Lastly, if the Stellaron really explodes, you won't harm too many people around you.

C: 就算景色一样，休假时看和工作时看，当然是两种心情啦。
E: Be that as it may, taking it in while on vacation and observing it during work are not the same thing.

C: 从空间站里要一件奇物，大概也没问题吧……
E: And it's probably not too much to ask for a rare item from the space station, right?

C: 她可是不太在乎你的想法喔。
E: She's not going to care a lot about what you think.

C: 你们也救了我啊。
E: You guys saved me, too.

C: 「星际和平公司」的售货机在哪儿看见都没什么好奇怪的帕？
E: Shouldn't be a surprise to see the IPC's vending machine anywhere...

C: （甚至连之前空间站的照片都有……）
E: (There are even pictures of the space station...)

C: （不知道培育的是什么植物，下次问问看三月七好了。）
E: (I can't tell what plant this is. Maybe I'll ask March 7th next time.)

C: 列车的力量…
E: About the Express' source of power...

C: 关于「了解」…
E: About Understanding...

C: 三月七的桌子，没有找到像日记的东西。
E: March 7th's desk. You fail to see anything that resembles a diary.

C: 「寒潮」是星核创造的灾祸。
E: The Eternal Freeze is a product of the Stellaron.

C: 是她的卫兵！
E: It must've been a guard.

C: 还有没做完的事吗？明天白天就要和守护者会面，没时间逛街了。
E: Is there anything left to do? We're meeting the guardian tomorrow. There won't be any time for sightseeing.

C: 你们居然知道…是的。寒潮以外还有许多威胁，你们见到的怪物就是其中之一。
E: How do you... That's right. Out there in the blizzard, there are still many threats... including the monsters you saw.

C: 怎么了？姐，你今天真的很不正常……
E: What is it? You seem pretty off today, Serval...

C: 呼…憋死我了！这什么电视剧的桥段……
E: Phew...I nearly suffocated! What kind of plot device was that...

C: <size=36>不！许！拆！</size>
E: <size=36>Do! Not! Take! It! Apart!</size>

C: 啊，我只是听情报部的同事聊到过这个，具体内容我也不清楚。毕竟我只是基层员工，平时工作里也遇不到这些东西。
E: Oh, I only once heard my colleagues from the Intelligence Department talking about this. I don't know the specifics. After all, I am just an entry-level employee, and I don't usually encounter these things at work.

C: 哈哈，指望我老弟还不如指望我去偷一份对译表呢。他平时都是把这种活交给佩拉的……
E: Haha, you wanna ask my brother for help? It'd be much easier to steal the Silvermane Guards' master cipher codebook. My brother wouldn't know a thing about encryption. He usually just leaves this kind of work to Pela...

C: 佩拉她可是《雪国冒险奇谭》书迷会里的风云人物呢——他们都管她叫作…唔，什么来着……
E: Pela is an important member of the Tale of the Winterlands fan club. They all call her... um, what was it...

C: 差点死在里边…
E: We almost died...

C: 啊，是杰帕德！他来迎接我们啦？
E: Ah, it's Gepard! Is he here to meet us?

C: 呃，算了，怎么说也算有点纪念意义…这张照片就送给你们吧，就当作是列车组的临别礼物。
E: Never mind, at least it's memorable... A little farewell gift from the Astral Express.

C: 呃，我的意图就这么明显吗？大意了呀……
E: *sigh* Was it that obvious? I'm out of practice...

C: 这我说了不算，得帮你问问。
E: Such matters aren't up to me, I'm afraid I'll have to ask around first.

C: …你还好意思说我！
E: Hey! Watch it.

C: 都到这个时候了，你脑袋里装的还都是「人民」啊…真不知道该说什么好。
E: Even at a time like this, you're still thinking about the people... *sigh* I don't know what to say.

C: 哈哈，谢谢你。今后也请你多关照啦。
E: Haha, thank you. Make sure you look after me now~

C: 慢着慢着，我可不想被你当成不靠谱的人啊……
E: Hold up, I wasn't that late...

C: 希露瓦？我就知道…
E: Huh, classic Serval.

C: 信封上写着：好心人，能帮我买张邮票贴上，再帮我寄出去吗？千恩万谢！
E: The envelope includes the following: Dear kindhearted soul, can you please buy me a stamp and post this for me? A thousand thanks!

C: 全世界最完美的垃圾桶离开你的视线，只有你知道这究竟需要多大的勇气。
E: Only you know how much courage it takes to avert your gaze from the world's most beautiful trashcan.

C: 四：『算了，上班去。』
E: 4. "Forget it. Time for work."

C: ——但是小青龙选手示意比赛继续！他已经迫不及待了！好啊！看看是这帮家伙的拳头硬，还是机器人的铁皮更硬！
E: And Cold Dragon Young is signaling that the contest will go ahead! He's just itching to get into it! And so are we! It's the iron fists of Cold Dragon Young — and friends — versus the iron skin of Team Robomatic!

C: 正好，我本来就想见见下层区的领导者。
E: Good, I've been wanting to come face to face with the leader of the Underworld.

C: 看来问题的核心还是史瓦罗的机器人……
E: Seems like the core of this problem is Svarog's robots...

C: 但你召唤我来，应该不是为了这些矿石。说出你真正的想法吧，克拉拉。
E: I sense that your reason for summoning me is not the ore in question. State your true intention, Clara.

C: 什么！？{NICKNAME}，你居然这么体贴！
E: Huh. {NICKNAME}, when did you start being so nice?

C: 没人知道机器人的来历吗？
E: Does anyone know where the robots come from?

C: 说来话长，反正不好惹。咱们还是赶紧去找其他人吧——伊蕾恩，你能自己走回休息区吗？
E: Let's just say he's not to be trifled with. Let's go and find some other people. Elaine, can you make it back to safety?

C: 这升降机，是坏、坏了吗？怎么一点反、反应都没有啊？
E: Is this elevator b—broken? Why isn't it r—responding?

C: 银鬃铁卫为什么撤离了地下？
E: Why did the Silvermane Guards withdraw from the underground?
Goethe...?

C: 哼，那去别处走吧——
E: Hmph. Walk somewhere else, then...

C: 脾气这么大，我才不帮呢。
E: We're not helping anyone with a temper like that.

C: 让我想想…用来固定断骨的钢板和绷带快用完了。铆钉镇的中心有一片集市，镇民撤离的时候还堆着不少货物。辛苦你们去找找吧。
E: Let me think... I'm almost out of metal plates and bandages used for immobilizing broken bones. There's a market in the center of Rivet Town. Residents left behind piles of materials there when they evacuated. Please look for some there...

C: 我们根本没有这套系统。
E: That certainly isn't our area of strength.

C: 唷，看看是谁来了！
E: Oh! Look who's here!

C: 没说什么，就随便聊了几句。
E: Not much. We just chatted a bit.

C: 我这儿的拳手可不是什么普通人，没点名气都踏不进俱乐部的大门。
E: My boxers here aren't just "ordinary people." Only reputed fighters are allowed to step into this club.

C: 嚯哈哈哈，怎么样？这么好的点子，全下层只有我史考特想得出来！
E: Hahaha, what do you think? In all of the Underworld, only Scott can come up with such an ingenious idea!

C: 你们是来看「怪物盔甲」的吗？
E: Are you here to see Monster Armor?

C: 谢谢你，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！我就在这里待着，边看书边等妈妈下班……
E: Thank you! I'll just stay here and read while I wait for my mom to get off work...

C: …真的吗？太感谢了，我这就回家改衣服！以后有机会的话，我请你吃我自己烤的苔藓面包，刚出炉的可香了。
E: ...For real? Thank you so much. I'll go home and tailor the clothes now! When the chance comes, I'd like to treat you to my home-baked moss bread. It's super yummy when fresh out of the oven.

C: 我先去其他地方转转。
E: I'll go mill around elsewhere first.

C: {NICKNAME}会无情地粉碎对手的梦想，还是成为年轻有为的机械师寻梦之路的垫脚石？这场战斗将为各位观众揭晓答案！
E: Will {NICKNAME} ruthlessly crush their opponent's dreams, or be a stepping stone to a young and promising Mechanic's dream? This battle will reveal the answer to the audience!

C: 哟，您来的真巧！下一场比赛正在筹备当中，您打算参加吗？
E: Hey, great timing! The next match is about to begin, would you like to participate?

C: 您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
E: Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.

C: 而且，「外来者」在下层区声名远扬——您要是肯赏脸参赛，那这拳馆指定是座无虚席！
E: Besides, the Outsider is well known in the Underworld. If you can grace us with your visit, then the tickets will be sold out for sure!

C: …呃，还是{NICKNAME}来说吧，我不擅长汇报工作，说错话就尴尬了。
E: ...Uh, maybe {NICKNAME} should do the talking. I'm no good at serious stuff — I'll probably say something I'll regret.

C: 嗯！我们也带了布洛妮娅的口信来哦——「封锁很快就会结束，下层区的人们很快就能自由地呼吸了」。
E: Mm-hmm! Oh, we brought you a message from Bronya! Ahem, "The blockade will soon be lifted. The people of the Underworld will breathe freely."

C: 戍卫官？！他还有脸回来？
E: The captain!? He has the gall to return?

C: ——人不能总是单独面对问题，把挣扎永远藏在心里…要学会依靠他人，至少是亲近的人。
E: We can't always face problems alone and build walls to keep people out... We need to learn to rely on others — especially those we care about the most.

C: …明白了，就陪你一起去吧。
E: ...Say no more. We'll go with you.

C: 这么多全都是我的东西吗？谢谢你{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！我赢下来的玻璃弹珠，这个东西也是我的吗…「给<unbreak>50</unbreak>年后的尤利安」？
E: Is all of this my stuff? Thank you, {M#mister}{F#miss}! These glass marbles I won... Are these also mine? "For Julian, in <unbreak>50</unbreak> years' time"?

C: 说真的，我现在有些期待了，等{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}全部收集齐了之后再找我吧。
E: But seriously, {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, I'm actually starting to look forward to reading all those pages now. Please come and find me whenever you've found them all.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 在此，我们代表星际和平公司向星穹列车的开拓者们送上最真挚的祝福。
E: On behalf of the Interastral Peace Corporation, we wish the best of luck to the Trailblazers of the Astral Express.

C: 此前报导过，「星核猎手」入侵了天才俱乐部的螺丝咕姆星球，与星球的主人螺丝咕姆爆发了冲突。根据最新消息，他们上一次出现的地点是仙舟「罗浮」。
E: We have previously reported that the Stellaron Hunters invaded Planet Screwllum of the Genius Society and started a conflict with the owner of that planet, Screwllum. According to the latest reports, the Stellaron Hunters were most recently sighted at the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 反物质军团正在全银河范围内肆虐，引发的灾变与破坏难以数计。公司提请广大群众重视「存护」的意义。
E: The Antimatter Legion is ravaging through the galaxy and has caused countless calamities. The IPC would like to remind everyone to remember the significance of the Preservation.

C: 冰封世界雅利洛-Ⅵ重新传来通讯信号，星球原住民或有生还可能。
E: Signal transmissions from Jarilo-VI have been detected. This could mean that there are still survivors on the icy planet.

C: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
E: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

C: 根据可靠消息，在忆者的努力下，死灭世界「月卫之盾」的忆质碎片已全部打捞完毕。
E: According to reliable sources, thanks to the efforts of the Memokeepers, all memoria fragments of the deadworld of Moonshield have been salvaged.

C: 日前，第一支救援队已抵达巴兰扎熔炉，将与流光忆庭展开合作，抢救珍贵的技术成果，并帮助幸存者恢复正常的生活。
E: Just days ago, the first rescue team arrived on Baranza Forge, and will work alongside the Garden of Recollection to salvage valuable technology achievements, and assist survivors in rebuilding their lives.

C: 总之，交给我们就好。所获的情报，我会毫无保留地同各位分享。
E: In any case, you can deliver her directly to us. Once we learn something, I will share every piece of information with you.

C: 没有没有…各位下回见到驭空大人，替小女子美言几句便是最好的奖赏了。我已经接受了我的劳碌命。
E: No, no, though I'd appreciate it if you mention to Madam Yukong that you got a warm reception from me when you next see her. *sigh* Better to be busy than idle, I suppose.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，咱们跟列车报个平安吧～
E: Oh, let's let the Express know how we're doing~

C: 恩公，就在这儿下船吧～
E: Let's disembark here, benefactors.

C: 咱们是在这儿等着，还是现在就去见太卜司的人？
E: Should we wait here, or go find the messenger from the Divination Commission?

C: 我不一样，我有自由意志。
E: I'm different. I have free will.

C: 是是是！咱们地衡司的人手已经倾巢而出，半个都不剩啦。倒是你们丹鼎司的人呢？怎么才来这么几个？
E: Yeah, yeah, yeah, the Realm-Keeping Commission is out in full strength — what about the Alchemy Commission? Why are there so few of you here?

C: 只是那附近被地衡司的人占去了，实在嘈杂…吃！
E: ...but folks from the Realm-Keeping Commission descended on the area. It's too loud over there now... Pass! Pass!

C: …岂不是煞风景，不如就趁着闲暇时光带各位「长乐天」一游，顺便体验一下仙舟民粹——帝垣琼玉牌。等我…这一把……
E: ...And wouldn't that be more fun, too? Better to show you the real Exalting Sanctum and introduce you to a true Xianzhou pastime: Celestial jade. Aha...

C: 正是，总之想象有多大，它就有多大。
E: Exactly, let's just say it was bigger than your imagination.

C: 这位小友，你也是来此处游赏「长乐天」胜景的吗？
E: Hello, are you here for a bit of Exalting Sanctum scenery too?

C: 刚才吓死我了，多亏有人救了那位持明族的龙女大人……
E: That was terrifying, thank goodness the Vidyadhara dragon lady was saved...

C: 人手都在这儿了
E: Everyone we can mobilize is here

C: 有没有见过这位小姐姐？
E: Have you seen this lady?

C: 三月七，慢点！
E: March, not so fast!

C: 正是。「药王秘传」在这散入洞天各处的雾霭中，混入了诱发魔阴身的丹药。
E: Indeed. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus infused the smoke that permeates this delve with medicinal pellets that elicit mara.

C: 何况，这并非是我一人的决定……
E: Besides, this is not my decision alone...

C: 好在各位来了。太卜说了，几位不到，云骑便不得进发。
E: It's good that you're here — the master diviner said the Knights weren't to move out until you arrived.

C: 哦，你们不懂…短生种不懂的。什么「魔阴身」？那是药王所赐的第二生命！消解我执，成就仙体，自由自在的生命！
E: Oh, you don't understand... a short-life species couldn't understand. Mara-struck? Bah! It's a second life gifted by Sanctus Medicus! To eliminate the self! To achieve transcendence! A life of true freedom!

C: 无视长生种的本性，遏制心魔，假扮凡人维持文明社会，就像成年人玩小孩子过家家。这是另一种疯狂。
E: ...ignoring the true nature of long-life species, suppressing the inner mara, maintaining the facade of mortal society... it's a child's game. Another breed of madness, perhaps.

C: 那本是持明族管理的洞天，据说是自持明故乡世界移栽而来的古海胜境。
E: It is a delve governed by the Vidyadhara — supposedly an ancient oceanic region transferred from the Vidyadhara home planet.

C: 所谓「近乡情怯」，你的眼神很诚实。
E: As home draws nearer, so our feelings grow stronger. I can see it in your eyes.

C: （看来这条道已被云骑军把守住了，得另寻出处离开…）
E: (Seems this road is guarded by the Cloud Knights. I need to find another way...)
Hmph...

C: 对，就在前方的「显龙大雩殿」上。
E: Yes, they are waiting in the Dragonvista Rain Hall.

C: 这雕像好像丹恒啊，难道说……
E: It looks so much like Dan Heng... I wonder if...

C: 倏忽之乱时，我有幸躬逢其盛，目睹过这一奇景。山移海转，宫城空墟…持明族以故土圣地囚禁建木，罗浮仙舟实在亏欠他们良多。
E: I was fortunate enough to be here during The Shuhu Upheaval period — I witnessed this place in its prime. An age past — the palace was left in ruins, and the Vidyadhara used their sacred homeland to imprison the Arbor. The Luofu and the Xianzhou are greatly indebted to them.

C: 镇压「建木」是持明的责任。
E: Quelling the Arbor is the duty of the Vidyadhara.

C: 对了将军，停云小姐的…事情，你应该听说了吧？
E: General, did you... hear about Miss Tingyun...?

C: 将军你…没事吧？
E: General, are you... okay?

C: 原来如此！丹恒拿枪刺你的时候，可把我吓坏了…
E: So it was all part of the plan! When Dan Heng stabbed you, I was scared to death...

C: 各位启程前，请先好好休养歇息一番。有什么想去的地方，尽可以逛逛。我要暂代云骑事务，无法奉陪了。
E: Before you leave, please make time to recuperate. If there's anywhere you'd like to visit, feel free to take a look. I must attend to some Cloud Knight matters — farewell for now.

C: 东西都理得差不多了，都在箱子里边，你们瞧瞧有哪些是用得上的？
E: Well, I've managed to get through pretty much everything — it's all in this box. Please, take your time.

C: 片刻后，梦茗为你们端上了她所冲泡的茶饮。
E: A few moments later, Mengming serves the tea she brewed.

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 说好了，能溜出去就去。
E: Better start planning that escape route then.

C: 要是一路有什么头疼脑热、伤筋动骨、三长两短的麻烦，不要忘了来找我看喔！本小姐绝不收你诊金！
E: Aaaand don't forget to come see me if you get any headaches, fever, tendon pain, joint pain — anything! My treatment is on the house!

C: …如需搬运行李到客房，您随时可以找我。去吧，别让您的朋友久等。
E: ...Should you need assistance with moving your luggage to your room, feel free to contact me. Please go ahead, don't keep your friend waiting.

C: 嗯…那如果有一片巨大的梦境，它足够逼真，逼真到与现实无异。那里没有生离死别，每个人都能收获应得的美满与幸福，并永远快乐地生活下去。
E: Mm... Then, if there was a vast dreamscape, so lifelike it's indistinguishable from reality. There, no one faces life's separations or deaths. Everyone attains their deserved happiness and lives joyfully ever after.

C: 他说你是匹诺康尼最英俊的人，真有意思。
E: He said you were the most dashing person in Penacony, how interesting.

C: 啊，果然是那位「知更鸟」！居然能在这里见到本尊……
E: Ahh, it really is Robin! To run into her in person here...

C: …还有件令我在意的事。当说到邀请函时，那位家族话事人是这么回应的：「作为匹诺康尼的实际管理人，家族理应为各位排忧解难」。
E: ...There's something else on my mind. When the invite was brought up, that Family leader mentioned being one of the "actual administrators" of Penacony, and that it was their duty to "relieve" us of any problems.

C: 聪明人就是爽快。
E: Cutting to the chase, I like that.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 您看这样可以吗？与我们同行的丹恒行程临时有变，没办法入住，能麻烦您把为他预留的房间转让给这孩子吗？人数也对得上。
E: Something came up in Dan Heng's schedule, and he couldn't make it. I have an idea — could you reassign his room? It's still the same number of people.

C: 我已经有点累了。
E: I'm already a little winded.

C: 我也想问…
E: I was about to ask too...

C: 在入梦池中躺下。
E: Lie down in the Dreampool.

C: 是啊。不过，我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
E: Indeed. But still, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria.

C: 到底会是什么样子？好期待啊～
E: What exactly would that look like? I can't wait!

C: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
E: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

C: 也只有在这里，你才能充分理解「糖浆主义」的真正内核……
E: This is also the only place where one can fully experience the core values of Syrupism...

C: 哟，这不是我忠实的大顾客——{NICKNAME}嘛！
E: Hey, well if it isn't my most loyal customer, {NICKNAME}?

C: 三个。
E: Three.

C: …天哪！
E: ...Oh, my!

C: 你变得好…酷。
E: You look so... cool.

C: 再见了~
E: So long!

C: 可是球棒的效率太低…不对！我是说，我们不能用这么粗暴的方式解决问题……
E: I'm afraid a baseball bat isn't an efficient weapon... No! What I mean is, we can't solve the problem with violence...

C: 我现在非常…开心！
E: I feel like... I'm on cloud nine!

C: 可恶…到底是哪里出了问题？
E: Argh... What exactly went wrong?

C: 呃，我记得这里上次还没有看守的…是我出入太多引起注意了？
E: Um, this area wasn't guarded the last time I was here... Have my frequent comings and goings started drawing attention?

C: 我们…应该还可以参考其他人的做法？
E: Aren't there... other Crew members we can take inspiration from?

C: 如果它指向「钟表匠的遗产」——就和现在身处匹诺康尼之梦的每个人都息息相关……
E: If it points us towards the Watchmaker's Legacy, it will be connected to everyone who is melded to Penacony's dream...

C: 电视机的闪光好刺眼…小心，好像有什么东西……
E: The TVs are so bright, it's hurting my eyes... Careful, something's up...

C: 这、这是什么怪物啊——
E: Wh—What is this monster...

C: 不如这么称呼我吧…「忆者」黑天鹅。
E: You can call me... the Memokeeper, Black Swan.

C: 似曾相识的桥段…
E: I think I've had this dream before too...

C: 众目睽睽之下，你对金垃圾做出了完美的均分，就连钟表披萨的每一块都不一定如此均等。
E: Amidst the watchful gaze of the three, you perfectly split the golden trash. Not even a Clockie Pizza can be divided this evenly.

C: 我们三桶将成为你的助力，为我等族类赢得自由。
E: We three cans will become your aides, and win freedom once more for our people.

C: 也不知家族脑袋出了什么问题，又或者有人从中作梗，这帮家伙竟然也收到了邀请函。永火官邸当然不会拒绝，来势汹汹，誓要将盛会之星烧作一片火海……
E: I'm not sure what The Family was thinking, or perhaps someone was scheming behind the scenes, but shockingly these characters received an invitation. And why would the Ever-Flame Mansion decline? They harbor fierce intentions, swearing to turn the Planet of Festivities into a sea of blazing flames...

C: 放心吧，那是一道单向门，只会通往清醒的现实。除非那女孩抱有强烈的意愿，怎么也不肯从梦中醒来…怎么可能呢？她现在一定正在酒店的某处揉眼睛呢。
E: Don't worry. That is a one-way door leading to awakened reality. Unless that girl is so stubborn that she refuses to wake up from the dream — which isn't possible — she must be holed up somewhere in the hotel massaging her eyes right now.

C: 抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
E: Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?

C: 不对劲。这些痕迹都是前不久留下的，有人刚从这里离开…会和方才的事有关么？
E: Something's off. These traces are fresh. Someone just left the scene... Would this person have anything to do with what happened just now?

C: 这样啊…嗯，我尊重你的选择。我们走吧，回现实去。
E: I see... Fine, I respect your choice. Let's return to reality.

C: （看来要忙一阵子了，不知流萤回现实了没有……）
E: (We'll be busy for a while. I wonder if Firefly's returned to reality yet...)

C: 他还不知道流萤小姐的事——但从你的反应中，他或许有所察觉，就有意将话题诱导向「死亡的真相」，把你绕进他的逻辑里。
E: He doesn't know about Miss Firefly yet — but judging by your reaction, he may have noticed something going on and deliberately shifted topics to the "Truth of Death" to try and pull you in line with his way of thinking.

C: 这一点…我也赞同。
E: That... is something I agree on.

C: 你好，我需要五星好评。
E: Hello, I need a five-star review.

C: 毕竟两起案件的性质有根本不同…家族首要提防的，还是那些不怀好意的来客，比如那位公司的使节。
E: After all, the nature of the two murders is fundamentally different... The Family's first protective measures should be against malicious actors among the guests, such as that IPC envoy.

C: 《谐乐颂》周而复始，人们依旧各行其道，全然不知无人在意的角落中，已有两条生命化作梦泡消散。
E: Odes of Harmony plays on, as people continue their journeys, oblivious to the unnoticed corners where two lives have already dissolved into fleeting dreams.

C: 接触过这么多次，你对黄泉小姐的印象如何？
E: You've met her many times, now. What's your impression of Miss Acheron?

C: 「三重面相的灵魂啊，请你用热铁烙他的舌和手心，使他不能编造谎话，立定假誓。」
E: "Oh, Triple-Faced Soul, please sear his tongue and palms with a hot iron, so that he will not be able to fabricate lies and make false vows."

C: 我找你们长官有事，他在哪里？
E: I've got business with your Captain. Where is he?

C: {NICKNAME}，你这钟表把戏怕是有点…危险了。
E: {NICKNAME}, this clockwork trick of yours... It's kinda dangerous.

C: …加拉赫先生还知道我的名字？
E: ...Mr. Gallagher, you even know my name?

C: 黄泉小姐何出此言？
E: Why do you say that, Miss Acheron?

C: 我没有遇见任何愿意交谈的人。只能站在十字路口，看着一群又一群人像风一样匆匆掠过钢铁的丛林，只为把赚来的苜蓿币锁进银行金库。
E: I've never met anyone who was willing to talk. I could only stand at the crossroads, watching crowds of people hurrying like the wind through the jungle of steel, only to deposit the Alfalfa credits that they'd earned into the bank's vault.

C: 谢谢，瓦尔特先生。我知道你想确认什么。宇宙中有着无数相似却又相异的世界。在这些世界中，也有无数相似却又相异的人。
E: Thank you, Mr. Yang. I know what you wish to confirm. The universe has innumerable similar, yet different worlds. In these worlds, there are innumerable people who look alike, yet don't.

C: 那我们究竟是为了什么…才要向光而行？
E: Then why exactly... do we even walk towards the light?

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 好戏很快就会上演了，老人家。但在那之前，我想向您打听件事。您知道这梦里哪儿能找到「死亡」吗？
E: A great show will start soon, old man. But before that, I need to ask you something. Do you know where I can find "Death" in this dream?

C: 还记得我说的吗？你们茨冈尼亚人就适合待在窨井盖下边……
E: Remember what I said? You Sigonians are better off hiding in the sewers...

C: 换句话说——喝到什么都看命。所以别想太多，犹豫不决是享受的大忌。
E: In other words, what you get from your drink is down to luck. So don't overthink it. Indecisiveness has no place when it comes to enjoyment.

C: 在酒吧里四处转转，把喜欢的材料带回来，决定好了就跟我说吧。
E: So go ahead, explore the bar and bring me any ingredients you prefer.

C: 勇敢无畏的{RUBY_B#哈努努}反抗者{RUBY_E#}，祝你也能像他一样咬碎镣铐。
E: A {RUBY_B#Hanunue}symbol{RUBY_E#} of bravery and dauntlessness. May you break free from your shackles just like he did.

C: 呵…知道的不少啊，果然没看错你们。这下我也没理由不向各位坦诚了。
E: Heh... I was right about you. You guys seem to know quite a bit, and now there's no reason to hide anything from you anymore.

C: 我什么都没做…这就是最大的背叛。
E: I did nothing... and that's the worst betrayal of all.

C: 可惜「钻石」不会见你，谁也见不到他。所以此刻，我就是「钻石」的代理人，替他做出决定。
E: A pity Diamond won't see you. No one gets to see him. From here on out, I am Diamond's representative, and I will decide on his behalf.

C: 你…就一个人吗？你的父母呢？
E: Are... you alone? Where are your parents?

C: 然后，成为这场盛会的「第三个牺牲品」。
E: You'll be the closing act! The final sacrifice.

C: 终于…走出这里了。
E: Finally... made it out of this place.

C: 但我们必须给死者一个交代。
E: But we must mete out justice for the dead.

C: 祂从不瞥视任何人，祂也无需瞥视任何人。
E: THEY have never glanced at anyone, and THEY never need to.

C: 看来你也知情。
E: I see you're in the know.

C: 倘若命运的骰子从来都被灌铅，那就是我们命定的归宿，我们…又为何要与之相抗？
E: If the dice of fate are always weighted, then that is our destiny. Why then... do we struggle against it?

C: …谢谢你。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 瓦尔特先生也能看见。
E: You also saw him, Mr. Yang.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 我想和你合作。
E: I'm suggesting we cooperate.

C: 我将与各位站在同一战线，中止谐乐大典，并亲自偿还歌斐木先生欠下的血债。
E: I'll fight alongside you. We'll put the Charmony Festival on hold and make sure Mr. Gopher Wood pays for his blood debt.

C: 毕竟我检查内容的时候，发现里面什么都没有…多半又是什么「开拓」密文的吧，比我还神秘。
E: After all, when I checked its contents, I found nothing inside ... Maybe some Trailblaze runes? Even more enigmatic than me.

C: 哥哥…哥哥…？
E: Brother... Brother...?

C: 最后的两份礼物就送你们啦。如果谐乐大典还是不幸召开了…千万记得在演出现场使用，可别弄丢了哦。
E: Here, the last two gifts for both of you, and don't lose them. If, by some unfortunate chance, the Charmony Festival starts against all odds... remember to use them during the show.

C: 所以我们才应当对弱者施以关爱和照料，给予充分的援助，如同那是我们自身…「谐乐颂」也始终是这么教导我们。
E: That's why we should care for the weak and support them as if their suffering were our own... That's what the Odes of Harmony have always taught us.

C: 回来了？
E: Back already?

C: 哦！来得正好。
E: Oh! Just in time!

C: 也许她本人比我更清楚。
E: I'm sure she knows it better than I do.

C: 这位乘客的意思是……
E: This passenger is requesting...

C: 看来…你的忆者朋友来找你了。
E: Looks like... your Memokeeper friend has finally arrived.

C: 「巡猎」的死志直至生命终结也不会平息，所以总得人来引渡这些亡魂，他们生前都是英雄，死后不该沦为「虚无」的傀儡。
E: The unwavering determination of The Hunt followers persists even in death, so someone must guide these lost souls to their life beyond. They were heroes in their time, and they shouldn't be reduced to mere puppets of the Nihility.

C: 我没意见，就这么办吧！
E: Fine by me. Let's do it!

C: 你还挺会鼓励人的哈……
E: Got any more encouraging words?

C: 可以，非常激动！然后到了故事下一幕——你们找到了一份修铁路的工作，但日夜辛劳、体力不支，最后倒在了沙漠深处……
E: Very good! Very intense! And then we cut to the story's next scene — you find a job mending the rails, but the days are long, and your endurance can't keep up, and you finally collapse in the endless expanse of desert...

C: 你们不得不将高价囤积的货物赔本销售…这无异于饮鸩止渴，把你们拖到了破产边缘。这个时候——不服输的你会做出怎样的决定？
E: You have no choice — the goods you stockpiled at high prices have to be sold at a loss... This is a pretty self-destructive move which drives your business to the brink of bankruptcy. At this moment, what would you — who refuses to admit defeat — decide to do?

C: 任何人都别想夺取我的苏乐达™！我将运用化龙妙法，化身为恐龙，嘎呜——！
E: None will take my SoulGlad™ away from me! I will use the Transmutation Arcanum to turn into a dinosaur! *rawrr*

C: 恭喜两位选手顺利通关！但比起通关，我们更关心——二位玩得还开心吗？「开心」比「成功」更重要！
E: Congrats to both of you for clearing the stage! But more importantly: Are you having fun? Fun is more important than success!

C: 天哪，我第一次看见你蹲下。
E: Gosh, this is the first time I've ever seen you crouch down.

C: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
E: Am I... just a failed experiment?

C: 恭喜{NICKNAME}和流萤获得本次热砂盛典的冠军！
E: Congratulations to {NICKNAME} and Firefly on becoming this Scorchsand Festival's champions!

C: 谢谢你，钟表小子…如果不是你，我永远也无法像这样好好地和人交流——是你帮助我重新认识了我自己！
E: Thank you, Clockie... If not for you, I'd never be able to connect with people like this — you helped me find myself again!

C: 可如今的匹诺康尼一点也看不到星核污染的迹象，家族也向来以播撒和谐闻名…我该如何确信你们所言非虚？
E: However, present-day Penacony bears no marks of the Stellaron's taint and The Family has always been renowned for spreading Harmony... How can I be sure your words hold truth?

C: 你们将有关「钟表匠」和匹诺康尼星核的一切真相告给了银枝……
E: You revealed to Argenti all the truths about the Watchmaker and the Penacony Stellaron...

C: 正是。不过这又和星核有什么联系？
E: That's right. But what does this have to do with the Stellaron?
Hmm...

C: 别打哑谜了，说重点。
E: Stop beating around the bush and get to the point.

C: 而另一边的房间是…是放玩具的屋子。我喜欢把箱子里的东西一股脑儿在地上摊开，然后挨个给他们编故事。
E: And... And the room on the other side was... the toy room. I loved spreading out all the toys from the box on the floor and making up stories for each of them.

C: 「钟表匠」，你要去哪里？
E: Where are you going, Watchmaker?

C: 我们要举办一场盛会，理由就用「『钟表匠』的遗产」吧。然后…向全银河发出邀请，把人们都聚集到这儿来。
E: We'll organize a festival, using the "Watchmaker's Legacy" as a facade... and send invitations to the entire Cosmos to gather people here.

C: 他认识那辆车上的人，他会拜托对方带上我一起离开，我梦寐以求的旅行…会从这里开始。
E: He said that he knew the crew on the train, and that he had asked them to take me along. He said the journey I had always dreamed of... would start there.

C: 天无二日。如有必要，我会出手将太阳击落。
E: Well, there can't be two suns in the sky. I'll step up and take down the other sun if necessary.

C: 「欢呼颂唱遂齐声响起——」
E: "Cheers and chants reverberated in unison..."

C: 一段时间前……
E: A while ago...

C: 这次的匹诺康尼之旅让我看到了星核之灾的另一面…就表征而言，梦境的状况和「玛瑙世界」非常相似，前往那里或许有助于我们加深对星核的认识。
E: This trip to Penacony has allowed me to see another side of the Stellaron Disaster... In terms of symbolism, the state of the Dreamscape bears a striking resemblance to the Agate World. Visiting it might deepen our understanding of the Stellaron.

C: （等待跃迁期间…干点什么好呢？）
E: (There's still some time before the jump... What should I do?)

C: 那我们就一起照看它，直到它能够回归天空的那一天吧。
E: Then let's take care of it together until it can return to the sky.

C: 还没有做好准备…
E: I'm not quite ready yet...

C: 它们从「虚无」中诞生，向着「虚无」而去，度过毫无意义的一生。但就是这么一道虚幻的影子……
E: They emerge from the Nihility and head toward it, leading purposeless lives. However, these hollow phantoms...

C: 因此，我们就在这作最后的道别吧。
E: Let's bid our final farewells here.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>请问，你还会踏上这段旅途吗？</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I would ask — Would you still embark on this journey?</color>

C: 真搞不明白…你们盯着这个小案子不放、一直上纲上线，到底是出于什么居心？
E: I just don't understand... Why are you so fixated on this minor case and constantly escalating it? Seriously, what's your purpose?

C: 是那位{RUBY_B#砂金}公司使节{RUBY_E#}捎来的口信，他说这是「礼尚往来」。
E: I got this information from a message sent by that {RUBY_B#Aventurine}IPC ambassador{RUBY_E#}. He said it was to "return the favor."

C: 你们来了啊，休息得还好吗？
E: There you are. Did you rest well?

C: 我想想，这杯调饮应该是庄严、肃穆，且独一无二的，因为我们要用它来纪念那些英雄……
E: Let's see. The mixed drink should be solemn, dignified, and unique, as we'll use it to pay respect to those fallen heroes...

C: 一只眷顾大地的鸟，一只向往天空的鸟…即便知更鸟亲手阻止了兄长的愿望，她依然不愿放弃他。
E: One bird longs for the earth, and the other longs for the sky... Even if Robin had to stop her brother with her own hands, she won't give up on him.

C: 感谢您能来，姬子女士。
E: Thank you for your presence, Miss Himeko.

C: （但我还是不太明白，她是怎么做到的，「典押」又意味着什么？回去问问吧……）
E: (But I just don't understand. How did she do it? And what does "pawn" really mean? I should go back and ask...)

C: 结果决定匹诺康尼未来的会议比想象中顺利好多…几乎没什么争论就结束了。
E: Turns out, the meeting to decide the future of Penacony went much smoother than expected... with little debate.

C: 「解锁」？真是富有诗意和美感的说法，但你已经行于「纯美」的命途之上了。
E: Unlock? An eloquent and picturesque choice of words, yet you have already set forth on the Path of Beauty

C: 就是那个小姑娘！都给我动起来，在谐乐大典开幕前赶紧拿下那个通缉犯！
E: It's that girl! Get moving! Arrest that criminal before the Charmony Festival's opening ceremony starts!

C: 而此次美梦得以重回正轨，同样也少不了「开拓」的助力。如果没有星穹列车的各位，此次谐乐大典同样不能顺利举行——
E: And now the sweet dream is back on track, all thanks to the Trailblaze, of course. If it weren't for everyone on the Astral Express, we wouldn't be able to successfully host this Charmony Festival.

C: 这座邪恶的城市已经堕落了！身为「警长」娃娃，我不能坐视不理，而如今只有这枚虚数中子弹才能彻底肃清你们，给这座花火城重新大洗牌！
E: This evil city has fallen into depravity! As the Sheriff Doll, I cannot idly stand by and do nothing! And now, only this imaginary neutron bomb can completely cleanse Sparkle City of your ilk!

C: 我需要你帮忙，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。你和火火博士打过不少交道，再加上刚才说的「炸弹」案，你一定能找到证明火火博士是凶手的证据。
E: I need your help, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. You've had quite a few run-ins with Dr. Boom, and with the recent bomb situation, you're bound to find evidence that proves Dr. Boom is the killer.

C: 不过，看在你这么努力的份上，我就告诉你一件事好了：炸弹不在这里，有的只有我精心布置的恶作剧——时间不多了，快去找到真正的炸弹吧～
E: But, seeing as you've put in so much effort, I'll throw you a bone: The bomb's not here. This is only a prank I've craftily set up. Hurry, time's running out. You'd better find that real bomb quickly!

C: 「祂永远不会放弃你，永远不会令你沮丧！祂永远不会抛弃你，永远不会让你哭泣！」
E: "THEY will never give you up, never make you sad! THEY will never give you up, never make you cry!"

C: 我是来拆炸弹的。
E: I'm here to defuse a bomb.

C: 忆者也许能把炸弹转移到没人的地方，但…我在娃娃体内发现了一张纸条。
E: The Memokeeper may be able to teleport the bomb to a deserted location, but... I've found a note inside the doll.

C: 「加拉赫」，向你致意，沉眠的猎犬——
E: Gallagher, we raise a toast to you, the slumbering Hound...

C: 答案并不重要，重要的是从别人的答案里，我们自己能得到什么…是吗？
E: It's not the answer that's important, but what we can learn from others' answers... right?

C: 义无反顾地踏上旅途吧，走在「开拓进行时」的无名客。
E: Set forth on your voyage without hesitation, Nameless, on the path of the Trailblaze.

C: 谢谢，谢谢。
E: Thank you. Thank you.

C: 校园，真是个令人怀念的词啊。
E: "Campus..." That word sure brings back a lot of memories.

C: 六间？
E: Six?

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: Ba na na na~

C: （唔，又来了…好奇怪的感觉。）
E: (Oh, here it is again... That strange feeling.)

C: 怎么这里也有！
E: There are monkeys here too!?

C: 校长这么不正经吗？
E: Is the dean supposed to be this unserious?

C: <size=36>美梦多彩，理想自由！</size>
E: <size=36>Color your dreams, free your ideals!</size>

C: 哇哦，那我们就是同学了，请多指教！
E: Wow, that means we'll be schoolmates! Let's help each other out.

C: 还有好特别的辛香味，带着一股暖流弥漫我的口腔——太棒了！
E: There's also a unique spicy taste, like a warm current spreading through my mouth. Awesome!

C: 多少沾点纯美骑士。
E: I see hints of the Knights of Beauty.

C: 眼下仍有公义需要伸张，乱破当先全力相助。
E: There is still justice to be upheld. I must prioritize assisting that cause.

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 飞龙•忍者，诸位都是习得「开拓」真传的上忍，自然知道在银河忍界中，像我等这般伟力非凡的忍者不在少数，其中亦有邪忍。
E: Ninja Hiryū. You and your companions are all elite ninjas who follow the true teachings of Trailblaze. You should know in the Cosmic Ninja Realm, there are many extraordinary individuals like me, but also evil ninjas.

C: 连你也没通过啊…但我必须得进去，有什么办法吗？
E: So you didn't pass the test either, huh. Well, don't change the fact that I still gotta get in one way or another. Got any bright ideas?

C: 匹诺康尼发生什么了吗？
E: Is something going on in Penacony?

C: 对睡蕉小猴来说，没有哪种形容会显得夸张，先生，你怎么回事？
E: Are you serious? No narrative is too dramatic for Slumbernana Monkey, sir.

C: 你好啊。
E: Hello.

C: …皮带？
E: ...Your belt?

C: 抱歉，我只带回来一个坏消息……
E: Apologies, but I only bring bad news...

C: 哈…哈哈哈……
E: Ha... Hahahahahahahahahaha...

C: 喔…还真够热闹啊。
E: Wow... Everyone's here!

C: 你仔细端详面前的宝箱，但却没有发现任何解密界面、隐藏文本内容或道具提交插槽——看来它确实没法打开。
E: You scrutinize the chest in front of you, but don't notice any encrypted interfaces, hidden text, or item submission slots — it looks like it definitely can't be opened.

C: 「小三度音如泣如诉，减六度音叹息不止。」
E: "Those lesser thirds so plaintive, sixths diminished, sigh on sigh."

C: 待会再说
E: Maybe later.

C: 错，大错特错！
E: You're mistaken! Utterly mistaken!

C: 蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bana! Bana!

C: …它跑了，怎么办？
E: ...It ran off. What now?

C: 别缠着我了，体谅下穷学生吧！每天除了上课就是卖货，为了处理这批订单，我已经三天没合眼了……
E: Please, take pity on this poor student! Have a heart! As if squeezing in sales between classes isn't enough, I haven't slept a wink in three days, just so I can get this batch of toys ready!

C: 毕竟谐乐蕉师可是睡蕉小猴的缔造者之一，只有各位青年才俊才能满足她挑剔的目光。
E: Considering how Charmony BananAdvisor's a creator of the Slumbernana Monkey, I believe only young and talented people such as yourselves will be the ones to catch her discerning eye.

C: 怎么反派的台词都没写？
E: Why aren't there any lines for the villain?

C: 矛盾的反派需要精湛的演技，自由的台词更需深厚的功底，这是难度最高的角色，非你莫属！
E: The role of a conflicted villain requires sublime acting, and improvised lines further demand a robust foundation in the art. You are the only one who can take on this most challenging role.

C: 不及格！勇者小猴是拯救校园的英雄，才不会发出这么柔弱的*蕉声*！
E: Fail! Brave Monkey is the savior of our university! It would never utter such dainty Banagibberish!

C: 何其凶残！阁下的忍•真言已进入半步•令使之境了。
E: Stellarly brutal! You've attained the skills of a Semi-Emanator when it comes to reciting the ninja mantra!

C: 呃，你们在说什么呢？这也是剧本上的台词吗？
E: Uh... What are you talking about? Are these lines in the script?

C: 我只是一介过路导演，怎么敢轻举妄动？要战胜可怕的反派，还得仰赖各位身份显贵的主角。
E: I'm just a director that stumbled upon a sinister plan. A reckless move on my part can bring dire consequences! It is up to very important stars like you to defeat that hellkite of a villain.

C: 等等，你在做什么啊？
E: Not so fast! What are you up to this time?

C: 对于老好人，死亡能保全他的高洁。对于狡诈恶徒，死亡会干脆利落地结束一切。
E: For the good-hearted, death keeps their purity intact. For the cunning scoundrels, death ends things clean and quick.

C: 这样啊。也就是说，你并不害怕死亡？那么请向我伸出手吧。
E: I see. Does that mean you're not afraid of death? If so, please extend your hand out for me.

C: 还真像尼克说的一样，复仇不用找借口，就像世界上只有一件事不用学——
E: It's as Nick said: Revenge needs no excuses, just like how there's one thing in the world that doesn't need to be taught...

C: 一个为了复仇而活着的人，如果失去了仇恨，会发生什么？
E: For a person who has made revenge their sole purpose in life, what would happen if their hatred were to vanish?

C: 很好，您真的很有悟性，那让我们继续下一堂课吧……
E: Excellent. You're very perceptive. Let's move on to the next lesson then...

C: 这会是最艰难的一课，所以我会陪在你的身边。接下来……
E: This will be your toughest lesson, but I'll be with you throughout. Now then...

C: 叛忍，来战！
E: Traitorous ninja, engage me in combat!

C: 在服下药物的瞬间，剧烈的疼痛淹没了你的感知。
E: The moment you take the medicine, intense pain overwhelms your senses.

C: 思想这么狭隘，这辈子都别想引起博士的关注。
E: You'll never get the Doctor to notice you if you keep being so narrow-minded.

C: 要把三号移交给能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>？为什么！？
E: You're transferring No. 3 to Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>? Why!?

C: 奇怪，我记得你一直很听话。能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>说什么你就做什么，怎么到我这儿就不是了？
E: Odd. I've always thought of you as obedient. You always did everything Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak> said. Why aren't you obeying me?

C: 拜谢苦茶大师，弟子不胜荣幸……
E: Thank you, Master Kucha. This is my greatest honor...!

C: 缭乱•忍者，今天的试炼改为…击溃叛忍！
E: Dazzling Ninja, there has been a change to your trial today. I now ask you to... vanquish those traitors!

C: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道防卫系统出现大规模失控。
E: Warning: Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>'s security system has largely gone out of control.

C: 校方并没有把事态扩大化…或许是芮克先生取走了部分当事人的记忆。
E: The university did not escalate matters... Perhaps it's because Mr. Reca extracted a portion of the people's memories.

C: ——够了，阁下快住嘴吧。
E: Enough! Just shut up.

C: 恶人做恶事永远都有无数的借口，总想要将自己摆在正义的位置上。
E: When evil people do evil things, they always have a myriad of excuses to try and justify their own actions.

C: 但我等必须令这阵风止息——哪怕忍徒渴望纵身一跃，也必须是自己的选择，而非妖风所致。
E: We have to stop this breeze from growing. Even if the ninja initiates decide to make the leap, it should be a conscious choice of their own, and not sorcery that coerced them into it.

C: 惊梦剧团
E: Dreamjolt Troupe

C: 「在恐惧中抛却凡躯吧，悬锋之王！」
E: "In fear you shall abandon your mortal body, King of Kremnos!"

C: 聒噪…！
E: How noisy...!

C: 这里是「预言书库」，当年的仪式重地。
E: This is the Archive of Prophecies, an important ceremonial site back then.

C: 我们不知它的源头从何而来，反而发觉它如同包围陆地的大海一般，持续进逼着尚且安宁却已然狭小的土地。也正因此，它才得名为「黑潮」。
E: Nobody knows where it came from or how it came to be. What we do know, however, is that it is steadily encroaching upon what little remains of this tranquil land, much like a rising sea closing in on an island from all sides. It is for this very reason that it became known as the "black tide."

C: 你是丹恒…本人吗？
E: Are you... the real Dan Heng?

C: 这位朋友，你又有何高见？
E: And what might your concerns be, my friend?

C: 说来也真是神奇…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战后，它的声音仿佛就有了灵性。
E: This is amazing... It seems as if their voice has become more intelligible after the battle with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...

C: 这也是个…玩笑吗？
E: Is this... a joke as well?

C: 唉…希望树庭的人们，度过这次难关的…越多越好。
E: ...We can only hope that the Grove weathers this crisis with as many survivors as possible.

C: 好像没人啊…刚才那歌声是幻觉吗？
E: There's no one here... Did I just imagine that singing?

C: 「一支飞行的箭应在运动还是静止」。
E: "Is a flying arrow in motion or at rest?"

C: 纯白的少女以一种微妙的神情直直盯着你，粉色的小动物大大的眼睛里有小小的疑惑，而那位幽灵般的女子似乎不打算睁眼。
E: The pure white girl gazed at you with a subtle expression, while the pink creature's large eyes held a hint of curiosity. And that ghostly woman appeared unwilling to open her eyes.

C: 她有，但是好伙伴，我忍住了！
E: She's laughing. But I managed to hold it in!

C: 好耀眼…
E: How dazzling...

C: 这个「绅士之蝶」，到底是什么呀？是很厉害的守关怪物吗？
E: What exactly is this "Butterfly of the Vine Mine"? Is it a very powerful guardian monster?

C: 阿格莱雅知道白厄可能会失败……
E: Aglaea knew that Phainon might fall...

C: 欧利庞，{RUBY_B#万敌}这孩子{RUBY_E#}没做错任何事！
E: Eurypon, {RUBY_B#Mydei}the boy{RUBY_E#} did nothing wrong!

C: 你忘了，悬锋人不相信血脉。我们的王只能从{RUBY_B#悬锋祭典}浴血的角斗{RUBY_E#}中诞生……
E: Have you forgotten that we Kremnoans place no value in bloodlines? It is through {RUBY_B#Kremnos Festival}pure bloodshed and slaughter{RUBY_E#} that the kings of Kremnos have ascended to the throne...

C: 刻法勒在上啊……
E: By Kephale above...

C: 凶…手……
E: The... culprit...

C: 说说吧，万敌？告诉我们，你和白厄做了些什么傻事。
E: Speak up, Mydei. Tell us exactly what kind of foolishness you and Phainon indulged in this time.

C: 那二人的决心登峰造极，强烈的意志令水汽都为之色变，气焰裹挟着水汽直冲云霄，遮天蔽日，使人目不能视……
E: With unparalleled resolve, the two warriors' determination even alters the very hue of the steam. Flames intertwine with scalding vapor, reaching toward the heavens, shrouding the sky and the sun. The spectacle is so magnificent that none dare gaze upon it directly...

C: 仇恨蒙蔽了你的双眼，你差点就要迷失在那试炼里了。
E: You were blinded by hatred and almost lost yourself in that trial.

C: 「迈德漠斯，请你转告我的家人：打倒我托勒密的并非歹毒的诡计，而是翁法罗斯一切历史的重量。」
E: "Mydeimos, please tell my family: It was not cunning schemes that vanquished Ptolemy, but the immense weight of Amphoreus' entire history."

C: 所以，你觉得让族人留在圣城才是更好的选择？
E: So... You hesitate because you think leaving your people in the holy city is a better choice?

C: 那边…又有伤者？
E: Is someone... injured over there?

C: …会这么称呼自己，确实是本人没错。
E: ...Indeed. You are the only one who would refer to yourself like that.

C: …女士，如果你需要帮助，请尽管吩咐。
E: ...Please let us know if you need any help, ma'am.

C: 可是，妈妈刚才说，黑潮也会吃掉泰坦…如果连{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}也被吃掉了，那该怎么办呢？
E: But, Momma, you said the black tide can swallow up Titans too. What do we do if even {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} is eaten?

C: 呜…只学习{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的知识还不够吗？
E: Ugh... isn't {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' knowledge enough?

C: 小…八音盒？那是什么……
E: M—Music box? What's that?

C: 「于是便有了我、你，编织言语和歌谣，诞下爱情与知己。」
E: "Thus you and I were created, with words and song to weave, and love and intimacy to give."

C: 既然心意已决，就穿越黑潮，为翁法罗斯拨开迷雾吧……
E: Since your mind is made up, then traverse the black tide and dispel the fog for Amphoreus...

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 久违了，我是那个在灵魂物理学的课堂上掀翻了教室的学生。
E: It's been a while. I'm the one who once overthrew the entire classroom in that spiritual physics lecture.

C: 还请不吝赐教：有关您所知的，那位黑袍剑士的一切。
E: Could you please teach me everything you know about the black-robed swordmaster?
Mmm...

C: 乖…这里没有坏人。缇安，你不是用「百界门」保护了大家吗？
E: Don't be scared... There are no bad guys here. Didn't you save everyone with the Century Gate, Trianne?

C: 它若生有羽翼，我就不可能从树庭活着回来。
E: If they had wings, I wouldn't have made it out of the Grove alive.

C: 考虑到奥赫玛、树庭和这几处目标地点的距离，我想，最应该设防的是……
E: With the distances between Okhema, the Grove, and these potential targets, I believe we should bolster our defense in...

C: 虽然对「百界门」的掌握不如缇安，但只要各位能争取些时间，*我*也可以开启一扇漂亮的门。
E: I may not be as masterful as Trianne when it comes to the Century Gate, but even I can open a nice, big gate if I have enough time.

C: 迷迷的计划就是我的计划。
E: Whatever Mem's plan is, I'll follow.

C: 不知道该怎么回应的话，微笑就行了。
E: Just smile if you don't know how to respond.

C: 很可惜，我感受不到任何气息。
E: I don't feel them at all, regrettably.

C: 我正打算来同你道别，半路就撞上了这番景象。
E: Well, I was actually on my way to bid farewell to you, but ended up running into this.

C: 因为你听上去不太肯定。
E: Because you don't sound entirely sure.

C: 好吧，这么说是有些轻描淡写了。别担心，你迟早会搞明白这些人际关系的。
E: Alright, I suppose that's putting it lightly. Don't worry, you'll figure out the intricacies of these relationships sooner or later.

C: 如果不把火种归还涡心，让泰坦的神位就这么空着…不知会有怎样的劫难发生！
E: If we don't return the Coreflames to the Vortex of Genesis and we leave the Titans' divine positions vacant... we can't even begin to imagine the disaster that would follow!

C: 不了。我更想待在缇安大人身边。
E: No, I'd prefer to remain here to accompany Lady Trianne.

C: *我们*从出生起就被关在这圣殿群中，从未踏出「万径之门」半步。为了解外面的世界，*我们*花了许多时间学习各种知识，当然也搞了点小发明。
E: We were raised in this temple complex and had never stepped outside the Gate of Infinity. To understand the outside world, we spent much of our time acquiring knowledge and developing a few inventions along the way.

C: 可是，为什么呢？
E: But... why, Mama?

C: *我们*中的每一个人，也不曾忘记。
E: Each one of us has never failed to remember.

C: 汝魂魄已所剩无几。要是再无所作为，就只能由吾掌管这副躯壳了。
E: There's not much left in your soul. If you don't do something soon, I will have to take over this body.

C: 呵呵…当真？
E: Hehe, is that true?

C: 只可惜…接下来这场实验，偏偏不能由我亲自来做啊。
E: Regrettably... I can't carry out the upcoming experiment alone.

C: 缇宁也留在重渊。这样一旦有任何进展，两边可以有个照应。
E: Trinnon will stay in the Abyss, too. That way, both sides can communicate with each other if anything happens.

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。螺丝咕姆先生说你今天会来，我就在这儿等了一会儿。
E: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. Mr. Screwllum said you'd stop by today, so I figured I'd wait here for a bit.

C: 怎么不给我留个言呀？
E: Why didn't you leave me a message?

C: 抱歉，突然出现在了这里。毕竟星穹列车的开拓之行总是来去匆匆的，我想尽量不干扰各位的行程。
E: Sorry for just showing up out of the blue. The Astral Express's trailblazing journey is always a whirlwind, so I try not to disrupt your plans.

C: 那么，你有信心成为「圣杯战争」最后的赢家吗？
E: Well then, do you think you've got what it takes to win the Holy Grail War?

C: 我的意思是，御主，你知道这附近有什么食物份量充足的餐厅吗？
E: Master. Do you know anywhere around here that serves large portions?

C: 旁边这位，恐怕就是您召唤的「英灵」了吧？斗胆问一句，英灵小姐，您是匹诺康尼历史上的哪位名人？
E: And this must be the Heroic Spirit you summoned, huh? Dare I ask, Miss, which famous person from Penaconian history do you represent?

C: 你要我做的事，我办到了……
E: I did what you wanted me to do...

C: …我还以为Caster会准备什么怪物啊，异族的军队啊，巨龙啊之类的对手来困住我们。
E: ...I thought Caster would use monsters, foreign armies, or even dragons to trap us here.

C: 啊，抱歉，御主，突然絮絮叨叨地谈起了自己的过去。既然眼下有这样的机会，就不管什么幻觉啊梦境啊，我带你在故乡到处逛逛吧？
E: I'm sorry, Master. I got carried away talking about my past. Now that we're here, how about we set aside our worries about illusions and dreams, and I'll show you around my hometown instead?

C: 我曾相信当我斩杀伏提庚，驱逐异族，召集圆桌骑士，建成坚不可摧的卡美洛城时，和平的乐土会降临在不列颠。
E: I once believed that once I slew Vortigern, expelled the foreign invaders, gathered the Knights of the Round Table, and built the impenetrable castle of Camelot, peace would finally come to Britain.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>不列颠总有一天会结束，而它此刻的繁荣，建立在王的痛苦之上。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That Britain would one day fall, and its current prosperity was built on the suffering of its king.</color>

C: Saber，难不成你想留下来吗？
E: Saber, do you... wish to stay?

C: 想必你也是忆质入脑，幻觉缠身吧？不然怎么会觉得自己成了列车上的无名客呢？
E: You probably ate too much of that memoria too and thought those illusions were real. Why else would you believe you're a Nameless aboard the Express?

C: 鸟儿以为，赢得自由后她能开始全新的生活。她能在舞台上和银幕中展示自己美丽的羽毛与歌喉，像过去那样为一无所有的人们带去希望。
E: The bird believed that she would begin a new life after gaining freedom. She would shine on the stage and the silver screen, displaying her beautiful feathers and voice, just as she had once brought hope to the hopeless.

C: 可如果人人都因它们而踌躇不前，我想，世上就不会有英雄了。
E: Yet, had everyone turned back because of their fear of regrets, humanity would never have produced any heroes.

C: （有什么在阻止我离开这里，我得躲开他们。）
E: (Something's stopping me from leaving this place. I need to avoid them.)

C: 既然如此，我会如你所愿……
E: Then, as you wish...

C: 我喜欢看人们蜂拥挤入匹诺康尼，用自己的全部家财去换一个加入圣杯战争的机会！我喜欢苜蓿币从「烫金的时刻」流淌出去，注入银河的市场买入卖出！
E: What I like is watching people swarm into Penacony, spending their entire fortunes just to buy a chance to enter the Holy Grail War! I like having Alfalfa credits pour out of the Gilded Hour, entering the Cosmic Exchange!

C: 等等，这不是什么灵体化，而是凭空从我们的眼前消失了。这位从者的气息遮断，比我想象的还要诡异。等等——
E: Wait, this isn't spirit form. He just vanished, right before our eyes. This Servant's Presence Concealment is more disturbing than I imagined. Wait—

C: 这就是异界英灵的实力吗…哼，也是，匹诺康尼不过是只有十个琥珀纪的弹丸之地，论创造传奇和历史的积累，自然比不上真正的英雄。
E: So this is the power of Heroic Spirits from another world? ...Hmph. Figures. Penacony's just a backwater speck with ten Amber Eras. With no real legend or history, of course we pale in comparison to true heroes.

C: 耍弄诡计的人没什么力量…
E: Tricksters never pack much of a punch anyway...

C: 你瞧，御主，知更鸟小姐想要建立的同盟，已经慢慢有雏形了。军队有了目标，接下来就该行动了。
E: You see that, Master? Looks like Miss Robin's alliance is starting to come together. This army has a goal, and now it's time to move.

C: 一段孽缘罢了。
E: Let's just say... it was unpleasant.

C: 畏惧我吧，凡人们！在影子下，在睡梦里，在你背后，我无处不在！现在，我，群狼的主人，千面的斯科特将撕咬万物！
E: Fear me, mortals! For I am everywhere! In your dreams, in your shadows, right behind your back! Now I, the lord of the wolfpack, the Thousand-Faced Skott, will devour all!

C: 刺眼的光芒里，你被强行缩小，塞进了哈努兄弟的轮廓里。
E: With a blinding flash, your body shrinks, and you're forced into the outline of Brother Hanu.

C: 呱呱！呱呱！
E: *ribbit ribbit*

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，真他宝贝的畅快。这种时候，就该开一瓶赫尔多林的烟熏麦芽汁。
E: Hahaha, that was so fudgin' satisfying! Time to break out the Heldorin's smoked malt juice to celebrate!

C: 我也希望如此，可惜，我的对魔力并不像你那位Saber一样作弊。
E: If only it were that simple. Unfortunately, my Magic Resistance isn't nearly as overpowered as Saber's.

C: 呦，看来你们刚刚经历了一场恶战啊。
E: Oh, looks like you just crawled out of a tough fight.

C: 他虚空鲸的，打完了你知道出来了？
E: Forkin' void song whale, now you decide to appear after we did all the work?

C: 他宝贝的呜呜伯，有完没完！这些片子说到底不都是一回事吗？
E: Dadgum Wubbaboo, when will this ever end!? Aren't these movies all the same?

C: 完了，没救了，这家伙多半是疯了。
E: Well, it's hopeless. This guy's probably gone mad.

C: 只要集齐所有的知更鸟，就能召唤知更鸟之神，让我吞噬整个匹诺康尼，成为噩梦之王。
E: And once I've gathered them all, I'll summon the God of Robins, swallow all of Penacony whole, and become the King of Nightmares.

C: 惊梦剧团发出了短促的叫声，它向前凑了凑，将挂在身前的汽水瓶朝向两人。
E: The Dreamjolt Troupe lets out terse shouts. It moves closer, pointing the soda bottle hanging in front of it towards the two.

C: 我对「同谐」的庆典并无兴趣，谢绝邀请也是理所当然。但也因此错过了各位的精彩冒险，结论：追求合理也有坏处。
E: I have no interest in the Harmony's celebration, so it's only natural for me to turn down the invitation. But it looks like my decision also cost me the front-row seat to all of your exciting adventures. Conclusion: There is likewise a downside to pursuing reason.

C: 那可真是段不解之缘啊。
E: Yeah, a bond that truly runs deep.

C: 呵呵……
E: Hee-hee...

C: 「算是我的习惯。对于是否要来到这个世界，我想每个人都有选择的权利。」
E: "It's a habit of mine. I believe everyone should have the right to choose whether they wish to return to this world or not."

C: 学会适应它吧。幸存者的代价往往是「不幸」，这也无可奈何。
E: You'll have to learn to adapt to it. Unfortunately, the inescapable price of survival is often more adversity.
...Huh?

C: 各位的仙舟之旅，小女子遗憾错失。可后续种种展开，除却阴谋的部分，却又与我本人在场不差分毫。停云因此看见了一种可能……
E: I regret missing out on your Xianzhou journey, but everything that unfolded afterward, aside from the scheming, played out exactly as if I'd been there. This leads me to consider another possibility...

C: 你我身边，何曾有过第三个人？
E: There was never a third person with us, was there?

C: 诚然，那圆环是种群的天赐，但它未必不可毁弃。
E: It's true that this ring was bestowed upon our people by the heavens, but that doesn't mean it can't be thrown away.

C: 那你是挺倒霉的，没能成为更好的自己。
E: What a pity, failing to become a better version of yourself.

C: 有没有一种可能，消失的会是你？
E: Is there a possibility that you will be the one who disappears?

C: 想来蒙托尔星系的家族一定脱不了干系。
E: My guess is that the Family from the Montour System must be involved.

C: 瓦尔特先生，我只想告诉您一件事：「同谐」绝不止有一种面相，祂可以是星穹列车最坚实的盟友，也可以是最可怕的敌人。
E: Mr. Yang, I just want to tell you this: The Harmony has more than one side. THEY can be the most steadfast ally of the Astral Express or the most fearsome enemy.

C: 从过去的对手那里，我才能习得最宝贵的经验。请畅所欲言。
E: I learn the most valuable lessons from my past opponents. Please say whatever's on your mind.

C: 我也没意见。
E: I'm fine with that.

C: 做好准备，我会一直盯着你。
E: You should know that I'll be watching your every move.

C: 无论如何，我无法接受。
E: I won't accept this, no matter what is said.

C: 呵呵，我可没这么说。
E: Your words, not mine.

C: 哎呀别捣乱了，列车干净得很，不用做大扫除啦。
E: Geez, stop messing around. We don't need a scrub. The Express is already spotlessly clean.

C: 不闲聊啦，你也快去收拾收拾吧。
E: Enough chitchat. You should get packing, too!

C: 你来啦。听说各位无名客选择了翁法罗斯，十分明智的决定。
E: Ah, you're here. I hear the Nameless are going to Amphoreus. A very wise decision.

C: 我…在……
E: Yeah...

C: ——为了给「谒见系统」供能，我必须调用整个空间站的能源，让它进入静默，事后再重启。这一来一回，你知道背后的成本有多高吗？
E: Powering the Audience System alone required me to reconfigure the energy supply of the entire space station! I had to switch it to Hibernate mode before rebooting everything. Do you have any idea how much that costs?

C: 想跟机器头说上一句话可不容易。如此缜密的系统，平时想要测试或是定期维护也是难上加难，出点小问题也正常。
E: Sending a message to Droidhead involves more intricacies than you can imagine. If routine trials and maintenance on such an elaborately sophisticated system are already as bad as squaring circles, then it's no surprise for glitches like this to crop up.

C: …已打开。
E: ...is enabled.

C: 你潜入这里，无非就是为了窃取<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊的记忆</color>，不是么？
E: You crept in here to steal <color=#dbc291ff>Nous' memories</color>, didn't you?

C: 星穹列车的杨先生我有印象，你旁边这位是……
E: I am familiar with Mr. Yang of the Astral Express, but the one next to you...

C: 因为…我们陷入了进退两难的境地。
E: Well, that's because... we're caught between a rock and a hard place.

C: 扇他一巴掌！
E: Slap him in the face!

C: 看来不打算放我们离开，身后是死路和悬崖，只能应战了。
E: Looks like they want to keep us here. With a dead end and a cliff edge behind us, there's no other way out. We're going to have to fight them.

C: 小——白——！你又乱来！跑那么快，还擅自惹事？
E: Phai—non—! Look what you did again! Taking off only to get yourself into trouble?

C: 啊！怎么还把人家的武器弄坏了！完了完了，这是和陌生人打交道的礼节吗？
E: Agh, you even ruined his weapon! Now you've really gone and done it! This is no way to be treating strangers.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 他们也从远方来，是将要前往圣城的旅人。我记得你叫…维尔图斯？叫我白厄就好，刚才发生了什么？
E: Travelers from afar. They're also headed for the holy city. If memory serves me right, you are... Virtus? Please, you may call me Phainon. What was that just now?

C: 丹恒终于能跳了？
E: Dan Heng is finally going to be able to jump?

C: 年轻人相信你，就像你相信*我*。如果你不愿离去，他们也会一直留在这神殿中，变成{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}矛下的亡魂。
E: The young place their trust in you just as you place your trust in us. If you stay, they will remain here too, doomed to fall under {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s spear.

C: 先问这些吧。
E: That's all the questions I have for now.

C: 姿势莫名幽默的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
E: A humanoid statue with a rather comical pose. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.

C: 我已经走不动了。
E: I can't walk anymore.

C: 很神奇吧！来到这里，就能安静说话了……
E: Amazing, isn't it? Now that we're here, we can speak in peace...

C: 两位，我们继续前进。
E: Well, let's keep on moving then.

C: 你们真的对天外一无所知？
E: Do you really know nothing about what's beyond the sky?

C: 那接下来呢…
E: So, what do we do now?

C: 没错，是我们。
E: Yes, that's us.

C: 「捡到」可还行。
E: Pfft, did he really pick us up?

C: 老人家，您这东西是新的！而且是纯新，毫无争议的新。
E: Ma'am, this item of yours is new! Completely new! There's no doubt about it.

C: 倒也不是谎言…
E: It's not exactly a lie...

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 粉霞天女！快来买啊！
E: Rosy Celestial Maiden merch! Come get them right here!

C: 果然被发现了…
E: We've been made...

C: 翁法罗斯从不缺少向往天外的人。曾有一邦僭主穷尽举国之力修建「天舟」，意欲突破苍穹、企及星空……
E: There have always been people in Amphoreus who looked beyond the skies. Indeed, there used to be a tyrant nation that spared no expense in constructing "skyships," with the desire to break through the blue sky and reach the stars...

C: 我将以「四问」考验你们。昧心的回答会令金线震颤，真诚的回应则平静无波。
E: I shall ask you four questions. Dishonest answers will cause the golden thread to vibrate, while truthful responses will not affect the thread.

C: 我不擅长繁文缛节，但一定尽力而为。
E: While I'm not good at formalities, I'll do my best.

C: 被架起来，只能拼命了。
E: Guess we have no choice but to give it our all.

C: 我——奥赫玛的阿格莱雅，黄金裔，承载{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}神权的半神——对你们即将践行的道路施以祝福。
E: I — Aglaea from Okhema, Chrysos Heir and the demigod who bears {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s divine authority — hereby bless your journey ahead.

C: 缇安会为你们打开通往悬锋城的大门。愿金色的丝线指引你们的征途，亦愿它能带你们找到归家的路。

E: Hey, careful!

C: 别害怕，你不再孤单了。我是雅辛忒丝，继承了英雄血脉的医者——
E: Don't be afraid. You're not alone anymore. I am Hyacinthia, the healer who inherited the hero's bloodline...

C: 哎呀，怎么连人家都开始这么自称了！
E: Ugh, I can't believe I'm calling myself that now too!

C: 现在…我将带领诸位进入雨之民的殿堂。
E: Now... I shall lead you into the Rainfolk's hall.

C: 天空降下的诅咒……
E: A curse that fell from the sky...

C: 聆听塞涅俄丝与雨之民的对话。
E: Listen to the conversation between Seliose and the Rainfolk.

C: 受诅咒的黄昏之女，战无不胜的阳雷骑士，将会飞入云霄，挑战泰坦……
E: The cursed Daughter of Dusk, the invincible Daythunder Knight, will soar into the heavens to challenge the Titan...

C: 而那个理由，我也愿意假定它出于善意——因为这就是我看待世界的方式，我的选择。
E: And as for those reasons, I choose to believe they came from a place of goodwill. That's how I see the world.

C: 岁月流逝，恐怕晨昏之眼早已变成一片废墟。
E: It's been so long... Maybe the Eye of Twilight has already turned into ruins.

C: 扎格列斯之手或许能帮我们把「硬盘」复位——
E: Maybe the Hand of Zagreus can help us to put the "hard drive" back to where it's meant to be...

C: 就在刚才，我们离开晨昏之眼以后…我感觉翁法罗斯的水体和我切断了联系。
E: Just now, after we left the Eye of Twilight... I felt the waters of Amphoreus severing their connection with me.

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈！！
E: Ha... Hahahaha!!!

C: 言语不起作用…那就只能靠剑刃表露决意了。
E: If words won't work... then we can only express our resolve with our blades.

C: 圣城…燃烧。抗争…我已尽力。
E: Burning... the holy city is. To resist... I did all I could.

C: 一切…都将归零。
E: Everything... will be reset.

C: 希望有朝一日，我们能在星宿的见证下重聚…到时候，我们再摆一席迟到的庆功宴吧。
E: One day, I hope we will reunite under the constellations... When that time comes, we can hold a belated victory feast. How about that?

C: …现在可就躺在本大爷深不见底的胃囊里呀！
E: ...is currently nestled in the depths of my bottomless tummy!

C: 而我胃囊里的这颗火种…<color=#dbc291ff>不正是用来维系泰坦生命和神性的核心嘛？</color>
E: And this Coreflame in my belly... <color=#dbc291ff>Is it not the core that maintains a Titan's life and divinity?</color>

C: 这…就是我穷极一生，不惜变成这副模样，也想实现的「神迹」呀！
E: This... is the "miracle" I wished to achieve in my life's pursuit, even at the cost of turning into this!

C: 当然█它并非█无限使用的奇物█只能为一人持有
E: Of course, ███ it is not ███ Curio with unlimited uses ███ may only be held by one person

C: 呵呵，您多虑了。
E: (chuckles) You misunderstand.

C: 他是诸王中的至高，流离者的牧人，将团结的人子高举于仇敌之上——
E: Greatest of kings, protector of the displaced, raising humanity's children above their adversaries—

C: 我具体要做些什么？
E: What exactly do I need to do?

C: 怎么又换身份了？明明不久前还是从异邦漂流过来，和你订下剑艺修习契约的勇者……
E: Switching roles again? What happened to being the valiant hero from a distant shore who made that solemn pact to learn the sword...

C: 「枝和叶为什么生长，风要向什么方向吹拂…♪」
E: "Why do leaves and branches grow, which way does the wind blow...♪"

C: 不过这下…就只剩下我们咯？继续刚才的话题吗？
E: Looks like it's just us now... Care to finish that chat?

C: 开个玩笑，没有别的意思哦。
E: Just kidding, don't read too much into it!

C: 唔…小涟倒是没怎么变呢，好神奇！
E: But look at Reney. She hasn't changed one bit! How fascinating!

C: 粉色…在我印象里，迷路迷境似乎从来没有过粉色的妖精，不知道多哆啦迷有没有见过？
E: Pink ones? That's strange. I don't recall any pink fairies in the Membrance Maze. Have you seen any, Chief Dolimem?

C: 至少能知道逃避的方向。
E: At least we'll know which way to run.

C: 这代表着一位…背离了子民的「君王」吗？
E: Is this showing us... a "Ruler" who forsook their people?

C: 最后，希望所有迷途人的跫音不再徘徊不前，取而代之的是祈祷的明亮歌声。
E: Finally, I pray that the footsteps of lost souls no longer wander aimlessly, instead, replaced by the bright songs of prayer.
Phai█ ███ █non █ ███ █

C: （这两人以前这么水火不容啊……）
E: (Hard to imagine they once clashed like this...)

C: 是个心急的大男孩呀，你们说不定很合拍呢。
E: Quite the hothead. Y'know, you two just might get along.

C: …能与您这样的哲人同行最后一段路，是我的荣幸，那刻夏老师。
E: It's my honor to walk the final stretch with a mind such as yours, Professor.

C: …你也感觉到了。
E: ...So you feel it too.

C: 「再创世」…这件至美的作品，能够交由我最信任的学徒收针，我已没有遗憾。
E: The Era Nova... this unrivaled masterpiece, I have no regrets, now that I may entrust it to my most trusted apprentice.

C: 请阁下自便，随意阅览。
E: Please, take your time. Look around as much as you wish.

C: 何必多此一举，向我们解释这么多呢？
E: Why go through the trouble of explaining all this to us?

C: 在那之前，我更好奇另一件事：刻律德菈陛下，她人在哪里？
E: Before that, I'm more curious about one thing: Where is Her Majesty Cerydra?

C: ——去把我的原话带给阿格莱雅。同样的话我不会再说第二遍，猫女。
E: Take my words back to Aglaea. I won't say the same thing twice, Catgirl.

C: 就算你再怎么厉害，也不过是肉体凡胎罢了！承载十二颗火种？别开玩笑了，你只会被神火吞噬，然后拉这个世界给你当陪葬……
E: No matter how strong you are, you're still just a mortal body! Carrying twelve Coreflames? Don't make me laugh! You'll just get consumed by the divine flames, and drag this world down with you...

C: 你、你……
E: You... you...

C: 没人能追得上我，我早就不再为「逃亡」而奔跑了。
E: No one can catch up to me. I'm no longer running to escape anymore.

C: 两百万三千四百三十二次轮回……
E: Two million three thousand four hundred and thirty-two cycles...

C: 你自己…无数个你自己的愿望…又是什么呢？
E: What about your wishes... the wishes of all the countless versions of you?

C: 照亮它的，果然不是我心间的那团火焰啊。
E: ...Turns out, the fire that lights the way was never mine to begin with.

C: 我会成为翁法罗斯的黎明。
E: I will be the dawn of Amphoreus.

C: 一人前往未来……
E: One will step into the future...

C: 哦…舞步不错。
E: Oh... Nice moves.

C: 就让天空…熔合此世全部痛苦吧。
E: Let the sky... merge with all this world's suffering.

C: 第二幕：「试炼」
E: Act II: Trial

C: 不要畏惧……
E: Cast aside your fears...

C: 呼…呼…终于追上你啦。
E: Whew... at last... I finally caught up.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>返程的路也许要花上很久很久，比普通人一生的时光还要漫长许多……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The return journey could take ages... longer than most lives...</color>

C: 谁让我们是如此相似呢？娇弱可爱的外表下，都藏着一颗炽热的真心呢！
E: Birds of a feather we are! Looking all sweet and innocent, but with hearts of fire!

C: 好吧，从某种意义上说，你是看见了无数个「昔涟」的结局。但现在，我就在这里，水灵灵地站在你面前，这不是很好吗？
E: Well, I guess you did see the end of countless Cyrenes, in a way of speaking. But I'm standing before you right here, right now, as alive as ever. Isn't that a good thing?

C: 但这种故事早就不流行啦。在一篇浪漫的史诗中，坏人的阴谋就该被主人公挫败，对吧？
E: But those stories went out of fashion ages ago. In a proper romantic epic, the hero's supposed to foil the villain's plot, right?

C: 得知你平安无事，我们很欣慰，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: We are very glad to learn that you're safe, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 理性地分析局势。
E: Analyze the situation rationally.

C: {NICKNAME}…是在担心肩上的职责太沉重吗？放轻松，也许答案没有那么复杂。
E: {NICKNAME}... Are you worried that the burden is too heavy for you? Don't worry. Maybe the answer isn't as complicated as you think.

C: 正如三千万世的停滞过后，是你的到来让翁法罗斯的命运再度开始转动。这不是偶然，而是「开拓者」的必然。
E: But those aren't coincidences. Just like how your arrival kick-started Amphoreus's fate once more after a stagnation of more than thirty million cycles. It's the inevitability of being a Trailblazer.

C: 于是，在白厄的帮助下，翁法罗斯的岁月再次重置，可我却迷失在了时间乱流中。紧要关头，找回了全部记忆的迷迷以牺牲自己为代价，将我送回了时间起点……
E: Thus, with Phainon's help, time in Amphoreus reset once more, but I became lost in the chaotic flow of time. At the critical moment, Mem, who had regained all her memories, sacrificed herself to send me back to the beginning of time...

C: 「别了，阁下。愿我们…在新世界再会。」
E: "Farewell, then. May we... reunite in the new world."

C: 嗯。第一次逐火以「律法」的试炼作结，我们要在火种被归还前找到半神，取得对方的信任。
E: Indeed. The first Flame-Chase ended with the trial of Law. We must find the demigod and gain her trust before the Coreflame is restored.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们先找个隐蔽的角落，躲起来观察下状况吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't we find a place to hide and observe from the shadows?

C: 什么？他…是不是提到了<color=#dbc291ff>天外的群星</color>？
E: What? Did he... just mention <color=#dbc291ff>the stars beyond the sky</color>?

C: 尸体……
E: A corpse...

C: …{NICKNAME}，现在不妨将计就计，先跟着他们回圣城吧。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, we might as well dance their dance. Let's go with them to the holy city.

C: 不会比上一次更难，对吧？弄清楚这个轮回发生了什么，我们一定能反客为主，取回主导权。
E: Should be easier than last time, right? If we figure out what happened in this cycle, we'll be able to turn things back in our favor.

C: 正是。黎明云崖是众英雄的行宫，为使各位免于战事辛劳，凯撒为这座宫殿花了许多心思……
E: Indeed. Dawncloud stands as the heroes' residence. The Imperator put much thought into its design, in order for it to serve as a sanctuary from the burdens of battle...

C: 对天外了如指掌，还被称作「那位大人」，难道是…？
E: Someone who is all too familiar with the world beyond the sky and is referred to as "that Lord"... Could it be...?

C: 嗯，不必着急。
E: Alright. There's no rush.

C: 说得太对了！趁着凯撒的鹰犬还在围猎其他家伙，多过过嘴瘾吧。
E: You're absolutely right! While the Imperator's hounds are still hunting down others, let's let out our grievances.

C: 冬霖爵…似乎话里有话啊。
E: Seems like there's more to Dux Brumalis's words than meets the eye.

C: 我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军参谋。
E: I'm Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages at the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.

C: 我要告诉戍卫！
E: I'll inform the guards!

C: 未来的你…依旧是这世上最棒的织者。
E: In the future, you... will still be the finest weaver in the world.

C: 但是，在凯撒的统治下是最安全的……
E: But it's safest under the Imperator's rule...

C: 机会难得，不如一起碰个杯吧，趁我们还有享受欢欣的时光——敬下一个千年的命运与牺牲。
E: Why don't we have a toast, while we still have time for pleasure? Here, to the destinies and sacrifices of the next millennium.

C: 现在，请转过头去，轻轻地——不要发出任何响动。
E: Now, please turn around. Very. Very. Quietly. Don't make a single noise.

C: 所谓「救世主」也是其中一员。这群流民误以为自己能串联群星，以同盟替代征服，然而历史早已给出当头棒喝。
E: That so-called "Deliverer" is part of that last group. Those vagabonds mistakenly believe they can connect the stars through alliances instead of conquest, but history has already given them a tough lesson.

C: 为您过去达成的诸多成就，我向您致敬；但对于您当下的立场，我深表遗憾。
E: I offer sincere acknowledgements for your many past achievements, but I must deeply regret your current perspective.

C: 三月！我也想死你了！
E: March! I've really missed you too!

C: 流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
E: We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

C: 而「死亡」的半神会永远看护这条密道，直到{RUBY_B#救世主}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}归来。
E: And the Demigod of Death will forever guard that secret path until {RUBY_B#Deliverer}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#} returns.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>将我的灵魂裂成五份，为我打造不朽的躯壳……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Split my soul into five pieces, forge me an immortal vessel...</color>

C: 一、把战场移动到创世涡心，于情于理，{NICKNAME}出现在那边都更有说服力。
E: First, shift the battlefield to the Vortex of Genesis. It would be more convincing if {NICKNAME} were to appear there.

C: 这一幕是「海洋」黄金裔诞生时的历史…曾经，她是名为「海妖」的泰坦眷属。
E: This is the scene when the Chrysos Heir of Ocean was born... She was once of a Titankin race named "sea sirens."

C: 而银河中的我们，是否真的比她清醒？现在，无名的人、无命的人，请试想……
E: But we in the cosmos... Are we truly any wiser than she was? Now, nameless one, fateless one, ask yourself this:

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你可确信，凯撒已准备好为迈向星海的野心献祭一切！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Know this: I am ready to sacrifice everything for the ambition to conquer the sea of stars!</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「Ω」——我将其定义为：「智识」的陨落。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Ω — What I call "The Fall of Erudition."</color>

C: 这不是你玩弄命运的理由。
E: That's not a reason for you to toy with fate.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>如此一来，我们就能以另一种形式，让他陷入和英雄们同样的轮回，在没有尽头的循环里感受孤独和痛苦……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Then we can entrap him in the same kind of cycle as the heroes were in, and get him to experience loneliness and pain in that endless recurrence...</color>

C: 千年前，那场血腥的宴会后，那小跟班找到了我，为我展示了她的日记本。
E: That sidekick found me after the bloody feast a thousand years ago and showed me her diary.

C: 银河很大，大到「未知」远远多于「已知」，但它们最后都算不上什么。你走得越远，越能理解这句话。
E: The cosmos is so vast that the "unknowns" far outnumber the "knowns," but none of them will end up being anything amazing. The farther you go, the more you'll understand what I mean.

C: 你究竟在试炼中看到了什么？
E: What exactly did you see in the trial?

C: 不存在了——第二军团和第四军团已经把它们彻底荡平了！
E: They are no more. The Second and Fourth Legions have destroyed them all.

C: 我相信，敏锐的{NICKNAME}一定能察觉到端倪。
E: I believe someone as sharp as {NICKNAME} would definitely figure out that something's wrong.

C: 这不会花上太久，只需跟我一同步入<color=#dbc291ff>感官之雨</color>。我会告诉你，谁该被遗忘，谁该被铭记。
E: It won't take too long. You just need to step into the <color=#dbc291ff>Rain of Sensation</color> with me. I'll tell you who deserves to be forgotten... and who deserves to be remembered.

C: 观景车厢…变得好陌生。
E: The Parlor Car feels... so strange.

C: 黑天鹅将{NICKNAME}的遭遇告知了丹恒……
E: Black Swan told Dan Heng what happened to {NICKNAME}...

C: 这座迷宫，弥漫着遗忘的气息……
E: This maze is full of... memory loss...

C: 我不这么认为。
E: I don't think you do.

C: 想为自己多争取些时间，好给同伴通风报信？
E: Why should I do that? So you can buy more time and send a message to your companions?

C: 对她而言，想必是段艰难且孤独的旅程……
E: It must have been a difficult and lonely journey for her...

C: 没权限，只能暴力闯入了。
E: We don't have permission. Looks like it's brute-force time.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在封装密钥——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Encapsulating encryption key—</color>

C: 这样一来，它就不再是「昔涟」一个人的回忆。
E: That way, it won't just be "Cyrene's" memories alone.

C: 然后，又会有新的「我」，带着新的「记忆」回到这里。
E: Then, there will be a new "me" returning here with new "memories."

C: 而你会守候在这里，呵护这座「记忆」的苗圃。
E: And you shall continue to wait here, protecting this garden of "memories."

C: 带上所有的往昔，一同走向新世界吧。
E: Let's march into the new world with all the past.

C: 一位天才的镜子戏法，和一道「智识」的保护机制，对么？
E: A genius's mirror trick and a protective mechanism of the Erudition. Is that right?

C: 翁法罗斯不应被舍弃。
E: Amphoreus should not be discarded.

C: 小心，到处都是「长夜月」的眼线。
E: Be careful. "Evernight's" eyes are everywhere.

C: 是啊，真没想到…另一个「我」居然强得这么不像话……
E: I really didn't think that... this other "me" would be THIS strong...

C: 呀，怎么一下子就被猜出来了…真没悬念！
E: Huh? You got it already? No suspense at all?

C: 动之以情的部分，我做到了。至于晓之以理……
E: Well, I've appealed to your emotions. As for reasoning with logic...

C: …哦？有意思，她要怎么做？
E: ...Oh? Interesting. What does she want to do?

C: （时间刚刚好，去开会吧。）
E: (Perfect timing. Let's head to the meeting.)
(March...)

C: 又一场太一之梦…
E: Another Ena's Dream...

C: 我记得这一幕…
E: I remember this scene...

C: 综合来看，这是最合理的推断。信息量有些大，不如整理一下，回去找昔涟……
E: All things considered, that's the most reasonable conclusion. It's a lot to take in. Time to clear my head and find Cyrene again.

C: 不听话的{NICKNAME}……
E: Tsk... {NICKNAME}, you really don't know how to behave, do you?

C: 「我才得以靠『调律』抹去忆域对你的影响。」
E: "Only then, through 'tuning', was I able to undo the Memory Zone's effect on you."

C: 「…务必小心。翁法罗斯被异常汹涌的忆潮席卷，我也只能尽力而为。」
E: "Please, be careful. Amphoreus is being overwhelmed by an unusually violent memoria tide. I'll do all I can... but even that might not be enough."

C: 务必小心，「大地」背离了逐火的使命。荒笛依然在世，它绝非「开拓」的盟友。
E: You must be careful. "Earth" has abandoned the Flame-Chase mission. Though Terravox still lives, they are not an ally of the Trailblaze.

C: 为一己私欲，擅用化龙之力，让昔日亲友化作仇敌……
E: I used dragon transmutation for selfish reasons, and close friends turned to enemies.

C: 但我能听到，你的血脉中依旧回荡着澎湃的声响……
E: But I can hear the sound of blood still surging through your veins, fast and strong...

C: 那么，最后一问……
E: Then, a final question...

C: 我明白了。那么……
E: I understand. Then...

C: 而是一片浩瀚无垠的星海。
E: But a vast and boundless sea of stars.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}阁下。属于我的那一条…也走到了温暖的终点。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. My own path... has finally come to a gentle end.

C: 没错。它熔进卡厄斯兰那的身躯，成为「毁灭」最后的赐福。
E: Yes. It melded into Khaslana's body, becoming the Destruction's final blessing.

C: 我认识的每一个人都已死去，我妄图拯救的世界也支离破碎。
E: Everyone I know is dead, and the world I dared to save has been torn to pieces.

C: 所以，我要先一步去往明天了。
E: So, I'm going to head towards tomorrow first.

C: 不错。借由这具机械躯体，你能够控制思维的边界，只将部分真相拱手示人。
E: That is correct. Thanks to that mechanical body, you can control the boundaries of your thoughts, opting to only show partial truths.

C: 这就足够了。说起来，螺丝先生的「准备」如何了？
E: That's more than enough help to us. By the way, how are Mr. Screwllum's "preparations" coming along?

C: 多么遗憾，您永远不愿承认自己的谬误。
E: How unfortunate that you'll never admit your own mistakes.

C: 布下「开拓」的信标，与外界建立联系吧。
E: Let's set up the Trailblaze beacon and establish contact with the outside world.

C: 星际和平娱乐的总部在艾普瑟隆，倒是不难理解。但名单上的其他世界……
E: It makes sense, since Interastral Peace Entertainment's headquarters is in Epsilon. But why are all the other worlds on the list...

C: 「{F#她}{M#他}现在的样子，可比以前伟岸多啦。」
E: "{M#He}{F#She} looks way more majestic now than {F#s}he used to."

C: 全体公民，看啊——最后的泰坦，「负世」的{NICKNAME}将要醒来！
E: Citizens, behold: Our last Titan, the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, is about to awaken!

C: 「{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}火种{RUBY_E#}将熄——神的时代已经结束——」
E: "The {RUBY_B#Destruction}Coreflames{RUBY_E#} flickered and dimmed... and the age of the gods met its end..."

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 我以为那个话题早过去了。
E: I thought we were done with that conversation.

C: 我们——<color=#dbc291ff>最后的十二泰坦</color>——已准备好为世界的命运鏖战。
E: We, <color=#dbc291ff>the last of the Twelve Titans</color>, stand ready to fight for the world's destiny.

C: 你…不打算和我们同行了么？
E: So... you're not coming with us?

C: 看。我掘地三千尺，总算挖出了点宝贝。
E: Look. I dug three thousand feet down, and finally struck gold.

C: 我想…《如我所书》只是一种媒介。「记忆」有千万种方法凝固时光。
E: I believe... As I've Written is but one medium. The Remembrance has countless ways of capturing time.
Heh...

C: 因为，他正是「英雄」的化身。
E: It's because he is the very embodiment of a "hero."

C: 「说起来，赛飞儿小姐，多洛斯人…都很喜欢球类吗？」
E: "Speaking of which, Miss Cipher, do Dolosians... all like spherical things?"

C: 直到现在，你依旧在闪烁么……
E: Still shimmering... after all this time?

C: 「所谓天降的救世主，终究是从尘土中崛起。」
E: "Even the Deliverer from the sky must have their beginning in the soil of the nations."

C: 情绪稳定，才是乖孩子。
E: Good kids keep their emotions in check.

C: 现在，世界内部的时间流速已经完全和现实宇宙同步。
E: The speed of time within Amphoreus has finally been synced with that of the real universe.

C: 银河的命运，在此一役。
E: The fate of the cosmos hangs in this battle.

C: 放手干吧，每个人都是。
E: Good luck, all of you.

C: 被那道裂缝撕开的星空，就是最后一处需要我们治愈的伤痕。
E: The starry sky marred by that rift is the last scar that needs to be healed.

C: 垂死挣扎吧，没头脑，你这只会无能狂怒的半成品！
E: Struggle as much as you want. You brainless, half-baked tool with nothing but impotent rage!

C: 光会创造天地！
E: Light will create the heavens and earth!

C: 不过，变化的不止有我们。
E: But we're not the only ones who have changed.

C: 不用提醒，我一直记得你们。
E: No need to remind me. You are always in my mind.

C: 「你将与一位无漏净子相遇，教会她何为『爱』，然后，第一次直面『毁灭』。」
E: "On that trip, you will encounter a Pure Child of Anāsrava, teach her what 'love' is, and then you will directly face the Destruction for the first time."

C: 「只顾低头锻造，三千万世。」
E: "For thirty million cycles. Always kept my head down. Forging."

C: 所有逐火的人们，他们行走在你三千万次的讲述中。而这一刻，回忆交织在一起，所有前世过往都拥有了意义。
E: All the Flame-Chasers walk in your thirty million retellings of their story. At this moment, all the memories are tangled with each other, and all the previous cycles have gained meaning.

C: 我为何「开拓」？只因目中所见，并无尽头。
E: I "trailblaze" because my own eyes have not seen the end.

C: 机缘月，我令「欢愉」遍洒黎明——
E: In the Month of Fortune, I scatter Elation throughout the dawning day...

C: 我不在乎。
E: It doesn't matter to me.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，好像醒了……
E: Looks like {NICKNAME} is waking up...

C: 真冷静啊，灰子——看来那场大战真是让你成长了不少哪。
E: So composed, Gray Mystery... It looks like that big battle really helped you grow up, didn't it?

C: 你安然无事，这便是好消息。借用了下这…「吧台」里的器具和饮品，但愿你不介意。
E: Glad to see you're safe and sound. I helped myself to some equipment and drinks from this... "bar" of yours. Hope you don't mind.

C: 我没意见。
E: I do not mind.

C: 如此，来自众多世界的有能之士必然能从逐火的事迹中获得启发，开启伟大的征途。
E: Thus, capable individuals from countless worlds will surely find inspiration in the Flame-Chase's tales and embark on their own grand journeys.

C: 是呀，大家都会好好的。你看，每位英雄都卸下负担，变回了纯真的孩子。
E: Yeah, everyone will be alright. Look, every hero has put down their burden and returned to their innocent, childlike selves.

C: …我明白了，大概就像宴会上喝蜜酿的时候，讨喜的人会举盏相邀，但不讨喜的人会碰杯强求。
E: ...I see. It's like drinking honey brew at a banquet. Likeable folks invite others to raise their cups together, while the unlikeable ones force others to drink with them.

C: 放一百个心吧！嘴再硬的人，也扛不住我们六只拳头。
E: Rest assured! Even the most stubborn person can't withstand our six fists.

C: 「收好它吧。也许，它就是翁法罗斯留给银河的最后一件馈赠。」
E: "Keep it safe. Perhaps this is the final gift that Amphoreus left for the cosmos."

C: 但恐怕并非所有的「海洋」都适宜生物居住。这一点，你也务必要纳入考量。
E: But I'm afraid not all "oceans" are suitable for life to inhabit. You must take this into consideration as well.

C: 于是，「奇迹」得以暂时逃离「死亡」……
E: And so, the "miracle" was able to slip away from Death temporarily...

C: 可惜，权杖的阻力太过强大：即便「神明」，也只能向同路人送去一道转瞬即逝的模因……
E: But the obstruction from the Scepter was far too strong. Even the "gods" could do nothing more than send a fleeting memetic being to someone who walked the same path...

C: ——昭告「灰白的黎明」。
E: Proclaim a "pale dawn."

C: 走吧，我们一起回家。
E: Come on. Let's go home together.

C: 风儿，明明那么温暖……
E: The breeze is warm...

C: 至少「赞达尔」仍忌惮它。
E: Well, at least "Zandar" is scared of them.

C: 那便让我们共享发现真相的喜悦吧。至此，史诗最后的隐秘也烟消云散——
E: Then let us share the joy of discovering the truth. The last secret of the saga will finally dissipate here...

C: 昔涟是，哭着诞生的，脆弱的，透明的，像是水晶的。

E: In that case, I want to make a promise. I want to gift my pen, my book, and my name to you.

C: 谈到对失败的理解，没有人比赞达尔更深刻。他已尝过太多苦果，就算再多一次又有何妨？
E: No one understands failure better than Zandar. He has suffered so much already. What is one more failure to him?

C: 正是。我已彻底切断与「赞达尔•壹•桑原」的连接。
E: Yes. I have completely severed my connections with "Zandar One Kuwabara."

C: 也许，卡厄斯兰那会愿意将这份金血，交给为翁法罗斯赴汤蹈火的盟友。
E: Perhaps Khaslana would be willing to entrust the golden blood to an ally who went to great lengths for Amphoreus.

C: 万敌
E: Mydei

C: 收到。这次能让我玩得开心点吗？之前的几次行动都很无聊呢。

C: {NICKNAME}，你意下如何？

E: After so many questions, I think you would've made your choice, no?

C: 你是？

C: 听起来好厉害的样子！
E: That sounds awesome!

C: 嗯～上道！
E: Yeah, you are on the right track!

C: 不撞南墙不回头。

C: 就留给你，做个纪念吧。

C: 重新激活那边的界域定锚！
E: Reactivating the Space Anchor over there!

C: 古恩他也许是个坏人…
E: This Gunn, he could be a bad guy...

C: 就当是保全我这个老人悼念亡妻的小小祈愿吧。

E: 2. Fix and factory reset Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>.

C: 虽说这里的设备与资源都是顶级的，但待久了依然有人会觉得憋屈难受。
E: Despite our top-notch equipment and resources, some people still find it unbearable to live on the station after staying here for a long time.

C: 毕竟我们生来是人，并非什么没有情感的草木山石，如果连自己的喜好与情感都要抛之脑后，那我们又怎能称之为人？
E: After all, we are born to be humans, not plants or rocks that do not have emotions. How could we still call ourselves humans if we were to throw away our hobbies and emotions?

C: 我们的目的是调查这里裂界化加速的原因，为此需要你尽可能地对全域进行探索。
E: Our aim is to investigate the cause of the accelerated appearance of Fragmentum in this area, so you need to explore the entire area as much as possible.

C: 怎么样，想必你已经彻底理解了我的为人吧？我劝你，知难而退，别在我这里费心思费口舌了。如你所见，我也是很「忙」的。
E: Seems like you already know what kind of person I am. I'm telling you, quit while you can and don't waste your time and effort here. You can see that I, too, am quite busy.

C: 阿兰不在，空间站的安保需要格外谨慎，请诸位拿出十二分的决心与集中力。
E: Arlan isn't here right now, so we need to step up the space station's security. Spare no effort and stay focused.

C: 啊，这张通行证，上面还有一张佩佩的大头照片……

C: 呜呜，呜呜呜呜！

C: 没想到今日会以这种形式再见。相信上一场交锋的延续很快就会到来。
E: I never thought our next meeting would take place under these circumstances. I believe the continuation of our last encounter will soon arrive.

C: 有点奇怪…
E: Something's not right...

C: 朋友，你能想象吗，我竟然得到了黑塔女士的认可，这是足以记忆一辈子的事啊！
E: Can you believe it, I've just been acknowledged by Madam Herta! This is something I'll remember for the rest of my life!

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: …算了，尽是些尴尬的回忆。这事就此翻篇吧。
E: ...Just, it's an embarrassing memory. Just forget about it.

C: 最后银狼似乎玩够了，关闭了游戏，这场风波这才宣告平息。只是我没想到，那时她和黑塔女士都已经布好了下一局棋。
E: In the end, Silver Wolf seemed to have had enough fun and shut the game down. That was the end of that saga. What I didn't know is that Madam Herta and she had already set up the chess board for the next game.

C: 银枝说的是吧？
E: Did Argenti tell you that?

C: 天天忙着上班，有也忘干净了……

C: 我就知道…
E: I knew it...

C: {NICKNAME}，为什么？

C: 是哦，他真的像是会在眼睛上蒙上白布，然后要在自己附加的这种严苛筹码里与木桩对战、修炼自己的人。

C: 最后，是冥火大公的能力，也就是「人体自燃」的秘密。

C: 不过在整起事件中，还有一重疑问尚未得到解决。
E: But there is one mystery that remains unsolved...

C: 我听说空间站有些动荡。

E: Depends on who they are.

C: 黑塔把我和螺丝咕姆叫来空间站，为了商议些重要的议题。她还给斯蒂芬发了邀请，但他没回信，黑塔似乎不想再等了。
E: Herta called Screwllum and I to the space station to discuss some important topics. She also sent an invite to Stephen, but he didn't reply and Herta didn't seem to want to wait any longer.

C: {NICKNAME}，那你觉得，开拓者应该做什么呢？
E: Well, what do you think a Trailblazer should do then, {NICKNAME}?

C: 当然，你要是实在不感兴趣，也可以将这件事暂且搁置，回头我再问问小三月他们。
E: Of course, if you really aren't interested at all, you can put this matter aside for now. I can always ask March and the others another time.

C: 谁？！谁在污蔑我？
E: Who said that!? Are you slandering my name?

C: 其实我也不会选花。
E: I actually don't know much about flowers either.

C: 我的嗓音…你也是知道的，不适合唱音乐剧，但没想到竟然很适合唱爵士乐。
