E: As you know... My voice is not well suited to musicals. Fortunately, it turns out that it's perfect for jazz!

C: 其实成为音乐剧演员一直是我的梦想，既然塔米拉小姐和{NICKNAME}都这么相信我，那我会好好努力，不会让自己和你们失望的。
E: Becoming a musical performer has actually always been my dream. Miss Tamila, {NICKNAME}... As you both have so much faith in me, I will do everything I can to get there. I will not let you or myself down.

C: 是徘徊在裂界的过去之灵。
E: They are ghosts of the past that roam the Fragmentum.

C: 这些装备也不像你们的东西吧。
E: Does our equipment bear any resemblance to yours?

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ可是连星核都挺过去了，这回还能出什么大事？你就别操不必要的心啦。
E: Don't get yourself all worked up. If Jarilo-VI is strong enough to withstand a Stellaron, it'll be just fine.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ…我刚才瞄了一眼杨叔发布的观测记录，相比我们第一次开拓之行的时候，那颗星球的平均地表温度已经回暖了不少。
E: I was just taking a look at Mr. Yang's records, and it seems that Jarilo-VI's average temperature has warmed up quite a bit. It's much warmer than it was on our first trip there.

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么样？你准备好出发了嘛？
E: Ready to go, {NICKNAME}?

C: 直到「星核」危机解除，公司才发现贝洛伯格居然一直存续到了现在……
E: ...It wasn't until the Stellaron crisis was resolved that the IPC discovered that Belobog had survived...

C: 正是凭借那笔资金，贝洛伯格才得以建起如此高大的城墙…甚至连最初一批自动机兵的研发经费都是从那笔钱里划出来的。
E: It was with those funds that Belobog was able to construct its immense walls... Even the initial funding for the development of the first batch of automatons was drawn from the same pool.

C: 那种感伤好像凝聚了历史，画家通过自己的笔触，把贝洛伯格几代…不对，是几十代人的苦难都给概括了出来。
E: It's as if the artist has condensed history into one poignant, but sorrowful image. The artist's brushwork depicts a generation's — no, several generations' hardships...

C: 托帕小姐，我们已经从布洛妮娅那里听说了，关于贝洛伯格的债务问题……
E: Miss Topaz, Bronya's already told us about Belobog's debt situation...

C: 你这么说鬼才信咧！
E: Pfft! As if anyone would ever believe that!

C: …算了，管她帕托还是托帕，眼下最要紧的是赶紧把大矿区给夺回来。{NICKNAME}，三月，一起来吗？
E: Potaz, Pazto — whatever her name is, she can wait. Right now, the most important thing is to free those trapped in the Great Mine. Are you two with me?

C: …但它和公司的人不是一伙的吗？真奇怪。
E: ...But aren't they on the IPC's side? Strange...

C: 哼唧…呼噜！呼哩！
E: Oink... Oink! Oink!

C: 克拉拉，回宅邸里等我。
E: Clara, go inside and wait for me.

C: 我警告你们，赶紧从这里滚出去，别再让我看见你们那身行头——否则就别怪这把镰刀不长眼了！
E: I'm warning you — get lost or suffer the consequences! Don't you dare show your face around here again!

C: 托帕！我们要见你的上级，托帕小姐！
E: Yeah! We demand to speak with Topaz!

C: 也许吧，但我不能逃避。
E: Perhaps, but the IPC won't wait for me to catch up.

C: 贝洛伯格不会出卖自己的未来。值得我们永远记住的，只有你们这些屡次在危难时刻伸出援手的朋友。
E: Belobog's future is not for sale, and we'll never forget the friends who stood by us in our time of need — not once, but twice.

C: 还能是什么，「匹诺康尼」呗。
E: Penacony, what else?

C: 将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了佩拉……
E: You tell Pela about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...

C: 要说这里唯一让我担心的，就是布洛妮娅姑娘自己。她能不能承受住来自自己人民的非议？她准备好背上可能流传千年的骂名了吗？
E: What worries me most is how Lady Bronya will handle the backlash from her people. Will she be able to withstand the criticism? Is she prepared to carry the weight of a tarnished reputation for years to come?

C: …没想到居然攸关贝洛伯格的存亡，对吧？
E: Yeah, you didn't think the future of Belobog was at stake, right?

C: 这种事不该由我来做。不管布洛妮娅选择了哪条路，我都会追随…我唯一不能做的就是替她下决定。
E: I'll respect whatever decision she makes, but... it's not my place to make it for her.

C: 不必慌张，三月。列车组从不提倡冲突，可一旦快进到刀兵相向的场面，我们也从不胆怯。一路都是这么过来的，不是吗？
E: Don't worry, March. The Express never pursues conflict as a first means... but if it comes down to it, we won't back down either. That's how it's always been.

C: 怎么又撞上倒霉事了…
E: How have I ended up in a spot like this again...

C: 也辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。真没想到会再次把你们卷进危机里…还差点导致列车跟公司之间的关系破裂。
E: Thank you so much for all you've done, {NICKNAME}. I never thought we'd drag the Express into a crisis again, much less one that might cause a rift between you and the IPC.

C: 哇，好香啊！又焦又脆的感觉，太棒了！
E: Wow, they smell so good! They look so crispy and crunchy! I think I'm in love!

C: 我？我还在改造期…
E: Me? Why, I'm still going through parol— a period of transformation...

C: …你还真是难打发啊，不过…你说话倒也挺中听的。
E: You don't give up easily, do you? Still... you're full of kind words.

C: 像我这样的矿工，根本等不起什么「漫长的疗程」——吃了药以后要是不能立刻返工赚钱，那和晾着等死差别也不大……
E: Miners like me don't have time for lengthy treatments... If I can't take something and get right back to work, I may as well lie down and wait for death to come knocking...

C: 抱歉，我之前还怀疑过你…
E: I'm sorry that I doubted you before...

C: 这一次，一定不会再失手了。
E: This time, we won't fail.

C: 你是知道我的，知道拉明娜究竟是怎样一个人。
E: You know me. You know what kind of person Lamina is.

C: 活该！哈哈，想逮住我们，还早了几百年哪！
E: Serves them right! Better luck next time, slowpokes!

C: 我不明白…你要「走」去哪里？
E: I don't get it... Where are you trying to go?

C: 总之，我先把它记录下来，然后也给你抄一份。喏，给你。
E: Anyway, I'll write it down first, and then I'll copy it for you. Here you are.

C: 我需要有些想法需要验证，所以必须去调查那个数据储存端——从这里沿左边道路往下就是了。
E: I need to verify some theories of mine, so I have to investigate this data terminal myself, which is just down the road on the left.

C: 是啊，我腿都走酸了…赶紧拿到「钥匙」就回去吧！
E: Hear, hear. My legs are sore... Grab the key and let's go back!

C: 好像有怪物来到这附近了…是我们动静太大了吗？
E: Looks like monsters are here now... Were we too loud?

C: 我的养父是贝洛伯格名气响亮的外科医生。也正因如此，他的每台手术都是医界的焦点…他总是背负着巨大的压力。
E: My father is a famous surgeon in Belobog. Because of his fame, people in medical circles paid great attention to his surgeries... He always had a lot of stress to deal with.

C: 这样吧，这一瓶瓦赫医生的抗寒药，请两位拿着。如果你们叙述的经历都是真的，我觉得两位肯定有能力保护自己。
E: Here, take this medicine. If what you two told me is true, I'm sure you're more than capable of handling yourselves out there.

C: 这样就可以了，{NICKNAME}。谢谢你帮我了断这最后一桩心事。
E: That'll do. Thank you for helping me, {NICKNAME}. I feel like a great weight has been lifted.

C: 走吧，约好的时间快到了。可不能让老人家等太久。
E: Let's go, my mom will be there soon. Best not to leave old folks waiting!

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。不瞒你说，看到这朵花的一瞬间，我立刻就联想到了瓦赫…啊，不用担心，我想到的是一些幸福的回忆。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. To be honest with you, it reminds me of Vache... Don't worry, good memories only.

C: 你们第一次来到这里的时候，正巧赶上十年一度的翻修工程，博物馆没有对访客开放。
E: Last time you visited, it was closed for its ten-year renovation.

C: 但他们本可以把海报直接从墙上撕掉，不必费此功夫……
E: They could've simply ripped the poster down — why spare the effort?
(Empty...)

C: 哼，我爸爸也……
E: Hmph. My daddy did too...

C: （小声）是个大家伙！
E: (Quietly) You can say that again!

C: 他们讨论的内容很不对劲！反正就是…鬼鬼祟祟的，净是些见不得人的话！
E: It seemed suspicious... They were acting all sneaky!

C: ——那就值得夸赞，小姑娘。
E: ...then you are indeed worthy of praise, little girl.

C: 就是它啦。
E: This is the item in question.

C: 唷！美丽的贝洛伯格人民公仆，还有神通广大的外来者，你们好啊！
E: Ah! If it isn't Belobog's most adorable public servant — and the magnificent outsider! Good day to you!

C: 结果也正如我所料，我们才审讯了不到半天的时间，那家伙就全招了。
E: The result is just as I expected... After less than half a day of interrogation, he confessed everything.

C: 身份藏得这么深，而且还有相当可靠迅速的消息源…我猜他应该已经知道诺尔伯特少爷被抓的事了，所以才能溜得这么快。
E: He knows how to keep his identity hidden, and his sources are fast and reliable... I guess he found out about Mr. Norbert's arrest and made a run for it.

C: 这…非常感谢您，娜塔莎小姐！不过我得想一想……
E: That's... Thank you very much, Miss Natasha! But I'll have to think about it...

C: 志愿者是自愿帮助他人的人。
E: Volunteering is when you volunteer to help somebody else out.

C: …呵呵，事情变得有意思起来了。
E: ...Hehe, this is getting interesting.

C: 你说得对…真诚永远是最好的武器！
E: You're right... Sincerity is the best policy!

C: …我就知道！该不会连这场面试也是你为了拿我打趣才精心设计的骗局吧？
E: ...I knew it! You didn't set up this whole interview as a prank to make fun of me, did you?

C: 还怪正经的…那我们就在这儿歇会儿吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: This seems serious... Let's take a break here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不。佩拉非常认可你的能力，所以就叫我来面试你了。
E: No. Pela was impressed by your ability, so she wanted me to have an interview with you.

C: 居然还有这样的意象…真是学到有趣的知识了。那么，我们来看下一问吧。
E: Wow, I'm surprised by its profound meaning. How fascinating! Now, the next question —

C: 我承认那个希儿天赋过人，我们两个…配合得确实不错，不过就仅此而已了。
E: I admit, Seele is talented. We... do work well together. But that's all there is to it.

C: 哔嘟…你才是老古董！你全家都是老古董！
E: Beep, beep, beep... Your mom's an antiquity!

C: 你早说这个名字我都不用查了。
E: Mentioning that name sooner would've saved us a lot of time.

C: 大叔经常照顾我的生意，对我很和善，不过我跟他也说不上太熟。只说矿脉这事，他干得确实不地道。
E: Fersman is an old customer of mine. He's pretty nice to me, though we are not so close. As to what he did about that Geomarrow vein, it was kinda unethical.

C: 桑博应该是清白的！
E: Surely Sampo is innocent!

C: 告诉你们吧，磐岩镇有个叫「矿灯」巴列维的家伙，是个鉴定商。他表面自称不再鉴定古代遗物了，但其实背地里还在做高价回收的生意。
E: Listen here, there's a fellow in Boulder Town they call Balaway the Miner's Lamp. He's an appraiser. Although he claims that he doesn't do appraisals anymore for ancient relics, he actually still does a bit behind the scenes for ones that are of especially high value.

C: 他们被裂界怪物困住了。
E: They were surrounded by monsters.

C: 太难看了，可可利亚——缠着人不放可不是你的作风啊。
E: Hmph, since when did you forget how to let go, Cocolia?

C: 这是发生什么事了？
E: What is going on?

C: 还有一个请求…希望你务必不要被她发现，否则玲可肯定又要对我们发脾气了。
E: One more thing... don't let her discover you. Otherwise, she'll probably get upset with us.

C: 啊，玲宝！你快来看看这是怎么回事！
E: Hey, Lynxy! Come and have a look at this!

C: 原来如此。现在看起来确实稳固多了…不愧是玲宝！
E: Got it! It's definitely sturdier now... Nice job, Lynxy!

C: 难道是什么小动物吗？
E: Is it some kind of animal?

C: 嗯，我也看到了。可它好像没什么敌意，长得也挺可爱，圆滚滚的……
E: Mm, I see it too. But it doesn't seem aggressive... and it's all chubby and cute...

C: 至少让我拍张照吧，佩拉——身为科考人员，这也是我的义务。
E: Can I at least take a picture, Pela? That's also my job as a researcher.

C: 太好了！玲宝，你快看——居然是地髓激活元件！没想到在这里找到了！
E: Awesome! Lynxy, look! It's a Geomarrow Activation Component! I never thought we'd find one here!

C: 能、能找到这个零件真是太好了！快让我们把炉子修好吧——
E: I—It's great we finally found the component! Let's go fix the stove!

C: 软盘里有什么？
E: What's in the floppy disk?

C: {NICKNAME}，陪我去个地方吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, there's somewhere I want to go — will you come too?

C: 听娜塔莎说，那座房子是从前某位富商捐赠的。不管他是干什么的，肯定是个大好人。
E: Natasha said that the house was donated by some rich businessman. Whatever his business may have been, he must have been a good person.

C: 走吧，我得再多看看周围才能确定……
E: Come on, I need to look around a bit more before I can be sure...

C: （这声音是……）
E: (What's that sound...)

C: 不在。
E: No.

C: 为什么要给我？
E: And why give it to me?

C: …你可真死板，叫你收下就收下呗。
E: ...You sure are prissy, huh? Just take it.

C: 太危险了…你能活到现在真是个奇迹。
E: So dangerous... You're lucky to have lived till now.

C: 事先说好，你可千万不要把虎克卖掉宝贝的计划告诉老巫婆哦！
E: I'm warning you — don't you dare tell the old witch about Hook's plan to sell the treasure!

C: 才、才不是我想玩啊，都是被这群小孩子逼的！
E: Hey, it wasn't like I wanted to play! The kids forced us to...

C: 啊…帕斯卡自顾自地跑掉了！它是要我们跟上它吗？
E: Ah... Pascal ran off!

C: 唔，虽然知道了帕斯卡偷零件的原因…但还有许多问题没有解决呢。比如……
E: Although we now know why he took them, there are still many unanswered questions. For example...

C: 就是止痛剂的分量稍微少了些，储藏室那边出了什么情况吗？
E: Huh... It's just, there are less painkillers than I'd expected. Did someone break into the storage room?

C: 不知道你骄傲什么。
E: And that's something to be proud of?

C: 哟，哟，没本事的废柴们给我站稳，听好——
E: Yo, yo, listen up. This one's for all you pretend rappers...

C: 去周围打听打听吧…
E: Let's listen in on some conversations...

C: …咦？大家是有什么要紧的事要找史瓦罗先生吗？克拉拉可以帮你们带话……
E: ...Huh? What do you need to see him for? I can pass him a message...

C: 史瓦罗的计算是在什么时候开始的，克拉拉？
E: When did Svarog start doing his calculations, Clara?

C: {NICKNAME}和三月没有撒谎，克拉拉。我相信{F#她们}{M#他们}。
E: Hey. {NICKNAME} and March aren't lying, Clara. I believe them.

C: 民众很难接受这样的结果，博士。如果让他们知道，是伟大的阿丽萨•兰德启动了这个东西，让这个世界被寒潮覆盖……
E: The people will struggle to accept this conclusion, doctor. If we were to tell them that the almighty Alisa Rand activated this thing and triggered the Eternal Freeze...

C: 这里不是上层，没那么多猜忌、规矩。不管有什么烦恼，都可以大声说出来。
E: This isn't the Overworld. We don't do envy and etiquette down here. Whatever's on your mind, you can say it.

C: 如果是对老桑博的感恩戴德之情…那就免了，咱们是什么交情？钱到位了就行！
E: I know, your heart is bursting with gratitude... but there's no need to thank me. We have what I'd like to call a "fiscal friendship." If the money's right, not a problem in sight!

C: 不予执行。与克拉拉相关的记忆都是重要的数据，必须完整保存。
E: I cannot grant this request. Records pertaining to you constitute important data, Clara. They must remain intact.

C: 没、没错！
E: Uh... yeah, that's right!

C: 等等，你怎么知道？！莫非是…同行？
E: ...Wait, how did you know that!? Unless you're... a fellow gemologist?

C: 他们新增了适合小孩子的拍品。
E: They've added some new kid-friendly items.

C: 谢谢你们，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再见，小妹妹再见！
E: Thanks so much guys! I gotta go!

C: 三百二十五！
E: <unbreak>325</unbreak>!

C: 机会很大，别着急。
E: Don't worry, we have a solid chance.

C: 五百！
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak>!

C: 哦？狙击最高价的买家突然出现了！七百五十冬城盾一次！
E: Oh-ho? A new challenger enters! <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield!

C: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你…要是没有你的帮助，虎克肯定拍不到探针！
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you so much... Hook would never have won the probe without your help!

C: 太好了。
E: Great!

C: 谢谢你，虎克…但是这样一来，我准备的生日礼物不就……
E: Thank you, Hook... but the birthday gift I've chosen is...

C: 不愧是布洛妮娅，真是雷厉风行呀！
E: That's our Bronya — quick as a flash!

C: 我是天才侦探少女的天才助手。
E: I'm the brilliant sidekick of this genius detective.

C: 对、对不起！那个…{F#大姐姐她}{M#大哥哥他}应该是开玩笑的…请您不要放在心上！
E: I'm sorry! {F#She}{M#He} was just joking... Please don't take {F#her}{M#him} seriously!

C: █ 对不█疼███苦███苦痛█疼痛█ 不█痛█对起 █ █对█████起 █ ██疼█████████痛█ 对不起对痛苦不起对不起痛对不起对疼不起 ████████████？！
E: █Sorry█hurt███suffer█pain█no█pain█sorry██so█████rry███pain█████████hurt█sorry suffer sorry sorry pain sorry ouch pain sorry████████████!

C: 唔，接下来只要把它的外壳拖回去就好。
E: Hmm, then all that's left is to drag the shell back.

C: ——备份完毕，开始进行格式化处理。
E: Backup complete, initializing formatting.

C: 大守护者来了也不行？
E: Uh, not even the supreme guardian?

C: 「舞池摇滚氛围模式」…这谁加的？还用我的歌！
E: Rock 'n' Roll Dance Floor Atmosphere Mode... Who the heck added that!? And they used one of my songs!

C: 小心！前面有个大家伙。
E: Careful! There's a big guy up ahead.

C: 而你带领这群罪犯冲入禁区，伤害铁卫兄弟，劫持能源中枢…事到如今仍然执迷不悟…你对得起朗道这个姓氏吗？
E: Yet here you are leading fugitives into the restricted zone, attacking my Silvermane comrades-in-arms, hijacking the energy hub... Are you really worthy of the Landau name?

C: 你以为我为什么要出现在这里？我们找到了驱散寒潮、封印裂界的办法，那可能是这个世界的最后一线生机！
E: Why do you think I've come here? We've found a way to dispel the Eternal Freeze, to seal the Fragmentum. It might be the only lifeline this world has left!

C: …我知道了。
E: ...I'm sure.

C: 问题机器人现在在哪儿？
E: Where are the faulty robots now?

C: 在佩拉的指挥下，犯罪分子被赶到现场的铁卫们押送至禁闭室，等待进一步处置……
E: The Silvermane Guards rushed to the scene, and under Pela's command, they led the criminals to the confinement room, where they'll be awaiting their punishment...

C: 解决这个箱子谜题能帮到你吗？
E: Will solving this box puzzle help you?

C: 把你遇到希莉儿的事转告给了邓恩……
E: You tell Dunn about your encounter with Cyrille...

C: 没问题。我这就派人去核对下铁卫名册。
E: No problem. I'll send someone to check the Silvermane Guard roster.

C: 总感觉…和之前的残影有些不太一样？
E: It feels like this echo is different from the others before.

C: …但她还是决定挑战这股远超人类想象的力量。大守护者可可利亚牺牲自己，驱散了笼罩贝洛伯格的阴霾。
E: ...and yet she decided to challenge its power — a power beyond human comprehension. Supreme Guardian Cocolia sacrificed herself to dispel the dark clouds enveloping this city.

C: 你让我看清了真相，陌生人。我不知道该如何报答这份恩情…如你所见，现在的我什么都做不了。
E: You've shown me the truth, stranger. I don't know how to repay this kindness... as you can see, I can't exactly do anything right now.

C: 如果我没记错…在你们此次旅行里，应该与那位年轻的大守护者结下了缘分吧？
E: If my memory still serves me well... You've connected with a young Supreme Guardian during this journey. Isn't that right?

C: 如果，这个小家伙的经历和我那批消失的快递一样——那么根据「寰宇佳品」的说法就是：「因物流受到反物质军团等不可抗力的干扰」。
E: If this little one's experience was the same as my missing package, then according to Cosmo Premium, it was "because the shipment was impacted by an unavoidable interference, such as the Antimatter Legion."

C: 它穿过桥洞消失在视野里…还没等到你转身追上去，就只听到惨烈的车祸事故声音。
E: It disappears from your sight after zooming underneath the bridge... You hear a terrifying crash before you can even turn to give chase.

C: 笔记可以一会儿再找。
E: We can look for them in a bit.

C: 笔记上还写着「联系方式」。
E: A contact number is listed in the notes.

C: 芦慧姑娘想要解雇您。
E: Ms. Luhui wants to fire you.

C: 通过一番调查比照，檀檀发现这个推理结果有些问题……
E: After investigation and comparison, Tantan feels there is a problem with this thinking...

C: 你在这东张西望干什么？
E: What are you doing here? And looking around like this?

C: 什么，对钱没有兴趣？我懂，钱无法让人获得真正的快乐。我最快乐的时候也是站在讲台上传道授业的时候。
E: What? Not interested in money? I understand. Money doesn't bring true happiness. I, too, am the happiest when standing behind a lectern and teaching students.

C: 今天还要来教希拉吗？
E: Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?

C: 「扫描联系方式获得失主『工造司匠人小聪』的实时位置。」
E: "Scan the code to get the real-time location of the owner, Cong from the Artisanship Commission."

C: 真的吗？看来你应该去联系这位「小聪」并告诉他这个好消息。
E: Really? Looks like you'd better get in touch with this Cong and tell him the good news.

C: 听帘卷西风。
E: I listen to the wind rolling up the curtains.

C: 「天对地，雨对风。大陆对长空，山花对海树，赤日对苍穹。」
E: "The sky matches with the earth, the rain matches with the wind. The great land matches with the vast sky, the flower matches with the mountain, the red sun matches with the blue sky."

C: 「我给你持明一生也未曾拥有的情感火花。」
E: "I offer you the spark of emotions that the Vidyadhara could never have."

C: 别别别，哎呀。这玩意儿，你偷偷扔了就成，我不用拿着它汇报工作。
E: Oh, please don't. Just throw them away when no one's looking. I don't need the posters to report on my work.

C: 一则寻物启事如同一张狗皮膏药突兀地粘在墙上。
E: A Lost and Found Notice has been slapped onto the wall, sticking out like a sore thumb.

C: 我对科员们一视同仁，温符瑞科员要是想自由追爱，我肯定不拦啊。只是这个「美丽狐仙聊天」实在可疑。
E: I treat all my staff members equally. If Wen Furui wants to pursue his romantic yearnings, I will not stop him. But this Foxian Beauty Chat thing is very suspicious.

C: 等等，你是星穹列车上的人。
E: Wait, you're one of the Astral Express people.

C: 事关空间站科员的日常安全……
E: It has to do with the safety of space station staff members' daily lives...

C: 「鹤运物流」为您服务，请问您是临时寄件、还是预约寄件？
E: Heron Express, at your service! Are you looking to deliver a parcel now, or book a parcel delivery?

C: 对啊，我们怎么可能诈骗，要诈骗肯定也是对面的狐人在诈骗。
E: That's right! How would we be defrauding people? If anyone, it has to be the foxian who's out there scamming people.

C: 不是我，那是黛青……
E: That's not me, that's Daiqing...

C: 那到底是谁拿着你手上的玉兆给我们回信息呢？
E: So who's the one holding the jade abacus in your hand, replying to our messages?

C: 你怎么背对着我们呀，黛青就在……
E: Why do you have your backs turned against us? Daiqing is over...

C: …我是不感兴趣啦，但是这位{F#姑娘}{M#兄弟}可是被诈骗了很多钱。
E: ...It doesn't concern me much, but this {F#lady}{M#man} has been scammed out of a huge amount of money.

C: 听艾丝妲的说法，先去之前见过经纪人的地方找找吧。
E: Based on what Asta said, I should start by searching around the spot where we first encountered the manager.

C: 龙尊的转世重回故地，分海引涛？光是听你说这么几句，就有种身临其境目眩神迷的感受了。
E: The reincarnated high elder has returned to his homeland, parted the sea, and stirred the waves? Just hearing you say these gives me a vivid image. It's as if I were there.

C: 你理解了老师的意思？
E: Have you figured out what your teacher meant?

C: 贝尼尼老师显然也是理解了这一点，才会留下那些图案的。
E: Bernini must have realized that. That is why he has left behind those drawings.

C: 请提交在鳞渊境找到的拓片
E: Please submit the rubbings found in Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 我，陶德。如假包换。
E: It's me, Todd. The one and only.

C: 我的老师贝尼尼学士也是其中一人。他本该像所有人一样毫无收获。但他别有奇遇。
E: My teacher, Scholar Bernini, was one of them. He should have gone home empty-handed just like everyone else. But somehow what he found was adventure.

C: 作为帮助过我的恩人，我不会亏待你的。
E: As someone who's shown me kindness before, I will not treat you poorly.

C: 啊…真是个讽刺的结果，不是吗？
E: Ahh... Isn't it ironic? Don't you think?

C: 你是景元将军和符玄大人的贵客，地衡司对你自然是很信任的。
E: You're the distinguished guest of General Jing Yuan and Diviner Fu Xuan. As such, you also have the full trust of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 有话快说，我赶时间。
E: Make it quick, I'm in a hurry.

C: （翻翻他的裤兜…）
E: (Let's check his pants pockets...)

C: 敲门
E: Knock the door

C: 稍、稍等一下！我再找找。
E: W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.

C: 他叫梁沐，是个来求药的短生种。
E: His name is Liangmu. He's a short-life species that requested an elixir.

C: 你们先去流云渡，我之后过来。
E: Go to Cloudford. I'll catch up with you later.

C: 我不能，我不能忘记他……我必须到那里。
E: I can't... I can't forget him... I must get there.

C: 你会帮我的吧？
E: You'll help me, right?

C: 我们换上云骑军的盔甲?
E: Can we wear the Cloud Knights' armor?

C: 白露治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
E: Bailu healed the Outworlder. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.

C: 很合适！
E: It's perfect!

C: 别让自己后悔就行。
E: What's done is done, no need for regrets.

C: 听说过星穹列车吗？
E: Have you heard of the Astral Express?

C: 谒见相关的事情已通传完毕，丹恒大人可有疑议？
E: I have delivered the missive about the meeting. Do you have any questions, Master Dan Heng?

C: 传言没错，你果然回来了…
E: The rumors are true — you really are back...

C: 我只是趁着主治医士不在，溜出来放松身体…你们快些去吧，我也该回去了。
E: I must return to my quarters, now — I merely took advantage of the healer's absence to slip out and relax a little... Be on your way.

C: 小姐，不可胡说！
E: Miss Bailu, please don't say things like that!

C: 这些飘动的影子被称为蜃影，是持明族在古海中结卵蜕生所褪去的前世记忆，旧日的回响。
E: These floating shadows are called Mirage Echoes. They are memories of past lives and echoes from the past that the Vidyadhara shed during their rebirth.

C: 全是你的错觉，那都是假的，这一切都是阴谋。
E: It's all just an illusion. It's all fake — just a conspiracy.

C: 这是我们的老大「星芋啵啵」，快把货拿出来给他老人家掌掌眼。
E: This is our boss — Startaro Bubble! Let's see this delivery, and make it snappy.

C: （感觉会的帕？不是不是…感觉会的吧？）
E: (I—It kinda works, right...?)

C: （小三月对这些小细节的处理总是特别符合逻辑，但是其他部分就……）
E: (When it comes to minor details, March can be very logical. As for the rest of the story...)

C: 这样啊…不过你们的寿命那么长，转行也不是难事吧。
E: I see... But your lives are so long — shouldn't career change be easy?

C: 看看影像三。
E: Watch footage three.

C: 因此，那扇门也是常年上锁的。据我所知，已经锁了几百年了，只在偶尔检查时才打开。
E: That's why that gate is almost always locked. As far as I know, it's been locked for centuries and only gets opened for occasional inspections.

C: 列车组…我怎么没听说过，该不会是其他仙舟上的大佬吧……
E: The Express Crew...? Never heard of you. I mean, they couldn't be higher-ups from one of the other Xianzhou ships... could they?

C: 完了，不会真遇到硬茬子了吧？嗯…好汉不吃眼前亏。
E: Dang it, am I in trouble? Ugh... Better to live and fight another day.

C: 是这本《渔公案》。书被撕掉了扉页，也不能放在店里卖了，我一直在想该怎么处理…既然你们问起来了，就送给你们吧。
E: The Angler Mystery. I was wondering what to do about it — I can't sell a book without a title page... But, since you asked about it, here — you can have it.

C: 收下这个吧，就当做我的赔礼了，可好吃了。
E: Here — a little something for the inconvenience. It's yummy.

C: 「书籍扉页」
E: Title page

C: 为了防止别人被这个可恶的「剧透仙人」伤害，罗刹撕下了被写下剧透内容的扉页……
E: So he paid for the book and tore off the title page to protect people from the spoiler...

C: 好了，时间不早了，咱们出发吧。
E: Alright, let's head out before it gets late.

C: 采翼小姐吗…我记得她。采翼可是当时数一数二的武备士，想和她同飞的人数不胜数。
E: Miss Caiyi? ...I remember her. She was an ace gunner — many people wanted to be her flight partner.

C: 我…我从没想过自己的梦想会让她如此为难。
E: I... I never thought my dream would put Mom in such a difficult situation.

C: 那可太有吸引力了…又苦又累钱又少，天天把脑袋绑在裤腰带上，一年到头也回不了几次罗浮……
E: You bet. Sure it's exhausting, dangerous, low-paid, hehe — plus you only get back to the Luofu a few times a year...

C: 可如果让我再选一次，我还是会成为斗舰飞行士……
E: ...but given the choice, I'd always pick this...

C: 接入机巧鸟
E: Connect the cycrane

C: 我知道你会回心转意的。谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I knew you'd come around. On the Xianzhou... you're the only person I can turn to for help.

C: 说谎。
E: Tell a lie.

C: 关于你的过去没什么可说的。你记得我，是因为你只见过我。在你诞生灵魂的时候，是我陪在你身旁。
E: There's nothing to say about your past. You only remember me because I was the one with you when your soul was born.

C: 因为你是为了容纳星核这件事而被制造出来的，你的身体经过星神力量的改造，即使接触星核也不会遭到污染。
E: Because you were created for that purpose — your body has been transformed by the power of an Aeon. You are immune to Stellaron contamination.

C: （这样一来，方向安全了。）
E: (With this, the path is secured.)

C: 所以，可以说你就是独一无二的星核「容器」。
E: Therefore, you could say that you are a one-of-a-kind Stellaron vessel.

C: 十王司要处死他的时候，他逃出了幽囚狱，但受了重伤，很多事情都忘记了。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission planned to execute him, but he managed to escape from The Shackling Prison. He was severely injured — he forgot nearly everything.

C: 不对。
E: Wrong.

C: （威慑云骑。）
E: (Threaten the Cloud Knights.)

C: 喝！你们一个也休想逃走。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: Hah! None of you will get away. Everyone, take them down!

C: 瓦尔特先生懂的很多。
E: You sure know a lot, Mr. Yang.

C: （小声）万一这次又被通缉…
E: Trying to avoid ending up on another wanted list...

C: 你知道我们？
E: You've heard of us?

C: 杨叔可不是你的起重机啦！
E: What? Does he look like a crane to you?

C: 关于飞行，你什么也记不起来。尊贵如你的前生，本无需亲手操舵。而今世身为无名客的你也未曾接触星槎。
E: The concept of flight holds no memories for you. In your previous life of nobility, you were spared the task of taking the helm. As an unnamed traveler in this life, you have not yet come into contact with a starskiff.

C: ——而那「棺中之物」，正是为此准备的吧。
E: ...and the purpose of the contents of your coffin.

C: 你的不死身绝不是这么简单就能被打发的东西。以人间的剑杀不死神使的血肉，这一点，「命运的奴隶」应该告诉过你吧？
E: The immortality that you possess is not something that can be dealt with so easily. I am sure Destiny's Slave already told you that the swords of mortals are incapable of killing someone with the flesh of an Emanator.

C: 很显然你蒙对了一些词汇，与谛听产生了交流。不过，这显然还不够。
E: Evidently, you guessed some vocabulary right and communicated with Diting. However, this is not enough.

C: 没错，就是这位姑娘。
E: That's right, she's the one.

C: 景元真是把你给教坏了…尽耍嘴皮子。
E: Hmph, Jing Yuan trained you alright...

C: 我…我看了您找到的那封信……
E: I... I read the letter...

C: 不渴望？也许是因为你对此已然绝望！
E: Do you not believe in the pursuit of eternal life? Perhaps it's because you've already given up on that aspiration!

C: 嗐，我寻摸着像这样的邪恶组织发展下线时，多半希望成员能在执法者队伍里渗透影响力，所以我穿着盔甲就来了。这叫充分洞察用户需求。
E: Hmph, I have my reasoning. Cults like this want to recruit people with influence in law and order — I wanted them to know I was a Cloud Knight! Always know your enemy...

C: 我是长乐天卫戍区的云骑，见到那个「绿芙蓉」一直鬼鬼祟祟的，还宣传一些离经叛道的思想，这才跟过来，准备卧底。
E: I'm a Cloud Knight from the Exalting Sanctum garrison. That Green Hibiscus has been sneaking around spreading heretical lies for a while now. That's why I'm here — to spy on him!

C: 你放肆！
E: ...How dare you!

C: 老大？你是说「魁首」对吧？会见到的，现在还不急。
E: The boss? You mean the master... You'll meet them, but for now there's no rush. All in good time.

C: 不用，我自己行动。
E: No need. I operate alone.

C: 你们怎么不走？
E: Why are you still here?

C: 哼…正是此人。若你们见到他，尽力避开便是。
E: Hmph... You guessed right. If you see him, don't engage.

C: 路不拾遗啊…去还给地火吧？
E: We can't just keep lost items... Should we return it to Wildfire?

C: 那么，接下来，本座会将你连接到大衍穷观阵上，而穷观阵会读取你的记忆，引导你回溯自己的过往。
E: Very well. I will soon connect you to the Matrix of Prescience Ultima, where the Matrix will read your memories and guide you back into your past.

C: 三月小姐，要不要抽一发最新推出的「仙舟美人图鉴」呢？这段时间抽到限定卡「罗浮俏郎君」的概率会大大提升哦～
E: Roll up, roll up! Miss March, would you like to take a look at the latest edition of the Xianzhou Beauty Index? The chance of drawing a Luofu Playboy card is suuuuper high right now~

C: 你可别误会啊，这里面绝不存在任何巧取豪夺，完全是两位绅士之间梦想的承继。
E: And before you get the wrong idea, there was ZERO trickery involved — this was a cherished agreement between gentlemen.

C: 欢迎来到桑博宾馆，三月小姐。
E: Welcome to the Sampo Hotel, Miss March.

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 在翁瓦克的战斗中，你深受重创。为了保护你，义侠之首将你封入寒冰中，待你自行复原。
E: You were severely wounded during the battle for Vonwacq. The leader of the Rangers encased you in ice to protect you, and waited for you to recover.

C: （工造司这么大，她会去哪儿呢？）
E: (The Artisanship Commission is so big. Where could she be?)

C: 不知为何，面对你，我好像能敞开心扉……
E: For some reason, I feel like I can open up to you...

C: 云璃没有偷剑，我有十足把握。
E: I'm a hundred percent sure Yunli didn't steal the sword.

C: 哎，云璃啊云璃……
E: Oh, Yunli...

C: 不行，他已经完全被魔剑的力量诱惑了。
E: Oh, no. He's completely captivated by the power of that cursed sword.

C: 我以骑士精神宣誓，在纯美的女神伊德莉拉的见证下，我将成为孤云阁下的决斗代理人。
E: I swear on the spirit of chivalry, in front of Idrila the Beauty, that I will represent Master Guyun in this duel.

C: 在下虽略懂剑术，但在如此庄严的决斗中，骑士理应使用日夜锤炼的技艺前来应战。
E: While I know a thing or two about swordplay, in a proper duel like this, a knight should rely on the skills he's honed day and night.

C: 啧。
E: Tsk.

C: 这是花火大人留下的「相互保证毁灭」按钮，一旦按下，花火大人会立刻和整个匹诺康尼一起灰飞烟灭！
E: That's the "Mutually Assured Destruction" button that Miss Sparkle installed. Once pushed, Miss Sparkle and the entirety of Penacony will instantaneously go up in smoke!

C: 我的确是这么考虑的。即便主观不存在规律，行为也一定会留下某种共性——记忆是不会说谎的，它或许比那女孩本人更了解她的本质。
E: That's exactly what I plan on doing. Even if it's just subjective, there must be an overall principle behind the behavior — memories cannot lie, and hers may just understand more about her than she does herself.

C: 真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有您这样明察秋毫的神探，三位嫌疑人一定会蒙受不白之冤！
E: What a tragedy. If it weren't for your incisive detective work, the three suspects would all be facing grave injustice!

C: 警长阁下，凶手是阿佑，证据是板凳，这个对吗？
E: Sheriff, the murderer is Wright. The evidence is the stool, right?

C: 天啊！副警长阁下，难道他真是天才？如此难以想象的谜底，竟能被他轻易揭开！
E: Goodness me! Deputy sheriff, is he really a genius? How could such an unfathomable mystery be solved so easily by him!

C: 嗯，是什么呢…答案是「虫子」，对吗？
E: Mmm, what is it then... My answer is "bugs." Is that right?

C: 喔，没声音了？这家伙可算安静了。姐，咱们赶紧打开盖子，把那姑娘揪出来吧……
E: Huh, no voices? This guy's pretty quiet. Miss, let's hurry up, flip open the lid and find the girl...

C: 怎么了，「侦探助手」先生？你好像很心急的样子。
E: Huh, Mr. Assistant Detective? You seem to be getting anxious?

C: 没有其他问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 还有什么事吗，黑天鹅警探？
E: Anything else, Detective Black Swan?

C: 虽说你们是太卜的客人，但她本人最讨厌不守规制，问东问西的人…可千万别触她的霉头。
E: You may be the master diviner's guests, but she hates people who don't abide by rules and regulations, oh — and people who ask too many questions, not to mention... *sigh* Please don't push her buttons.

C: 快到穷观阵的阵心了，太卜应该就在那边等着我们。
E: We're almost at the Matrix of Prescience core. The master diviner should be waiting.

C: 咱们回阵心，向太卜复命吧。
E: Let's go back to the core and report to the master diviner.

C: 如何？
E: Well?

C: 符卿呀符卿，我还有一支奇兵没用呢。
E: Please, Lady Fu, I still have forces to deploy.

C: 这位师傅的性格好单纯……
E: This guy is pretty deluded for a "master..."

C: 可惜，差一点点就能成了……问题到底出在哪里呢？
E: Agh, we were so close... What went wrong?

C: …老夫有个想法，小娃儿要不去那里看看？
E: ...Young friends, I have a suggestion. Why don't we head that way?

C: 我突然想起还有别的事…
E: I suddenly remember I have some other matters to attend to...

C: 哈哈，快看呀，这短生种居然妄想加入咱们！
E: Haha, look, this short-lifer wants to join us!

C: 好的好的，老大，咱们验货。你一包，我一包。
E: I... guess it couldn't hurt. Good idea, Boss! One pack for you, one for me.

C: 这地方太危险了，{NICKNAME}，咱们回长乐天吧。
E: This place is too dangerous, {NICKNAME}. Let's head back to Exalting Sanctum.

C: 你的脸色变得好可怕…
E: You had a scary look on your face just now...

C: 真的没法治好「天缺者」吗？
E: Is there really no way to cure Incomplete Ones?

C: 我以丹鼎司传授的学识，冥思苦想过这个问题。但内心只有一个答案。并无差别。
E: I've given this question much thought, using all the knowledge I've learned from the Alchemy Commission to answer it. But, deep down, I know there is only one correct answer: There is no difference.

C: 现在你明白，为什么孽物中不会诞生「天缺者」了吧？
E: Now you know why there are no Incomplete Ones among the abominations...

C: 这是她在戏弄你？还是说，她的药在你身上失手了？我建议你之后来复查一下，毕竟药王秘传的「仙药」，谁也说不好有什么「疗效」。
E: Could Dan Shu be playing a trick on you? Or is her medicine somehow not working as planned? My advice is to come back later for another examination... It's a Disciples of Sanctus Medicus prescription after all — who knows what "healing" effects it may have.

C: {NICKNAME}，好久不见。今天来神策府有何贵干？
E: {NICKNAME}, it's been a while. To what does the Seat of Divine Foresight owe the pleasure?

C: 植物，无法反抗…总是最大的输家！
E: Plants can't fight. This makes them the biggest loser!

C: 毕竟，让生命在适合它们的猎场中自由狩猎，这才符合自然法则啊，也符合仙舟的「巡猎」之道不是吗？
E: After all, isn't it in line with the laws of nature and the way of The Hunt on the Xianzhou to allow living creatures to hunt freely in an environment suitable for them?

C: 放生它们，将它们从那绝境和必死的命运里解放出来的您，贝娜小姐，将会攒下大大的功德！
E: Miss Benna, you'll gain a lot of merits by releasing them and freeing them from the crisis and their imminent demise!

C: 唉…笑得差不多了，走吧，咱们去水边吧。刚才和他们三位功德大师约好了，咱们要在这里搞一个小规模放生仪式。
E: Okay, that's enough laughter for today. Let's go to the waterfront. The three Grandmasters Meritus and I have just decided to hold a small release ritual there.

C: 这三个人之间的食物链问题解决了，以后再也不会被别人败坏掉功德了，确实是可喜可贺的事情…药师若是有知，想必会与我们同喜。
E: Now that the Three Benevolent One's food chain problem is solved, their merits won't be undermined by others in the future. This is indeed something worth celebrating... If Yaoshi knows about this, I'm sure they will share our joy.

C: 哎哎哎，可不兴出口伤人啊，冬妮娅小姐。当初你们三位可是对咱们的解决方案表示非常满意的呀。
E: Hey, hey, please get your facts right, Miss Tonya. Don't forget the three of you were very satisfied with the solution we offered.

C: {NICKNAME}，还有什么事情吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, is there anything else I can help you with?

C: 钟珊留给你的信里说了什么吗？
E: What did Zhongshan say in the letter?

C: 藿藿小姐，能让尾巴大爷出来合个影吗？
E: Miss Huohuo, can we have Mr. Tail come out for a photo?

C: 越是强大，越是会毫无顾忌地轻视自己的对手……恰恰相反，有时候弱小才是生存之道。
E: The stronger you are, the more you underestimate your enemies... sometimes being weak and humble is the way to survive.

C: 你可以信任我，我也想离开这里，我们俩之间算是互相利用。
E: You can trust me. I want to leave this place, too. We are useful to each other.

C: 而我接下来要放出的视频，就会证明仙舟真的是个充满灵异的地方。
E: This video is gonna prove that the Xianzhou is full of supernatural phenomena.

C: 说到这个，要是前面有什么风吹草动，咱俩可千万要绕开走。不说撞见鬼，万一遇见了判官，咱俩肯定会被赶出来，这一趟就算是白来了。
E: Speaking of which, we have to avoid running into the judges. If we get kicked out, it'll all be for nothing.

C: 站住，记得我们的交易吗？你要帮我逃离十王司判官的追捕。
E: Stop. Do you remember our deal? You need to help me evade capture.

C: （这是我自己说出来的话吗？）
E: (Did I really just say that...?)

C: 哎？我…我不行的。我不像两位大人那样有本事…我只会在战斗时躲在一边瑟瑟发抖。
E: Huh? I—I won't be able to do it! I'm not as powerful as you two... I always run and hide before a battle...

C: 虽然知道{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}是想安慰我…但，这话听着高兴不起来啊。
E: I know you're trying to comfort me... but that sounded a little weird.

C: 又也许，我想和十王司交换一个「放我离开」的承诺？
E: ...or maybe I just want to do a favor for the Ten-Lords Commission that will ensure I can leave here in one piece?

C: 桂乃芬小姐，请小心…靠法阵太近，可能会让人有些头晕目眩呢……
E: Miss Guinaifen, please be careful... You might feel dizzy if you get too close to the matrix...

C: 不打紧、不打紧，毕竟我也是第一次这么近观看十王司的除魔道具呢！
E: It's okay. It's okay. This is my first time seeing the Ten-Lords Commission's exorcising tools up close~

C: 我说过我会从你身体里离开的，{NICKNAME}。
E: I told you I'd leave your body, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我哪儿也感应不到他…他不在了。
E: I can't sense him anywhere... He's gone.

C: …谢谢你，藿藿已经好多了。现在得麻烦你去向素裳小姐解释解释，好让她放下心来。
E: ...Thank you. I'm much better now. Could you please let Miss Sushang know what happened...? She'll be relieved.

C: 呃，没事，就当我什么也没问。
E: Uh, never mind. Forget I said anything.

C: 守住谈狐林入口的幽府武弁本想阻止你离开，但是她们忍住了。
E: The Wraith Wardens who guard the Locufox Forest entrance wanted to prevent you from leaving, but they held themselves back.

C: 它的原料取自…取自忆域古老的材料。整体的风格潇洒而优雅，十分适合重要场合穿着。
E: It is made from... from ancient materials harvested from the Memory Zone. The overall style is chic, yet elegant — perfect for important occasions.

C: 这里有最新的一期《美梦华服》杂志，您可以在里面了解更多的信息。
E: This is the latest issue of Dream Couture. You can learn more about the fashion items in this magazine.

C: 柯柯娜小姐很不舒服。
E: Miss Cocona's not feeling well.

C: 您真是一位乐于助人的逐梦客——我见过许许多多、形形色色的客人，拥有您这种品质的人简直少之又少。
E: You're such a helpful Dreamchaser. I've met many guests from all walks of life — those with character comparable to yours are few and far between.

C: 一切都已经过去了…以前的我会陷入踌躇，举棋不定…但是现在，我想我终于找到解决一切的办法了。
E: They're all bygones... I used to be trapped in my hesitation, afraid to move forward... But now, I think I've finally found a way to resolve it all.

C: 我有一样东西遗失在了梦境酒店——是一张唱片。您可以帮我拿回来吗？您看上去…有股强大的气场，肯定不怕酒店里的那些诡谲异常。
E: I lost something at the hotel in the Dreamscape: It was a record. Could you help me bring it back? You look like... you have a mighty air about you — you definitely won't be intimidated by those strange incidents going on in the hotel.

C: 你家里应该也不富裕吧？那就少摆出一副清高的样子。你真的以为匹诺康尼是什么美梦？告诉你吧，它能烧得如此耀眼，靠的完全是我们这些「燃料」！
E: Your family's not wealthy, right? Then stop posing like you can afford to maintain so-called virtues. You really think Penacony is some beautiful dream? Let me tell you — the reason it burns so bright is because of "fuel" like us!

C: 你是谁？你和我长得很像，但我认不出你了。
E: Who are you? You look just like me, but I don't recognize you.

C: 我也想好了。
E: I've also made up my mind.

C: …{F#女士}{M#先生}？
E: ...{F#Miss}{M#Mister}?

C: 柯柯娜的目光和你撞在了一起，她的脸颊突然泛起一阵红晕。
E: Cocona's gaze and yours meet, and her face suddenly flushes red.

C: 哈哈…女士，小心脚下。
E: Haha... Miss, please watch your step.

C: 你说莱斯利？
E: You mean Lesley?

C: 住在这里的访客已经拖欠了接近两周的房款——看来家族对待赊账宾客的态度比你想象中更加宽容。
E: The guest staying in this room is already nearly two weeks behind on payments... It seems that The Family's attitude in treating overdue guests is more lenient than you imagined.

C: 说吧，我不会告诉别人的。
E: Tell me, I will not tell anyone.

C: （这个房间的住客因为花光了积蓄，被强制退房了。）
E: (The client in this room was forced to leave having exhausted all of their savings.)

C: （不知道这会不会对莱斯利造成影响…回梦境里看看吧。）
E: (I wonder if this will affect Lesley in any way... I should return to the dream and check on him.)

C: 这是他们自己的选择。
E: That is up to them to decide.

C: 请您告诉我实情吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Please, tell me the truth, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 当然，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。您不必给自己压力，毕竟这件事与您并无干系。
E: Of course, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. Please do not put any pressure on yourself, as this matter has nothing to do with you, after all.

C: 他把自己封锁在只有「莱斯利•迪恩」的世界里，不去面对真正的痛苦源头。
E: He locked himself in a world of only "Lesley Dean." He could not bring himself to face the true source of his suffering.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。还有其他人在等着我们。
E: Let's go, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. There are others awaiting us.

C: 的确如此，可怜又可憎。
E: You're right. It's pitiful and loathsome.

C: …迪恩先生？您…您怎么还在？
E: ...Mr. Dean? Why... Why are you still here?

C: …列车长帕姆。
E: ...Pom-Pom, Conductor of the Astral Express.

C: 很有视觉冲击力的涂装，不愧是您！如果您之后对空艇的名称与涂装不满意，可以跟我说，我会帮您进行更换的。
E: A visually striking coat of paint. It's got your style written all over it! If you're dissatisfied with the airship's name and paint in the future, you can tell me, and I'll help you change them.

C: 比如说…这里……
E: Like... here...

C: 船长大人，又见面了。我这次回家招了些人过来，请您检阅！
E: Captain, we meet again. I've recruited some folks from my hometown. Please take a look!

C: 佩德罗将你带至空艇游人必经的长廊里。
E: Pedro leads you to the long gallery that every visitor must pass by.

C: 你将星穹列车即将持股匹诺康尼的事告诉了丹尼斯，并「稍微」夸大了一下事实——比如在「5%」的5后面加了个0……
E: You tell Dennis that the Astral Express is about to become a stakeholder of Penacony, and embellish the truth "a teensy-weensy bit" — such as adding a zero behind the five percent...

C: …好像不太押韵，但谁在乎呢？对技巧的过度崇拜不过是那些尘俗诗人的拘儒之论罢了，像你这样的鬼才绝不应被那些条条框框束缚……
E: ...Even if the last line lacks rhyme, it doesn't matter. Excessive worship of such rhymes is simply the mundane theories of those banal poets. A true ingenious poet like you should never be constrained by such rules...

C: 呃…好的？匹诺康尼集团的股东{F#女士}{M#先生}。现在能帮我办入住了吗？
E: Er... okay? {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Penacony Conglomerate shareholder, could you please check me in now?

C: 好消息！你选择的入住时机绝佳，现在正值旅游淡季，白日梦酒店有很多空置的房间。
E: Good news! You picked the perfect time to stay, because it's the off season and The Reverie Hotel has plenty of vacancies.

C: （…糟了，可不能在公司的人面前露怯！{NICKNAME}，别紧张，好好表现……）
E: (...Shoot! You can't let the IPC see any fear in you! {NICKNAME}, relax and put on a good show...)

C: 没想到呀，看来你是真感兴趣？
E: I didn't expect that. Are you really interested?

C: …咳，见笑了，翡翠女士。{NICKNAME}算是老熟人了，倒是不怕见外…砂金总监，下次再想吵架的话，也麻烦请你注意一下时间和场合。
E: ...*ahem* My humble apologies, Madam Jade. {NICKNAME} is an old friend of ours, so we acted a little too familiar before them... Director Aventurine, next time you want to pick a fight, please mind the time and the place.

C: 别拿{NICKNAME}开涮了，砂金。星穹列车现在和公司一样是匹诺康尼集团的持股人，我们可以算是地位平等的商业伙伴了。
E: Don't make fun of {NICKNAME}, Aventurine. The Astral Express is now a shareholder in the Penacony Conglomerate just like the IPC, so you can consider us equal partners.

C: 你用尽浑身解数，靠着双手和双脚拿走了整整*一打*苏乐达。
E: You do everything you can to get a whole dozen SoulGlads in your hands (and feet).

C: 谢谢你提醒了我，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thanks for reminding me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我也只去过这些地方。
E: These are the only places I've been to.

C: 我是宇宙凝缩而成的精华——
E: I'm the essence of the universe...

C: 你知道吗？曜青仙舟、朱明仙舟的使者就要回去了！
E: Didn't you know? The Xianzhou Yaoqing and the Xianzhou Zhuming messengers are heading back home!

C: 姬子小姐和瓦尔特先生也已经从「金伦加深域」返航，今日也将抵达罗浮仙舟。
E: Miss Himeko and Mr. Yang have already begun their return from the Calenga Abyss as well, and they'll be arriving at the Luofu today.

C: 啊，是这样吗？啊哈哈哈，不好意思。
E: Ah, over here? Ahaha, I'm sorry.

C: 除了各种各样的手稿之外，还有一封<color=#dbc291ff>星际和平公司设计师入职邀请函</color>，从日期上看，距离现在已经有<color=#dbc291ff>一百二十多年</color>了。
E: In addition to all the manuscripts lying about, there's an envelope titled <color=#dbc291ff>IPC Designer Invite</color>. Judging by the date, it's already <color=#dbc291ff>over <unbreak>120</unbreak> years old</color>.

C: 这样吧，我们先把手稿的事情放一边，去星槎海转换一下心情如何？
E: How about this? Let's put the manuscript aside and pick up the mood at Starskiff Haven, huh?

C: 先别想手稿了，换下心情如何？
E: Forget about the manuscript for now. Let's take a break!

C: {NICKNAME}，邀请函在你那儿吧？快拿出来给铖杰瞧瞧。
E: {NICKNAME}, do you have the invite? Quickly, let's show Chengjie.

C: 因为他从你身上看到了他自己。
E: Because he could see himself in you.

C: 不行，你也得一起去。
E: No, you have to come with us.

C: 我还是第一次知道，{NICKNAME}你有什么想问的吗？
E: This is the first time I've ever heard about this. {NICKNAME}, you got any questions there?

C: 那棵巨树也在下个瞬间变成了枯木死去。那段小树枝，在一瞬间获得旺盛的生命力，也在一瞬间将生命燃烧殆尽，实在是有些可怕。
E: That massive tree spent the next few seconds withering before dying off. And that small twig gained incredible vitality within seconds, and then exhausted all life within a few more seconds. It really was a terrifying phenomenon.

C: 培养舱难道也会一起生长吗？
E: Do the incubators grow alongside the starskiffs themselves?

C: 我现在只想马上回去，赶紧完成师傅的手稿。
E: I just want to go back right away and help complete my master's manuscript.

C: 你有问过工造司的其他师傅吗？
E: Have you consulted other craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission?

C: 工造司的学徒们都知道你的技术不行，我也确实看不上你的手艺。
E: Your incompetence is known to all apprentices at the Artisanship Commission, and I indeed consider you an unskillful craftsman.

C: 哎？我只是随随便便翻了翻文件，没想到也在太卜的预判之内吗？
E: Eh? Did you also predict that I would flip through the documents?

C: 接下来，只等雪衣判官将逝者接引出来了。
E: Next, we'll wait for judge Xueyi to summon the deceased out.

C: 别画画了，还是找个厂打工吧。
E: Painting isn't a good idea. You should find a factory job instead.

C: 还阳之事，可没那么简单。
E: Bringing someone back to the world of living is a complicated matter.

C: 喂，你这家伙——
E: Hey, where do you think you're—

C: 我也想不明白。
E: I don't get the whole thing, either.
Beep... boop...

C: 这家伙应该就是源头了吧？干掉它，这片区域的裂界活动应该就能消停一阵了——
E: So, this guy is the source of it all, right? If we take him out, the Fragmentum activity in this area should subside for a while...

C: …你管这叫「正常」？要是在擂台上也就算了…不对，哪怕是赢了比赛以后，我也从来没见你喊过那么尴尬的台词……
E: ...You call that normal? I might have let it slide if it was in the cage... On second thought, no, that was cringe even by Fight Club standards.

C: 你还敢说自己没毛病？！
E: Oh boy...

C: 这里的人也不想，但他们没得选。
E: The people living here don't want to either, they've got no other choice.

C: 去找史瓦罗的事，你跟头儿打过招呼了？
E: Have you talked to Oleg about going to see Svarog?
*sigh*

C: 我现在躺在病床上，但我一点都不害怕！因为有卢卡哥哥在，你的每一句鼓励我都记得清清楚楚。
E: I'm lying in bed sick right now, but as long as Mister Luka is around I won't be scared! I remember everything you said to encourage me.

C: 我有点担心，自然风光相关的梦泡会不会有些过时…不过无妨，我们去看看吧。
E: I'm a bit worried that nature-themed dream bubbles might be outdated... but hey, let's go check it out anyway.

C: 让各位久等了。演武仪典在即，星槎海又是罗浮的交通枢纽，我光是从人群中找人就花了不少时间。
E: Sorry for the delay. With the upcoming Wardance, and the Starskiff Haven being so busy, things are a little hectic.

C: 在下路君，巡防卫队的值守武官。多谢彦卿骁卫出手相助。事起仓促，绝非这位队长的过错。
E: I'm Lujun, an officer of the patrol defense squad. Thank you for your help, Lieutenant Yanqing. The situation unfolded rapidly, and it shouldn't be held against the captain.

C: 彦卿。
E: Yanqing.

C: 灵砂司鼎公务繁忙……
E: Cauldron Master Lingsha is busy with official business...

C: 灵砂姐姐还是一如既往，教人打白工也说的这么冠冕堂皇……
E: Lingsha, as always, you're still an expert in making unpaid work sound so noble and grand...

C: 东道主要派出技艺高超的战士守擂，应对四方挑战，以彰显仙舟武德之盛。当老朽听你提及星穹列车会前来观礼，本以为本次守擂之人会是罗浮龙尊……
E: The host will dispatch a skilled warrior to take on challengers from all over the cosmos, showcasing the excellent martial arts of the Xianzhou Luofu. When you mentioned that the Astral Express would be attending the ceremony, I thought the high elder of the Luofu would be the ringmaster...

C: 那就是认输咯？好啊，既然你连教人的自信都没有，不如我来替你守罗浮的擂台如何？
E: So, you're admitting your defeat, huh? If you're not even confident to teach, why don't you let me be the ringmaster instead?

C: 这可不是一条简单的路啊。
E: It won't be a walk in the park, that's for sure.

C: 是啊，三十年前，你是曜青「青丘军」的先锋，我是罗浮「垂虹卫」的飞行士。没想到，再次见面你已成了将军，而我已经放弃了飞翔…如此想来，真是恍如隔世啊。
E: Yes, back then, you were the vanguard at the Yaoqing's Verdant Knights, and I was a pilot of the Luofu's Rainbowfall Fleet. Who would have thought that upon meeting again, you'd be a general, and I'd have given up flying... Really does feel like a lifetime ago.

C: 这便是「断狱轮钥」，负责把守重刑犯的最终门关。
E: That was the Nether Key — the key that keeps felons locked away behind the ultimate gate.

C: …说实话，我也不知该怎么办。毕竟我是第一天教人。那就拜托三月小姐规规矩矩，不许叫苦，也不准逃课。
E: ...Honestly, I'm not sure what I'll do either, because I've never been a teacher before. So, Miss March, please behave and don't skip classes or complain.

C: 彦卿在司辰宫后花园处找了个僻静的地方，我们会在那儿一起为你上第一堂课。
E: I've found a quiet spot in the back garden of the Palace of Astrum for our first lesson together.

C: 可惜时间仓促，来不及请匠人定制。我只好尽力选了模样好看，配重又适合初学者的武器。若是三月小姐不嫌弃，那就太好了。
E: Unfortunately, I didn't have time to ask the craftsman to customize the swords for you, but I did my best to choose ones that look nice and are suitable for a beginner. I hope you like them, Miss March.

C: 谢谢彦卿师父！
E: Thank you, Master Yanqing!

C: 确实误会你了。你不是孱弱文人，你是无耻文人。
E: Looks like I did get you all wrong. You're not a feeble scholar, but a sinister and despicable one.

C: 唉，明白了，朱明的孩子也很苦。
E: I see. It's not easy for kids on the Zhuming either.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 你说的不错，也许我确实和星核猎手有所关联……
E: You know what? Maybe I do have a connection with Stellaron Hunters...

C: 此次前来是为探视其关押状况，为后续交接押送事宜预先准备。判官大人想必已收到了知会。
E: We're here to inspect the conditions of his imprisonment and make preparations for the handover and transportation. I assume you've been briefed, your honor.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。都是因为我的缘故，才会将你们卷入仙舟一系列事件中。你本不应该看到幽囚狱里的景色…真是抱歉。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. It's all my fault that you were involved in the Xianzhou's problems. You shouldn't have to see the inside of The Shackling Prison... I'm so sorry.

C: 判官没来，我到处逛逛。
E: Since the judge isn't here yet, I'll just wander around a bit.

C: 请判官为我们引路。
E: Please lead the way, your honor.

C: 真好啊。可惜寒鸦公务繁忙，不能观赏赛事…以我如今的样貌，去了只怕也会吓到旁人。
E: Sounds amazing. It's a shame I'm too busy to attend... but even if I could, I'd probably just scare people off with my current appearance.

C: 那么，大人，我们该走了。
E: Well then, my Lord, we should leave now.

C: 寒鸦！吾吾吾…回来了！
E: Hanya! I—I—I'm back!

C: 专心战斗吧。
E: Just focus on the fight.

C: 你不说话看起来更棒。
E: You look better when you're silent.

C: 这种藏形匿影的技法…和曜青「天风君」座下持明掌握的「风幔」颇为相似。你们有眉目吗？
E: Their hiding technique... it's pretty similar to the Wind Mantle technique used by the Vidyadhara serving Caelorum Venti on the Yaoqing. What do you think?

C: 暂无消息！我们正在尽快恢复与幽囚狱的联系！
E: No news at the moment! We're trying to restore contact with The Shackling Prison as soon as possible!

C: 判官多礼了。云骑战阵折冲，幽府威罚罪囚，云骑与幽府同为仙舟的一体两面。能为十王司效劳，也是我的荣幸。
E: There is no need to apologize. We Cloud Knights fight on the battlefield, while you judges punish the criminals. We are two sides of the same Xianzhou Luofu, and it is my honor to serve the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 即便服下压制狼毒恐惧的丹药，但仍然有无数云骑在他的凶残气势之下，恐慌到连抬手反抗都无有余力…若不是前任剑首以霜刃封住呼雷行动，胜负仍未可知。
E: Even with medicinal pellets that suppressed the fear caused by his Lupitoxin, countless Cloud Knights succumbed to panic in the face of his murderous aura. They couldn't even raise a hand in resistance... If the former Sword Champion hadn't immobilized Hoolay with her Frost Blade, the outcome of that fateful battle could have been very different.

C: 我想听听他们作何解释。
E: I'd like to hear their explanations.

C: （反击，指出他们在逃亡）
E: (Refute him by pointing out that they are the runaways)

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>我是曜青使节椒丘。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I'm Jiaoqiu, envoy of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.</color>

C: 你敏锐地感到不远处有一道目光正死死盯着你。
E: You can sense someone staring at you from not far away.

C: （拒绝，让他知道你不会开口）
E: (Refuse, letting him know you won't talk)

C: 「吞噬」，这是生命得以延续、茁壮的真谛。它凝聚着被我们吞噬的猎物的生命精华，也让我们变得越发强壮！
E: Devouring is the true essence of life, allowing us to endure and thrive. It gathers the life essence of all the prey we consume, making us stronger and stronger!

C: 眼下是个好机会，就趁现在试着学学如何评估你的对手吧，就用这个大厅里的人练练手。知己知彼，才能百战不殆。
E: Now is a perfect opportunity to learn how to evaluate your opponents. Let's use the people here in the contestants' hall to practice. If you know yourself and know your enemy, you will not lose in a hundred battles.

C: 好像…没有什么特别的感受？
E: I don't... really feel anything special?

C: 哇哦——！这就是从观众席望过去的感觉……
E: Wow! So this is what it's like from the spectator seats?

C: 只剩下天空中的竞锋舰了？
E: So his only option is the Skysplitter?

C: 你们以为自己还能像千年前那样到处侵略和屠戮？
E: You think you can still pillage and murder freely as you did a thousand years before?

C: 别怨我啊，这可是你家将军的主意。他得知你放弃守擂，加入我的猎狼队伍，便要我对你保密。也许是怕你急性子坏事吧。
E: Don't blame me, this was your general's idea. When he learned that you gave up being the ringmaster to join my Wolf Hunt team, he insisted that I hide the plan from you. Perhaps he thought your impatience would mess things up.

C: …休想用花言巧语蒙蔽我，没有什么动物会用如此残忍的方式摧毁一个世界。你们是这片银河里最可憎的毒瘤。
E: Don't think you can deceive me with some poetic speech! There is no animal alive that would destroy a world so brutally. You are the foulest poison this cosmos has ever seen.

C: 我猜你信守了自己的诺言。
E: I imagine you kept your promise.

C: 你呢，萨兰？
E: What about you, Saran?

C: 快、快救我！把我从墙上放下来！
E: Quick, get me down from this wall!

C: 椒丘，你的眼睛…看不见了，是吗？
E: Jiaoqiu, your eyes... You can't see anymore, can you?

C: 宇宙浩瀚，一定有人能治好你的双眼，我会找到他。而在那之前……
E: In this vast universe, there's bound to be someone who can heal your eyes. I'll find them. But until then...

C: 这群信徒经常会把初来乍到的逐梦客骗进酒吧，灌个酩酊大醉，撺掇他们当众出丑。算是一种很低俗的娱乐方式。
E: These believers will lure dream-seeking newcomers into the bar and egg them on to commit embarrassing acts in public. It's a form of low-brow entertainment.

C: 原来是…啊？？？
E: I see... Whaaaa???

C: 这有啥好羡慕的？她个假皇帝册封的假贵族，又没有封地，哈哈哈。
E: What's there to be jealous about? It's a fake knight title given by a fake Emperor, and even has no fiefdom that comes with it, hahaha.

C: 即使对你这样的人来说，那些记忆也太残酷了。逃往匹诺康尼之后，你请「家族」将它们封存了起来。
E: Those memories were too cruel, even for someone like you. After fleeing to Penacony, you asked The Family to seal them off.

C: 先冷静一下…
E: Calm down first...

C: 蒂索克二世点点头。她认同你的决定，因为她信任你，胜过信任这世上的任何人。
E: Tizocic II nods her head. She agrees with your decision, because she trusts you, far more than anyone else in this world.

C: 休要狡辩！侍卫，拖下去！
E: Don't deny it! Retainers, take him away!

C: 所以你不能是发善心赈灾——你必须是趁国之危，以赈灾之名，准备拥兵自重，占山为王。这就是为什么朕必须杀你。你明白吗？
E: Which is why you can't be soothing relief with kindness. You must be the one who declares himself king of the hill as he prepares his army while the kingdom is weakened. This is why I must kill you. Don't you get it?

C: 离开这里，逐梦客。不要再靠近查德威克博士一步——否则后果自负。
E: Go away, Dreamchaser. Don't ever go near Dr. Chadwick again, or you'll suffer the consequences.

C: 自生命之火于我的核心内被点燃以来，于这漫漫的星海旅途中，我极少遇见真正配得上「天才」二字的灵魂。
E: I've been traveling across the universe since the flame of life was ignited in my core. Throughout the long journey, I rarely met souls that truly deserved to be called a "genius."

C: 家族…鬼知道他们背地里在谋划什么。说吧，螺丝，你想怎么行动？
E: The Family... Who knows what kind of scheme they are brewing? Screwy, what do you think we should do?

C: 面对未知，你展露出的激情总是令我神往。
E: I admire your excitement in the face of uncertainties.

C: …很遗憾，两位。查德威克博士不便接待访客。
E: ...I'm sorry, gentlemen. Dr. Chadwick can't meet with visitors at the moment.

C: 是你！
E: It's you!

C: 据我所知，卡尔德隆•查德威克并非长生种。而我与他的最后一次通话……
E: To the best of my knowledge, Calderon Chadwick isn't a long-life species. And the last time I talked to him...

C: 难道是家族在忽悠我们？
E: Has The Family taken us for a ride?

C: 非常抱歉，查德威克博士。我不应如此唐突地提问，导致您不得不给出违心的答案。
E: I'm very sorry, Dr. Chadwick. I shouldn't have sprung that question on you and put you in a position to give an insincere answer.

C: 我经历的一切都是自己种出的结果…这么多年过去，我已经不需要再被人提醒这一点了。
E: I brought this upon myself... After all these years, I no longer have to be reminded of that.

C: 你知道吗，螺丝？我一直都在后悔。第一次遇见你的时候，我屏蔽了自己的心之声。
E: You know what, Screwllum? I've always regretted not listening to the voice inside me when we first met.

C: 奇迹！是奇迹！
E: A miracle! It's a miracle!

C: 那难道是…查德威克博士残留的意识体？
E: Could it be... the residual consciousness of Dr. Chadwick?

C: 拜托了，客人！请你帮忙去找找那孩子吧，啾！
E: Please, guest! Help look for that child, tweet!

C: 你不打算离开这里吗？
E: You don't intend to leave?

C: 他最优秀的四个学生被赋予了「折纸筑梦师」的称号。他们是建筑师，更是征服梦境的伟大逐梦客。
E: His four most outstanding students were coined the Origami Dreamweavers. They were architects, but first and foremost, they were great Dreamchasers who conquered the Dreamscape.

C: 哪来的照片？都说了我忙得很，我——
E: Where'd you get this photograph from? I already told you I'm very busy, I...

C: 计划还得从长计议…
E: We need to plan this out carefully...

C: 或许他也有难言之隐…
E: Maybe there's something he can't tell us...

C: 用人的时候多殷勤，呵呵…惊梦剧团都没你们翻脸快。
E: And you were so hospitable when you were using me, heh-heh... Even the Dreamjolt Troupe should learn from you when it comes to betrayal.

C: （巴罗想要保护奥尔拉，但…他的身体似乎快撑不住了。）
E: (Barlow wants to protect Orla, but... he's not going to last.)

C: 你没有阻止。小鸟轻盈地朝着光飞去，飞向其他小鸟的身边。在光芒中，你恍然看到鸟变为一位少年，他转头向你轻轻微笑。
E: You didn't intervene. The bird flies gracefully toward the light, joining the other birds in flight. Within the radiance, you witness the bird's transformation into a young man, who turns his head and offers you a gentle smile.

C: 喂，奥尔拉！
E: Hey, Orla!

C: 全场消费由我开拓者买单。
E: As a Trailblazer, I'll take care of all expenses.

C: 哼，不光大地兽，我对经手的各种商品都了如指掌。你问吧。
E: Hmph, not only the dromases, I also know my merchandise like the back of my hand. Ask away.

C: 慌张的外邦人连连道谢，消失在了人群尽头。
E: The flustered outlander expresses profuse appreciation and disappears into the crowd.

C: 抽签进城嘛。圣城已经收留了很多人，住房和其他资源都有限，尤其是在尼卡多利袭击之后。
E: To enter the city. The holy city has taken in many people, and accommodation and other resources are limited, especially after Nikador's attack.

C: 哈哈~如果有哪个外邦的吟游诗人听了说你的壮举，我相信他会为你专门写一首歌的。
E: Haha! If an outlander bard hears of your exploits, I reckon he will surely write a song regaling your feat.

C: 你的意思是…我明白了，有能力的人确实容易受到优待。
E: You mean... I see, those of ability are more easily favored.

C: 我不同意你的观点。
E: I disagree with your perspective.

C: 哎，必须要我同行吗？原本还打算和这位灰发英雄一块选购来着。
E: Hey, do I really need to come along? I was thinking of doing the procurement with this gray-haired hero.

C: 你撑住啊。领队已经在想办法了，你很快就会好起来的…别睡，别睡！
E: Hang in there. The leader is already trying to help. You'll get better real soon... Don't go to sleep. Don't sleep!

C: 妈妈，它们看上去好像不是很新鲜……
E: Mama, they don't look very fresh...

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，这个新鲜的给你吃。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, this fresh apple is for you.

C: 因此，今天我们遵循传统、召开公民法庭，由在场的诸位代表作出裁决。愿塔兰顿的公正与我们同在。
E: And so, as per the tradition that we uphold, we have opened up the public court, for everyone present to be the judge. May Talanton's justice be with us.

C: 公民们纷纷为这番开场词鼓起掌来，直到元老示意掌声止息。
E: The citizens' applause rise in a crescendo in response to this opening, till the Elder gestures for the clapping to cease.

C: 拉莱德，苏克提瑞斯有发言的权利。
E: Liluder, Soctires has the right to speak.

C: 我认为拉莱德说得有道理。无论是否出于善意，人总要为他做过的事负责。
E: I think Liluder speaks true. Regardless of motive, he has to be responsible for his actions.

C: 观众们回想起拉莱德平日的作为，纷纷开始骂他，直到元老厉声制止。
E: Recalling Liluder's usual behavior, the spectators start berating him, till the Elder calls for order.

C: 只要假以时日，外邦人创造的资源总会比消耗的多，公民的生活也会因此改善。难道你们不想看见那一天吗？
E: As long as time flows, the resources that outlanders create will one day exceed their consumption, and the citizens' lives will be improved. Do you all not wish to see such a day?

C: 哎哎，少在那假惺惺的，好像人家跟你多熟一样。说不定{F#她}{M#他}就是因为亲眼看见了才做出这个决定的呢。
E: Hey, hey, stop with your crocodile tears and pretending that you're so close. Maybe {F#she}{M#he} made this decision precisely because of what was witnessed.

C: {RUBY_B#泰坦詈语}Hinas{RUBY_E#}……
E: {RUBY_B#Titan curses}Hinas{RUBY_E#}...

C: 钟表把戏，启动…
E: Clockwork, activate...

C: 帕里斯…帕里斯……我居然不知道这个名字？你等等！
E: Paris... Paris... I've never heard that name? Wait!

C: 说到《金毯密传》，那身为王子的男主与敌邦公主的私奔故事可谓精彩绝伦……
E: Speaking of the Secret of the Golden Carpet, that story of a prince eloping with the princess of an enemy state is truly a masterpiece...

C: 很久以前，这个名字曾流传于奥赫玛的街头巷尾，人们说那是一个被黄金之茧庇佑的理想之城，在纷争正盛的年代，人人都向往那个地方。
E: A long time ago, this name spread through the streets and alleys of Okhema. People said that it was an ideal city that was protected by the Chrysalis of Gold. In the era of strife, people flocked to it.

C: 一会儿未见，泰坦眷属似乎比之前更加颓靡了，能从声音中到感受到她的活力正在飘逝……
E: In the time that you were gone, it seems that the Titankin has become even more desperate than before. You can sense from her voice that her vitality is slowly fading...

C: 这样呀…不好意思，欢迎你来到奥赫玛，客人。
E: I see... My apologies, welcome to Okhema, dear guest.

C: 呵呵，这里是奥赫玛，在刻法勒的庇护下，没什么好怕的。
E: Hah, here in the land of Okhema, we are under the protection of Kephale. There is nothing to fear here.

C: 小帕里斯啊，等你打赢了那个疯王，咱们也把他的嘴封上！
E: Young Paris. When you finally defeat the Mad King, let us seal his mouth shut, too!

C: 呵呵，你的所爱之人是谁呢？不会就是送给你这宝贝的<color=#dbc291ff>俄诺涅女士</color>吧？
E: Hah, who is this one you love? Surely it is not <color=#dbc291ff>Lady Oenone</color>, the one that gifted you this treasure?

C: 等我做好出行的准备，一定会将此次恩情的报偿补还给您的！相信我！
E: Once my preparations are complete, I will make sure I repay you for this kindness! Believe me!

C: 恩人，你看到眷属姑娘往何处去了吗？
E: Savior. Did you see where the Titankin girl went?

C: …说的也是，在金宝座上的泰坦眼中，我们不过是微不足道的蝼蚁。
E: ...This is true. To the Titans on their golden thrones, we are no more than insignificant ants.

C: 别说了，姑娘！
E: That's enough, girl!

C: 是命运让我们将善意与怜悯赋予了错误的人！是命运让恶果降临在了戍卫长身上！
E: It is fate that caused us to show kindness and mercy to the wrong person! It was fate that brought this dire ending on the captain!

C: 帕里斯，我的英雄，你还有我。为何要将金丝赠予一个丑陋的邪物，而不是将它归还它的主人呢？
E: Paris, my hero. I am here for you. Why would you give the golden thread to a vile, evil creature like that and not return it to its original owner?

C: 谢谢你，俄诺涅，谢谢你救我……
E: Thank you, Oenone. Thank you for saving me...

C: 嗡嗡…嗡嗡……
E: Buzz... Buzz...

C: 到时候，我们就是黑潮里的一根稻草，只能任凭尼卡多利的军团把我们当作战利品放到盾牌和枪上。
E: By then, we'll just be a blade of grass among the black tide, merely a trophy for Nikador's legion to mount on their shields and spears.

C: 我还可以选择…
E: I still can make a choice...

C: 我不想失去自由！
E: I don't want to lose my freedom!

C: 请您向我们宣告神谕吧，我们愿为泰坦的预言赴汤蹈火。
E: Reveal to us the oracle, and we shall dedicate ourselves fully to the prophecies of the Titans.

C: 好的，我会一直在这里等你。
E: No problem. I will wait here for you.

C: （祭司们向神明祷告，耳畔是余音回响）
E: (The priests offer prayers to the gods, with echoes playing across their ears)

C: 那样的话，我们就再也吃不到跳跳糖，再也不能听娜塔莎姐姐讲故事……
E: If that happens, we'll never get to eat popping candies again, or listen to Natasha's stories...

C: 算了，你还是去影视乐园找钟表小子玩吧，当心别被异域迷因抓走。
E: Whatever. Just go hang out with Clockie at the theme park, and watch out for those alien memes trying to abduct you.

C: 翁法罗斯，明天见。
E: See you tomorrow, Amphoreus.

C: 《如我所书》今天又售罄了…
E: As I've Written is sold out again today...

C: 好啊，好。那就让他们听听，是个怎样的故事吧。
E: Alright, alright. Let's tell them what kind of story this really is.

C: 尽快，危险，呜呜！呜呜呜！
E: Quick. Danger. Wooo! Woooooo!

C: （这下应该就搞定了，回去转告那只着急的呜呜伯一声吧！）
E: This should do it. Go back and tell the worried Wubbaboo!

C: 呜呜，找回，带路，拜托呜呜！
E: Wooo. Back... way. Please! Wooo!

C: 所以你想来折腾我。
E: So you want to order me around.

C: 你就不怕我教坏她吗？
E: Aren't you worried I might lead her astray?

C: 嗯，我一直记着的。虽然我只是个仿生人，但大家一直对我怀抱着各种期待，所以我不能让大家失望。
E: Yes, I always remember. I am an android, but everyone has always had high expectations for me. I can't disappoint them.

C: 你不是说你不在乎？
E: Didn't you say that you don't care?

C: 跟她聊天真的很开心，感觉内心的躁动都被她的声音抚平了。
E: It's really fun to chat with her, and I can feel her calm voice soothing my restless soul.

C: 这些机器人之前还好好的，不知道为什么就突然坏了。
E: Those robots were fine just before, but suddenly they've all broken down.

C: 为什么不拆，你不是工程师吗？
E: Why aren't you taking them apart? Aren't you the engineer?

C: 什么猜想？
E: What hypothesis?

C: 是{NICKNAME}吗？
E: Is it {NICKNAME}?

C: 但我早就把机器人修好了，那批新买的机器人只能留着备用。
E: But I fixed the robots already, so this new batch is now our backup.

C: 总之现在是全部修好了，大家可以放心吃饭了！我也得去休息会儿，哎哟最近真是累死我了！
E: Anyways, it's all fixed, and everyone can eat on time! I need to catch some rest myself. It's been pretty exhausting lately!

C: 这个新品效果真的太棒了！
E: This new product has such awesome effects!

C: （将知道的事情告诉他）
E: (Tell him what you found.)

C: 哎，你看我这样子就知道了——全身上下写满了「非常不幸」四个字。
E: Oh, just look at me. I've got "unlucky" written all over me.

C: （看来不是这个人，再找找看吧。）
E: (Doesn't seem to be the right person. Let's keep looking.)

C: （总感觉另有隐情，但是也问不出更多的了。回去告诉阿德勒吧。）
E: (I feel there's something deeper here, but I can't get any more answers. Let's return to Adler.)

C: 好吧，我还是不狡辩了。我承认，最开始做这个研究是真正为了科学！但是后来我发现，很多人都爱看我写的「怪谈笔记」，我就被虚荣心打败了……
E: Okay, fine, I admit! Yes, initially this was about science! But then I realized so many people loved reading my ghost story compilation, and I yielded to my desire for attention...

C: 棕色有一种温暖的感觉…诶打住打住！不是想问你喜欢哪个，我是想知道哪个发色更好看！
E: Brown has a warm feeling to it... Wait! I'm not asking which color you like. I want to know which hair color looks better!

C: 她说…
E: She said...

C: 这位「垃圾大王」我也有所耳闻，听说是一位神秘的拾荒者。没人知道他的真实身份，可能是我一直待在垃圾桶边，引起了他的注意吧？
E: I've heard things about this "Garbage King." They say he's a mysterious scavenger and nobody knows who he really is. Maybe I've been hanging around this trashcan for so long that I caught his attention.

C: 走，咱们去看看那箱东西！
E: Come on, let's take a look at that box!

C: 那个什么计划，我忘了…
E: What plan was that, I forgot...

C: …雪原？那可是禁地啊，普通人擅自出城可是重罪一桩……
E: ... Snow Plains? That place is forbidden, and it's a serious crime for ordinary people to leave the city without authorization...

C: 当然！我这就帮您挑上一株……
E: Sure! One moment, please.

C: 嗐，我怎么会生他的气呢……
E: Of course not...

C: 给你这个，这是我关于「大宇宙时间隧道」这一科学发现的论文。这篇划时代的论文本该被大守护者读到，应用于科研建设，为万世开太平。
E: Check out this paper of mine on the theory about the big universe time tunnel. This groundbreaking research should have been studied by the Supreme Guardian and applied to the research and development of our world.

C: 都说了你该自己去…
E: Told you that you should've gone yourself...

C: 哎哟，别磨蹭了！你每在这儿多待一秒，他们怀疑你作弊的可能性就大一分……
E: C'mon, quit dawdling! Every second you stay here, the more they'll suspect you of cheating...

C: 好了，不要打断我。听好了，第二题的题面是……
E: Okay, don't interrupt me. Listen up: The second question is...

C: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。
E: You're so smart. With a little training, you'll definitely be able to answer these questions and then turn in that paper to me.

C: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
E: Until we meet again, youngster.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，你竟然答对了！
E: Hahaha, that's correct!

C: 那我公务在身，就先行告退了。年轻人，我们有缘再见。
E: I've got some duties to carry out, so I'll bid my farewell now. Youngster, I hope we are destined to meet again.

C: 唉…碰上死缠烂打的家伙可真让人头疼。行吧，就通融你一次——前提是你真能答对。
E: This guy's a real stalker and a pain in the behind. Alright then, I'll bend the rules for you just this once — but you have to guess it right, okay?

C: 「一样多」。
E: "The same."

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 谢谢你，小女子距离她的灵魂更近了。收下这些谢礼吧。
E: Thank you! I feel a little bit closer to her soul, now. Please, take this as a thank-you.

C: 小女子听说塔米拉小姐今天要去机械屋逛逛，拜托你去机械屋看看她要做什么吧~谢谢你啦~
E: I heard that she's going to the workshop today. Please, can you go to the workshop and observe what she's up to? Thank you so much~

C: 对对对，就是志愿者团体！
E: Yes, a volunteer group!

C: …开个玩笑。加入「会社」与否是你的自由——我们不会逼迫你的。
E: ...I'm joking. You're free to join the Society or not. We won't force you.

C: （去找艾格尼斯问问看吧……）
E: (I'll ask Agnes about it...)

C: 那就先这样？
E: So, this is it?

C: 「会社」不该帮人逃避工作吗？
E: Isn't the Society all about helping people avoid work?

C: 他是个好儿子。
E: He's a good son.

C: 爸爸妈妈…你们是不是不要我了…？
E: Don't Mom and Dad... want me anymore...?

C: 这机器里留着我最珍贵的宝贝，能修好可真是太好了……
E: My most precious treasure is kept inside this machine. Thank goodness it's fixed...

C: 其实今天是我的生日！娜塔莎姐姐想为我拍张照，然后再寄给爸爸妈妈，让他们看看我的变化！
E: It's actually my birthday today! Miss Natasha wants to take a photo of me and mail it to my Mom and Dad, so they can see how much I've grown!

C: 您说得对啊，我不能再这样下去了——这要让老爹知道了，那我还有什么脸面对他……
E: You are right. I can't continue like this anymore — If my Dad ever finds out, I would never be able to face him again.

C: 这东西…是叫「迷彩油漆」吗？哈哈，有点意思……
E: Is this thing called... Camo Paint? Haha, interesting...

C: 还是把漂流瓶交给跃渊吧。
E: I should hand the drift bottle over to Yueyuan.

C: 还是把漂流瓶交给跃渊吧。
E: I should hand the drift bottle over to Yueyuan.

C: 你会有不老的容颜。
E: You shall forever look young.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 哎呀，这倒是我的不是了。你说得对，相识一场，我们就不该谈这些庸俗的字眼。
E: Ah, my bad! I apologize sincerely for my misbehavior! You're right. We're good friends, and we shouldn't let material interests ruin that.

C: 嘻…嘿！嘿嘿！
E: Hehe... Heh! Heh, heh!

C: 但你正要张嘴，却看到了杜老板的头顶与脑后，几处被发丝横向平躺以夹子并拢的空白刺痛了你的双眼。
E: However, before you can say anything, you are taken aback by the sight of a few areas on Boss Du's head that are already showing signs of balding.

C: 如果这是一个有开锁器和盗窃技能树的开放世界游戏，也许你可以调查一下里面是不是藏着一些利衡币。
E: If this was an open-world game with lockpicks and a thief's ability tree, you might be able to reveal if there was any Balance Coins stashed within.

C: 你查看着躺椅上倒扣的书卷，发现那是一本《如何正确使用浴场》的玩意儿。在泡澡时看关于泡澡的书——这大概就是所谓的理论与实践完美结合。
E: You examine the book face-down on the lounger — it's a book titled How to Use a Bath Correctly. Reading a book about baths while in a bath... this has got to the apparent perfect fusion between theory and reality.

C: 你躺在躺椅上，仰望着不远处的巨幅壁画：灿烂的黎明、流动的星云，还有缥缈的…好吧，你不得不承认画家的笔触过于抽象，使你分辨不出这究竟画了什么。
E: You lie back on the lounger, gazing at the giant mural not far in the distance: A splendid dawn, a nebula stream, and the ethereal... All right, you have to admit the painter's brushwork is too abstract, and you can't figure out what was painted.

C: 你被砸晕了…但物件能有什么坏心思呢？
E: You have been knocked out... but what bad intentions could an object possibly harbor?

C: 白厄的试炼仍未结束…也不知道他情况如何了。
E: Phainon's trial is not over yet... I wonder how he is getting on?

C: 他们的决心固然值得赞许，但泰坦们究竟是何方神圣？它们的力量来自哪里？若要开拓翁法罗斯，这些问题的答案必须写进智库才行。
E: Their determination is admirable, but just what are these Titans? Where does their power come from? If Amphoreus is to be trailblazed, these questions must be answered and entered into the data bank.

C: 尼卡多利，纷争之泰坦，曾经的荣耀象征，如今沦落成「疯王」——哪怕拖着残破的身躯，它也要继续同黑潮抗争，严重性可见一斑。
E: The Strife Titan Nikador. They were once a symbol of glory and now they have fallen to become the "Mad King" — They continue to fight back against the black tide though their body is broken and battered. That's how you can tell how serious this disaster is.

C: 你让时空共鸣交融，海陆敬从边界，昼夜踏上轮回。
E: You let space and time resonate, ocean and land respect their borders, and night and day alternate.

C: 「天空在思量，海洋在狂放。」
E: "The sky contemplates while the ocean rages."

C: 尼卡多利的巨剑
E: Nikador's Greatsword

C: 刻法勒的俯身
E: Kephale's Lean

C: 哈——我知道该怎么和你搭上话了。咱们都打过架了，就互换些心得如何？
E: Hah. I know how to relate to you now. As we have fought before, how about we share some of our insights?

C: 没错，白厄阁下，一切都在消逝。我之所以来到此处，正是为了「相较」。
E: That's right, Lord Phainon. Everything is beginning to fade away. I am here precisely because I wish to "compare."

C: （查看结果）
E: (View Result)

C: …快走吧，这里很危险。
E: Quickly now, this place is dangerous.

C: …好处？做学术的事，怎么能叫好处呢？其中蕴藏着生命的奥秘，形而上的哲思，数代学者的心血，是纯粹理性的结晶！
E: What's so great? How could academic work be called "great"? Within it lies the mystery of life, the metaphysical essence, the painstaking efforts of generations of scholars — a crystallization of pure reason!

C: 我只是不愿做……
E: I just don't want to be...

C: 从小我就羡慕你的黄金裔身份，一直踩着你的脚印前进…你怎么能倒在这里！
E: I've spent my whole life chasing your shadow, looking up to your golden blood... Don't you dare give up now!

C: …我最喜欢迷迷了！
E: ...I like Mem the most!

C: o((='ω´= )っ「这症状是非常典型的…『万帷网』逛多了欧」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "This is the typical symptom of... excessive World Wound Web browsing." )∋

C: 突然我好想进去冲撞…
E: I suddenly feel the urge to charge straight in...

C: 嘟嘟。消息发送失败的提示音让你有些沮丧。很遗憾，万帷网是奥赫玛区域限定。
E: Beep beep. The message fails to send, and you feel a pang of frustration. Unfortunately, the World Wound Web is region-locked to Okhema.

C: ——奥赫玛早就陷入永夜了。让黎明机器继续燃烧的，正是诡计的神力。
E: ...Okhema has been in Evernight since centuries ago. Trickery's divine power is what has kept the Dawn Device burning.

C: 永夜之下，还有哪里是安全的？新世界吗？
E: Where can we find safety in the Evernight? The "New World"?

C: 「若门后的景色美好，却无人能够跨越，也不妨认定那就是美好之处。」
E: "If the scenery behind the door is charming yet none can step into it, then it may still be a place of beauty."

C: 艾格勒用这些装置记录着翁法罗斯的历史，可惜你不具备阅读它们的能力。
E: Aquila used these devices to record the history of Amphoreus, but unfortunately, you lack the ability to read them.

C: 你不知道这意味着什么，但显然不是一个好兆头。
E: You don't know what this means, but it's clearly not a good sign.

C: 再创世就要来了，你……
E: Era Nova is coming, you...

C: 传说在翁法罗斯的神话故事中，悬锋城的某位英雄从出生起就被母亲倒提着浸入冥河之中，冥河之水被认为具有赋予人不死之身的神奇力量。
E: According to the myths of Amphoreus, a certain hero of Castrum Kremnos was dipped upside down into the River of Souls at birth by his mother, believing its waters would grant him invulnerability.

C: 「武器是战友，好好锻造的话，它绝对不会背叛你。」曾有位铁匠如此叮嘱着勇士。
E: "Your weapon is your comrade. Forge it well, and it'll never betray you." A smith once gave this advice to a warrior.

C: 小锤<unbreak>40</unbreak>，大锤<unbreak>80</unbreak>。
E: Looks like you're stuck in a bit of a stable situation!

C: 我遇到了我的真爱…
E: I've found my one true love.

C: 凯撒大人…您今天怎么…
E: My Great Imperator, how did you end up...

C: 换句话说，如果我们在树庭遇见了，或者你们到研究室来找我，想请教我的学问，我只会回应「阿那克萨戈拉斯」这个名字。
E: In other words, should we meet at the Grove, or should you seek my wisdom at the lab, I will only respond to the name "Anaxagoras."

C: 你记得在此地，她复现了久远的炼金术，将残损的死龙从冥河中召唤出来。
E: You remember, right here, how she revived ancient alchemy and summoned the broken corpse of Netherwing from the River of Souls.

C: …海瑟音，请聆听无礼的金鳟，最后的祝福吧——
E: ...Hysilens, please heed the final blessings of this rude golden trout.

C: 嘻，又见面了呀，勇敢的「开拓」小灰鸟♭
E: Hehe, fancy meeting you again, brave Little Trailblazing Graybird ♭

C: 大地从来就不止是某处的土地。只要有生灵驻足的地方，便会有大地——大地，只取决于我们伫立于何处。
E: Earth was never just a piece of land somewhere. Wherever life dwells, there is Earth — Earth exists wherever we choose to stand.

C: 拆不下来的…
E: It cannot be removed...

C: 拥抱…新生…
E: Embrace... new life...

C: 要挑战吗…
E: Wanna take on the challenge...

C: 好啦，想再见到我，你就靠近镜子吧。
E: Alrighty then, just step close to the mirror if you ever want to find me.

C: 那就好……
E: That's good...

C: 我都那样拜托你了，你还是告诉他们了啊。
E: I asked you so candidly yet you still told them.

C: 我、我盼望那一天能早点到来！
E: I—I'm hoping that day can come soon!

C: 谢谢！您已经帮了我们太多——接下来的事就交给我们吧。
E: Thanks! You've helped us out so much already, so leave the rest up to us.

C: 一路小心，我会一直在这里执勤。
E: Take care, I shall be here on duty whenever you need.

C: 对方别有深意地看了你一眼，沉吟了片刻。
E: It gazes at you profoundly and mutters to itself for a moment.

C: （别说怪话了，小点声，别打草惊蛇。）
E: (Don't say weird things. Just lower your volume. Don't act rashly.)

C: 贪吃的「阮•梅」造物为你指明了某处。
E: This gourmand creation points you somewhere.

C: （这家伙好傲慢，实在没办法跟他沟通。）
E: (This guy seems so arrogant. It's hard to communicate with him.)

C: 但为了这些特别的故事，人家会耐心等待哦，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
E: But for these enchanting tales, I'll wait right here in dreamland... You'll come back, won't you?

C: 看来{NICKNAME}也和人家一样，是个内心细腻，又想象力丰富的孩子呢。
E: It looks like {NICKNAME}, like me, is a soul with a gentle heart and a wild imagination.

C: 同道…这么说好像也没错。
E: Kindred spirits... well, I suppose you could say that.

C: 树庭变成了这样，似乎没时间学习啦……
E: With the Grove being like this, there isn't any time to study...

C: 不可能全都记得吧？
E: There's no way I could remember everything...

C: 我更好奇你是不是。
E: I'm curious about your hidden side.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 将梦境再次连接吧！
E: Let's reconnect to the Dreamscape!

C: 嚯嚯嚯，你以为我在这里等谁呢？等的就是你，年轻人，来吧。
E: Who do you think I am waiting for here? It's you, kid. Come on.

C: 不错不错，这次实验数据收集得很顺利…说个题外话可以吗？你觉得咱们工造司的金人造型如何？
E: Not bad. The data collection for this experiment went well... Can I digress? What do you think of the shape of the aurumatons in our Artisanship Commission?

C: 好吧，我就不过问了。
E: Alright, I won't ask.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，听我一句劝，组织这赛事、为此下重注的可都不是善茬。
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, heed my advice: Those who run this syndicate and gamble on it are not good people.

C: …但是你这也不叫下棋啊。
E: ...But what you're doing can't really be called chess...

C: 你会回来找我的，因为你想和我下棋！
E: You'll be back! Because I KNOW you want to face me in chess!

C: 你知道我要说什么，我也知道你要说什么，来吧？
E: You know what I'm going to say. I also know what you're going to say. Should we start?

C: {NICKNAME}大人，要继续玩「寻径指津」吗？
E: Welcome back, {NICKNAME}. Would you like another game of "Pathfinder"?

C: 「枘凿六合」出了些事情…要我自己来讲实在是有些难以启齿啊……
E: Something happened to Hexanexus... It's a little hard for me to explain it on my own...

C: 你在牢里也能进行游戏开发？
E: Can you also develop games behind bars?

C: 进入心境空间。
E: Enter the Emoscape.

C: 干脆利落，奖励拿去。
E: Straight to the point. Take your reward.

C: 滴、答…哈哈，我只是懒得说话。
E: Tick, tock... Haha, I was just too lazy to speak.

C: 不用和我客气的，游客！保证不收取任何费用！
E: No need to be polite! I won't charge a single penny!

C: 在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
E: In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.

C: 去寻找它的藏身之处吧，我在那里为你准备了一份礼物。
E: Seek out its hidden place — I've left a gift there, just for you.

C: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
E: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

C: 嗯…有位织者格外称职，执意要完成被托付的任务。金丝带来消息，它正在努力<color=#dbc291ff>支撑一座天平</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver is upholding their utmost duty, insistent on completing the mission entrusted to them. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hard at work <color=#dbc291ff>propping up a scale</color>. Go look for it there.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 嗯…有位织者对建筑的设计非常挑剔。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>着火的陷坑旁边</color>，琢磨着怎么过去呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver with a keen eye for architectural flaws. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>next to the burning pit</color>, contemplating the best way to navigate their fiery depths.

C: 桀桀桀——这样贪心的想法，扎格列斯老祖听了，都不惜得抬抬它那高傲的眼皮！
E: Hehehe... Even the great Zagreus wouldn't bat an eyelid at such a greedy attitude!

C: 最惊险的，莫过于那次——塞纳托斯派了只乌鸦向我递话。
E: There was no more thrilling escapade than the time Thanatos sent me a raven with a message.

C: 和现在很不一样。
E: It's very different from your present self.

C: 想薅我羊毛？没门！
E: Think that'll work on me? Think again!

C: 看你吃瘪就很高兴！
E: Nothing pleases me more than seeing you humiliated.

C: 诶，谦虚可不是江洋大盗的美德。
E: Hey, modesty doesn't suit a master thief.

C: 好啦好啦，还给你还给你……
E: Okay, okay, you can have it back...

C: 真巴特鲁斯在哪？
E: Where's the real Bartholos?

C: 桀桀，老伙计！惊不惊喜，意不意外？有没有想到在这里也能见到老巴特鲁斯？
E: Heh-heh! My old friend! Bet you didn't expect to run into old Bartholos here, of all places!

C: 说到底，咱只是一个普通的盗贼，可以偷你「一直拥有」的记忆要素，但对你「一瞬拥有」的真正记忆就无可奈何了。
E: Let's be honest. I'm just a regular thief who can steal elements of the memory fragments you "always carry," but those authentic memories you "hold for just an instant" are completely beyond my reach.

C: 不过可别担心！只有把浮土全部吹去，真金才会被我们握在手心。
E: But don't you worry! We only find the gems after we've blown away all the worthless dust.

C: 去获得来自天外的步数吧…它将助你赢取最终的胜利。
E: Go get those moves from beyond the sky... They will help you achieve ultimate victory.

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我们——「我昨日留存的小甜饼现在何处？」
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where is the cookie I saved yesterday?"

C: 我要挑战高难度的旧卷！
E: I want to tackle the challenging old scrolls!

C: 关于雅努斯迷津…
E: About Janus' Maze...

C: 你在卜筮时具体做什么？
E: What exactly do you do during divination?

C: 唔，对不起对不起。都怪我这大发声器官，太久没和真人交流，「说都不会话」了…嘿嘿。既然是活人，我就不该拦你了——上面有宝物，快上去看看吧！
E: Uh, sorry, sorry. It's all my fault — this loud mouth of mine. It's been so long since I've talked to a real person, I barely remember how to speak... Hehe. Since you're alive, I shouldn't stop you — there's treasure up there, go take a look!

C: 吓死我了…我就说嘛，会用祷言又不是什么稀奇事。听好，只要让<color=#dbc291ff>所有的球都停在压力板上</color>，就算完成啦！
E: You almost got me... Anyway, using the prayer isn't such a big deal. Listen carefully, as long as you make <color=#dbc291ff>all the balls stop on the pressure plates</color>, it's done!

C: 桌上摆着尚未读完的书卷，还有尚未吃完的果盘。它们看上去都不像是经受过岁月侵蚀的模样。
E: On the table lies an unfinished scroll and a partially eaten fruit platter. Both appear untouched by time.

C: 你就是伊来内吗？
E: Are you Alain?

C: 不必紧张。我受大司铎委派在此管理火种匣，多少知晓了一些秘辛，凯妮斯女士也曾因此向我抛出橄榄枝——说实话，元老院的一席之地，的确十分诱人。
E: No need to be on edge. The Chaplain assigned me to oversee these Coreflame Caskets, so I know a few secrets. Even Lady Caenis extended me an invitation — honestly, a seat in the Council of Elders is indeed a tempting offer.

C: …「愚不可及」。
E: ...Unsurpassed idiocy.

C: 父亲，您曾说…微光象征着弥合与疗愈。
E: Father, you once said... the faint light symbolizes healing and reconciliation.

C: 谢谢你们。
E: Thank you, everyone.

C: 这是所谓的「动态难度」吗？
E: Is this the so-called "Dynamic Difficulty"?

C: 喂，罗刹，「{RUBY_B#星神}繁育{RUBY_E#}」的事你才说了一半，接着讲嘛，怪有意思的。真稀奇啊，星神也会死？祂们不是无敌的吗？
E: Hey, Luocha, you didn't finish telling us about the {RUBY_B#Aeon}Propagation{RUBY_E#}! Keep going — it's interesting. So Aeons can die, huh? Weird, I thought THEY were invincible...

C: …令堂说的不错，持明是「龙裔」，亦即星神「{RUBY_B#龙}不朽{RUBY_E#}」的后代。因此持明之中，曾经是有人能化龙的，却不是人人都有此资质。
E: ...Your mother is right. The Vidyadhara are Long's Scions. They are descendants of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Long}Permanence{RUBY_E#}. That was why some, but not all, could turn into dragons.

C: 随吾来。
E: Come with me.

C: 「培育数据发生膨胀，很神秘的现象。处理起来并不棘手，但…我不知道『秘密』还能藏多久。」她抿嘴，歪头温婉一笑，「感谢你的到来，为我又带来些有效数据。现在让我给你些奖励——为了我们的『以后』。」
E: "The cultivated data has seen some unusual expansion. It's quite mysterious. It's not difficult to handle, but... I don't know how much longer this 'secret' can remain hidden," she pouts, tilts her head, and smiles gently. "Thank you for coming. You've brought me some valuable data again. Now, let me give you some rewards — for our 'future'."

C: 最后，还加入了一点小机制，帮助你更好地假扮阿基维利。
E: Finally, there's a new mechanic that helps you to better pretend to be Akivili.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「呃，就是这么单调。」</color>男人的声音说，他似乎是真的很抱歉。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh, yeah, that's how bland it'll be for now."</color> The man says as if he is genuinely sorry.

C: 第二世界的难度大吗？
E: Was World 2 difficult?

C: 「报酬想要多少都有的是。」黑塔讥笑着，「继续玩就是了。」
E: "You'll get paid whatever you ask for," Herta chuckles. "Just keep playing."

C: 你离得更远了……
E: You move further away...

C: 「我敢断定，这家伙完全、彻底在状况外。Ⅸ能有什么理由在乎塔伊兹育罗斯？」黑塔说，「但是{NICKNAME}，你得赶快脱身。你以为在模拟宇宙里摸鱼没有代价？祂刚刚肯定出现过，让你的一部分神经失去了知觉，你别被Ⅸ吞没了——」
E: "I'm sure IX doesn't know what it's doing. Does IX have any reason to care about Tayzzyronth?" Herta adds, "But, you need to get out of the place quickly, {NICKNAME}.
