Do you think you can slack off in the Simulated Universe without paying the price? The Aeon must have appeared just now and made some of your nerves go numb. Don't be swallowed by IX..."

C: 祂从一个光点中突然演变成巨物，构成祂的片段凝固、倒转，接着平行、靠拢、交错；祂像一个镜子质感的口香糖瞬间膨胀。这是一瞬间的事：众多星系轰然倒塌毁灭。你惊愕万分，但你似乎揣摩到其意味所在：诸星正在坍塌消亡，而芸芸众生的祈愿——众消逝的记忆却正在凝结。
E: From a bright spot, THEY suddenly transform into a giant entity, the segments of which solidify, reverse, align, converge, and intertwine with each other. THEY expand in an instant like a mirror-like piece of gum. In the blink of an eye, numerous star systems collapse and crumble. You are dumbfounded, but you seem to be able to grasp its significance: The stars are collapsing, while the collective aspirations of countless beings — the vanishing memories — are crystallizing.

C: 「十分荣幸。」螺丝咕姆说，「这会是场有趣的游戏。」
E: "I'm honored. This is going to be interesting," says Screwllum.

C: 你也砰嗵一声投身于海水中！你在水下的视野并不清晰，却看到一些彩色窗格般的光辉将溺水者笼罩——他在死后被称为古时世上为神合音最动听、圣洁的溺水者。
E: You also jump into the sea with a resounding splash! Your vision underwater is muddled, but you can see kaleidoscopic rays of light enshrouding the drowned — after his death, the drowned would be known for having the most moving and holy of voices that ever harmonized for gods in the ancient era.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了泯灭帮火焰般的嘶吼。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the crackling howls rising from the throats of the Annihilation Gang.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 长话短说，一个骰子。
E: In short, a die.

C: 「就是这里。」黑塔暂停了，「<color=#dbc291ff>第二个疑点来了——奥博洛斯和太一在这个故事中途消失了！</color>完全、彻底的了无音讯，仿佛在表面的舞台之下，有另一个故事在暗中推进…也可能是我们的推演漏了些什么，总之我十分怀疑。好吧，那么…接着呢？接下来气氛如何到达高潮，几位神如何在同一琥珀纪加入列神的战局？{NICKNAME}，我们到第三位面再继续啰。」
E: "Right here." Herta pauses," <color=#dbc291ff>The second point of suspicion: Oroboros and Ena vanished in the middle of this tale!</color> Completely, silently, as if there was another story progressing along in the shadows underneath the main stage... Or perhaps we left something out in our simulation. In any case, highly suspicious. Okay, then... What happened next? How does the story reach its climax? How did these gods join the clash of the gods in the same Amber Era? {NICKNAME}, we shall continue on the third plane."

C: 嗯？
E: Hm?

C: 他的虚拟形象点了点头，似乎是在向你致意。
E: His virtual image nods, as if to salute you.

C: 搜寻人群中的「谋犯者」。
E: Search for the perpetrator in the crowd.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我不恨…我亦是如此。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I don't hate them... as I'm one of them.

C: 你不关心，只想等待宴会结束。在你身边，一位学者颤抖着、哭泣着摇头，不断念叨这并非博识尊计算中的「时刻」。
E: You are not concerned by the topic, instead waiting for the banquet to end soon. Next to you, a scholar is trembling, weeping, and shaking his head. He keeps mumbling about the incident not being one of the "Instants" calculated by Nous.

C: 你默默地记下这些话语，在心里把过去的哈罗瓦描绘出来。
E: You silently commit these words to memory, creating a mind map of the old Halover.

C: 到底要创造出什么，才能留下自己存在的痕迹？
E: What does one have to create in order to leave behind traces of our existence?

C: 在一片空白里，你安详地飘浮着，像一片云，无悲无喜，归于清净。
E: You float about peacefully in the blankness like a cloud, emotionless as you return to tranquility.

C: 子弹掠过，眼前的怪盗已不见踪影。
E: As bullets fly past you, the thief disappears without a trace.

C: 你移植了这颗心脏，离开了病榻，来到高大来访者的庄园与世隔绝。你一天比一天健康，一天比一天强壮——你感觉自己似乎过于强壮了。当你在白皙的月光之下因极度痛苦与癫狂开始撕扯自己的咽喉与胸脯的时候，你再一次看到了两位来访者。
E: After having this heart transplanted into your body, you leave the hospital bed and come to the tall visitor's estate to separate from the outside world. Your health improves by the day as you grow stronger and stronger... You feel almost too strong. As you find yourself tearing at your throat and chest in a fit of extreme pain and madness under the white light of the moon, you see these two visitors once more.

C: 普拉多斯仿佛看穿了你的想法，他转身在仪器上输入几行数据。「我把沙盘的控制权移交给你了，接下来一周你来负责对沙盘<unbreak>013</unbreak>次文明的观察和预测。」
E: Prados turns to the console and enters a few lines of data, as if he has read your very thoughts. "I have transferred control of the sandpit to you. For the next week, you will be in charge of observation and prediction for Sandpit Civilization <unbreak>013</unbreak>."

C: 在夏季三轮例会的一开始，克丝黛拉就冲着你所在的元老位慷慨陈词。「我们应当正视科研实用主义在学派中的负面效益，它已经对年轻学者的研究热情产生了巨大阻碍。」
E: As the first of the three scheduled summer meetings begins, Chrystella unleashes an impassioned speech at the elder seat you reside in. "We need to face the negative effects that research pragmatism is having on our school. It creates a massive obstacle standing in the way of our young scholars' passion."

C: 你在一片只有黑白的世界里，脚下的大地是无限延伸的白色大理石，头顶的天空则是没有光泽的黑曜石。
E: You are in a world of black and white. The ground below you is an infinite stretch of white marble, and the sky above, a matte obsidian.

C: 黑色与白色泾渭分明，在视线的尽头对峙出一道交界线。
E: Black and white are clear and distinct, forming a boundary line at the summit of your line of sight.

C: 仪器发出嘎吱嘎吱的响声，被无垠的真空吞没。你习惯性打开淘来的老式收音机，不期待能从中得到任何有用信息。
E: The device emits clacking rings, swallowed up by the boundless void. You turn on the vintage radio you thrifted out of habit, not really expecting to glean any useful news from it.

C: 嚯，该不会是我吧？
E: Oh? Could it be me?

C: 摆脱那群该死的白痴对知识的控制。
E: Break free from those damnable idiots and their control over knowledge.

C: 跃迁开始的瞬间，屏幕上的图像如舞动的弦般抖动。精心设计的实验环境，在空间变化中坍缩，帕提维娅数年的心血，皆死在疯狂跳动的数据图里。一团无名之火在你的胸中点燃，你要等待一个时机，让所谓的先知，见证庸人的愤怒。
E: The instant the warp jump commences, the images on the screen dance like trembling strings. The meticulously designed lab environment starts to collapse with the spatial change. Years of Patavia's efforts are lost in the quivering delirium of data images. An inexplicable fire is set alight in your chest — you must wait for a chance to let this so-called prophet witness the rage of a Mundanite.

C: 证明：变量进入同态结合阶段，检测到基因与回路的双重特征，注入稳定方程……
E: Proof: Variable entering homotypic integration phase. Gene and circuit dual characteristics detected. Injecting stable equation...

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
E: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

C: 一团「不好念头」在脑内疯狂生长，扎根进意识深处。培养舱的强化玻璃犹如脆弱的坚果外壳，在你的拳头下崩裂成碎片。你起身向「权杖」深处狂奔。
E: A cloud of bad thoughts grows unbridled in your mind, taking root in the depths of your consciousness. The incubator's reinforced glass appears no more than a fragile nutshell, shattering to pieces under your fist. You get up and make a mad dash for the Scepters.

C: 你身前有一位女性个体。基于安全分析，你不应向她暴露自己的无机身份。指令：<color=#dbc291ff>扮演对方的同伴角色，并脱离其观测。</color>。
E: A female entity stands before you. Based on your security analysis, it is not appropriate for you to reveal your inorganic status to her. Order: <color=#dbc291ff>Play the role of her companion and leave her observational range</color>.

C: 死亡率判定为——<unbreak>66.02</unbreak>％。
E: Death probability calculated as — <unbreak>66.02</unbreak>％.

C: 学会内部是否仍存有隐藏的感染者？对完美进化学派的清算，又是否属于学派战争的一部分？人们对问题的答案心照不宣。
E: Are there still infected lurking in the Guild? Is the School of Evolutionary Perfection's dissolution a part of the Scholars' Strife? Everyone tacitly understood the answers to these questions.

C: 就仿佛，鲁珀特二世早已预料到自己的死亡。特地在王座边缘，为自己留下这座不被打扰的<color=#dbc291ff>衣冠冢</color>。
E: It was as if Rubert II had long-since predicted their own death. As if they had purposely left this <color=#dbc291ff>cenotaph</color> around the edge of the throne so as not to be disturbed.

C: 我想让后人捕捉祂的天慧…
E: I want future generations to capture THEIR divine wisdom...

C: 帕提维娅麻木地记录下眼前的知识，将它们蛮横地塞入脑中。她太过无力，甚至无法分清，知识究竟在被自己主动记下，还是由博识尊灌输进她的意识。
E: Patavia robotically records down all the knowledge before her and stuffs it brutally into her mind. She has so little agency in the matter that she cannot even tell whether it is her actively recording the knowledge, or Nous is forcibly instilling knowledge into her consciousness.

C: 在伊斯特邦联的一场比赛中，它被选手的挥拍击中。鳞羽上的粉尘引发了呼吸道过敏，又让喷嚏连连的选手将微不足道的感冒病毒传染给了接见他的总统。
E: In an Isthmian Confederation competition, it was struck by a competitor's bat. The powder from its wings triggered a respiration allergy in the competitor, causing him to sneeze non-stop. Later, that competitor passed on a trifling cold virus to his president whom he was visiting.

C: 我正陷入一场噩梦。
E: I am having a nightmare.

C: 「伟大的存护星神克里珀…祂能听到我们的声音。」矿工们举起铁锹又落下，他们像狂热动物，又像信徒。
E: "Great Qlipoth, Aeon of Preservation... THEY can hear our voices." The miners raise and dip their shovels like frenzied animals — or the faithful.

C: 有人看到了你——戴着探测灯的*头号矿工*。他的臂膀黝黑健壮，嘴唇同样乌黑。他豪迈的笑容令人难忘。他镶了一颗金牙，在你脑海中不停放大、扭曲，最后你只看得到他的*笑容*——嘴唇和眼睛搅在一起，像调色盘里颜料融化。
E: Someone notices you — It's the "lead miner" wearing a detector lamp. His arms are dark and muscular, and his lips are in a similar shade of ink. His hearty smile is very memorable. He has a gold tooth that ceaselessly expands and twists in your brain, till all you can see is his "smile" — His lips and eyes fuse together, like the melting sludge of paint on a palette.

C: 很有魅力。
E: They are charming.

C: 你想弄明白如何回到模拟宇宙。你可以从左边的管道爬出去，或者跳上右边的砖块。
E: You want to figure out how to get back to the Simulated Universe. You may climb out from the pipe on your left, or hop onto the brick on your right.

C: 「还有谁要来？谁还能打第<unbreak>78201</unbreak>场！」
E: "Who else is coming? Who's up for the <unbreak>78,201</unbreak>st round?"

C: 你遇到了一片「超验之镜」的巨大碎片，碎片下供奉着三盏烛火。
E: You come across a massive fragment of the Mirror of Transcendence. Three candles are placed beneath it as offerings.

C: 你来回驻足、摩梭……
E: You walk back and forth while being deep in your thoughts...

C: 你快步离开了……
E: You walk away hurriedly...

C: 你站起身，发现自己掉在一个巢穴入口前。你拨开这个巢穴的门帘，认出了这些「鏖兜虫」：它们作为地面作战单位，以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与刚硬的甲壳。
E: You get to your feet and find yourself landing before the entrance of a lair. You draw the curtain open and recognize the Combatobugs. As ground combat units, they traded their flying abilities in exchange for heavy and rigid exoskeletons.

C: 你还要继续相信星际和平投资机吗？
E: Will you continue to trust the Interastral Peace Investment Device?

C: 占卜师的面纱遮住了表情，唯有迷离的双眼浅浅地望向你，她从星空般深邃的长袖中抽出一副塔奥牌，熟稔地将它们分成几叠，陈列在你的面前。
E: A veil covers the soothsayer's expression, leaving only her vacant gaze glancing in your direction. She fishes out a pack of Tawot Cards from her sleeves that look as profound as the starlit heavens and deftly arranges them into several stacks before you.

C: 「那是当然，金属纯度<unbreak>70</unbreak>％以上的大货。」店长搬出压箱底的收藏，人工做旧的箱子上，刻满了鲁珀特帝国的徽记。
E: "Well, of course, that is one of our over <unbreak>70%</unbreak> pure metal specialties." The shopkeeper pulls out their treasured collection from the bottom of an artificially aged chest that is covered in engraved crests of the Rubert Empire.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 恍惚间，你仿佛听到，机械的传动声在按钮下回响，宛如一颗跳动的心脏。等反应过来，你的手已在不知不觉间放到了按钮上。
E: In a flash, you feel like you can hear the echo of a mechanical device whirring to life under the button, like the beating of a heart. When you realize what has happened, you see your hand placed upon the red button.

C: 「这家伙的骨头挺硬」，马格称赞道，「不像那些动不动就嗷嗷叫的反物质火焰。」
E: "This thing's got some pretty sturdy bones!" Magg exclaims, impressed. "Nothing like those antimatter flames that spend the whole time wailing!"

C: 交易是双向的，付出越多，得到也越多。诗人期待地望着你的眼睛，等待你即将分享的故事。
E: Deals are mutually beneficial. The higher the price you pay, the more you should expect to receive. The poet looks at you with excitement, awaiting the story you will share.

C: 「智人们智械们，还有头上长满菠萝花的智能植物们，欢迎来到银河星船竞速赛的现场！让我感受到你们的振动好不好？」
E: "Wise Intellitrons, and sentient plants with pineapple flowers adorning their heads! Welcome to the Galactic Grand Prix! Let me feel your vibrations!"

C: 「诸位好，在下是一团太空军舰寿司。」飞船在领奖时如是说道。
E: "Greetings, all. I am a space sushi spaceship." The ship says while receiving the prize.

C: 修补匠的胡子上沾满了齿轮和矿渣，他披着冷却恒星做成的斗篷，活像一位魔法师。
E: The repairman's beard is covered in small gears and flecks of ore. He's draped in a cloak made from chilled stars, looking like a magician.

C: 你断开大脑内的联网装置，摆脱深层数据的影响，趁着意识清醒的片刻回归现实。
E: You disengage the network device within your brain, liberating yourself from the grip of deep data and returning to reality before slipping into unconsciousness.

C: 你背起行囊，走进曜青仙舟的港口，一段新的人生即将等待你去品味。
E: You hoist your luggage onto your shoulder and walk into the port of the Xianzhou Yaoqing, where a new life for sampling awaits.

C: 奔跑是伟大的竞技。
E: Running is a grand competition.

C: 法吉娜最嫌弃的泰坦。
E: Phagousa's most detested Titan.

C: 可笑的扎格列斯。
E: Zagreus. How laughable.

C: 拔出利剑。
E: He drew the sword.

C: 到这里，便是连吟游诗人们也语焉不详的世界了。他们有的说，英雄们都在死亡的国度重新聚首，举杯对饮。也有的说，那里只有累累白骨，点缀渺无生机的世界。
E: From this point on, even bards speak vaguely. Some say the heroes gather in the realm of death to raise their glasses in celebration. While others say it is a lifeless place, adorned only with endless piles of bones.

C: 还有那些随意制造的眷属，在半梦半醒时，用珊瑚、礁石、水草和浪涛抟成的海兽。若是被问起，泰坦定早已将它们遗忘。
E: There are also those kins created in half-dreams, molded from coral, reefs, seaweed, and waves. If asked, the Titan has surely forgotten their existence by now.

C: 用纯粹之爱纺织金茧。
E: They weave the golden cocoon with pure love.

C: 出师不利，还是走为上策，下次再收它也不迟。
E: Not the best start to this mission... but a tactical retreat is better than a reckless demise. You can deal with it another day.

C: 欧洛尼斯宣告一段关于白金的预言，这预言为动荡的世界带来转机。
E: Oronyx proclaimed a prophecy concerning platinum, this revelation brought a turning point to the turbulent world.

C: 是谁于鸿蒙初开之时，颁布约束万物的法律，令秩序通行寰宇。
E: Who was the one that enacted the laws that bound all things at the inception of primordial chaos, and set order upon existence?

C: 瑟希斯被人们的贪婪激怒，它命令所有的植物枯萎，就当人们认为泰坦已经抛弃他们的时候，吉奥里亚又一次展现了自己的悲悯。
E: Enraged by humanity's greed, Cerces commanded all plants to wilt. Just as mortals believed the Titans had forsaken them, Georios once again revealed their boundless compassion.

C: 人子为了充饥，将瑟希斯赐予的理性抛诸脑后；人子为了果腹，掠尽了林中的野菜和果实。
E: To satisfy their hunger, humanity cast aside the reason bestowed by Cerces. To fill their stomachs, they depleted all the wild vegetables and fruits of the forest.

C: 似乎并没有什么变化。
E: Doesn't seem like anything is different.

C: 你注意到这里贴着一张泛黄的留言条：「谁能听懂它在说什么？我权限不够，借不到『不可承受之重』……」
E: You notice a yellowed note that reads, "Can anyone understand what it is saying? My authorization isn't high enough, so I can't borrow the Unbearable Weight..."

C: 很好……
E: Great...

C: 卢卡哥哥！卢卡哥哥！
E: Luka! Luka! Luka! Lukaaaa!

C: 别看现在馆里这么热闹，但其实那帮粉丝都是三分钟热度…我最了解这群人了。你要是想跟卢卡小哥聊聊，就等他们散了再过去吧？
E: The club might be crowded now, but these fans won't be sticking around for long... I've seen this all before. If you want to chat with Luka, just wait till the fans leave.

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 那味道越来越剧烈，令你忍不住舒展整个伞盖，全身心地浸入这令你意乱神迷的馥郁香泽中…到了、就快到了！接下来就是大快朵颐的时间……
E: The scent grows more intense. You can't resist the urge to extend your umbrella of a body as you throw your whole being into this dazzling aroma... You are so close! So close! Now it is time for a grand feast...

C: 我来拽你！
E: Let me pull you!

C: 你问我懂不懂？我当然懂嗡！
E: Do I understand it all? Of course I do!

C: 吾主昔日的警示仍在我的脑中回响：当立足的大地由红转蓝，前往彼岸的大门便将打开。
E: I keep playing back in my head my master's warning: The door to the other shore will only open once the ground beneath you turns from red to blue.

C: 真是一场酣畅淋漓的比赛啊，都把天给看黑了喀！
E: It was such a rousing contest that I watched it until it got dark outside!

C: 你从隐形的背包中掏出安东尼娜送给你的矿镐。该你上场了，新晋矿工{NICKNAME}。
E: From your invisible bag, you pull out the pickax Antonia gave you. It's time to get down to business, {NICKNAME} the rookie miner.

C: 「没吃饭吗，小东西？」
E: "You didn't eat a good meal, little one?"

C: 怎么样，打算参加吗？
E: What do you think? Want to give it a go?

C: 这家伙能行吗？表情倒挺自信的。
E: Do they have what it takes? Their expression at least looks confident.

C: 不过根据规则，挑战没成功就不能免单。所以，五盘炸岩居蟹的价格一共是——<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。您是想现在支付，还是……
E: However, according to the rules, contestants who don't complete the challenge must pay for their meals. With that in mind, five plates of Deep-Fried Rock Crab cost <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits. Would you like to pay now, or...

C: 对。运气。
E: That's right. Luck.

C: 看你做选择相当有趣…过程值得我细品一番。
E: Watching you make decisions is fascinating... The process is worth savoring.

C: 调查大型宝箱
E: Investigate the large chest.

C: 不满意
E: Unsatisfied

C: 你不清楚自己是否见过这位小朋友，但你觉得她十分面熟。在人生的某个时刻里，你确信自己曾见过这样一位把「狡猾」写在脸上的小孩子。
E: You aren't quite sure if you have seen this kid before, but she does seem very familiar. You are certain that, at some point in your life, you've also met a kid with a similarly sly expression written all over her face.

C: 哎呀，原来您是铁卫啊！早说嘛……
E: Oh, you're a guard? You should've said something...

C: 出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
E: Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...

C: 我的希露瓦大人…呜呜…
E: My Lady Serval... Oh...

C: <size=36>啊！这鼻子！</size>
E: <size=36>Ah! The nose!</size>

C: …传奇的旅途注定艰辛，看来我还得继续努力喀。
E: ...Legendary voyages are destined to be difficult. Looks like I'll have to keep working hard at it.

C: 两秒？
E: Every 2 seconds?

C: 喀喀，听我指挥——加入智慧、勇武、迅捷和刚毅……
E: Crrk crrk — Listen carefully: Add intellect, fortitude, speed, and resolve...

C: 并非此刻
E: Not this moment

C: 若能欣赏到那番美景，我的虫生该有多幸福啊喀……
E: What joy it would bring to see such splendor...

C: 据说在工业星球，甲虫会被外表亮丽的玻璃瓶吸引…而这只若虫更爱石头塑像。
E: It's said that on industrial planets, beetles are often attracted by beautiful glass bottles... But this nymph prefers stone statues.

C: 我可以卖艺啊！
E: I could do some busking!

C: …行，那就<unbreak>10000</unbreak>，成交。来吧，一手交货，一手交钱。
E: ...Okay, <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> it is. Deal. Come on then. You take the money, and I take the goods.

C: 旅行者哟，请问这条瀑布和千百年后的那条还是同一条吗？
E: Traveler, tell me — does this waterfall remain the same as it will be in a thousand years?

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 别愣着！
E: Don't just stand there!

C: 在安提灵花的香气中，你想起了她曾经最爱的诗句——
E: Amidst the fragrance of Antila flowers, you recall the verses she once loved most —

C: …还会再回来吗？
E: ...Will they ever come back?

C: 哈哈哈，你打赌输了。
E: Haha, you lost the bet.

C: 你只说真话吗？
E: Are you telling only truths?

C: 原来你不知道啊…你以为我会相信吗？
E: So even you don't know... And you think I'll believe that?

C: 啊，这些快递箱吗？这些只是找不到收获地址的快递而已……
E: Ack, these things? They're just courier packages with unknown addresses...

C: 但是，这次不太一样。
E: But, this time it's different.

C: 连身后的你也感觉到一种熊熊燃烧的灼热感。这就是「暴怒模式」吗！何等炫目，何等耀眼！你开始期待机巧鸟能够爆发出怎样的能量了。
E: Even standing behind it, you can feel a scorching heat emanating from the cycrane. This is the so-called Wrath mode, then! How dazzling, how awe-inspiring! You start to wonder what kind of energy burst this cycrane can unleash.

C: 我知道你在想什么，你认为我不遵守游戏规则，你认为我只是想恶心你。
E: I know what you're thinking. You're thinking, "This thing broke the rules. It's just trying to annoy me."

C: 嚯！好狂的口气。
E: Wow! How cocky.

C: 对啊对啊，{F#她}{M#他}要是没做出来，就证明{F#她}{M#他}没有足够的智慧；要是{F#她}{M#他}做出来了，我们就可以抄作业了。
E: Splendid idea! If {F#she}{M#he} can't solve it, it proves that {F#she}{M#he} is lacking in wisdom. If {F#she}{M#he} can solve it, it means we can just copy the answer.

C: 我明白了，工作量都是一样的，每个人都应该是5镝呀。
E: I've got it. Since the workload is the same, each of you should receive 5 strales.

C: 太不公平…
E: How unfair...

C: 嗐嗐嗐，干嘛呢{F#小姑娘}{M#小老弟}，我在旁边呢！这么明目张胆的吗？
E: Hello, {F#miss}{M#mister}, I'm standing right here! How dare you?

C: 失陪了，我得找他谈谈。
E: Excuse me. I need to have a word with him.

C: …我在听。
E: ...I'm listening.

C: 好了，你身子还没完全好，快回家去休息休息吧！我也得再去知会一下十王司，叫他们不用派冥差来了……
E: Alright, you're still weak after all that. Go home and take a nice long break! I have to cancel the spiritfarer that the Ten-Lords Commission will be sending over...

C: 不行，我感觉我的好奇心在折磨我。
E: No way. My curiosity is going to torment me until I find out.

C: （就用「{NICKNAME}」吧）
E: (Use "{NICKNAME}")

C: 那个粉色头发的姑娘，戴眼镜的帅气大叔，沉默寡言的黑发青年，还有一名优雅的红发女士…这不会都是你的记忆吧？
E: That lady with pink hair, the older gent with glasses, the silent black-haired young man, and the classy lady with red hair... Are these your memories?

C: <size=36>嘭！</size>
E: <size=36>BOOM!</size>

C: 你老实交代，你到底是不是「纯路人」？
E: Be honest, are you Pure_Passerby?

C: 这确实是个不容易发现的地方。向你介绍这里的人一定非常珍视你们的关系，才会把这幅美景与你分享。
E: It's not an easy place to find. The person who introduced it to you truly values your friendship by sharing this view.

C: 望着眼前的高楼，你陷入了沉思。
E: Gazing up at those tall towers before you, you lose yourself deep in contemplation.

C: 乐园的三大主题区彼此独立。想要在板块之间穿梭，你必须借助「气泡弹珠」。
E: The three themed areas stand independently of each other. If you want to scoot between each, you'll have to use a Bubble Pinball.

C: 当然，这只是很少一部分人，很少，很少。
E: Of course, it's just a small number of people. Very small.

C: 「梦境不是家族的宠物，请停止驯化美梦，还睡眠以自由。」
E: "The Dreamscape is not The Family's pet. Stop taming the beautiful dreams and unchain sleep!"

C: 以后的日子不好过啊…
E: We've got tough times ahead...

C: 看着是新面孔啊，小哥你是怎么过来的？
E: Now there's a fresh face! How did you come to be here, young man?

C: 万一公司趁乱接手了这里，咱们以后的日子可就难过喽…
E: If the IPC takes this opportunity to seize this place, times ahead will be tough for us here...

C: 你迫不及待地瘫倒在沙发上，一切的烦恼都在此刻消散作云烟。
E: You hastily plop yourself on the sofa, all your troubles dissipating away like smoke in an instant.

C: 如果能一直坐在这儿就好了，恍惚间，有什么东西在你身旁耳语道。
E: If only you could just keep sitting here... Momentarily, something whispers in your ear.

C: 没事，我只是迷路了。
E: I'm fine. Just got lost.

C: 怪物都消停了，难道…
E: The monsters are quiet... Does that mean...

C: 看来智种学派是对的…
E: Looks like the Nousporists were right...

C: 「种子」应当向大家分享！
E: Seeds should be shared with everyone!

C: 这不是你的错！
E: This isn't your fault!

C: 你是什么款式的人类？肾长肩膀上？况且我扔个硬币而已，能造成多大伤害啊？
E: What kind of person grows a kidney on their shoulders? Besides, all I did was toss a coin. How much damage could that possibly do?

C: 唉，敬礼神明这种事，能不能成功，主要看内心是否澄澈。我这接连失败，想必是因为内心不够澄澈，还沾染了些许污垢吧。
E: Ack, the success of this ritual mainly depends on the purity of your heart. I keep failing at this because my heart isn't pure enough, must've been stained by impurities.

C: 列车长…你是在哭吗？
E: Conductor... are you crying?

C: 帕姆才不是复读机！
E: Pom-Pom's not a repeater!

C: 我不以歌喜不以曲悲。
E: I'm not a sentimental type.

C: …唔，这就是{NICKNAME}乘客想的办法？好像确实挺有用的……
E: ...Oh, so that was your plan all along? It seems like it kinda worked...

C: （还是算了吧）
E: (Forget it)

C: 还是重新养一盆吧。
E: Why don't you get another?

C: 不知道大家都喜欢什么口味呢……
E: Pom-Pom wonders what flavor everyone likes...

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，别笑啦，赶紧来拉列车长一把！
E: Stop laughing, {NICKNAME}. Come and give me a hand!

C: 你成功打断了帕姆的自娱自乐，但帕姆看起来似乎很生气。
E: You have successfully stopped Pom-Pom from singing, but they don't look happy about it.

C: 不管你怎么说，总之你把地板弄脏了。
E: Anyway, you've dirtied the floor.

C: 听你这口气，她真的是你的「朋友」吗？
E: There isn't much enthusiasm in your voice. Is she really your friend?

C: 调度已经准备就位，这几种配色都是帕姆精心挑选的，{NICKNAME}乘客只需要给出公平公正的感受就好！
E: Everything's ready. These colorways are carefully selected by me. Please tell me what you think about them, {NICKNAME}!

C: 这其实和情报官的工作一样，都要依靠脑力。
E: In fact, management is the same as the work of an intelligence officer, and it all depends on brain power.

C: 说起来，丹恒乘客时常通宵整理资料，睡眠质量很成问题帕。
E: Come to think of it, passenger Dan Heng often spends entire nights organizing files. I imagine his sleep quality isn't great.

C: 感谢你能担当我们的陪练，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Thanks for being our sparring partner, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: （好像被锁住了呀。怎么回事？）
E: (Seems locked. What's going on with it?)

C: *电波滤音*…你开着「回响发生装置」吗？小心，你背后好像有什么接近了！
E: *electronic voice* ...Do you have the Reverberation Generator on? Watch out! Something is approaching you from behind!

C: …我也只是推测「隐身现象」与扑满有关，进一步推测，隐身原理与持明族的云吟术相近而已。不然「回响发生装置」就不会生效了。
E: ...It's just my hunch, but I think that the "phenomenon of invisibility" is somehow connected to those Trotters. Maybe they used some abilities similar to the Vidyadhara's cloudhymn magic. Otherwise, how would the Reverberation Generator have picked anything up?

C: 事情是这样的…迴星港必须尽快恢复生产，但现在里面又涌现出了很多建木污染的区域，不得不继续封锁。
E: Here's the thing... Stargazer Navalia has to resume production as quickly as possible, but several areas with Ambrosial Arbor pollution have emerged, so we have no other choice but to continue blocking it off.

C: 不过，我得提醒您一句。在这些污染区域里，怪物之间都被一种特殊的力量连接在一起，牵一发而动全身。
E: Let me just remind you that the monsters in these polluted areas are connected by some kind of special power. One slip up will alert all of them to your presence.

C: 管它呢——我进来了，衣柜！
E: Whatever, I'm going in. Here I come, closet!

C: 哈，正中下怀！所有的旅馆恶魔都喜欢把自己伪装成「客房服务」。毫无新意。
E: Ha, there it is! All hotel devils love to disguise themselves as "room service." Such a cliche.

C: …你说得对。画画这方面，我还得多向佩拉请教才是。
E: ...You're right. When it comes to painting, I've still got so much to learn from Pela.

C: 没画你是因为…我忘了你长什么样了……
E: I never painted you because... because I forgot what you looked like...

C: 西南方有什么？
E: What's in the southwest?

C: 我就是混乱的化身！
E: I am chaos incarnate!

C: 首先是一盆可爱的花卉造景。你问为什么是造景？这是因为你看它常年摆放在此处，始终未有凋落的迹象…就像一朵真的假花。
E: First up is a cute flowerpot scene here. Why is it a scene? Because you've seen this year-round, and it's never wilted of lost leaves before... Just like a fake plant.

C: 你以五为单位，每数五个就停下来。不得不说，这一招最初卓有成效，但随着时间的推移，你的眼睛开始疲劳，记忆也不那么靠谱了……
E: You break things down into groups of five. This trick works great at first, but over time your eyes get tired and your memory grows unreliable...

C: 不过，它的说话的方式实在是…太令人尴尬了，而且还总喜欢抬杠……
E: However, the way it speaks is kind of... awkward, and it loves to argue...

C: 哎，或许你说得对。总之——谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！
E: Hey, maybe you're right. Anyway, thank you, {NICKNAME}!

C: 你就这么静静站着看他。男人脸上一阵青一阵白，仿佛意识到自己说错了话。
E: You just stand there in silence, looking on. The man's face turns blue and then white, as if realizing the mistake in what he'd just said.

C: （投入物品。）
E: (Put the items inside.)

C: 请你稍等一下。我麻烦了你不少事，应当给你准备些赔礼才是。
E: Please wait a moment. I've put you through a lot of trouble, so I should give you something to make up for it.

C: 它看起来不属于任何人，或许也正确实如此。
E: It looks like it doesn't belong to anyone. Perhaps it really doesn't.

C: 所以，你会如何答复呢？开动脑筋，来写下开头的第一句话吧！
E: So then, how should you reply? Put your brain to use and write an opening line!

C: 信中人似乎对于在千百年后再度收到「逍遥先生」来信感到十分欣喜。可你明白，时过境迁，如今的来信者与「逍遥先生」皆非故人，可谓是物是人非。
E: This correspondent seems delighted to have received another letter from Mr. Carefree after millennia, but you know that times have changed and this correspondent is no longer the same person who had composed the initial letter. People change.

C: 我当初第一次操纵机巧鸟的时候也这么开心！
E: I had the same reaction the first time I controlled the cycranes!

C: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在穷观阵外围建筑。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索封火墙附近、<color=#dbc291ff>屋檐上方</color>。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost in the buildings around the Matrix of Prescience. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search near the firewall, <color=#dbc291ff>on top of the roof</color>.

C: 驭空大人命我带队调查恶意破坏栖木的犯人，一路追查到了这里…看起来，那些人似乎是药王秘传的信徒。
E: I was instructed by Madam Yukong to lead a team to investigate the culprit who vandalized the roost, and the clues bring me here... Those people seem to be the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 还有这些，这是您的工钱～希望下次还能有机会与您合作！
E: And this is your pay. I hope I'll get to work with you again next time!

C: 请选择探索区域。
E: Please select the area to explore.

C: 行医市集
E: Healer's Market

C: 我被人骗进了这个陷阱啊！你敢信吗？这世上竟有人坏到去欺骗一个单纯的阴晴伞！
E: I got tricked into this trap! Can you believe it? I never thought there'd be people in this world who could cheat pure and simple Baroumbrella!

C: 请一定要多玩啊，「枘凿六合」天下第一！
E: Play lots and play often. Hexanexus is the bestest!

C: 当时我还年轻，也有自己喜欢的东西，比如从奥布瓦尔传入的夸克棋，比如无名客带来的开拓牌，再比如星际互联网络的电子游戏…数不胜数。
E: Back then I was still young, and had my hobbies such as Auberval's quark chess, trailblaze cards from the Nameless, and video games from the Interastral Network... So, so many games.

C: 有点土。
E: It's pretty basic.

C: 即便深知这不过是一场梦，人在遭遇突发事件时，本能的反应也往往要快过理性。凑巧，我不是个胆大的人……
E: Despite knowing full well that it's a dreamscape, people's instinctual reactions are quicker than logical thought when it comes to emergencies. And as luck would have it, I'm not a brave person...

C: 你的脸色有些差。
E: Your complexion looks a little off.

C: 盯紧点…
E: Keep on the lookout...

C: 哦…哦，我没关系，你先去吧。
E: Oh... Oh, that's fine. You go on.

C: 你以为我不想回现实看看吗？不巧，我早就是个幽灵了——我根本离不开这该死的梦境，我的人生已经结束了，没戏唱了——你懂吗？
E: Do you think I don't want to go back to reality? Unfortunately I've already been a spirit for a long time — I can't leave this cursed dreamscape. My life is over, totally over — do you understand what I'm saying here?

C: 难得的假期，就该好好放松一下——不然连我自己的良心都会谴责我的。
E: It's your own hard-earned vacation, so relax a little... Otherwise, even my own conscience is going to condemn me.

C: 是啊，入射角度必须精确，发射力度必须适中；任何失误都会破坏碎片的排列，根本没有重来的余地。
E: Yeah, the angle of incidence must be exact with moderate force only; any mistakes would destroy the arrangement of the scraps. There was no room for a mulligan here.

C: 感觉会变成旅游景点…
E: Sounds like it'll become a tourist destination...

C: 这些房子看起来像铁皮拼成的蜂巢，结构简单但数量繁多，显然是人工建造的——这里曾经住着一整个聚落！
E: These houses looked like little honeycombs woven out of tin foil. Simple in structure and numbering in the hundreds, they were clearly artificially built — an entire settlement once lived here!

C: 你不是个宇宙行商吗？
E: Aren't you a traveling merchant?

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Keep silent)

C: 见鬼，我明明付钱买的是钟表匠的消息，亲爱的线人为什么给了我这玩意！？
E: Gah! I paid for information about the Watchmaker, but this is all I got from that blasted informant!

C: 果然，负责「开拓」的无名客心胸也很「开阔」。和你这样的人相处真是轻松。
E: Thanks for being the bigger person here, Nameless. Dealing with people like you is such a breeze.

C: 这样可不行，朋友——我答应家族的可是要建成一座全新的梦想之城，是能超越黄金的时刻的、世人闻所未闻的辉煌伟业！
E: This is unacceptable, my friend... I promised The Family a new city of dreams, something out of this universe and even greater than Golden Hour!

C: 如果可能的话，最好让他们打个具体的分数…至于具体该找谁打听，你自己定吧。放心，凡是<color=#dbc291ff>家族里稍微有点地位的人</color>应该都已经来过这里、体验过一遍了。
E: If possible, I'd like them to rate our work... It's up to you who you want to approach. Don't worry, as <color=#dbc291ff>anyone who holds a position in The Family</color> should have already been here and tried what we have to offer.

C: 啊？怎么还有打分环节？
E: Huh? I didn't know I had to do that.

C: 我听说那个筑梦师团队以前整出过不少风评不错的虚拟现实项目。谁知道呢？指不定有些人就吃这套。
E: I've been told that the team used to produce many critically acclaimed virtual reality projects back then. Who knows? Some people might be drawn to it.

C: 好伙计，这个任务就交给你了！我需要一个新面孔帮我收集信息，看看我们搞的这个项目在他们看来有多少价值。
E: The mission is yours, buddy! I need a fresh face to gather information for me, as I want to find out how The Family values our work.

C: 不不不，一点都不打扰！我还巴不得多和您聊几句呢！
E: No, you aren't bothering me at all! I couldn't be happier to carry on this conversation!

C: 哎，最近加班加得都快累死了，可算能好好休息一下了。
E: Alas, I've been exhausted from working overtime lately. I could really do with a break.

C: 在调查人员的不懈努力下，大部分赃款现已成功追回。
E: Thanks to the persistent effort of the investigation team, most of the stolen money has been recovered.

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 那你还那么在乎专利干嘛？
E: Then why do you care so much about your patents?

C: 告诉你，它可能是匹诺康尼历史上最伟大的发明之一！仔细听好了，我给它取的名字——「长效专利捍卫一纸通」！
E: Behold, this could be one of the greatest inventions in the history of Penacony! Listen carefully, it's called the "Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier."

C: 出问题的就是这只望远镜？
E: So, is this the telescope that went haywire?

C: *皮皮西族粗口*特拉维斯那个叛徒！败类！皮皮西族之耻！
E: *Pepeshi curse* Travis! That traitor! Scumbag! A disgrace among us Pepeshi!

C: 第八次的一见钟情，我爱上的是……
E: Well, the eighth time I've fallen in love at first sight...

C: 就连与她的离别都充满了欢颜，不留任何遗憾…我和她渡过了最完美的二十分之一的人生，未来恐怕……
E: Even our parting was filled with joy and no regrets... I spent the most amazing one-twentieth of my life with her, and I'm afraid I won't be...

C: 你将科蒂的照片交给了莫里斯。
E: You handed the photo of Coty over to Morris.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 哎呀，那还真是可惜了，难得有这么好的底子，再考虑考虑吧。
E: Ohh, what a shame. You've got great potential, you know? Just think about it again.

C: 关于你的工作…
E: About your job...

C: ——但幽默要分尺度和场合。就算你不是公众人物，也要注意言行。
E: ...But humor has its time and place. Even if you're not a public figure, you should watch your actions.

C: 我已经想通了，咱们把那些骗人的歌忘了吧，我要让你成为宇宙中独一无二的音乐艺术家，让你能自由地唱出自己喜欢的歌曲！
E: I've thought it all through! Let's forget about all those bogus songs! I'm going to make you the most unique musician in the universe, and you'll be free to sing the songs you like!

C: 感谢各位宾客的捧场，这次我带来了一些特别的音乐…这些歌曲与我过去的风格不同，但我希望诸位能耐心感受一下其中的「纯美」——
E: Thank you all for attending, my dear audience. This time, I've brought some special music... This song is different from my usual style, but I implore your patience as you experience the Beauty within it.

C: 从一开始，我想要的就是功成名就，而不是什么传承艺术的使命。
E: From the start, my goal was to achieve success and fame, rather than the calling of passing on the art.

C: 我就像只被困于笼中的鸟儿，只有鼓起勇气一跃而下，才能真正获得自由！
E: I'm like a bird trapped in a cage. Jumping off bravely is my only way to freedom!

C: 可是梦里根本摔不死。
E: But it's impossible to fall to your death in a dream.

C: 你、你这人怎么这么没同理心？！我就知道，这世界上所有人都一样…一样的冷漠、一样的刻薄！
E: H—How can you have so little empathy!? I knew it! Everyone in this world is cold and mean!

C: 刚进入梦境时，那座高耸的<color=#dbc291ff>酒店大楼</color>曾让我心潮澎湃。但我对它的印象已经有些模糊了……
E: When I first arrived at the Dreamscape, that <color=#dbc291ff>towering hotel</color> took my breath away. However, I can barely remember how it looks now...

C: 真的还有存在生命的星球吗？我还能完成自己的使命吗？这样的探寻…真的有意义吗？
E: "Does life still exist on any of those planets? Will I be able to accomplish my mission? Is my search... meaningful?"

C: 但那究竟是谁的手笔，我到现在也没能想通。
E: I still can't figure out who did it.

C: 来匹诺康尼之前，我曾在一个污染严重的星球上生活过一阵。那地方遍地工厂，排放出的黑烟遮天蔽日……
E: Before coming to Penacony, I stayed on a heavily polluted planet for a while. That place was full of factories spewing black smoke that covered the sky...

C: 我不太清楚这其中的原理，我也愿意相信方才只是一场小小的意外…但我想提醒您，家族尽管尊重每一位逐梦客，但他们的忍耐也是有限度的。
E: I'm not sure of the actual reason, but I'm willing to believe what happened just now was simply a minor accident... Though, I still wish to remind you that even if The Family respects each and every dreamchaser, there is a limit to their patience.

C: （感觉有些不妙…这家伙好像有些生气了。）
E: (Doesn't sound very good... This guy seems kinda angry.)

C: （得保持警觉…说不定她也会突然跳起来攻击我。）
E: (Gotta stay alert... she might just leap up too and attack me out of nowhere.)

C: 之前的那件事…进展如何？
E: How are things... with that matter from before?

C: 记住，谨言慎行。
E: Remember, be careful with everything you say and do.

C: 麦考先生没有把话说死——很明显，他知道你曾在梦中做过哪些丢人的事……
E: Mr. McCoy was not specific with his phrasing... He clearly knows the shameful things that you have done in the Dreamscape...

C: 他们颐指气使的态度令我恼火。总有一天，我会……
E: I can no longer stand their arrogant and domineering attitudes. One day, I will...

C: 时刻心怀善意，即使你并不富裕，撒下的种子也会在未来开花结果。只要有人因基金会的呼吁而心生良善，我们的努力就成功了。
E: Always harbor good intentions, even if you may not be rich — For one day, the seeds you sow will bear fruit in the future. So long as the foundation's cries fall on kind ears, our endeavors will count as a success.

C: 我嘛，就是个卖玩具的。如果你家里有小孩的话，没准儿也买过我们的产品，没啥技术含量。
E: Me? I'm just a toy trader. If you have kids back home, you might have bought one of our products. They're not complex at all.

C: 到底有没有钱，我心里清楚得很，别玩这种砍价的把戏，一口价。
E: I know exactly how much you're able to afford, so quit the haggling. It's a fixed price.

C: 她正在两头下注。
E: She was hedging her bets.

C: 我知道你军火商的身份了。
E: I know that you're an arms dealer.

C: 看到这个梦境迷钟了吗？修好它，就算你赢了。
E: See this Dream Ticker? Repair it, and you win.

C: 校长有话托我带给你…
E: The dean has asked me to relay some words to you on his behalf...

C: 哦？难道他打算为我发一份奖学金？居然现在才想起来，真是贵人多忘事。
E: Oh? Does he intend to award a scholarship to me? I can't believe I'm only just remembering this. It seems that great wits do indeed have short memories.

C: 当校长是什么感觉？
E: What is it like being the dean?

C: 更别说每天批不完的请示和拿不到的经费了，谁想谁头疼。
E: This is even before mentioning the endless mountain of requests waiting for my approval and the funding that always seems to be far from reach. It would give any person a major headache.

C: 这个箱子被放在了不起眼的角落里，仿佛故意不让人发现似的。难道是为了掩饰什么？
E: The box has been tucked away in an obscure corner, as if someone intentionally meant to keep it out of sight. Is there anything unspeakable hidden inside?

C: 呃，让我想想怎么说比较不得罪人...这么说吧，在咱们这群人里，有那么几位不是很懂得「把握分寸」…我就不直呼其名了哈。
E: Hmm, let me think how to explain without offending anyone... I'll put it this way: In our group, there are some who can't "read the room"... I won't mention them by name, of course.

C: 你这样会打扰到别人的。
E: You're being a bother.

C: 嗨～惊喜不惊喜，意外不意外～
E: Surprise! Bet you didn't expect to find me!

C: （向她投诉设备的安全问题）
E: (Complain to her about the safety of the facilities)

C: 在芝士流心，哦不，现在应当叫它「洞悉者」了——在它的无奈中，你开始向上攀登。
E: Notwithstanding the exasperation of Molten Cheese Tart — no, it's the "Insighter" now — you start your upward climb.

C: 这方面大家倒是没什么异议。
E: We actually have no objections to this idea.

C: 看来「造物机兵」这名字也不错。
E: Looks like the "Automaton of Creation" would make a pretty fitting name.

C: 你认真的吗...
E: Are you serious...?

C: 你看这个音符啾，写得一点也不标准。上面的小弯都没加。
E: Look at this note, tweet. It's not even accurate. It's missing a curve.

C: 好啾，那其他小鸟的事情还麻烦客官多留心了啾~
E: Alright, tweet. Then please look out for the other little birds, my dear guest. Tweet~

C: 那我走了，你要好好站岗，不要让石头老板跑进来了啾~
E: I'm leaving then. You keep a careful watch. Don't let Boss Stone get in, tweet!

C: 我还会回来的——啾！
E: I'll be back, tweet!

C: （可恶…看来只能迎战了！）
E: (Dang... Looks like it's an unavoidable battle!)

C: 唔…我确实安排了固定的站岗位置，但那些调皮的小家伙们总喜欢跑到别的地方去…
E: Ugh... I assigned fixed stations for sentry duty, but those playful little ones just love running off to other places...

C: 您好？啾啾？<size=28>啾——啾啾——！</size>
E: Hello? Tweet tweet? <size=28>Chiiirp tweet tweet!</size>

C: 啾啾！看来所有的孩子都回来了啾！
E: Tweet tweet! Looks like all the children are back, tweet!

C: 嗯哼，没关系啾，时间会为我们筛出那些更伟大的作品啾~
E: Uh-huh, that's fine, tweet! Time will filter out better works out for us, tweet!

C: …哎呀，怎么不是折纸小鸟呀！这份礼物不是给你的啾！
E: ...Oh? You're not an origami bird! This gift isn't for you, tweet!

C: （沉默地盯回去）
E: (Stare back silently)

C: 「很好…那么你的敌人也就会成为我的敌人啾。」
E: "Very good... Now any enemy of yours is an enemy of mine, tweet."

C: 啾啾？原来您是钟表小子的朋友啾！现在这里正需要帮手啾！
E: Tweet tweet? So you're Clockie's friend, tweet! We could use all the help we can get now!

C: 啾啾——太好了，跑丢的孩子们都安全回来了啾！
E: Tweet tweet... Thank goodness, all of the runaways are back safe and sound, tweet!

C: 嗯哼，本公子快要想起来了啾……
E: Mhmm, I'm fast remembering it now, tweet...

C: 啾，如果我天天都打理羽毛，也能有那么漂亮的翅膀吗？
E: Tweet, could daily feather-care lead to wings as splendid as hers?

C: 我还是回大树去找几个帮手吧，让我们去冒险啾！
E: I'd better head back to the Great Tree to look for some help so we can go on an adventure, tweet!

C: 这可能是好事。你又仔细想了想——史瓦罗会用何种方式帮助你解脱实在是个不可预知的谜团。
E: This is probably for the best. Thinking about it, the method that Svarog would use to free you is an unpredictable mystery.

C: （试着握爪）
E: (Try shaking its claw)

C: 我是一只没用的小鸟，连自己的巢都搭不好，只配住在垃圾袋里啾……
E: I'm a useless birdie that can't even build its own nest. I'm only fit to live in a trash bag, tweet...

C: 猫和鸟是天敌。
E: Cats and birds are natural enemies.

C: 我要找一个比垃圾桶更好的藏身点，成为捉迷藏之王啾。
E: I'm going to look for a hiding spot that's better than a trashcan, and become the champion of Hide-and-Seek, tweet.

C: 猜中了有奖励，猜不中就会被小鸟吃掉啾！
E: You get a prize for the correct answer! I'll eat you up if you get it wrong, tweet!

C: 我要把它画下来啾！
E: I'm going to draw it, tweet!

C: 更可惜的是…
E: What's even more unfortunate is...

C: 啾啾，这可是我的得意之作！
E: Tweet tweet, this is my magnum opus!

C: 你是纸做的，不能泡水。
E: You're made from paper. You can't soak in water.

C: 您好您好，请跟着箭头走啾~
E: Hello hello, please follow the arrows, tweet!

C: 祝你生日快乐啾~
E: Happy birthday to you, tweet!

C: 麻烦了，麻烦了！我忘了做输入框了啾！
E: Oh dear, oh dear! I forgot to include the input box, tweet!

C: 好吧，好吧啾。
E: Fine, tweet.

C: 另外，倘若你真想为本地建设做贡献的话，不如去造物之柱看看——记得戴上安全帽。
E: Also, if you really want to make a contribution to the local construction effort, why don't you go and check out the Pillars of Creation? Make sure you wear a safety helmet!

C: 它们都回家了嘛？呜呜，完了，我不认路，这下怎么回去啊！
E: Have they all gone home? *sob* It's game over. I don't know the way back. How am I going to get home!

C: 我明白了，我会等你，就等一小会，你快些决定跟不跟我走。
E: I see. I'll wait. Just for a short while though. Hurry. Decide whether you want to come with me.

C: 待会儿就躲在杂物堆后面千万别出来…等我喊你再出来，万万不可轻举妄动，听清楚了吗？
E: Just stay behind the boxes and don't come out... unless I tell you to. Don't do anything stupid. Are we clear?

C: 我跟你不一样，我行得正走得正。
E: No, I'm nothing like you. I've been a servant of justice.

C: 今天我定要替云骑军上下除掉你这个叛徒！
E: You filthy traitor! I'll take you down today for the sake of the Cloud Knights!

C: 我觉得还挺可爱的啊…哎呀，现在不是聊这个的时候……
E: But I thought it was a cute name... Oh, let's forget about it for now...

C: 我知道你，你不是{NICKNAME}吗？我听说你是见多识广的化外民，你知道这是怎么回事吗？
E: Hey, I know you! You're {NICKNAME}, right? I've heard that you're a knowledgeable Outworlder, so maybe you happen to know why my Diting has suddenly started talking?

C: 唉，没关系…小鱼也能猜到，这块石板早晚会被人收走的。
E: Fine, it doesn't matter... I always had a feeling that someone would come and take it away.

C: 呃…我去叫他显得十分刻意不是吗？「我这占卜用的玉兆好了，你可以来抽签了」…这不是就像是在说「以前玉兆是坏的」一样吗？
E: Well... it might seem a bit too deliberate if I just call him out of the blue and say something like, "Hey, my jade abacus is ready. Come over here and draw your lot." It might make it seem like my abacus wasn't ready before.

C: 钱我就不收了。
E: I won't accept the money.

C: 你有权保持沉默，但我警告你，在十王司，我们有的是办法让你开口。
E: You have the right to remain silent, but let this be a warning to you: At the Ten-Lords Commission, we have ways of making you talk.

C: 某种悸动在你胸腔里反复翻腾，你认真地想了许久，最终决定不碰这些供品为好。
E: A throbbing sensation churns through your chest, and you think long and hard about it — before ultimately choosing not to touch the offerings.

C: 它能被传唱大几千年，就是因为「吓人」。在我被收进造化洪炉之前，朱明人都听过这出戏！
E: The reason why it can be sung for thousands of years is because of how "freaky" it is. Before I was sealed within the Creation Furnace, it was known to everyone aboard the Zhuming.

C: 怎么？你这么警惕，我真的就是想给你一点好处啊。
E: Huh, why so paranoid? I'm just trying to do you a favor here.

C: 十分尴尬，一点都不严肃！
E: It's totally awkward and not serious at all!

C: 太好了，这份恩情在找到我朋友之前，我是不会忘记的。
E: Great. I will never forget this show of kindness... until I get to my friends.

C: …我必须得来，小佩。我爱夏洛特，我爱你的妈妈…现在我知道了她身在何处，我必须得找到她…哪怕只是和她见上一面也好啊。
E: I had to come here, Pennie. I love Charlotte — I love your mother... Now that I know where she is, I simply have to find her... Even if it is just to see her for a brief moment.

C: 这里的机器都赢遍了，接下来该去哪呢……
E: I've cleared out all the machines 'round here, where to next...

C: 我倒要看看…所谓的赌神是否真的像传言里那样无所不能，谁都赢不过他！
E: I want to see if this so-called Ace Gambler really is as all-powerful as the legends say, let's see if you really can beat anyone!

C: 那群人是…？
E: "They"? Who are "they"...?

C: 这不是自我感觉良好，{F#女士}{M#先生}，这是一个单纯的事实。相信您一定也看得出来吧？
E: This isn't self-flattery, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}. It's a fact. I believe you can see it too, right?

C: …所以呢，接下来咱们该去哪场宴会？该让哪位贵宾老爷品品我的酒香？
E: ...So, which banquet should we attend next? Which esteemed guest should I offer a taste of my wine?

C: 你从刚才起就一直在说些有的没的…那我呢？你就没有什么话想对我说吗？
E: You've been rambling on about irrelevant stuff since earlier... What about me? Don't you have anything to say to me?

C: 不知为何，你心中萌生出了一种想要把它砸碎的冲动。
E: For some reason, you feel an urge to smash it into pieces.

C: 瞧瞧你发现了什么，一只藏在广告牌里的折纸…大鸟，它的营养价值是牛肉的五倍。快偷偷地靠近它，给它一个惊喜。
E: Look what you've found! A giant... origami bird, hiding inside a billboard. Its nutritional value is five times than that of a big, juicy steak. Try sneaking up on it and giving it a shock!

C: 被剪下的磁带…
E: The tape cutting...

C: 白露…
E: Bailu...

C: 赞美伟大的桶王！
E: Praise the mighty King of Cans!

C: 明智的选择——苜蓿币不方便的话，我们也支持信用点支付。
E: A wise decision... If Alfalfa credits ain't no good for ya, we can take IPC credit payments, too.

C: 能反抗？早说啊。
E: I can fight back? Why didn't you say so earlier?

C: 别打了，别打了，再打就要痛醒了。
E: Stop, stop! Beat us any harder n' we'll be beaten awake!

C: 叉腰，既是表现我们的自信，也是勉励自己——无论明天是什么样子，我们都无所畏惧。
E: Hands on hips expresses our confidence while also encouraging ourselves — regardless of what tomorrow brings, we'll meet it head-on.

C: 你这…
E: You little...

C: 家人，想开点吧，都是为了知更鸟小姐。
E: Fam, keep an open mind. This is all for Miss Robin.

C: 听说附近有高价倒卖《空气蛹》的逐梦客，你知道在哪吗？
E: I heard there's a Dreamchaser around here scalping the INSIDE album. Do you know where?

C: 看啊！是知更鸟小姐！
E: Check it out — it's Miss Robin!

C: 我在流梦礁见过一位女士…
E: I met a lady at the Dreamflux Reef...

C: 台上人定定地望着你，你感觉到某种真挚的谢意。
E: The person on the stage soulfully stares at you. You feel a certain appreciative sincerity from those eyes.

C: 你想起一位假面愚者，与她的相识大大提升了你在匹诺康尼的开拓「风险」。
E: You think of a certain Masked Fool who made your Trailblazing expedition in Penacony a great deal more dangerous after you two met.

C: 你将手掌抵在放映机的尾部，与压缩梦泡亲密接触，纷乱的记忆涌上心头……
E: You place your palm against the back of the projector, in close contact with the compressed dream bubble. Chaotic memories flood your mind...

C: 您真是贵人多忘事啊，再说，我们也才没分开多久……
E: You must be kidding. We just met not long ago...

C: {F#她}{M#他}才是真的{NICKNAME}。
E: {F#She}{M#He} is the genuine {NICKNAME}.

C: 让您受累了，{NICKNAME}大人。
E: Sorry that you had to go through all these hassles, {NICKNAME}.

C: 下次要是能擦亮眼睛就好了…
E: Keep your eyes peeled next time...

C: 人有五名，回来的只有三个……
E: There are five, but only three have returned...

C: 没错，我劝你还是早点走出自己的创作舒适区！
E: Of course. So, I advise you to just come out of your creative comfort zone.

C: 密文是：嗯呢呢，呢嗯嗯，嗯呢呢，嗯呢呢。
E: The code is "Ehn-nah-nah, Nah-ehn-ehn, Ehn-nah-nah, Ehn-nah-nah."

C: 请你出去！
E: Please leave the area at once!

C: 自打退役以后，它成了赛事场馆，在新的使命中焕发生机。作为老父亲，我自然是很欣慰的，但内心也是很矛盾的——我那些「多就是好，大就是美」的舰炮怎么办呢？
E: Ever since its retirement, it has become a venue for all sorts of competitions and flourished in its new role. Seeing myself as a father to this ship, I admire it greatly, but I am also conflicted... What is to be done about those cannons? Did we not say: "The more the better, the bigger the more beautiful?"

C: 至于我的事，等你凯旋再说吧。
E: As for what I want, we can discuss that on your triumphant return.

C: 在二人的注视下，你不慌不忙地掏出玉兆，假做出维修的姿态，慢慢走近控制台。
E: Under the gaze of the two operators, you casually pull out the jade abacus and pretend to be fixing it as you slowly approach the control station.

C: 你明白了吧，这就是我找上你的原因。
E: Now you understand why I came to you.

C: 你还别说，他们看到程序之后就立刻来找我了，我大方承认就是我干的。
E: Enough of that. As soon as they saw the program, they came looking for me and I graciously admitted that it was my work.

C: 仁科！你不也有事情要拜托{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}吗，你倒是说两句啊！
E: Renke! You have something you wished to ask of the {F#girl}{M#boy}, don't you? Say something!

C: 你必须得去换一台更加强劲的设备来看飞行编队！懂了吗？手机看不见！
E: You need a far more powerful device to properly enjoy a flight demonstration! Do you understand me? You'll never see it on a phone!

C: 啾啾~啾——
E: Tweet tweet... Tweeeeeet.

C: 我、我叫小金…没接触过演艺圈，这是第一次参加电影拍摄。呃…谢谢。
E: I—I'm Goldie... I've never professionally acted, so this is the first time I'm participating in a film. Umm... Thank you.

C: 时间差不多咯，准备好——摄影机，启动！
E: It's about time. Everyone ready... Cameras, action!

C: 全场爆发出雷鸣般的掌声，普通的艺人遵守规则，天生的明星引领潮流！在铺天盖地的欢呼声中，我们的故事终于迎来了尾声，符合预期却又始料未及的结局！
E: The whole room erupts with thundering applause — Ordinary artistes stay in their lane, while it is the gifted stars who will blaze the trail! Amidst raucous cheers and clapping, our story has finally come to an end — a most expected yet surprising ending!

C: 你感到有些疲惫，眼皮不知不觉地耷拉了下来，但很快你又清醒了过来。
E: You feel a bit fatigued and your eyelids fall in spite of you. But soon, your senses return once more.

C: 呃，好吧，那换个说法——刚才见你一直露出智慧的眼神，看了就让人心里发毛。
E: Alright... Let's put it another way. When I saw you just now, you seemed so smart that it gave me the shivers.

C: 当然，没问题。只是这对睡眠质量有影响，是个坏习惯。建议你不要一直开灯入睡。
E: Sure, no problem. It's just that it will affect your sleep quality. It's not a good habit. You'd better not always sleep with the light on.

C: 瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!

C: 求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
E: My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

C: 对债权人而言，手中只有一纸欠条，钱款在债务人手里，谁也不知道债务人会不会按期还钱。拿着欠条，可不能当利衡币用，岂不也是「一无所有」？
E: The creditor is left with just a debt slip in hand while the money is with the debtor. Who knows if the debtor will repay the money on time? A debt slip is not equivalent to cold hard Balance Coins. Isn't that also being left with nothing?

C: 吼吼，这可不像是万敌阁下能说出的答案啊。难道在本狮不知道的时候，您还经常去观赏广场上的那些悲剧演出？
E: Ho-ho, this doesn't sound like a usual answer from Lord Mydei. Could you have been frequenting the plaza for tragic plays behind my back?

C: 我倒是想知道，这种问题，为什么要找我求助？
E: What I want to know is... why you're asking me such a question?

C: 你的想法很独特。
E: Your thinking is very unusual.

C: 你看，这就是我说的那种人。
E: See, this is the kind of character I was talking about.

C: 卜者阿洛说：「欧洛尼斯保佑…我早已预言了结局，却无力改变…唉。」
E: The diviner, Alor said: "May Oronyx protect us... I foresaw this outcome long ago, but I hadn't the power to change it... *sigh*"

C: 为什么要寄存在我这里…厨房里难道没有冰箱吗？
E: Why do you have to store it here... Does the kitchen not have a refrigerator?

C: 哈努兄弟是最棒的…
E: Hanu is the best...

C: 用球棒教训他一顿。
E: Teach the person a lesson with my baseball bat.

C: 我没重建帮派前在捡垃圾，我建了垃圾帮还在捡垃圾，那帮派不白建了？
E: Picking up trash before and after rebuilding the gang... what's the point of the gang then?

C: 这也太缺德了。
E: This is just plain bad taste.

C: 对了，你知道这里是什么地方吗？我怎么感觉像做梦…所有事物都很虚幻，就连你我都不例外……
E: Right, do you know where we are? Why do I feel as though I'm inside a dream...? Everything looks so unreal, including you and me...

C: 两个桶全揍一顿！
E: Beat up both of those cans!

C: （手指摩挲着木纹的痕迹时，你感受到它所感受到的……）
E: (When your fingers trace the grain of the wood, you start to feel what it feels...)

C: 风铃铁了心默不作声。再敲一次试试？
E: The wind chime stays stubbornly silent. Try ringing it... one more time?

C: 喂喂。
E: Hey there.

C: 快快长大吧，真好奇你会开出怎样的花呢。
E: Grow up fast, little ones. I can't wait to see what kind of blossoms you'll become.

C: 翁法罗斯或许将会引燃<color=#dbc291ff>一位绝灭大君的怒火</color>。
E: Amphoreus might soon trigger <color=#dbc291ff>the rage of a Lord Ravager</color>.

C: 迷路迷境的入口，无论看多少次都觉得很梦幻……
E: No matter how many times I see the entrance to the Membrance Maze, it still feels like a dream...

C: 这么说来，哀丽秘榭到处都很安静呢。待在这种让人心静的地方，无论什么烦恼，都能一下子忘掉……
E: Come to think of it, Aedes Elysiae is such a quiet place. Residing in such a serene place instantly dispels all your troubles.

C: 一些我们以为丢失的，其实一直都在。一些我们突然找回的，却又总是不愿相信。
E: The things we once thought were lost might have been with us all along, while other things we suddenly find may be unbelievable.

C: 好吧，你的理智最终获得了胜利。没关系，看起来这只木制的小马并不会自己跑掉，你还有很多时间来思考究竟该如何行动。
E: Alright, your rationality wins out in the end. It's fine. It doesn't look like this wooden horse is going to go running off on its own. You have some time to consider the best course of action.

C: （描述掌粮官的外观）
E: (Describe the appearance of the food provisions officer)

C: 你轻轻敲打了几下木壁，试图向那位信徒传递这样的信息——你是个温和而宽容的神，关爱世人，愿意聆听信者的任何请求。
E: You gently tap the wooden wall a few times, trying to convey this message to your disciple — You are a gentle and forgiving god. You care for the people of this world and are willing to listen to any request your believers may have.

C: 你还会回来吗？
E: Will you ever come back?

C: 不过嘛，现在其余神驹都去往别的城邦了，就剩我留在这。往后你要还有事，见到的就都是我了。
E: However, the other divine foals have departed for different cities as of now. I'm the only one still around, so I'll be your go-to helper from now on.

C: 至于那位亲身前往的神驹，我有段时间没听到它的消息了。
E: As for that divine foal who went there personally, I haven't heard news of it for some time.

C: 我是听说有位神驹在传送过程中迷失了，却没想到是在悬锋城。
E: I knew of a divine foal lost in teleportation, but never guessed it would be at Castrum Kremnos.

C: 致初次到访「神悟树庭」的学者——你好，欢迎参加雅努斯之驹的入学考试。
E: To first-time visitors of the Grove of Epiphany — welcome to the entrance examination of Janus' Steed.

C: …是只有大地兽生活的城邦吗？
E: ...is it the city with only dromas?

C: 这份工作非常危险，如果你出了什么问题，我可没有办法给艾丝妲交代。
E: This job is very dangerous. If anything happens to you, I really don't know how I would explain it to Asta.

C: 如果你了解到其他与星神相关的线索，请记得与我联系！
E: Please contact me if you have any other clues about the Aeons!

C: 那就是黑塔大人最忠实的追随者！
E: I am a die-hard fan of Madam Herta!

C: 不然你还是和我一起去避难吧？
E: Why don't you take refuge with me?

C: 那你可就找对人了，其实我正在调查这场袭击的内幕。
E: You've come to the right person. I am investigating this attack.

C: 然而，仅仅是因为它们的外形，并不为人类所普遍认识，它们的生命就不被重视了！
E: However, just because their appearances are not understood by humans, their lives are not valued!

C: 算了算了，就让世玲再给你做一次关于波少的科普介绍吧。
E: Fine fine. Let me reintroduce Master Capote to you.

C: 这……这关你什么事！空间站有空间站的规矩，应物科也有应物科的准则。
E: It's... it's none of your business! The space station has its own rules and regulations, so does our department.

C: 既然你能察觉到，那就最好不要来烦我。
E: I'm glad you noticed. Then leave me alone.

C: 如何评价这次的入侵。
E: How do you evaluate the invasion?

C: 哎，都怪这场入侵，搞得咱们科室好多文件又得重新整理了……
E: Sigh. Thanks to this invasion, I have to re-arrange a lot of the files of our department.

C: 为什么你也姓温？
E: Why are there so many Wens on the space station?

C: 你也认识呜呜伯？
E: Do you know Wubbaboo too?

C: 好像是加入了一些特殊的材料，我这种口味会让人共感到「爱」的存在。但大家都说，是一些让人流眼泪的刺激性物体，并不是「爱」。
E: Thanks to a special ingredient, I seem to be able to make people feel the presence of love. Yet, everyone says that it is due to some tear-inducing substance, not love.

C: 你就不能振作点吗？
E: Can't you pull yourself together?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你是外来者，你没听说过我的鼎鼎大名吗？…倒也正常。
E: Haven't you heard of me? ...I guess it's reasonable since you're an outsider.

C: 所以本天才接过了这个重任——我要来指导大家来赢取阮•梅的认可！
E: So, I have to shoulder the responsibility by showing everyone the way to win over Ruan Mei's favor!

C: 噢，你好，没想到能在这里遇到大活人，这还是头一遭。
E: Oh, hello. This is my first time running into a human here.

C: 嗯…得到这个问题的答案，就是你拨来通讯的原因吗？
E: Hmm... Did you make this call to get the answer to this question?

C: 唔…是这样吗？{NICKNAME}…看来「反吐真剂」开始发挥作用了。
E: Hmm... Is that so? {NICKNAME}, it seems that the Anti-Truth Serum is working.

C: 你终于搞明白这玩意的作用——它正沉默地提醒你，三种仪式道具就在这附近。或许是被信徒们收起来了，仔细找找或许能有所发现。
E: You finally understand what this thing is used for... It is silently telling you that the three ceremonial items are nearby. Perhaps they have been hidden away by the disciples... You may be able to find something if you search carefully.

C: 阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，如你所见，是位修辞学方面的教师。
E: Parmenides of Icatus. As you can see, I am a teacher in the study of rhetoric.

C: 我们双方都阐述了各自的立场。那么，这位智者，你要选择为哪方辩护？
E: We have both stated our view points. So, wise one, which side would you like to debate for?

C: 眼见两人又要为「真理」的定义争吵起来，你赶忙快步离开了现场。
E: Seeing that both of the men before you are hurtling towards another argument about the definition of "truth," you rush away from the scene as quickly as possible.

C: 既然这位智者愿意加入讨论，我们就来选个直观而深奥的论题。阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我先退让一步，将确定论题的权力交付你。
E: As this wise one has seen fit to join us in debate, let us select a topic that is both intuitive and profound. Parmenides of Icatus, I shall step back and pass the rights of topic selection to you.

C: 这两者并不能简单等同。数学知识在没有人的世界中仍然能成立，可「阿卡索斯」呢？若是没有最初的那批建城者，这个城邦便会变得从未存在过。
E: You cannot equate these two concepts so simply. The truths of mathematics would still stand to reason in a world where humans never existed, but what of Icatus? If it weren't for its original builders, the city would never have existed in the first place.

C: …自去年以来，城中多个探险队的物资相继出现了问题，包括即将过期的应急食物、混着杂草的药物、各种残次品卷轴……
E: ...Ever since last year, we've had problems with many expedition teams' supplies in the city, including emergency rations nearing the expiry date, grass and weeds mixed in with medicinal herbs, and defective scrolls...

C: 让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
E: Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.

C: 可是城外危险…
E: But it's dangerous outside the city...

C: 刚刚在市集…宁芙小姐被她父母派来的卫兵强行绑走了。
E: Just now, in the market... Miss Nympha's parents sent goons to kidnap her and carry her off.

C: 我知道了…如果她家里人再找你订了些什么，请告诉我，我的朋友。
E: I see... If her family puts in any more orders with you, please let me know, my friend.

C: 听说那孩子藏在<color=#dbc291ff>对面的高台上</color>，我可以从屋顶绕过去。
E: I hear that kid is hiding on the <color=#dbc291ff>platform opposite</color>. I can go around the roof to get there.

C: （信息都收集完了，先回去和珀里法斯讨论下吧。）
E: (All information gathered. Time to head back and discuss with Periphas.)

C: 这个方向…也不能幸免啊。
E: Not even this area... was safe.

C: 节哀…
E: I'm sorry for your loss...

C: 不…我一定要救你出去，我们不能死在这里。
E: No! I'm not leaving without you. This won't be our end!

C: 我大概懂了…「哇！那我这次喝你这个吧！这家的咖啡真是永远都喝不腻！」
E: I think I get it... "Wow! I'll drink this one this time! I never get sick of the coffee at this place!"

C: 我们在开研讨会的时候，正好赶上反物质军团入侵。坐我前面那个老哥身上都挂彩了，我都快吓死了。
E: Just as we were running a seminar, the Antimatter Legion invaded. The old fella sitting in front of me was wounded in action, and I was scared half to death.

C: 刚来的时候，我还和它合过影。
E: When I first came here, I took a photo together with it.

C: 哼哼，这可不兴外传，主要是宣发…其实就是「病毒营销」！
E: Hmph, well you can't tell anyone, but it's all about promotion... especially viral marketing!

C: 我最近听说，你们应物科在找什么东西，是出什么事了吗？
E: Someone told me the Department of Implement Arts is looking for some things. What's up?

C: 正常，现在人都到处发疯。
E: Well, it's normal — everyone's going crazy these days.

C: 异乡的勇士，万敌殿下的同伴，请你为悬锋族人见证此行的结局——
E: As a warrior from the outlands, a companion of Lord Mydei, please bear witness to our choice —

C: 嗡嗡！呜嗡！呜呜嗡！呜嗡嗡！呜嗡嗡！呜——
E: Grumph! Grumph! Grumphhh! Grumphhh! Grumphhhh! Grumph —
I want to...

C: 别管我，我的脑子正在烧烤…
E: Leave me alone, my brain is still trying to make sense of it...

C: 包在我身上！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 她是继承扎格列斯之力的半神，跑得飞快的神偷，黄金裔赛飞儿！
E: She's Cipher, a demigod who inherited Zagreus's power, a lightning-fast master thief and Chrysos Heir!

C: 一起上吧，柯库翁！
E: Let's do this, Glykon!

C: 即便灵魂真的会去往再创世后的世界，但这一刻，死亡带来的恐惧和伤痛仍是真实的。
E: Even if souls really do travel to the world after Era Nova, the fear and pain of death at that moment remain real.

C: 我要坐第一排。
E: I'll take a front-row seat.

C: 希瑞雅，没必要为大家做到这个地步。谎话说太多，到了新世界你就当不上刻法勒的祭司了。反正我也做好了去见塞纳托斯的准备……
E: Serena, there's no need for altruism. Lies will only dash your hopes of becoming a priestess of Kephale in the new world. I'm ready for Thanatos' embrace...

C: 真希望他们平安归来，这回我无论如何也要跟他换个班。
E: Hope they make it back in one piece. This time, I'm swapping shifts with him no matter what.

C: 再创世…我们的再创世，我一直笃信，我们所有人都会在安谧的梦乡中迎来那片温暖、光明的未来。
E: The Era Nova... Our Era Nova... I always believed that we would awaken to that warm, radiant future in tranquil dreams.

C: 果然…雅努斯并未指引我，只是坚定了我心中的选择…那便无需再犹豫了。
E: As expected... Janus didn't guide me, but rather reinforced the choice I had already made in my heart... No need to hesitate any longer.

C: 贤人一旦产生了这样的忧虑，则无法安享欢宴，并必然踏上追求真相而自毁的道路。
E: Once a Sage harbors such worries, they can no longer enjoy the banquet, and will inevitably embark on a self-destructive path in pursuit of truth.

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 来吧，宝贝儿们…踩吧，把你们的渴望踏入池中——
E: That's it, my lovelies... step in and crush your desires deep into the basin—

C: 我觉得，自从你加入列车组之后，星穹列车里好像更「生机勃勃」了。
E: It's almost as if you joining the crew has given everyone an extra boost of energy...

C: 底座虽然又小又轻便，但用着还蛮稳固，我小时候经常用它来看星星。
E: It's got a small base, but it's stable enough to get the job done. I used to love stargazing with it when I was a child.

C: 若想要诊所的孩子们全身心地感受这风景…那就必须让他们来亲眼看看才行呢。
E: For the children in the clinic to truly know the feeling of this view, they'd have to be here to see it themselves.

C: 她怎么把这个给你了？
E: Why did she give you a doll?

C: 老爹平时总是说腰不舒服…三月七姐姐说，只要把这个玩偶垫在腰上，就会舒服很多了！
E: Daddy always says his back is sore... March said if we lay this puppet behind his back, he'll feel much more comfortable!

C: …现在，克拉拉感觉就像是做梦一样。
E: ...I feel like I'm dreaming.

C: 唔…如果{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}也这么说，克拉拉心里就有底了。
E: Mm... If you think so too, then I'll definitely try. Thanks, {NICKNAME}.

C: 电影里的机器人都好厉害哦！大家都好高、好大…还有翅膀！
E: The movie robots sound so cool! They're really huge and they have wings!

C: 克拉拉在想…要是给史瓦罗先生安装一副翅膀的话，是不是也可以像故事里一样，飞到宇宙里了呢？
E: I'm thinking... If I put a pair of wings on Mr. Svarog, would he be able to fly around the universe like in the movies?

C: 什么事？
E: What is it?

C: 而且不仅有贝洛伯格的音乐，还有其他星球的……
E: And not only do you have Belobog music, but music from other planets, too...

C: 哎，说得我也好奇起来了…要不，干脆找个时间去北方山谷里看看好了！
E: You know what? He's got me excited too... Let's find a time to head into the northern valleys and check it out!

C: 偶尔放松放松，感觉也很不错…谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thanks for your advice, {NICKNAME}. It's nice to have a break every now and then.

C: 据说不行，有门禁。
E: I heard there were restrictions.

C: 所以我…很珍视你这个朋友。
E: ...which is why I treasure our friendship.

C: 列车长？就是那个戴上帽子比我高但其实比我矮的可爱小家伙吗？
E: The conductor? You mean that cuddly-looking creature, right? The one that's shorter than me if you don't count the hat?

C: 她现在并不记得之前发生的事，也没什么烦恼，算是「过得很好」吧。
E: She doesn't remember what happened before and doesn't have anything to worry about, so I'd say she is "doing well."

C: 是…哪个领域方面的知识？我不是通识类学者……
E: In what field of study? I am not a general scholar...

C: 你应该为拉明娜道歉…
E: You need to apologize to Lamina...

C: 动画片？原来不是真实存在的剑啊…但你不觉得这个思路其实是可行的吗？
E: Cartoon? So it's not a real sword!? But it could be real, right?

C: 小年轻，又见面了。坐坐坐，别见外。
E: Kiddo, we meet again. Take a seat.

C: 这个话题我有发言权。
E: Oh, I am best qualified to talk about this.

C: …在登上列车之前，我以为贝洛伯格和雪原就是整个世界的全部了——但没想到实际情况远超我的想象。
E: ...Before I boarded the Express, I thought Belobog and the Snow Plains were the entire world. I didn't think reality would surpass my imagination this much.

C: 没什么不好意思的，你就收下吧。
E: Come on — take it.

C: …嗯？因为姬子小姐看上去就很懂武器，枪啊炮啊什么的。
E: ...Why not? Seems like Himeko knows a lot about weapons — guns, cannons, you name it!

C: 记得好好珍惜自己身边的朋友，{NICKNAME}！
E: You should treasure your friends, {NICKNAME}!

C: 这样吗？嗯，说的也是…就像三月，她似乎并不记得自己的过去——列车组的各位，感觉背景都相当神秘呢。
E: Really? Hmm, I suppose you wouldn't... That reminds me of March — she can't remember her past. Feels like everyone in the Express Crew has a mysterious background.

C: 欢迎你随时光临。
E: You're always welcome here.

C: 呃…我只是不想冒犯到它。
E: Uh... I wouldn't want to offend them, but um...

C: 这种松弛感，真是难得……
E: Such a natural state of composure is rare — even on the Xianzhou... Inspiring...

C: 可爱的外表下兼具实力！
E: Cute and capable, all at once!

C: 星穹列车的名头，我最初正是从她那儿听来的。只可惜，她游览千星，却无缘登上无名客心中的圣地，列车。
E: I first heard about the Astral Express from her. It is a shame that, in her travels to thousands of stars, she never had the opportunity to board the Express — the sacred place of the Nameless.

C: 是我唐突了，尽说些陈年旧事，坏了气氛。
E: Ahem... All my talk of former days is rather spoiling the atmosphere. My apologies.

C: …好像…也没有那么相似？
E: Not exactly...

C: 有什么烦恼，不妨说说看。
E: What's the problem? I'm all ears.

C: 宁静的星空…
E: A serene evening...

C: 听说你们的智库……
E: I heard the data bank...

C: 这不就是我平时的工作——「愚钝」是世界的顽疾，传播智慧便是在医治宇宙。
E: I often find myself addressing the world's seeming inclination towards ignorance. But sharing a bit of my acquired knowledge? Well, I suppose it's my modest contribution to the universe.

C: 嗯，那些行李还挺重的，有时也会碰上难缠的客人。但我很喜欢这份工作！
E: Yeah, those bags can get pretty heavy, and sometimes there are difficult guests. But I really enjoy the job!

C: 换作以前，我的确会统统买下。但我最近在网络上看到很多有关整理的文章分享…好像是叫「断舍离」？我也正在研究学习。
E: I'd have bought them all if this were the past me, but I've recently seen a lot of articles online about organizing... I think it's called "Detach and Declutter"? I'm trying to learn more about this.

C: 每顶假发都能带来不一样的风格，感觉对练习妆容搭配来说也是一项全新的挑战！
E: Every wig brings out a different style. It feels like a new challenge every time I try a different do!

C: 我没做什么坏事吧？
E: I didn't do anything bad, did I?

C: 我当时也差点被吓晕！
E: I was also almost scared to death!

C: 宇宙间具有「魅力」的生物很多。在不知晓对方来意的情况下，请务必保持警惕。
E: There are many "charming" creatures across the universe. Please keep your guard up if you don't know the other party's intentions.

C: 听起来有点危险…
E: Sounds a little dangerous...

C: 恩公，你来啦。这是小女子在匹诺康尼闲逛时，买的一份伴手礼。想着几次打扰列车，必须以表感谢。
E: You're here, benefactor. This is a souvenir I bought while strolling through Penacony. I've intruded on the Express a few times already, so I must express my thanks in some way.

C: 我也想像婷婷姐一样有个名字……
E: I want a name just like Wendy...

C: 编的，必然是编的，这不可能，机器人也得充电。
E: Lies, that has to be lies. Impossible. Robots still need to recharge their batteries.

C: 我不会再为她哭泣了，因为我的眼泪…已经流尽了。
E: I'm not shedding another tear for her, because my tears... have run dry.

C: 这些东西好难消化——嗝——
E: Those are tough to digest *burp*...

C: 他想的有点多。
E: He does overthink things.

C: 听说好多年以前，贝洛伯格还有被驯化的熊，野外有冰原狼。不过现在已经看不到了。
E: I heard that hundreds of years ago, Belobog had domesticated bears, and direwolves roamed the wild. They're no longer around though.

C: 我过得挺好的呀，就是最近睡得不怎么好。
E: I've been doing alright. I just haven't been sleeping so well.

C: 那你会倾听我的请求吗？
E: In that case, can you hear out my request?

C: 奇怪，地址和收信人写的很清楚，这怎么还会寄丢？邮政局的人也太懈怠了吧……
E: How can this letter be undelivered when the recipient's name and address are clearly written on it? The people at the post office must be slacking off...

C: 可恶，要是不能用文字构筑味觉、形成通感，那我们美食记者还有什么存在的价值？对了，正巧跟你聊着，我这里还有一段，你帮我听听——
E: Darn it. What's the point of being a food journalist if I can't use words to construct a sense of taste and utilize synesthesia? By the way, while I'm talking with you, I have another paragraph here. Let me read it to you.

C: …然后再想想要是被编辑拉进黑名单，以后我该靠什么过活…唉。
E: And contemplate on what to do for a living if I'm blocklisted... *sigh*

C: 不过我有自己的行事准则，这点挫折不会改变我的想法，放心吧。
E: But I know what I am doing. This minor setback will not change my mind. Don't worry about it.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 唔，原来是这样吗……
E: Hmm? I see...

C: 为什么呀？
E: Why?

C: 又不是活不下去，你看，我现在不还活蹦乱跳的吗？嘿嘿…呃，倒也不必用这种怜悯的眼神看着我，没那么夸张吧？
E: It's not like I might die. Look, I'm alive and doing just fine. Hehe... And don't look at me with all that pity. It's nothing.

C: 呼——哎哟！我刚做了个美梦…哎，怎么又是你啊？
E: *Snore*... Ah! I was having a really nice dream... Huh, it's you again?

C: 没什么…一点矿坑里的「土特产」而已……
E: Nothing... It's just a little specialty from the mine...

C: 这是磐岩镇的特产，你们小年轻的见识少很正常……
E: It's a specialty of Boulder Town. Younger people usually don't know much about it...

C: 没什么，我只是……
算了，你慢慢想吧。
E: Well, take your time.

C: 不会又要我跑腿了吧，唉…
E: Do I have to run errands again...?

C: 毕、毕竟，我们「地火」接管下、下层区也很多年了……
E: A—After all, we have been in charge of the Underworld for years...

C: 为什么要制作这种机器人？
E: Why do you want to build something like that?

C: 走开走开，我这边已经停止鉴定古代遗物的业务了……
E: Go away. The relic appraisal service is no longer offered...

C: 不过，总感觉挣不到什么钱呢。我经常是好不容易捉到两三只，想要拿去卖掉的时候，就被告知洞螈已经降价了……
E: However, I don't think I'm making any money. I usually can only catch two or three. When I try to sell them, I am told the price of olm has dropped...

C: 不管怎么说，我们一定用得上公司的技术。如果他们能安分守己地协助市民开展工作，贝洛伯格说不定能在一代人的时间里就完成他们口中的「技术跃迁」……
E: Whatever the case, we can definitely make use of the IPC's technology. If they can know their place and assist the citizens in their work, Belobog may even complete this "tech-leap" they speak of within a generation...

C: 哈哈，刚刚只是开玩笑。想聊些什么？
E: Ahaha, just kidding. What's up?

C: 出了这机械屋我可就没办法罩着你了，在外边千万要小心啊。
E: I can't protect you if you step out of the workshop, so please be utterly careful outside.

C: 等地上的工作完成后，我还是可以想办法来一次星间旅行。指不定到时候就不是被你们载着，而是和你们并排前进了。
E: When the work on the ground is complete, I'll still be able to plan my own interstellar journey. Who knows, maybe by then you won't be carrying me, but advancing alongside me.

C: 你误会了，我的意思是你身手不凡，将来或许还能帮上我们铁卫的忙……
E: You misunderstood me. I mean since you have extraordinary combat skills, in the future maybe you can help us Guards out...

C: 不过既然你这么关心她，我就和你简单说说吧。
E: But since you're so concerned about her, I'll tell you how she's faring.

C: 咳，我没找借口。
E: Ahem, I'm not deflecting.

C: 在托帕的命令下，星际和平公司的员工表现得相对安分。她还将「源代码」交给了克拉拉保管。
E: Under Topaz's orders, the IPC workers have been behaving relatively well. She even handed over the Source Code to Clara to take care of.

C: 暂时就了解这些吧。
E: I'm done with this topic.

C: 伊妮丝的表演结束了。
E: Eunice's performance ends.

C: 就怕你骨头软到跑也跑不远了
E: I'm worried you can't handle if I really shoot my shot

C: 嗯，我是贝洛伯格雪原科考队的队员。
E: Yup, I'm a member of the Belobog Snow Plains research team.

C: 怎么，想动动筋骨，稍微出两滴汗？
E: Hmm? Want to get some exercise and break a sweat?

C: 你的「试炼」很特别。
E: Your "trial" was special.

C: 就是星穹列车行驶的轨道——本地人肯定听说过星穹列车，对吧？就是那群来去无踪的天外来客……
E: It's the track on which the Astral Express runs. You must have heard of them, right? Those elusive star-seeking travelers...

C: 本地人觉得自己的手机卡顿、发热、出了问题，其实只是因为他们不知道怎么升级系统而已……
E: Locals may experience issues such as lagging or overheating on their phones, but it's simply because they don't know how to upgrade the system...

C: 当然了！要说我和这款游戏的缘分，还得从我的父辈开始讲起呢。
E: Oh, absolutely positively so! Let me tell you how I started playing this game! Well, it actually started with my father's generation.

C: 咕~咕咕！
E: Groo~ Groo groo!

C: 你清了清嗓子——该到一展歌喉的时候了！
E: You cleared your throat... It's your time to shine!

C: 哎，我是把行李放这儿了啊…上哪儿去了？
E: Hey, I left my luggage here... Where is it?

C: 哪儿来这么多垃圾……
E: Where did all this trash come from?

C: 是啊是啊！
E: Yeah. Yeah!

C: 听说捉洞螈挺有赚头……
E: I heard that catching Olms is lucrative work...

C: 咳咳，我来播报今天的新闻……
E: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

C: 这个月生活费又不够了……
E: My monthly allowance's nearly run out again...

C: 对，就这么打！
E: Yes, that's it!

C: 你少来吧，懂不懂上届冠军的含金量啊？
E: That's enough. Do you understand how much the last championship is worth?

C: 有事请向队长报告。
E: Please report to the leader.

C: 哈哈，难得啊，有人会来找我这修文物的聊闲天——你想聊点啥？我都可以奉陪！
E: Hah hah, that's rare, someone wanting to chat with me, an artifact restorer! What would you like to talk about? I'm down for anything!

C: 克里珀堡真比公寓亮堂多了…
E: Qlipoth Fort is so much brighter than back home...

C: 这其实就是我的名字。
E: That IS my name.

C: 运势这种东西也没有那么死板，要是什么都能决定了，岂不是太不自由了吗？
E: Your luck isn't something set in stone. If everything was already pre-determined, where would one's freedom be?

C: 做生意嘛，做占卜也是赚钱，开棋牌馆也是赚钱，不冲突。
E: I do business. Divination makes money, and so do games of cards and tiles. There's no conflict of interest.

C: 实际上，这些所谓的志怪故事大多是来自异星生物、或是平平无奇的巧合，仙舟人见怪不怪，根本不值得大费周章。
E: In fact, most of these stories are just due to otherworldly species or mere coincidence. The Xianzhou people aren't really flustered by any of that, and barely raise an eyebrow.

C: 当初十王司审判我的时候，我也是这么说的啊！可惜判官们说了，无论有何苦衷，参与侵略战争就是错的，必须要为此付出代价。
E: I said the exact same thing when I was sentenced by the Ten-Lords Commission! But the judges said that no matter what reasons I had, participating in an invasion was wrong, and I had to pay the price.

C: 他怎么今天也没来？
E: Why didn't he come by today?

C: 我这人倒也不是没考虑过转行。只可惜我脑子太笨，始终没能讨到好工作，不得已才来做了小贩。
E: So it's not that I haven't thought about changing industry one day. I'm just not smart enough to be able to get a good job. That's why I'm a merchant.

C: 你真在这地衡司工作吗？
E: Do you really work here at the Realm-Keeping Commission?

C: 在我们当地语言里，「元」与「亓」形似，平时总有人打趣说我与那将军景元是亲戚。我也灵机一动，想这倒是个混饭吃的法子，便也如此自称了。
E: In our local tongue, "Yuan" and "Juan" sound kinda similar, so people always joked that I was related to the General Jing Yuan. A light bulb went off in my head, and I thought this might be a good way to scrounge a few credits out of people.

C: 你这点儿岁数，不也是小孩儿吗？
E: At your age, you don't consider yourself a child?

C: 不打扰你工作了。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 后来青镞也劝卑职了，让卑职想清楚，自己万一出了什么事，将军大人一定会很伤心的。卑职觉得她说得在理，也就没再坚持。
E: Later on, Qingzu came to advise me. She said that the general would be devastated if anything bad happened to me. Thinking she was right, I did not insist.

C: 总而言之，一个人只要进了幽囚狱，就再也没有任何隐私可言。
E: In summation, as soon as someone enters The Shackling Prison, they have no more secrets left to hide.

C: 总感觉自己昨天还在阳间蹉跎人生，怎么一眨眼就在这幽囚深狱工作几百年了呢？
E: I feel like I was still living in the mortal realm just yesterday. How it is that hundred of years can pass by in a blink while I work here?

C: 当然不是。但我是总负责人。
E: Of course not. But I'm the director.

C: 好的。再见。
E: Alright. So long.

C: 您请问，我一定有问必答。
E: Ask away, and I'll answer anything I can.

C: 她降价，我也降价，我总得卖出去，不能让她占了便宜。
E: She cut her price, then so did I. I had to make this sale and couldn't let her seize the advantage from me.

C: 最后等到公文发下来的时候，我并没有那种很喜悦的感觉，就是麻木了，因为等得太久，我甚至都没能热烈地庆祝一番。
E: In the end, when the official document was finally issued, I didn't feel the kind of joy you'd expect. I was just so numb from waiting so long that I couldn't even get hyped up to celebrate.

C: 当然没有了！我记事就像刀子刻在石头上一样，绝不会出错。
E: Of course not! My memory is like markings left by a blade upon stone. Not one detail is wrong.

C: 我其实没什么事，只是想聊聊…
E: Actually, it's nothing. Really, I just come to chat...

C: 他们持明族只要能浴月蜕生，便能洗去一切烦恼重新来过，而我却要背负着痛苦继续生活下去。
E: Because the Vidyadhara can wash away all their troubles and get to start again with their hatching rebirth, but I have to keep on living with this burden of pain I bear.

C: 队长为何突发感慨呢？
E: Why did you get emotional all of a sudden, captain?

C: 行啊。我退休以前，在这鳞渊境也当了二百多年的护珠人了。对这里熟得不能再熟了，你有什么想问的都可以问我。
E: Alright. Before I retired, I was a Pearlkeeper here for over two hundred years. I know everything there is to know about this place, so you can ask me anything you want.

C: 既然是寄放，你怎能卖了？
E: How can you sell the stuff if they're just asking you to hold onto it?

C: 要是一个人永远被同一个念头、同一个自我所困，那岂不是很可悲？
E: Wouldn't it be a tremendous tragedy if someone was eternally stuck with the same thoughts and the same ego?

C: 多谢您关心，但我实在是不太好……
E: Thank you for checking in. I'm really not doing too well...

C: 虽然前路不易，丹鼎司定会重新建立起信任的。
E: Although the future is challenging, the Alchemy Commission will regain the people's trust.

C: 重申一遍，现在是元会算法运行期间，闲杂人等请勿打扰。
E: Please note that the meta algorithm is running at the moment. Unauthorized personnel should not disturb the process.

C: 您尽管问，不过我知道也有有限，太复杂的事情，就麻烦您去问问几位卜官大人了。
E: Ask away, though I don't know much. If it's about something too complicated, I'm afraid you'll have to ask the Managing Diviners.

C: 预测不是立即做出改变的保证。
E: Forecasting doesn't guarantee immediate changes.

C: 好的，您慢走。
E: Okay. See you.

C: 我看人眼光还是挺准的，你很有本事，只是我现在还没有适合你的工作。
E: Looks like I was right about you. You've got some serious talent. Too bad I don't have any jobs for you right now.

C: 你真的是一个怪人。
E: You're such a weirdo.

C: 哎呀呀，随喜赞叹、随喜赞叹。
E: Praise be to happiness' dedication!

C: 你好像喜欢做一些新的烈焰浓茶？
E: You're fond of inventing new flavors of Flaming Potent Tea, aren't you?

C: 师父总是讲「天不生无用之人，地不造无用之物。」简单来说就是，没有任何一样事物与人是真正的废弃物。
E: He always said, "Nothing is truly worthless in the world." In other words, what one sees as junk might be treasures in the eyes of another.

C: 哪里哪里，都是金人巷的商户们很照顾我，我哪里担当得起……
E: Yeah, I guess so, thanks to the kind merchants in the alley...

C: 商会秘书这份工作，主要就是和各种人打交道，久而久之就和大家熟悉起来了。
E: Being a secretary means dealing with a wide variety of people, and we've become acquainted over time.

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 既然客人不是来修机巧偃偶的，我便继续忙了。
E: If you're not here to fix your ingenium marionette, then I'll get back to work.

C: 还可以吧。多谢关心。
E: Not bad. Thanks for asking.

C: 那真是太好了。
E: Glad to know that.

C: 这个「课题」，老师自打来了仙舟以后，就力排众议非要重新开题，但我资历尚浅，当时我是有些无法理解。
E: Ever since Master came to the Xianzhou ship, he had been pushing to resume this subject, despite the opposition from other scholars. At that time, I was still an inexperienced scholar and didn't quite understand his decision.

C: 客官你要是有什么感兴趣的，看看可以，别着急上手。
E: Please feel free to take a look if anything catches your attention. Just, please don't touch them.

C: 瞧一瞧看一看！今天不把杂技看，余生千年留遗憾！吞火球、踏燃碳，空中飞人大家赞！四方的宾朋来围观，个个都说——来了悠姐杂技团，给我千金也不换！
E: Hear ye! Hear ye! Enjoy acrobatic shows for a tiny fee! Come to Ms. Yo's acrobatic troupe and take a seat! Breathing fire, walking on burning coal, and thrilling trapeze acts for you to see! Let go of your burdens, and relax yourself in glee!

C: 药王慈怀～助我发财～你又来啦？要买点什么阿合马铁窗集团研发的好东西吗？
E: O, mercy of Sanctus Medicus, please bless me with riches... Oh, you're here again. Any premium products developed by the Arma Correctional Group for you today?

C: 你们队伍最后挑战到彦卿了吗？
E: Did your team manage to get to challenge Yanqing in the end?

C: 什么是帝垣琼玉牌？
E: What's Celestial Jade?

C: 我现在就有空，走吧？
E: I'm free now. Let's go?

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 「我们」憎恨有机体，因为设计如此。提示：这是有机体自己的设计。
E: We despise intelligent organic lifeforms by design. Note: The intelligent organic lifeforms wrote this into the design themselves.

C: 以前我爹就教过我，一个人可以去全宇宙的任何地方，但绝不能忘记自己的来处。我的来处，就是悠姐的杂技团啦～
E: My dad once told me, one can go anywhere in the universe, but they must never forget where they came from. I came from Ms. Yo's acrobatics troupe.

C: 算命先生说，我血里有风，注定一世漂泊…但这其实是件好事啊！咱们短生种一辈子那么短，银河又那么辽阔，要是不多去些地方，那多可惜呀～
E: The fortune-teller told me that there is wind in my blood, that I am destined to a life of wandering... But I think this is a good thing! We short-life species only have a limited time and the cosmos is so vast! It would be a shame not to explore it properly~

C: {NICKNAME}大人这么想就错了。
E: That's where you're mistaken, {NICKNAME}.

C: {NICKNAME}是谁呀？真不认识。
E: Who is {NICKNAME}? I don't know that person.

C: 好哦，注意安全。
E: Sure. Be careful.

C: 高定，顾名思义就是高级定制，由设计师亲自打版制作，限量发售。需根据每个客人的体型，在已有成品上再做微调。
E: Haute couture clothings are premium items that are custom-tailored. The tailor personally handcrafts everything and quantity is limited. Every customer's size must be adhered to, with finer adjustments made to the completed article after.

C: 每一款玉兆都包含着精密而细致的篆刻回路，借助着回路完成复杂的计算，就和你们常见的半导体电路板是一样的。
E: Every jade abacus contains a precise and meticulous engraved circuit and uses that to process complex calculations — just like the superconductor circuit boards common in your world.

C: 哈哈哈哈，这样吧，您只要接入罗浮的网络，搜索「玲珑斋说玉」，那上面有我上传的「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」的评测影像，那里说得比较详细。
E: Hahaha. Alright, just link up with the Luofu internet and search for "The Iridescent Parlor Talks Jade." You'll find some very detailed videos I've uploaded that review the Auspicious XV.

C: 话这位客官您还是来得不巧，节目可能还需要等等。但是客官要想听我论茶的话，我还能小小地卖弄一下。
E: Unfortunately, you're still far too early for the show. But stick around if you don't mind listening to me chat about tea.

C: 校兵场上所有人不禁在心中浮现出一个共同的想法——这一剑削去了时间。
E: Everyone in the parade square was thinking of the exact same thing — this strike had sliced through time itself.

C: 为了实现这个目标，我考了特别多的职业资格证，刚才我提到的只不过是九牛一毛。
E: To reach that goal, I took plenty of professional qualification certifications. The vocations I just mentioned were some of many.

C: 「至味盛苑」就只取其尾部最脆的三根肉骨，吊煮百草高汤沃沐，再取鲜羊凝油化浆，油煎慢炸，直至肉骨焦酥。
E: In the Garden of Gourmet, we extract the three crunchiest bones from the tail, boil them in a broth of myriad herbs, then grill them using fresh goat's fat paste. At the final stage, we slow fry them till the meaty bones are caramelized and crisp.

C: 我记不得失忆前是什么性格。不过认识我的人说我无论蜕鳞逆生多少次，我都是这个性格。再说了，如果记忆只有三十天，你也会跟我一样纵情去爱的。
