E: I can't remember a thing about what I was like before I lost my memory, but those who know me say I remain the same way no matter how many times I molt. Besides, if you only had memories for thirty days, you'd be as spontaneous with love as me.

C: 噢！是这么回事。
E: Ah, is that right?

C: 我与{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}相谈甚欢，要是有什么想问的，我肯定「知无不言言无不尽」，权当是交个朋友了。
E: I've had a great time chatting with you, {F#m'girl}{M#boy}. If there's anything you'd like to know, I'll definitely tell you everything. Consider me your new friend.

C: 村里懂些天象的老人说，这是有星宿要下凡，来惩治妖孽哩。后来过了五六年，有一天，天上突然掉下一个蛋来！
E: Some older villagers who knew about the stars said a constellation was about to descend to rid of evil. And then, five or six years later, an egg suddenly fell from the sky!

C: 神仙姐姐？
E: The celestial lady?

C: 仙舟上到处都是物流机巧鸟。
E: Courier cycranes are everywhere aboard the Xianzhou.

C: 当然了。我们的口号就是「鹤运速递，啥都能寄」，不过最终的解释权还得在我们这里。
E: Sure. Our slogan is "Heron Express — We Mail Anything," but we reserve the right of final interpretation.

C: 不留心看不见，你可真仔细。
E: That's easy to miss if you're not paying attention. You've got quite the eye.

C: 哎！这位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你走路怎么没声啊，吓春分一跳！
E: Hey, {F#miss}{M#sir}! How do you not make a sound while walking!? You scared me half to death!

C: 哼，也就现在是和平年代，放在丰饶民战争时期，他们玩弄的那套把戏，与其说是武，不如说是舞。
E: Hmph, they're lucky to be living in peaceful times. During the Denizens of Abundance Wars, those "moves" would have been more like dance arts than martial arts.

C: 我心善，见不得年轻人白白送命。他还大有可为，让他成长吧。
E: I can't bear to see a young man lose his life so senselessly when he still has a bright future ahead of him. Give him time to grow.

C: 我支持你，继续说。
E: I'm all for that. Please continue.

C: 你不会是搞地下赌博的吧？
E: You can't possibly be taking underground bets, right?

C: 我才不信嘞，还有谁能比我更熟？
E: I don't believe you. Can anyone claim to know Master Yanqing better than me?

C: 买买买，我现在就买！
E: I'll take one right now!

C: 喝得那彗星也倒流～
E: A cry so fearsome, even the comet went astern~

C: 别提了，文件像山一样。
E: Forget it. I'm snowed under with work.

C: 我来给星槎上牌照…
E: I'm here to license your starskiff...

C: 那就变成了二次元生物了！
E: I don't wanna become a 2D creature!

C: 掉到洞天视界边缘…
E: If you fall down to the edge of the delve...

C: 你说的有道理。名门正派确实很适合表演，却不适合你。
E: You're right. The orthodox sects offer suitable performances, but they are not suited to your tastes.

C: 他难道不是在说…你？
E: There's no way he's talking about... you?

C: 不不不，没关系的。你不必反驳、不必辩解，更不必道歉，
E: No no no, it's fine. You don't need to argue back or explain yourself — much less apologize.

C: 当日既送我到这么一个不得见人的去处，现在还好意思在这里说风凉话！
E: You were the one who sent me to this isolation on that day, and yet you now have the nerve to be sarcastic with me?

C: 随便聊聊…
E: Just a little chit-chat...

C: 我代表十王司来审问你…
E: I am here on behalf of the Ten-Lords Commission to interrogate you...

C: 将来你会有机会感受到的。
E: You'll get a chance to experience it first-hand in the future.

C: 好嘛～记得常来找人家「切磋」啊～
E: Okay, don't forget to visit me for more sparring!

C: 居然重新长起来了…
E: But now it's actually growing again...

C: 凭什么啊？
E: And why not?

C: 该从哪本追起呢？
E: Which book should I start with?

C: 她们仨这是要撕破脸了…
E: The three are about to have a fallout soon...

C: 罗浮夜市有哪些美食…
E: What kind of delicacies does the night market of Luofu offer?

C: 这哪里是茶了？
E: Ugh... you call this tea?

C: 是呀，难道不用装进箱子？
E: Yup. Don't they need to be put into crates?

C: 不过要我说，也抓不全…
E: If you ask me, I'd say it's impossible to catch them all...

C: 怀念一起学星槎的日子。
E: I miss the days we learned starskiff manufacturing together.

C: 上次来的时候，小吃摊的老板还请我吃了串糖，可惜这次都见不着他了。想来，恐怕他已经……
E: When I was here last time, the stall owner treated me to candies. It's a shame that he isn't here now. I think he must have...

C: 原来如此…多谢指教！
E: I see... Thanks for the advice!

C: 嘟，嘟嘟！
E: Doot, doot-doot!

C: 胡闹？熔…咳，融入他们的内心，知晓他们的诉求，对确有困难者耐心疏导，对无理取闹者礼貌劝离。
E: Causing trouble? Melt... *ahem* Meld with their hearts, understand their needs, patiently guide those with genuine difficulties, and politely turn away those who make unreasonable demands.

C: 呵呵，不过…送你自是简单，但你若是学会自己炼成，岂不是更好？
E: Hehe, I could simply give it to you, but... wouldn't it be better if you learned to craft it yourself?

C: 人总有不成熟的时候，那都是什么时候的事了，芙缇尼。
E: Everyone has their immature moments. That was ages ago, Futini.

C: 哈哈，你的话语，还是一如既往地天马行空啊。
E: Haha, your words are still as wild and fanciful as ever.

C: 奶奶，灰子可是大英雄，{F#她}{M#他}说一句顶别人一百句呢。
E: Granny, Gray Mystery is a real hero. {F#Her}{M#His} words carry more weight than a hundred others combined.

C: 回聊回聊。
E: Let's chat later!

C: 啊！难道小灰也是来排队的嘛？不许插队哦！
E: Ah! Little Gray, are you here to queue up too? No cutting in line!

C: 往后么…我打算给自己放个长假，顺带重拾些因征战而抛下的爱好。
E: Moving forward... I plan to take a long vacation and pick up some hobbies I had to put aside during the conquests.

C: *兴奋的叫声*嗷呜嗷呜~
E: *excited howling* Awoo awoo~

C: 假如有机会，我想亲自开解他们当中的芥蒂，说不定，他们还能成为棋友？
E: If the chance arises, I'd like to help clear up the misunderstanding between them. Who knows? They might even end up becoming chess buddies.

C: 啊…盘成…发髻？我还没有试过。
E: Ah... putting my hair... up in a bun? I haven't tried that before.

C: 呵呵，剑旗爵，千年对我们的征程而言，不过弹指一瞬。
E: Heh. Dux Gladiorum, a thousand years is but a mere blink of an eye in our grand campaign.

C: 下棋是一门「牺牲」的艺术。每一次牵制、截杀、胜利…都需要以棋子的生死为代价换取，哪怕是「王」也不能例外。
E: Chess is the art of "sacrifice." Each pin, capture, and triumph is purchased with the death of a piece... Even the "King" is no exception.

C: 「后」是最强的棋子，来去如风，势不可挡。希望你今后的旅程，也能如它一般自由。
E: The Queen is the most powerful chess piece, moving like the wind, unstoppable in its path. May your future journey be just as free as it is.

C: 那时候我还很瘦。
E: Back then, I was still very skinny.

C: 五年，五年了，你知道这五年我是怎么过的吗？
E: Five years... It's five years! Do you know how I lived in the past five years?

C: 这可真没听说过…总觉得像「谛听形意拳」，「机巧鸟剑法」这样的名字听着好奇怪。
E: Never heard of that... Names like Diting Imitation Fist and Cycrane Swordplay would sound very odd.

C: 你也没赢过我！
E: You didn't win either!

C: 有看智械领悟的武功么？
E: Are there any inspired by Intellitrons?

C: 豪华观赛包厢。
E: Luxurious boxes to watch the matches in.

C: 这票买亏了。
E: The ticket isn't worth it.

C: 可我苦练了四百年啊。
E: But I trained for <unbreak>400</unbreak> years.

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 材质：囚犯
E: Materials: Convict

C: 数控屏显示有关竞锋舰的一切：剩余燃料、进出星槎数据、火力控制、雷达扫描、气象观测、各舱段的闸口通道。这里是竞锋舰的的控制台。
E: The numerical control screen displays all data regarding the Skysplitter: Remaining fuel, starskiff traffic data, firepower control, radar scans, weather report and access to each zone passage. This is the control console of the Skysplitter.

C: 诶，你也评评理，你说说看「枘凿六合」的广告放在这里合适吗？
E: Hey, you say something too, do you think it's appropriate to have a Hexanexus ad here?

C: 这有什么？你看那灰毛教练…
E: So what? Look at that gray-haired coach...

C: 红毛对红毛！期待！
E: Redhead versus redhead! Let's go!

C: 似乎有些包子还在下层的笼屉里忍受着煎熬，就像曾坐在桑拿房里的你，或者其他人。
E: Just like you and others who once sat in a sauna, some buns are still undergoing the trial of heat in the lower levels of the steamer.

C: 阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
E: The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.

C: 工造司格物院设计的巨大蓝图，可能会在不久的将来变成金人偃偶找你切磋。
E: The gigantic blueprint is the brainchild of the Artisanship Commission's Sapientia Academe. It might turn into a giant aurumaton puppet that spars with you soon.

C: 你很少见到如此安分守己的金人，且看且珍惜。
E: Such a well-behaved aurumaton is a rare find. You should appreciate it.

C: 「岁阳喜好寄生于有形身躯（通常为泛人类智慧种族），感应神经系统随情感而生的诸多变化。这种吃掉七情六欲的行为，会令不具形体的岁阳感到满足。」
E: "Heliobi like to parasitize physical bodies (usually those of the pan-human intelligent races) to experience the changes in the nervous system following different emotions. The shapeless heliobi take pleasure in feeding on emotions."

C: 「所有世界的灭亡都归结于同一个原因：内部信仰体系的冲突、精神支柱的幻灭、弃绝希望。可以说，在反物质军团登陆前，这些世界早已是失去灵魂的空壳了。」
E: "The destruction of the worlds stem from the same reasons: Conflict of their internal belief system, disillusionment with their pillars of support, and the lack of hope. In other words, these worlds were already past their heydays before the Antimatter Legion even arrived."

C: 「星际和平公司，首屈一指的泛银河超巨型贸易企业。其业务遍布众多文明世界，并实际掌控了上万颗星球的文明运转，以『补天司命』克里珀的名义保护了兆亿生灵。」
E: "The Interastral Peace Corporation (IPC) is a top-notch pan-cosmic mega enterprise. It has a foothold in many worlds and is in control of the civilizations of over ten thousand planets. In the name of Qlipoth, the Firmamend Arbiter, they keep trillions of living beings under protection."

C: 优雅、太优雅了！
E: Elegant. It's too elegant!

C: …要不还是去我那玩吧。
E: ...Why not come over and play?

C: 这是私人物品，我不能动。
E: This is a personal item. I can't interfere with it.

C: 当然，照例地，你发现了一张纸条：「一瓶水有八万四千微生物，放生功德无量！——放生帮。」
E: Of course, there's a note as usual: "One bottle contains over <unbreak>84,000</unbreak> microorganisms inside. Controlled releases are a virtue! — The Unshackled."

C: 你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
E: Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.

C: 你将收货地址抄写下来，找来一个干净的快递箱，将崭新的食物放了进去，随手预约了物流机巧鸟前来取件。希望这一餐能够帮到那位可怜的陌生人。
E: You write down the recipient's address and find a clean courier package to put fresh food into it. Then, you book a random courier cycrane to collect it. Hopefully, the meal will be able to help the poor stranger.

C: 典当铺「赎珠阁」的广告。店主瀚典掌柜阅历无算，说书的本领与西衍先生不相上下。
E: It is an advertisement for Jeweler's Pagoda, a pawnshop. Its owner, Handian, has been to a lot of places and is a storyteller as good as Mr. Xiyan.

C: 棱角分明的新鲜水果，可惜，摊主没有卖葡萄，那才是多边形灾难。
E: Fresh fruit with distinct edges. Unfortunately, the stand owner doesn't sell grapes. That would be a polygonal disaster.

C: 龙尊手执长枪，脚踏沧浪，看上去威风凛凛。殊不知，此造型方案迭代过无数次，仅一票之差战胜了「普通地站在原地」。
E: The high elder looks dashing while holding a spear and riding on waves. Surprisingly, this design has gone through countless iterations and only prevailed over the mediocre "standing straight" design by one vote.

C: 冰凉的触感令你心神恍惚，浓雾逼近，将你慢慢包裹，直至吞没…你努力地逃跑，却总也找不到尽头，耳畔涌入许多尖利伤人的话。
E: The icy sensation leaves you in a daze. A dense fog inches closer and slowly engulfs you... You try hard to escape, but you can't find the way out. Meanwhile, you can hear scathing comments next to your ears.

C: 在你的指尖下，薄薄一层卵壳之隔，你听见了一阵稳健的心跳声，那颗干枯的心又跳动了起来。
E: Under your fingertips and through the thin eggshell, you hear a steady heartbeat. The wilted heart has started beating again.

C: 也许货运码头能给金人巷带来改变，但是改变终究还是需要人来实现。
E: Perhaps the goods dock will bring changes to Aurum Alley. However, it is humans that must implement and realize these changes.

C: 工造司的工师傅将一根钢管切成4段，报酬为9镝。最后工师傅拿到了<unbreak>24</unbreak>镝，请问最后他将一根钢管切成了多少段？
E: An Artisanship Commission craftsmaster receives 9 strale when he cuts one whole steel pipe into 4 pieces. If he receives <unbreak>24</unbreak> strale for cutting a different pipe, then how many pieces did he cut this new pipe into?

C: 你现在明白，为什么这本习题册没有在桌子上，而是在废弃的箱子里。
E: You now understand why this notebook has been tossed into a crate instead of sitting on the student's desk.

C: 不错的决定。自从你登上仙舟，你已经见惯了路边的快递箱，这也不稀奇。
E: A fair decision. You've grown accustomed to seeing packages strewn all around the streets since coming to Xianzhou.

C: 你感觉自己胸前的…呃，背后的金色飘带越发鲜亮了起来！
E: You feel the golden ribbons across your chest... ahem, on your back — begin to look even brighter!

C: 演出还能进行吗？
E: Can the show still go on?

C: 这些狗血的争吵与你无关。你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
E: These petty squabbles are nothing to do with you. You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.

C: 我看到了很多泄露消息！
E: I noticed a lot of leaks!

C: 真的？能典当爱情吗？
E: Really? Do they take romance?

C: 外来者们无法理解的是，匹诺康尼的五大家系真能做到不分彼此，万众如一。图腾的归属于他们而言甚至不如游客的一声喷嚏紧要。
E: What outsiders could never understand is that the five major lineages of Penacony are actually one and the same. They represent one large group. The ownership of this totem is as important to them as a guest's sneeze.

C: 专供皮皮西的苏乐达俱乐部，不过它的门对皮皮西来说有些太高了。
E: A SoulGlad club that primarily serves Pepeshi, though the door is way too tall for them.

C: 「不会回来了…他被遗弃了，所以我们也被抛下……」
E: "He won't return... He has been discarded, and so have we..."

C: 嗯，你自便。
E: No problem.

C: 不瞒您说，其实我自己也买了这项保险套餐…相信我，总有能用上的一天！
E: To be honest, even I bought this insurance package myself. It'll definitely come in useful some day!

C: 感谢你的介绍。
E: Thank you for your introduction.

C: 万一真有被淘汰的那天，这些收藏就是我活下去的希望。
E: If there comes such a day when we are obsolete, these collectibles will be my hope to live on.

C: 您看见那些筑梦师了吗？就是他们将现实的荒漠敲碎，挑拣出形状姣好的碎片，又藉由想象与灵感为其涂抹艳色，最终精心编织成这个有序而稳定的梦之城。
E: You see those Dreamweavers? It is they who meticulously selected beautifully-shaped shards from the shattered remains of reality, then painted them with their imagination and inspiration, finally weaving them into this city of dreams, steadfast and orderly.

C: 呜呜伯呢？
E: What about a Wubbaboo?

C: 再次警告你，不准歧视任何生物！就算是一只过街的太空鼠，它的生命也和你是平等的！少来和我杠！
E: Let me warn you again, do not discriminate against any creature! Even if it's just a space rat crossing the street, its life is just as precious as yours! So stop trying to get smart with me!

C: 一群撰稿人头衔倒是高，什么「约瑟夫新闻奖提名」、「银河百大金牌写手」…实际肚子里墨水少得要死，都快比不上报社的狗仔了。
E: Sure, they've got a bunch of fancy titles like "Nominated for the Joseph Journalism Award" and "Top <unbreak>100</unbreak> Writer in the Cosmos"... but in actuality, they're such hacks that they're almost as bad as the paparazzi.

C: 呃…可以是可以，不过这件道具的训练还没结束，效果可能……
E: Er... Of course. But this item has yet to be trained, and the effect may be...

C: 只有我无足轻重，就像路边的一块石头，哈哈……
E: Only I'm the redundant one, like a pebble on the street. Haha...

C: 不是有句话这么说吗：父母是真爱，孩子是意外。但我又偏偏不是他们亲生的……
E: Isn't there an old saying? If parents are true love, then children are just accidents. Then again, I'm not their biological child...

C: 即使经过梦境美化，你也能看出它的身躯有些破败、显然承受了太多岁月的消磨。
E: Even though the Dreamscape has been beautified, you can't help but notice how dilapidated its body is. It has endured years of wear and tear.

C: 你有什么得意的作品吗？
E: What's your favorite work of art?

C: 每每陷入迷茫时，我总能在绘画中找到答案。你看上去…也像是个很有天分的人，虽然我不确定它是什么。
E: Every time I felt lost, I could find answers from painting. You seem... to be a very talented person, though I'm not sure what your talent is.

C: 哦，请原谅我的激动——或许是我还未能适应这份名为「喜悦」的情感！
E: Ah, please forgive my excitement... Perhaps I am not yet used to this emotion you call "joy"!

C: …因为躲在你的背后？
E: ...Because the robber was hiding behind you?

C: 这也是{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}对我们的教导，任何人都应铭记在心。
E: This is also the {RUBY_B#Harmony}Great One's{RUBY_E#} teachings unto us. Everyone would do well to remember them by heart.

C: 暂时没有问题了。
E: I have no questions right now.

C: 哦，这个问题真是正中下怀。梦里再找不到比我们猎犬更专业的探子了。
E: Oh, this is a good question. There's no one more in the know than us Bloodhounds.

C: 啊…这挥金如土的感觉，可真是该死的甜美啊！
E: Ah... it's a blasted good feeling to spend money as if it meant nothing!

C: 当然…不过每周只能拿一次。
E: Of course... But only once a week.

C: 如果没有规范，那艺术作品和鬼画符的区别是什么？如果有规范，那是否必然会导向如今常盘国艺术节规范呆板的现状？
E: If there are no standards, then what differentiates art from just random scribbling? If there are standards, then that will inevitably lead to the current situation we see in Tokiwa, with regulations and standards causing stagnation.

C: 雅利洛…八号？
E: Jarilo... VIII?

C: 女人脸上依旧挂着得体的微笑，但不知为何在你看来显得有些虚弱苍白。
E: The woman still wears a polite smile, but you notice a hint of fatigue in her expression.

C: 另外…在梦境中，剧烈的情绪波动可能会导致一些预料之外的情况，如果您无法有效管理自己的情绪，也可以向我们寻求帮助。
E: Additionally... in the Dreamscape, intense emotional fluctuations can lead to unexpected circumstances. If you have trouble managing your emotions effectively, you can also seek assistance from us.

C: 嘿嘿…我花了很大功夫才捏出来的。你喜欢就好~
E: Heehee... it took me quite some time. I'm glad you find it appealing!

C: 再玩一次捉迷藏吧。
E: Let's play hide-and-seek again.

C: 我有些梦想推销给你。
E: I have some dreams to share with you.

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 好，接下来开始公布这次考试的分数。老规矩，我会按照成绩和名次从低往高报。
E: Then we'll announce the scores for this exam. I'll announce the scores and rankings from lowest to highest, as usual.

C: 这是你在「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」的专属停车位，永久保留，不额外收费。可以将购买到的车辆停放在此处。
E: This is your exclusive parking lot at The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand. The ownership is permanent at zero extra charges. You can park your car here.

C: 好的，这就换成别的豪华飞车。
E: Alright. I'll trade you in for another luxury speedster.

C: 本型号独轮飞车使用特制接口，请您购买适配的充电插头进行操作。
E: This vehicle uses a special connector. Please purchase a suitable charging plug for charging.

C: 钞票纷纷扬扬飞上了天——倘若没人拿走，打扫起来可能要费点功夫。
E: Banknotes flutter in the sky. If no one picks them up, cleaning the place will be a hassle.

C: 直到我从镶金的鸟笼子里钻了出来，才明白并不是只要作品够精彩、够独特，就一定能收获关注与喜爱。
E: Not until I wormed my way out of my gilded cage did I realize that a piece had to be more than just exciting and unique to receive attention and adoration.

C: 那时候我是如此地崇拜着他——比起朋友，他更像是我的父亲，我的导师。现在他已经走了，这些话也没有那么难以启齿了…是，我的确曾经崇拜着他，依赖着他。
E: I looked up to him so much at that time. He was more like a father and a mentor to me. Now that he is gone, I can say these things a lot more easily... Yes, I once idolized and relied on him.

C: 是因为开启了推进系统的缘故吗…不对，是因为我好嗨！
E: Is it because I've turned on the propulsion system... No, it's because I'm excited!

C: 故乡是个很神奇的地方。你出门的时间越长，逃得越远，反而在情感上才离它更近。
E: A home is a mysterious thing. The longer you leave it and the farther you roam, the closer you feel to it.

C: 你会怨恨他们吗？
E: Do you hate them?

C: 梅芙恩——就是鸢尾花家系的家主，是个沉醉于舞台的人，她相信那种热烈的氛围能消解人与人之间的所有隔阂。在捡到我后，她将我作为未来的演艺明星而着重培养。
E: Maeven, the Iris Family Head, is obsessed with the stage. She believes that a passionate atmosphere can break down all barriers between people. So, after she took me in, she focused on raising me as a future acting superstar.

C: 想听听你对舒翁的看法。
E: I want to know your thoughts on Siobhan.

C: …呼唤家族？
E: ...Call The Family?

C: 您好，是需要咨询吗？这里很安静，正适合进行深入谈话。
E: Greetings, do you need counseling? It's quiet here, perfect for an in-depth conversation.

C: 你也可以找我咨询。
E: You can also ask me for counseling.

C: 真高兴见到你，星穹列车的开拓者。
E: Pleasure to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express.

C: 这里不仅是匹诺康尼最著名的地标性建筑，在梦境的发展历史中也有着重要地位。
E: Not only is this place Penacony's most iconic architectural landmark, but it also has an important place in the history of the Dreamscape's development.

C: 唉…每天除了干活就是干活，可存款却不怎么见长。入职的时候，项目经理明明告诉我，只要多干几年，什么都会有的，可这都多少年了？
E: Ah... I just work day in and day out, but I'm not seeing my savings grow. When I first started my job, the boss told me anything could happen if I just worked harder for a few years. How many years have I been at it?

C: 这乏味的工作属实枯燥，今天该怎么打发时间呢…嗯？
E: This mundane job is too boring. How should I spend my time today... Eh?

C: 别担心，我无意打探你的秘密，只是假如你此刻并不匆忙，请让我占用些许时光，为你带来一份乐事——
E: Don't worry, I do not mean to pry into your secrets. It's just that — if you're not too busy — I would ask that you lend me some of your time to bring you an item of pleasure...

C: 没想到大剧院里还能听脱口秀。
E: I didn't expect to find stand-up comedy in the Grand Theater.

C: 我和乐团商量了一下，觉得无论如何都得报答各位。可惜我们只是个不入流的小乐团，没法准备太昂贵的礼品……
E: I've chatted this over with the orchestra, and feel like we have to repay you no matter what happens. But unfortunately, we're only a small group of amateurs, so we couldn't get you anything expensive...

C: 但我听一位朋克洛德宾客跟我讲过「石剑」这位骇客的故事。我羡慕他的自由不羁——所以在这个可以隐去身份的梦境，我借用了他的名字。
E: But I heard this story from a Punklordian guest about the great hacker Stoneblade, and I was jealous of that kind of unrestrained freedom — so I decided to borrow his name and use it here in this Dreamscape where one can become anonymous.

C: 再这样下去，节目的口碑非得给他们败完了！
E: If I keep this up, the ceremony's reputation is going to be ruined by them!

C: 我有些问题想问你。
E: I've got some questions to ask you.

C: 总之，期刊的内容非常丰富，不仅有时事头条、悬赏招工这类常规内容，还有不少攻略指南之类的硬通货，你甚至还可以在上面追小说连载。
E: Anyway, the magazine is chock-full of rich content — not just things like regular news and vacancies but also lots of hard currency like strategic guides. Or you can even follow the serial fiction in each issue.

C: 你知道的，像我们这样的记者多少有些自己的消息渠道，所以在得知他的存在之后，我找到了他，请求进行赛前采访。
E: You know, journalists like us have our own sources, so after learning about his existence, I went looking for him to ask for a pre-match interview.

C: 虽然可能是我多心了，但出于谨慎，你最好还是留意一下那个叫做加西亚的男人。
E: I might just be paranoid, but out of an abundance of caution, I suggest you keep one eye open for this Garcia guy.

C: 你们在拍什么节目？
E: What are you shooting?

C: 我们在拍的这档节目叫《翻滚吧！银河球棒侠》，是受银河间行侠仗义的「无名客」启发创办的一档益智冒险类综艺节目，面向的人群是……
E: We're shooting a show called Jump! Galactic Baseballer and it's an adventure-puzzle variety show inspired by these intergalactic heroes "The Nameless." Its target demographic is...

C: 我还会在流梦礁待上一段时间。如果你有想法，可以随时来找我聊聊。
E: I will be in the Dreamflux Reef for some time yet. If you have any more thoughts, you can talk to me anytime.

C: 实不相瞒，我在现实里是星际和平公司的一员，年终奖抽中了来匹诺康尼的旅游机会……
E: I will not hide it from you. In the real world, I am a member of the IPC. I won a ticket to travel to Penacony in the end-of-year raffle...

C: 在大家的帮助下，孩子们进步得飞快。不久之后，他们也许就能进行完整的演唱了。
E: The children have been improving quickly thanks to everyone's help. They may even be ready for a full recital soon.

C: 我曾是来自折纸大学的学者，专业是忆质动力学。为了完成我的课题，我一直在流梦礁工作。
E: I'm a scholar from the Paperfold University, specializing in memoria dynamics. To complete my research, I have been working in the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 如果我们能够找到诱发忆质如此运动的事物，并且找到办法消除它，那么一切也许还来得及。
E: If we can find the thing that induces such a movement of memoria and discover a way to eliminate it, it may not be too late to savage the situation.

C: 我们一个个地记录并转译下那些故事，故事又流转到宇宙的各个角落，在我们身上，失落的文明获得了第二次进入太空的机会。
E: Methodically, we recorded and transcribed the stories, disseminating them to all corners of the universe. Through our endeavors, the lost civilization was afforded a second opportunity to travel the stars.

C: 诶呀…抱歉，唠叨了这么久…像我这样上了年纪的老琴，总忍不住找人聊聊…多聊聊，才不容易忘掉那些弦音……
E: *sigh*... Sorry for nattering on so long... an old double bass like me can never resist chatting with people... because chatting makes it harder to forget the melody of those strings...

C: 我尝试了好多新奇的菜品，发现大家还是最喜欢朴实无华、量大管饱的食物，所以就坚持下来一直做了。
E: I tried out many an experimental dish but discovered that everyone preferred filling themselves with simple meals in sufficiently large portions. So I kept going and making them all.

C: 仙舟的特色饮料吗？我好像在家族的图书馆里看到过。可惜不知道配方呢。
E: Is that the Xianzhou specialty drink? I think I saw it once in The Family's library. What a pity I don't know the recipe for it.

C: ——如何，听起来好玩吗？我瞎编的。
E: ...How about it? Sounds fun eh? I wrote it off the top of my head.

C: 嗯…有只倒霉的小鸟缺乏挑选藏身点的技巧，总是选中一些危险的地方。去找找<color=#dbc291ff>路边那只快要掉下来的广告牌</color>吧，它正在上面等人救场呢。
E: Hmm... There's a poor bird that lacks the know-how to pick a good hiding spot. It's always choosing dangerous locations. Go look by the <color=#dbc291ff>billboard that's about to collapse along the roadside</color>. It's probably trapped atop, awaiting rescue.

C: 但小镇外面来了一群坏蛋，把乐园弄得一团糟，连花都开不出来，大家花了好大的力气才把它们赶出去……
E: But a bunch of baddies came into town, and smashed up our paradise and turned it to scorched earth. It took everyone's efforts to drive them out...

C: 您不在的这段时间，人家想您想得羽毛都掉了好几根，翅膀都没以前好看了啾～
E: While you weren't around, I missed you so much that even a few of my feathers fell out. My wings look worse for wear too, tweet...

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 那人人向往的美梦，不过是个畸形的造物，暗藏着多少凶险与阴霾……
E: The dream that people look forward to is nothing but a twisted creature, lurking with myriad dangers and mist...

C: 但在梦里赚钱也没那么容易，在一次创业失败后，我只能在热砂的时刻当个普通的搬运工。
E: But it's not that easy earning your keep in dreams. After my first business failed, I had to work as an ordinary transport worker in the Moment of Scorchsand.

C: 大家的梦想一样，却因立场兵戎相见，真是可惜呀……
E: Everyone's dreams are the same, yet we became foes due to our differing allegiances. How unfortunate...

C: 据说那里被众神所夺，三座由青铜铸成的巨像用矛尖将其拱卫。即使只是其中的一尊，甚至都比星球本身更为庞大。
E: It is said that the planet was fought over by the gods and protected by three bronze statues wielding spears. Each of these statues was larger than the planet itself.

C: 可是，它们的某种习性却让我非常在意。
E: But their peculiar behavior piqued my interest.

C: 据说它们诞生于某个处于极夜的星球，几乎只能拥有十五分钟的寿命。
E: They come from a planet of eternal night and only have a lifespan of about <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes.

C: 啊…抱歉，好像又在毫无根据的情况下发散太多了。
E: Oh, I'm sorry. I'm making too many baseless assumptions again.

C: 当你落入星际监狱，临刑前最后一顿随你所愿，星际快递来的家乡菜就是美食。
E: When you're thrown into Interastral Prison and given your choice of a last meal, the food delivered from your home planet becomes gourmet.

C: 把雅各布大厨贬为普通厨师？我不认可。
E: Denoting Chef Jacob as a common cook? I don't approve of that.

C: 餐厅们说这是我的臆想，可是换做过去，他们每周都要在我这儿订上一整船的货。
E: The restaurants all claimed that I was fabricating the story, but they used to order a shipment of it weekly!

C: 全银河只有一家牧场产出此级别的牛排。雪花纹路均匀遍布，像红宝石上结的霜。只能做三分熟，多一分都是暴殄天物。
E: In the entire Cosmos, only one ranch can produce such a high-grade steak, with evenly distributed marbling that mirrors frost on a ruby. It should be cooked to medium rare at most to maintain its exquisite quality.

C: 呵呵…别看我没有黑眼圈，那都是遮瑕的功劳。其实…我每天晚上都在失眠。
E: You wouldn't believe it, but under all of this makeup are some serious dark circles. Truth is, I haven't been sleeping well lately.

C: 我才不怕被骂，只有有人还在关注我，那就意味着我还有钱赚…所以说，像我这样聪明漂亮脸皮又厚的女人…活该我赚得盆满钵满，哈哈哈！
E: I'm not bothered by the name-calling, because if I've still got followers, that means there's money to be made... So, being the smart, gorgeous, and shameless woman that I am, it only makes sense that I'm rolling in dough, hahaha!

C: 谢谢你的好意，不过我没什么实质性损失，暂时还不需要帮忙。如果真被骗钱，我肯定会报警的——你放心，猎犬们可不是软柿子。
E: Thanks. I didn't lose anything, so I'm fine. If I'd really been scammed, I'd have called the police. But don't stress it, the Bloodhounds aren't to be messed with.

C: 以前，我压根没时间停下来思考这些玩意。只能使劲干活，努力往前爬…但我再怎么努力，力气终归有限。现在我老咯，很多事都感觉力不从心……
E: Before, I just worked hard and climbed the ladder without a second thought, even though there was only so much I could do. But now that I'm older, some things are no longer within my reach.

C: 人生就是一场大型的棋局，只要有利可图，谁都能当棋子——你知道我为什么会找艾丽卡当我的结婚对象了吗？
E: Life is like a huge chessboard where, if there's profit to be made, anyone can be a pawn. Do you see why I picked Erica as my wife now?

C: 我的业务？你可以去打听打听，无论是什么类型的案件，从逃税罚单到重罪辩护，没有我接不了的案子。
E: My work? You can try asking around, I guess. No matter the case, be it tax evasion or felony defense, there isn't one that I won't take up.

C: 特别棒啾~
E: Yes, indeed! Tweet~

C: 现在你和与它大眼瞪小眼地沉默着，十分滑稽。你决心说点什么，打破这份尴尬的死寂。
E: You stare at each other in silence, leading to comical absurdity. You decide to say something to break apart this awkward silence.

C: 故事？我没什么故事啊，我就是个普通…呃，一个小乐队的贝斯手。乐队也没什么人气，作品也一般，赚不到钱，所以我就出来找工作了。
E: Story? I ain't got no story. I'm just an average... uh, bassist of a small band. A nobody band with mediocre music that wasn't making any money. That's why I left for another job.

C: 以前倒是来应聘过「晖长石号」的表演乐手，结果连简历都没过。后来遇到一位老师，说我手指灵活有力适合调饮…接着我就来空艇上干活了。
E: I previously applied to be a musician on the Radiant Feldspar, but they didn't even take a second glance at my resume. Then I met someone who found my hands dexterous enough to craft drinks... so here I am, working on the airship.

C: 你对现在的工作不满意吗？
E: Are you unhappy with your current job?

C: 今年球笼赛哪个学院会赢？
E: Which academy's going to win the Spheroid race this year?

C: 什么时候起，匹诺康尼不崇拜财富了？没接到通知啊。
E: Since when did Penacony stop worshiping money? I must have missed that memo!

C: 不成，这太直接了，和我一贯的表现差太多……
E: No, that's coming on too strong. I hardly sound like myself...

C: 校园里禁止使用暴力。
E: Violence is not allowed on campus.

C: 另外，包括门票和展品交易在内，这次展会收入的九成都会捐赠给星际知名的慈善机构。手头宽裕的话，还请为银河里贫困的人们贡献一份心意！
E: Also, <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of the proceeds taken from exhibition tickets and trades are going to be donated to famous interastral charitable organizations. If you are feeling generous, please consider making a donation to those less fortunate in the cosmos!

C: 哈哈哈，你别当真，只是无谓的思绪罢了。不管再怎么努力，我始终…不属于那个世界。
E: Hahaha, ignore me. They're just pointless thoughts... No matter how hard I work, I... I will never belong to that world.

C: 说话别说一半啊！
E: Don't mince your words!

C: 只要有人的地方就有利益纠葛，就有纷争，毕竟…哎，所有人都这样。
E: Wherever there are people, there will be conflicts of interest and disagreements. After all... that is just how people are.

C: 那么，我该怜悯自己吗——毕竟对于我们这样的普通人而言，这世上并不存在什么纯粹的、知识的乐土。
E: So, should I pity myself? For normal people like us, there is no such thing as a pure paradise of knowledge after all.

C: 只要能做自己喜欢的事情，能把喜剧当成一门艺术来钻研，对我来说就很满足了。至于名气之类的，这些就随缘吧。
E: Just being able to do what I love and study comedy as an art is extremely satisfying for me. As for fame and fortune, that's all down to fate.

C: 当然！我得珍惜毕业前最后的欢乐时光才行——派对万岁！音乐万岁！
E: I will! I must treasure the final moments of joy before graduation — viva la music party! Viva la music!

C: 对我来说，这样的经历简直难以想象。我大概…永远都忘不掉「缭乱」了吧。
E: Such an experience was simply unimaginable to me. I probably... will never forget The Dazzling.

C: 你有事情要找我吗？
E: Do you need me for something?

C: 关于筑梦学院代表…
E: About Dreamweaver Academy representative...

C: 从结果来看…你们也算完成了任务，虽然我是不明白这种音乐到底哪点好了。
E: Looking at the outcome... I suppose you've all completed the assignment, though I still don't get what's so good about this music.

C: …有时候真是不得不服老啊。
E: ...Sometimes one has to admit one's age.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 不不不！富贵！你不能这么想——已经没法回头了，我一定不能辜负老爹的期望，一定不能……
E: No no no! Richie! You can't think like this — there's no turning back now, and I can't let my old man down. I simply can't...

C: 顺便也想多接触点拍摄机会，我想体验下不同风格的角色，给自己的演艺事业攒攒经验。
E: It's also a way to get exposure to get more filming opportunities. I want to experience different characters and build up experience for my acting career.

C: 啊…别担心，别的甜品我也会做。
E: Ah... Don't worry. I know how to make other desserts too.

C: 同学…你刚刚说什么？
E: Classmate... what did you just say?

C: 我自幼开始参与家族事务，分身乏术，少有远行的时候。
E: I've been managing The Family's affairs since young, leaving me little time to travel afar.

C: 打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，星神的明光闪烁其间，令人沉醉不已。
E: It is my duty to salvage memories that are forgotten, while Amphoreus... is a treasure behind a window, with the Aeons' blinding light radiating from within, mesmerizing all.

C: 一旁的前台淡定地平息着客人们的恐慌，虽然她已经紧张得快要当场醒过来了。
E: The receptionist off to the side calmly works to mollify the frightened guests, even though she herself is so nervous that she could wake up right then and there.

C: 巨大的环形餐桌，特意保留圆角处的缺口，或许是为了防止名为「圆桌骑士」的奇怪食客大闹晚宴。
E: The giant ring-shaped head table has a segment carved out of it, perhaps to prevent strange customers named the Knights of the Round Table from making a fuss at the banquet.

C: 每个扑满似乎都有自己的个性与故事，你可以想象眼前这只四处游荡，最终来到匹诺康尼，成为飞艇上的吉祥物的传奇故事。
E: It's as if each trotter has its own personality and story. You fantasize about a legendary tale of this trotter before you, how it roamed the worlds and eventually ended up on Penacony, becoming the mascot of this flying ship.

C: 盘上双方都几近陷入楚茨文格——即使是打发时间的嬉戏，泰坦们也是动了真格的。
E: Both participants on the board are nearly out of good moves. Even though it's just a casual game to pass the time, the Titans are taking it very seriously.

C: 出于安全方面的考虑。
E: Out of safety considerations.

C: 梦里会是什么样子呢？
E: What would it be like in the dream?

C: 全梦境第一奢侈品店…
E: The number one luxury store across the whole dreamscape...

C: 柴油风味，要最醇厚的。
E: Diesel flavor. I like it rich and thick.

C: 梦里什么都有。
E: Anything is possible within a dream.

C: 要不去抢取款机吧…
E: How about we just rob an ATM...?

C: 先等我修下图…
E: Hold on, let me beautify the photos first...

C: 抱歉…那么根据我的判断，上述事件发生的原因有<unbreak>86%</unbreak>概率是由于您的身高处于司机们的视野盲区内……
E: I apologize... Based on my assessment, there's an <unbreak>86%</unbreak> chance that no cars stopped because your height was in the blind spot of the drivers' vision...

C: 唉，麻雀，我的小麻雀…离开我以后你要幸福……
E: Oh, my dear Sparrow... I wish you a happy life after you leave...

C: …在我看来，他们最好及时调整本地的落户政策，不然迟早要出问题……
E: ...In my opinion, they'd better adjust their local settlement policy in time, or there'll be problems sooner or later...

C: 这不是一般人能修好的吧？
E: This isn't an easy fix, is it?

C: 什么？你知道要是没了我，匹诺康尼影视界会有多大的损失吗？！
E: What!? Do you know what would happen to the Penacony Visioscape if I weren't around!?

C: 我想我没法拒绝，对吗？
E: I imagine I have no right to refuse, correct?

C: 我早说过那家伙能赢。
E: I told you that one was gonna win.

C: 说好的保我进决赛…
E: You said you'd guarantee me a spot in the finals...

C: 别提了，输得一干二净，裤子都快赔光了。
E: Bah, drop it. I lost everything. Almost lost my pants too.

C: 由于临近谐乐大典，无论是从规模、关注度还是参赛者的平均水准，本届海选都与往年有显著差异。
E: Since it's held so close to the Charmony Festival, the auditions this time have been a stark contrast to those held in past years whether in scale, reception, or contestant caliber.

C: 贵家系也人才辈出…
E: Your lineage is also brimming with talent...

C: 从这里看~
E: Look at it from there!

C: 亏我全套装造都准备好了。
E: And I spared no expense for my get-up too.

C: …我看不到啊！
E: ...I can't see anything!

C: 请勿相信任何私教…
E: Beware of personal trainers...

C: 我…明明下课前把它放在抽屉里，怎么就没了呢？
E: I... I clearly put it in the drawer before class ended. Where would it have gone?

C: 不行！告诉学校的话，我在课堂上玩游戏的事不就暴露了吗！
E: No! If I tell the school, won't it expose that I've been gaming in class?

C: 不会被社团前辈指责吗？
E: I won't be reprimanded by the club's seniors?

C: 吹奏部的原则是「兴趣至上」，很符合折纸大学的校训吧。
E: The mantra of the Concert Band Club is "interest above all," very in line with Paperfold University's vision.

C: 《虫皇陨落之谜》…博识学会什么时候也开始写这种校园科普读物了。
E: Mystery of the Imperator Insectorum's Fall ...When did the Intelligentsia Guild start writing academic material for high schools?

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 这是一根身经百战的球棒，你几乎用它打过棒球外的一切。
E: This is a battle-hardened bat, and you've used it to hit everything but baseballs.

C: 它热情地蹭向你的手背，对你的关注感到十分兴奋。
E: It eagerly rubs against your hand, feeling very excited by your attention.

C: 扑满发出兴奋的声音，时不时拱起鼻子做出回应。它很开心。
E: The trotter lets out a squeal of excitement, scrunching up its nose frequently in response. It's very happy.

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Oink, oink oink~

C: 这并不重要，因为列车组的每个人都会这样做。他们每个人都时刻关爱着你，也时刻关爱着彼此。
E: It doesn't matter, because everyone in the Express Crew would do the same. Each one cares for you and for each other.

C: 哈哈，你总算问到了，我最喜欢的赫拉克勒斯！听着，赫拉克勒斯不光是所有现役的大地兽里最强壮、最聪明的——就算是萨白尼从黑潮里复活，那里也找不到比它更好的大地兽～
E: Aha! You've finally brought up my favorite, Heracles! Let me tell you, he's not just the strongest and smartest dromas around today — Even if Sabany came back from the black tide, no dromas there would outshine him!

C: 黄金裔陶罐是正版授权吗？
E: Are your Chrysos Heir Dolia officially licensed?

C: （大喊）有人偷书了！
E: (yelling) Someone's stealing books!

C: 我没什么要打听的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 除此之外，我很乐意尽己所能，满足顾客们对于食物的一切需求。
E: For those who appreciate food, I'll do my best to serve top-notch dishes.

C: 嗯？最近他们活动得还挺频繁…哦哦，确实不错，给我称一些吧。
E: Yeah, they've been moving around a lot lately... Oh, these olives are really something. I'll have a few more.

C: 说说你的故事。
E: Tell me more about yourself.

C: 「民众颤抖不已，心中充满恐惧；军队蹒跚而行，践踏一切正义。」
E: "In trembling hearts, fear takes root deep and near. Armies advancing, justice a distant dream. World fractured, crushed beneath the relentless stream."

C: 谁？哦，它啊，它是我兄弟，我们俩长得差不多，但它没我这么高大威武！
E: Who? Oh, that's my brother. We look similar, but Kephale's not as majestic and dignified as I am!

C: 我都不敢想那燕麦粥该多好吃！
E: I can only imagine how delicious those oats must have been!

C: 呀，小灰！你也来花园这边散心吗？这边风景真的很好，*我们*要是觉得累了，就会来这里远眺。
E: Ah, Little Gray! You've come to the garden to relax, too? The scenery here is beautiful. We often come here when feeling overwhelmed.

C: 再比如，当阿雅需要派人去到很远的、金线没有布及的地方时，就会让他们带上*我们*中的一人。这样，就算传信石版不管用，阿雅也可以及时了解到第一手信息啦。
E: Also, when Agy needs to send people to a distant place out of the golden thread's reach, she'll ask one of us to join them. That way, even if teleslates won't work, Agy can reach us in time.

C: 奥赫玛最棒小信使！
E: A round of applause for Okhema's greatest messengers!

C: 恐惧与荣耀，不矛盾么？
E: Fear and glory... Is that not a contradiction?

C: 看书…扫墓…看花…还有做些小手工。
E: Read books... visit graves... admiring flowers... and make ornaments.

C: 可爱捏。
E: So cute!

C: 你趁西塞罗不注意，悄悄尝了一口杯中的液体。出乎意料的是，这只是一杯白水，并没有任何特殊之处。
E: As Cicero looks away, you take your moment to sneak a taste of the liquid in the cup. To your surprise, you realize that it is just a normal glass of plain water. There is nothing special about it at all.

C: 当然，任何地方都有其不足。我们仍在探索中，愿艾格勒的智慧指引我们前进的道路。
E: Of course, there is no place in this world that is without fault. We are still exploring. May Aquila's wisdom guide us forward.

C: 我当然知道能补，但就是气啊！那些私人小作坊也就算了，这种有门脸的店铺怎么还能如此不讲究！
E: Of course I know it can be patched up. I'm just mad! I'd get it if they were just some small private workshop, but how can a legitimate store pull something like this?

C: 天秤缓缓摇晃起来，卡森德拉仔细观察着，直到那枚双面硬币所在的托盘稍稍翘起。
E: The scales slowly begin to sway as Cassondra observes closely. Finally, the dish that holds the double-sided coin becomes slightly elevated.

C: 而如果因为种种原因，你连那一点「自己的事」都没得做…能确认自己还活着的方法，就只剩下了这样远远地看着别人。
E: And if for whatever reason you can't even get those personal affairs done... the only way to confirm that you're still alive is to stand at a distance like this, watching others.

C: 距离产生美…不只是风景，人类也同样如此。
E: Distance is what creates beauty... Not just in nature, but also in people.

C: 人们都说当{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}给你关上一扇门的时候，它还会为你打开一扇窗……
E: They say when {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} closes one door, they always open a window...

C: 它的根系长势惊人，还顺着管道那边一路生长，竟然把管道都挤爆了！
E: Its root system had grown at an exponential rate, along the sides of the pipe, until it burst it wide open!

C: 哎呀，这就走啦？好吧好吧。对了，要是你能帮我弄到一些黄金裔的洗澡水，我会非常感激的！说不定下次见面，我就能给你看看会跳舞的泪葱了呢！
E: Oh, off so soon? Alright, alright. Oh, yes — if you could help me score some of that Chrysos Heir bath water, I'd be infinitely grateful! Maybe next time we meet, I'd be able to show you a dancing tear onion!

C: 这…既然您坚持，也好吧。但容我嘱咐一句，对方要是不讲理，还请您别急着动手。毕竟看您的气势，恐怕对方非死即伤，我这边也会不太好办。
E: That... Well, if you insist. Although, a word of warning: If they are unreasonable, I ask that you do not rush to take physical action. I see you possess great strength and I fear that they could be injured or worse. That would make things difficult for me.

C: 他离开后，你竖起耳朵留意起外面的情况。
E: As soon as the attendant leaves, you prick up your ears and try to listen in on the situation outside.

C: 直到一位失魂落魄的饲养员把大地兽领走前，花园的蝴蝶都聚集并停驻在它的身上，令一众瑟希斯的信徒就地跪拜——那时，我才真正理解「神圣」一词的定义。
E: Before its dazed breeder came to collect the dromas, all of the butterflies from the garden had come to gather on its body, causing a group of disciples of Cerces to bow before it... It was at that moment that I finally understood the meaning of the word "sacred."

C: 条拖与湿布，利器与火烧，有时还要借助瓶瓶罐罐里的洗剂，乃至是用另一种污渍去盖覆。不论何种操作，若是最终能达成洁净如新，那便是可行之道。
E: Mops or wet cloths, sharp tools or fire. Sometimes you need the help of a stain remover. Sometimes you even need another stain to cover the original. No matter what method you use, if you achieve cleanliness in the end, then you have chosen the correct method.

C: 怎么，没听说过？像你这么青涩的新兵蛋子可不多了……
E: What, never heard of this before? There aren't many greenhorn recruits like you around...

C: 你知道尤利克赛斯吗？
E: Do you know Ulixes?

C: 不用，我自己能应付——得让他吃点苦头才行。
E: No need, I will handle it myself. He has to be taught a lesson.

C: 不管怎么说，相遇即是缘，您这帅气的面容老希我记下了。以后您要是有用得上我这铺子的时候，我给您打个对折！
E: No matter what, our encounter is surely fate. I'll remember your dashing demeanor. I'll give you a discount if you have need of my shop's services in future!

C: 再之后，法吉娜的信徒会敬拜今日取回的海水，就像敬拜法吉娜大人一般。祭司带领我们念诵它的密语，咏唱着它谱写的歌谣。
E: Then, Phagousa's disciples will worship the collected seawater, just as they worship the great Phagousa. The priests guide us to recite their hidden words, chanting the hymns they compose.

C: …入口有非常明确的阳光、木质香、石榴果的气息……
E: ...Distinct sunlight, wood, pomegranate flavors on the palate...

C: 你离歌声越来越近，灯火触手可及……
E: You get closer to the voice, the lamp within arm's reach...

C: 至于奇怪的梦…如果我说，见到阁下的前一晚总会梦到阁下，你愿意相信么？
E: As for strange dreams... If I tell you that I always dream of you the night before we see each other, would you believe me?

C: 你最近一定遇见了有趣的人、事、物。多么好呀！听见这样充满生机的声音，我也想稍微跳跳舞了。
E: You must have run into an interesting person, event, or thing recently. How pleasant! So full of life. I might break into a little dance as well.

C: 假如一枚泡泡快要破碎，不妨再吹一枚？
E: If a bubble is about to pop, why not blow another?

C: 今天有些忙，就聊到这吧。
E: I'm busy today, so let's put a pin in things there.

C: 关于你们山之民…
E: Regarding your people, the Mountain Dwellers...

C: 我同意希诺的观点。
E: I agree with Zeno's view.

C: 你的眼睛还有治愈的可能吗？
E: Is there a chance your eyes could be healed?

C: 嗯，我做了张地区土质表，详细介绍了各土场的营养价值，还标注了常见威胁，供「寻土人」参考。
E: I've compiled an earth quality chart detailing the nutritional values of various soil types and noting common hazards. It serves as a practical guide for Earth Scouts seeking the best spots for their needs.

C: 当然，也有很多人觉得奥赫玛本来就没有什么捷足飞贼，或许这个传闻是个谎言吧。
E: A lot of people also believe there never was a Phantom Strider in Okhema. It's all just a tall tale.

C: 差不多就得了，别练了，别练了。练得这么好，就是为了让我感到羞辱么？
E: That's enough. Stop training already. You've gotten so good. Is it just to make me feel humiliated?

C: 你们那个「探险队」还缺不缺人手？不如回程的时候也把我也捎上吧，我很想见见你们那个像兔子一样的雅努斯眷属呢~
E: Is your exploration team still short-handed? How about you bring me with you on the way back? I really want to see that rabbit-like kin of Janus that you mentioned.

C: <unbreak>999</unbreak>…<unbreak>998</unbreak>…<unbreak>997</unbreak>…<unbreak>996</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>999</unbreak>... <unbreak>998</unbreak>... <unbreak>997</unbreak>... <unbreak>996</unbreak>...

C: 面前的青年丝毫未察觉你的存在。他与身边的浴池总管激烈地争执，央求一份许可与权利。那决心就像赴死的英雄，只不过这片战地在浴场。
E: The young man before you has not noticed your presence at all. They are too busy locked in a ferocious argument over permissions and rights with the bath manager beside them. Their determination is like that of a dying hero, only their battlefield is actually a bathhouse.

C: 不像那位啰嗦的{RUBY_B#浴场侍者}达罗{RUBY_E#}老兄一样——「柯珀丝女士，请不要把画板带入池中」，「柯珀丝女士，我们打烊了，请您明晰时再来」。
E: Unlike that talkative {RUBY_B#Baths Attendant}Daros{RUBY_E#} —"Miss Karpos, please don't bring your easel into the pool," or "Miss Karpos, we're closing now, so please return during the Lucid Hour."

C: 来聊聊？
E: Want to chat?

C: 还鼓励所有成员都去和奇美拉来个近距离接触。哎，为了完成指标，我也当上了某只奇美拉小队的管理员，必须得监督它们工作，真是浪费时间。
E: They even encourage all members to get up close and personal with the chimeras. *sigh* In order to meet the quotas, I've ended up as the administrator of a chimera squad. I have to supervise their work, which is such a waste of time.

C: …水漫琴？我见过，这是卡弥特斯的特色乐器。根据记载，卡弥特斯是座受墨涅塔赐福的遥远城邦，那里的居民个个都是极具天赋的艺术家。
E: ...A water lyre? I've seen it before — it's a signature instrument of Carmitis. According to records, Carmitis was a distant city blessed by Mnestia. All her residents were artistic prodigies.

C: 地行龙。
E: The Terrazard.

C: 希拉。
E: Sheila.

C: 华劳斯可不像你这样目光短浅，虽然他不懂具体的理论细节，但是他有尊重科学的精神，以及…很多的钱。
E: Unlike you, Wallace isn't shortsighted. Even though he may not grasp all the detailed theories, he respects the spirit of scientific inquiry, and... well, he also has deep pockets.

C: 好啊，正好我手头没什么事。
E: No problem. I just so happen to be free right now.

C: 你爸爸已经回前线了？
E: Has your dad gone back to the front lines?

C: 你不是祭司么？神谕没告诉你？
E: Are you not a priest? Did the prophecy not tell you?

C: 有时候我们甚至要自掏腰包，补上合适的贡品、为友邦求取神谕。
E: Sometimes we even have to pay out of our own pockets to make up a suitable offering and obtain prophecies for our allies.

C: 是我的独门秘方，多年来一直深受神殿上下的青睐。每次我打开烤炉，这香味就把勾来一大片馋虫。
E: It's my secret recipe, cherished by all in the temple for years. Every time I open the oven, the aroma alone draws a crowd, all eager for a taste.

C: 日子虽然平淡，但我觉得很充实，神殿就是我的家。
E: Life might be simple, but it's fulfilling. This temple is my home.

C: 唔，说不上有趣，毕竟来这里的人形形色色，各有各的故事。
E: Well, not necessarily interesting, as everyone who comes here has their own story to tell.

C: 我原本构思过一些活动企划，但因为他们都是树庭的工作人员，闲暇时间经常被用来做各种研究课题，就……
E: I had envisioned several activities for us, but since everyone else is employed at the Grove, their free time is usually taken up by all sorts of research projects, so...

C: 未来…您是在暗示岁月的权能吗？莫非您是一位来自异邦的欧洛尼斯祭司？
E: The future... Are you alluding to the power of time? Could it be that you are an Oronyx priest from other cities?

C: 都是熟人了，不问了。
E: I know everyone well, and there's nothing more I need to know.

C: 感受不到，不如界域定锚。
E: I cannot feel it. Shall I use a Space Anchor?

C: 缇宁所看见、听见的事物，*我们*也都清楚地感知到了。那段因漫长岁月而蒙尘的往事，借欧洛尼斯的手擦拭，又再度明亮起来。
E: Whatever Trinnon has seen and heard, we also sense. Those dusty memories, buried beneath the weight of time, have been polished by Oronyx and now shine brightly once more.

C: 还是说…你是有什么烦心事，想要找人倾诉一下？
E: Or perhaps... Is there something on your mind that you want to talk about?

C: 好了，言归正传，既然你说不是来要签名石板的，那你找我是想要做什么？
E: Anyway, back to what we were saying... Since you aren't here for an autographed teleslate, what do you need from me, then?

C: 先不聊了，祝你好运。
E: I gotta run. Good luck with everything.

C: 有，不过那是很多年前的事了。那时候我还很年轻，刚成为祭司不久。它的声音是如此温暖，给予我莫大的勇气与力量。
E: Yes, but that was many years ago. Back then, I was still young, just a new priest. Kephale's voice was so warm, giving me great courage and strength.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 听起来确实帅气！
E: That really does sound impressive!

C: 当然！您与英雄们的逐火之旅何其恢宏、何其壮阔，能为您创作诗歌、记录下诸位的故事，是利波此生最大的荣幸。
E: Of course! Talk about your Flame-Chase Journey with the heroes. How magnificent, how grand! To create poetry for you and record your stories is the greatest honor of my life.

C: 有马尔库斯的消息了吗？
E: Any news about Marcus?

C: 唉，美妙的时光总是如此短暂…希望我们还有缘再见，朋友！
E: Ah, how fleeting sweet moments are... Till fate reunites us, friend!

C: 嘘——当然！我只悄悄和你一个人说，现在市集里的叔叔阿姨、哥哥姐姐，还有小鬼头们，都相信我真的听到了天父的神谕。
E: Shh— Of course! I'll whisper it only to you: now every adult and child at the market believes I truly heard the sky father's prophecy.

C: 不，正是灵魂！灵魂作为形式，是我们存在、行动的原因和目的。它决定了我们是何物，引导躯体潜在的存在实现，使之能够成为我们自己。
E: No — the soul! As a form, it's the cause and purpose of our existence and actions. It defines our being, actualizing the body's latent potential to become ourselves.

C: 而在某一个时刻，我可以是你，你也可以是我。
E: And somewhere in this endless cycle, I might live as you, and you as me.

C: 想到了翁法罗斯可能根本没有未来？那的确非常可怕…不过，我们也可以试着把它变成生存的动力。
E: Frightened by the possibility that Amphoreus has no future? It is terrifying... but perhaps we can transform that fear into a will to survive.

C: 谢谢，年轻的勇士。愿命运…眷恋于你。
E: Thank you, young warrior. May fate... favor you.

C: 贵客若有<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>，或许能让金丝不受此处的紊乱干扰，找到它们的踪迹。
E: If you have the <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>, perhaps it can help the golden thread overcome the disturbance here and find their traces.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望一段赤诚的友谊。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>井道的壁面上</color>，寻找同行的伙伴呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns for a sincere friendship. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the well shaft's wall</color>, looking for a companion.

C: 村长是这么教的迷！
E: That's what the chief taught us, memi!

C: （盯着他不说话）
E: (Stare at him without saying anything)

C: 很漂亮的麦田。
E: It's a beautiful wheat field.

C: 也难怪啦，这支舞我练习了好久，每个动作都刻在脑袋里了。
E: Well, no surprise! I've been practicing this routine forever. Every move is etched into my head!

C: 主要是稻草人的功劳。
E: That's mostly the scarecrow's doing.

C: 哼，现在说什么也来不及了。我要备战下一个耕耘月了嘤！
E: Hmph, say what you will! I need to prepare for the upcoming Month of Cultivation!

C: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

C: …没什么可奇怪的，阁下。我只是平日事务冗杂，太久没写信手生罢了。
E: ...Nothing to be surprised about, my {M#lord}{F#lady}. It's just that I was so busy with my daily affairs that I am out of practice with writing.

C: 我、我在写《落木逐火英雄纪》，一部记录逐火之旅的史诗。
E: I—I'm writing the Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase, an epic poem about the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: {NICKNAME}贵客，来，也请你看看这本《凯撒军记》的手稿。
E: {NICKNAME}, our honored guest, come, you should have a look at this manuscript of The Chronicles of the Imperator's Campaign too.

C: 垃圾…桶？啊…阁下是在担心环境卫生吧，我们有专人打扫的，不必担忧！
E: Trash... cans? I... dear guest, are you worried about hygiene? Don't worry, we have someone specifically here to clean things up!

C: 呼嗝~吼，吼啊——那你想听，听谁喝醉之后，闹出来的笑话？
E: Burp~ Rooooar— Then, which drunk's funny tale do you want to hear about?

C: 之后再见吧。
E: See you later, then.

C: 传说有一种流淌在树干上的甜浆，像黄金一样金黄，像琥珀一样剔透，比迷境里任何果子都还要香甜，是代表着「永恒」的梦幻佳肴——
E: They say there's a kind of sweet syrup that flows along tree trunks. It's yellow like gold, clear like amber, and sweeter than any fruit in the Maze. A dreamlike delicacy that symbolizes eternity—

C: 迷境里的传闻究竟是真是假？神秘餐馆崛起背后的真相究竟如何？
E: Are the whispers from the Maze true or false? What's the real story behind this rising culinary mystery?

C: 你有病吧？！！
E: What's wrong with you!?

C: 盲信会带来许多危害，试想，你因为一句不知真假的消息，便轻易下了某种草率的决定。结果呢？损失，后悔，还会让亲近的人看笑话。
E: Blind faith can bring many dangers. Just imagine, if you made a rash decision based on unverified information, how will things end? You will suffer loss and regret, and become a joke to your loved ones.

C: 别就知道钱钱钱的好吗，你的短视让瑟希斯蒙羞！
E: Can you stop talking about money all the time? Your shortsightedness brings shame to Cerces!

C: 就像奔赴冥界的蝴蝶，落在死亡的枝头。
E: Like a raven butterfly flying swiftly into the nether realm, perching on the twig of death.

C: 那你泼我冷水干嘛？！
E: Why are you spoiling this for me!?

C: 我会保护大家的！
E: I will protect all of you!

C: 咕咕…噢！有个孩子遇到了青春的烦恼，正四处寻觅漂亮戒指，想赠予心仪的小鸟…你去有<color=#dbc291ff>戒指</color>的地方找找吧，也劝劝他这并非真爱所需咕。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's troubled by the growing pains of youth, searching everywhere for a beautiful ring to gift to their beloved little bird... Go look for them where the <color=#dbc291ff>rings</color> are, and maybe remind him that true love does not need such things, hoot.

C: 你在研究什么生物呢？
E: What creatures do you study?

C: 到处打听关于她的事情，多半没什么好心思。你最好注意些，别让我发现你的阴谋诡计。
E: What good intention could you possibly have by asking around about her? You better watch out. Don't let me find out your scheme.

C: 哼，总算是问完了。亏世玲还大费周章地给你科普空间站的常识，没想到你倒是想知道更多不该知道的东西！
E: Phew, finally. I spent so much effort introducing the basics of the space station to you, but you're interested in things you shouldn't know!

C: 喂，你这幅不信任又担心的表情是怎么回事？
E: Hey, what's that distrustful and concerned look on your face?

C: 支持…安提西尼…？
E: Support... Antisthenes...?

C: 那么…需要我帮你找找吗？
E: So... want me to help you look for it?

C: …你是在问我吗？
E: ...Are you asking me?

C: 但是那个时候我听到了一个声音，那是在无穷远方的地心里，荒笛大人传来的引导…它能与大地上的所有生灵心意相通。
E: But at that moment, I heard a voice coming from the infinite depths of the world's core, it was the guidance from Lord Terravox... It could connect with the hearts of all living beings on Earth.

C: 曾经有一只蝾螈问过荒笛大人有关战争的回忆，尤其是举戈向吉奥里亚的时刻，那是它生命中最重要的一次「反叛」。
E: Once, a salamander asked Lord Terravox about their memories of war, especially the moment when they raised arms against Georios. That was the most important "rebellion" in their life.

C: 丹恒大人已接过荒笛大人的使命，他会将我们带往星空…荒笛大人曾说过，星空是另一片大地，我很期待那片大地。
E: Lord Dan Heng has inherited Lord Terravox's duty. He will lead us to the stars... Lord Terravox once said that the stars form another world, and I'm looking forward to seeing that world.

C: 好像的确看不到…
E: Yeah, I can't seem to see it...

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 嗯…有位织者正极目远眺。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>眺望神秘的入口</color>，为那奇观发出惊叹呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is gazing into the distance. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>looking out at the mysterious entrance</color>, marveling at that spectacular sight.

C: 这场聚会就是特地为你举办的，猎手小姐，请务必出席！拜托了，这是所有人的请求！
E: We're throwing this party especially for you, Miss Archer! Please come! Everyone's asking for you!

C: 来，都可以来…嚯！这不是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄吗？真是百闻不如一见。
E: Sure, everyone's welcome... Wait, aren't you the great hero who saved Amphoreus! The stories don't do you justice at all!

C: 怎么一个个唉声叹气的？
E: Why is everyone sighing?

C: 认识。
E: Yes.

C: 啊啊，要是早点发现自己的隐藏属性，我就能替大家守护好浴场了…啊，不灭的金血，从此时开始发光发热吧！
E: Ahhh, if only I'd discovered my hidden ability earlier, I could've protected the baths for everyone... Ah, indestructible golden blood, it's time for you to shine and burn bright!

C: 没有工作不是好事吗？
E: Isn't it a good thing to have no work?

C: 呜嗡嗡。（呜，还好我是大地兽，本来就没有头发。不然迟早要被{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}摸秃不可。）
E: Grumph. (Phew, good thing I'm a dromas and don't have hair. Otherwise, {F#Mama}{M#Papa} would've petted me bald by now.)

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 嗯，我去买些布匹练练力道。不然，若是失手毁掉人台，可不好交代了。
E: Hmm, I'll go buy some fabric to practice my technique. After all, it would be quite awkward if I accidentally destroyed the mannequin.

C: 这样的话，那*我们*可得好好想一个响亮的口号啦。
E: If we're doing that, then we need to think of a catchy slogan!

C: 接下来，我会基于你的记忆，将那段岁月唤回哀丽秘榭，作为最后的相片陪伴你。
E: Next, based on your memories, I will recall those days to Aedes Elysiae, as the final photograph to accompany you.

C: 不过，昔涟发现你了。她没有出声，只是眨了眨眼，对你露出一个微笑。
E: However, Cyrene noticed you. She didn't say anything, just blinked and gave you a smile.

C: ——但听到了街头流传的这些新版本，我也思忖起了要如何编排剪裁。
E: ...Though, after hearing these new versions circulating in the streets, I started contemplating how to arrange and edit them.

C: 呵！既然如此，别忘了我们身边就有一位——{NICKNAME}，听说你正打算把翁法罗斯的故事带到天外……
E: Hah! Speaking of which, we have someone right here. {NICKNAME}, I heard you're planning to take the story of Amphoreus beyond the sky...

C: 虽然人们见我时举止还是略有拘谨，但好奇的孩子们已经愿意牵起我的手，去看停驻在花丛中的蝴蝶了。
E: Though people are still somewhat wary around me, curious children are now willing to hold my hand as they go and watch butterflies resting among the flowers.

C: 不过，翁法罗斯因你的到来而诞生的奇迹，以及曾经相伴的那些记忆，于我而言，已经足够珍贵了。
E: But the miracles that your arrival brought to Amphoreus, and all those memories we shared, are already precious enough to me.

C: 嗯…有位织者迷失了自己的来路。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>残破断裂的柱子上</color>，疑惑归家的方向呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has lost their way home. The golden thread brings tidings: They're on a <color=#dbc291ff>fractured, crumbling pillar</color>, puzzled about which way leads home.

C: 嗯…有位织者得偿所愿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>那血晶环绕的王座前</color>洋洋得意呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who got their wish. The golden thread brings tidings: They're gloating <color=#dbc291ff>before the throne encircled by blood crystals</color>.

C: 再会了。
E: Farewell.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 在列车上一定很无聊吧？
E: Is it boring aboard the Express?

C: 不过作者在前言里说<color=#dbc291ff>「只要按照目录的提示，你就能找到对应的地点；只要找到对应的地点，你就能收集到对应的书页」</color>……
E: However, the author said in the preface <color=#dbc291ff>"If you follow the clues in the table of contents, you can find the corresponding locations, where you can collect the pages of the book."</color>

C: 哇！你真的收集齐了吗？
E: WOW! Did you really find them all?

C: 我尽量吧…
E: I suppose I can give it a try...

C: （提交教具）
E: (Submit Teaching Props)

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Sorry, I have something else to do.

C: 今天这谜题，我可是构思了很久啊…没想到被你轻易搞定了。
E: I thought about today's puzzle for such a long time... I didn't expect you to complete it so easily.

C: 看我的！
E: I got this!

C: 滴答，我好像是喝多了…对不起，我的工资没办法请您喝苏乐达，先拿这个当做补偿吧……
E: Tick-tock, I think I drank too much... I'm sorry. With my paycheck, I can't afford to treat you to SoulGlad. Please take this as compensation...

C: 感谢你，伙计。刚才我实在太冲动了……
E: Thank you, friend. I was a bit rash back then...

C: 枕头的鹅绒要重新换一遍了…睡在柔软的枕头上才能有柔软的梦。
E: The stuffing in the pillow needs to be changed... One only has sweet dreams if they sleep on a soft pillow.

C: 找那边的门卫帮忙？
E: Have you asked that guard over there for help?

C: 「首先要夸夸你，做得不错。没几个人能找到这个漏洞，连我自己都没发现。」
E: "First of all, I have to praise you on a job well done. Not many know about this exploit, not even myself."

C: 哎呀，这可不得了…竟然有人特地来这冰天雪地里找鄙人交流艺术……
E: Heavens, that's unbelievable... Someone is coming all the way out to this icy frostscape just to talk art with me...

C: 「大守护者可可利亚以她的气度与铁腕，唤醒了贝洛伯格每一颗沉睡的灵魂——她为忠诚的铁卫吹响反攻的号角，无愧为七百年来唯一的先驱。」
E: "Supreme Guardian Cocolia, with her magnanimity and firmness, awakened every sleeping soul in Belobog. She sounded the horn of counterattack for the loyal Silvermane Guards, worthy of being the only pioneer in the last seven hundred years."

C: 看看杰帕德的简历。
E: Check out Gepard's resume.

C: 「——『引发奇迹之人』阿丽萨•兰德。」
E: "— She Who Evokes Miracles, Alisa Rand."

C: 「她的仁慈使贝洛伯格停转的齿轮机构再度发出轰鸣，象征着进步的烟焰自高耸的炉身贯入雪幕；」
E: "Her compassion made Belobog's stalled gears roar once more, and the smoke of progress flowed from the towering furnace into the snow curtain."

C: 长戟与火枪，银鬃铁卫的制式武器。
E: Halberds and firearms, the standard Silvermane Guard weapons.

C: 你将展品带回了贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆……
E: You've brought the exhibit back to the Belobog History and Culture Museum...

C: 我赞成。
E: I agree.

C: 认错驭空大人？不会吧？
E: Mistaken Madam Yukong for someone else? Are you serious?

C: …所以为什么一开始要禁止天舶司谈论幽灵星槎啊？
E: ...So why did you forbid Sky-Faring Commission staff from talking about the phantom starskiff?

C: 所以…我相信乐于助人的{NICKNAME}一定会帮我的，对吧？
E: So... I'm sure the helpful {NICKNAME} will give me a hand, right?

C: 呜呜呜！
E: Woo-woo woo!

C: （滑梯上好像有两只扑满……）
E: (Seems like there's a couple of Trotters on the slide...)

C: 扑满趴在地上瑟瑟发抖，它现在已经无路可逃了。
E: The Trotter lies on the ground shaking. There's no place for it to escape to now.

C: {NICKNAME}，这边，这边！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, over here!

C: 竟、竟然一眼看穿了我的想法……
E: ...Eh-he, was it that obvious...?

C: 这店家到底懂不懂什么是流量，懂不懂什么是经济啊！
E: Do these people know nothing about the value of brand exposure? That's marketing <unbreak>101</unbreak>!

C: 跟你话说不到一块去。我探店，其实是在帮店家做宣传，这本来是要收钱的。
E: You're clearly not familiar with this line of work. Taste testing gives the restaurant publicity — that means a higher sales conversion!

C: 商会会长都没得法子，这位短生种小朋友真能做到吗？唉，死马当作活马医好了！
E: Even the president hasn't been able to solve anything — is this short-lifer really up to the job? *sigh* At this point, I guess we've got nothing to lose...

C: 码头的债务危机暂告一段落，金人巷的复兴才刚刚开始。
E: The dock's crisis is over for now. The revival of Aurum Alley is just beginning.

C: 打住吧。
E: ...Not on my watch.

C: 两者都不怎么样，非得选一个。
E: Neither party is ideal, but one has to be chosen.

C: 我给你们的建议是，去同功坊看看，店老板霄老大是「提出重组商会」的人。要是能够得到他的认可，你们肯定会受到更多商铺的支持。
E: My advice to you is to visit the shopkeeper Mr. Xiao. He is the one who proposed the reorganization of the Merchant Guild. If you can get his support, you will definitely receive support from the other merchants.

C: 我们用决策保护商铺，而公司只会为了决策牺牲商铺。
E: We protect businesses, the IPC sacrifices them for their own gain.

C: 只要说出最后一个字的时候，脸上在微笑就行是吧？
E: Remember, smile when you say the word!

C: 再给我一句宣传口号。
E: Come on, need another slogan.

C: 为什么{F#她}{M#他}会在这里？
E: {F#Her}{M#His} Favorite Place?

C: 更重要的是，它证明了作为「美食街」的金人巷，在如今依然有十足的竞争力。
E: It goes to show that the Alley still lives up to its name as one of the best food destinations.

C: 你错了，我们最终服务的是金人巷商铺。
E: Wrong. None of it would have been possible without winning the hearts of local businesses.

C: 素裳姑娘讲得好。
E: Well said, Sushang.

C: 这是从金人巷各商户处收集来的意向调查，其中大部分人与商会建立了合作，并且希望能够保留现在的经营模式——其中包括同功坊。
E: According to the poll we conducted earlier with business owners, most of them have already partnered with the Merchant Guild and wish to preserve their current business model. Artistry Hardware is among the shops that registered this answer.

C: 小少爷，你把自己看得太高了。
E: You think too highly of yourself.

C: 你是想随便丢出一件材料，然后等待我的反应吗？
E: You can't just present something irrelevant and expect me to respond.

C: 是呀，驭空大人不会对破坏商业秩序的行为坐视不理的。不等我们出手，天舶司也会派人来处理，斯科特这样的人肯定得意不了。
E: Exactly. Madam Yukong would never allow malicious competition. If we hadn't taught Skott a lesson, the Sky-Faring Commission would have done so anyway.

C: 那么公司可能就会更加肆无忌惮，更加难对付…幸好小少爷是一个讲道理的人。
E: Then the IPC would've been more brutal, and the situation would've been much harder for us... Thankfully, Xiaohan turned out to be upright and reasonable.

C: 你收到了公司的信用点，为了这点好处，你帮助公司破坏码头的运输活动。
E: You received payments from the IPC, and in exchange you sabotaged the shipping operations at the dock.

C: 啊？！只要豉油？
E: Huh!? Just soy sauce?

C: 豉油蒸鸡，不要葱姜蒜。
E: Steamed soy sauce chicken. No spring onion, no ginger, and no garlic.

C: 一言为定。
E: Deal.

C: 要是公司标下了金人巷，也许以后就没有寿考堂给你开病假了。
E: If the IPC manages to secure Aurum Alley, there may not be a Longevity Hall here anymore to give you sick leave notes.

C: （他完全将我们和公司划上等号了……）
E: (He is convinced that the IPC and us are the same...)

C: 出示。
E: (Present evidence)

C: 当然有必要！一想到鹤运物流还有数不清的货物没有运送完，我就心急如焚。我不会下班的，我永不下班！
E: Of course there is! I feel anxious every time I think about all the work left waiting to be done at Heron Express. I'll never clock off — never stop working!

C: 但这不重要！如果每一台机巧鸟都能像我一样自觉、奋发！那么鹤运物流将能造福更多的仙舟居民！我不会下班的，我永不下班！
E: But that's not important! If every cycrane could be as self-aware and hardworking as I am, then Heron Express could benefit even more Xianzhou residents! I'll never clock off — never stop working!

C: 我对交通事故不感兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in traffic accidents.

C: 辛苦了，垣风老哥对这次「客制运单」的服务非常满意。我们与鹤运物流进构建了长期的信赖关系，加强了合作，会有更多的高价商品进入码头物流。
E: Thanks to you, Yuanfeng is very satisfied with our Custom Order service. Now that we've built a long-term relationship with Heron Express and strengthened our cooperation, we'll be able to get more high-end goods in at the dock.

C: …这就没钱了吗？商会想办法凑了一些钱，请你省着点花。
E: Out of money already...? The Merchant Guild has thrown together some funds... Try to spend it more slowly this time.

C: 金人巷西南角区域地图已更新，感谢你的帮忙，这点辛苦费还是收一下吧，不然我和我的同事可过意不去了。
E: Thank you for your help. I've updated the southwest corner of the Aurum Alley map. Here's a little fee for your work. Take it, otherwise we'd feel awkward.

C: 有完没完，又开始了……
E: Ah... Come on, not again...

C: 好端端的怎么瞎骂鸟啊，你这家伙啊，真没素质……
E: Hey, watch your language! Who are you accusing of slacking off, huh?

C: …什、什么意思喔？
E: Wh—What do you mean?

C: {NICKNAME}大人上次使用「降魔机巧鸟」成功回收天上的「逸散岁阳」，这次守灵也要拜托大人将绥园各处的逸散的岁阳收集完整。
E: You successfully retrieved the dispersed heliobi in the sky using the exorcist cycranes last time, {NICKNAME}. This time, Shouling would like to ask you to again collect all the dispersed heliobi around Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
E: Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.

C: 难道是坏了？
E: Is it broken?

C: 哇！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}真有学问，太厉害了！
E: Wow! {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you know so much! You're so awesome!

C: 汇报感应仪坐标的勘测…
E: Survey report on the sensor coordinates...

C: 爸爸妈妈又不在，讨厌！
E: Mommy and daddy are not here again, I hate it!

C: …你…代号……
E: Your... code name...

C: 咕叽咕叽…唔……呜呜！
E: *unintelligible sounds*

C: （挥舞拳头恐吓「它」）
E: (Intimidate "it" with your fist)

C: 给小孩讲这些还太早了吧。
E: It's too early to be teaching children these things.

C: 在给我们讲宇宙理论！
E: He's telling us about the theories of the universe!

C: 得益于家族最新研发的梦泡压缩技术，我们得以将那些只存在于梦境中的独特风味带到现实。「仰望星空」蛋糕、「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞…只要你想要，没有我们提供不了的美味！
E: Thanks to The Family's latest Dream Bubble Compression technology, we can now bring unique dream-inspired flavors that used to exist only in Dreamscape to reality. Whether it's the Stargazer cake or Mr. Herring's lemon tart, there's no delectable dish beyond our reach!

C: 请拿好你的参与奖励——哦！看来你的朋友们也收到这份特别礼品了。
E: Please accept your participation reward — Oh! It looks like your friends have received this special gift as well.

C: 哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
E: Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.

C: 再来一次，我大概就能习惯这种脾胃翻腾的感觉了吧？{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们走吧。
E: One more time, and I think I'll probably get used to this topsy-turvy, nauseating feeling? Let's go, {F#miss}{M#mister}

C: 舒翁…这个名字我倒是没有听过。
E: Siobhan... This name isn't familiar to me.

C: 稍微教教就会，挺不错嘛。技术方面算是合格了。
E: You're getting the hang of things already! Technique-wise, you're a pass.

C: 哇嘎嘎！就喜欢你看不惯我，又拿我没办法的模样！
E: Whoa! I love seeing you hate me and not be able to do anything about it!

C: 就喜欢您这样温柔的类型~哎呀，要是*那位*也能这么贴心就好了。
E: Oh, I'm really fond of your gentle type! Alas, if only *he* could be as caring as you are.

C: 呜…呜呜……
你向舒翁讲述了在梦境酒店里遇见的事。当说起那些发狂的怪物时，你注意到她似乎并未感到惊讶，平静的神色间夹着几分疲惫，仿佛对现状早已知晓。
E: You tell Siobhan about what happened in the hotel in the Dreamscape. When you mention the frenzied monsters, you notice that she doesn't seem all that surprised. Instead, a touch of fatigue appears on her calm face, as if she has been expecting it.

C: 确实很可疑。
E: Suspicious indeed.

C: 呜呜！！我知道这样很丢脸…可悲伤它始终围绕着我，我控制不住自己呜哇哇哇！
E: *sob* I know it's awkward... but I just can't shake off my grief... Waaaaah!

C: 知道啦知道啦。会说话的狗狗，真可爱。下次再给你带礼物哦。我还有事要忙，先走啦。
E: Yeah, yeah. Talking dog, so cute. I'll bring you a gift next time, but for now, I've got work to do, so I'm outta here.

C: 乐意效劳。
E: I'm happy to help.

C: …时间有限，我就直说好了。
E: ...Time is limited, so I'll be straightforward.

C: 我一直都觉得玩调饮很开心。
E: I've had a lot of fun mixing drinks.

C: 关于我的事，之后再问吧。
E: Let's talk about me later, okay?

C: 在我的那个年代，「万界之癌」到处扩散，银轨阻塞，极端的气候变化也层出不穷…「开拓」一直都不是件容易的事，在星神阿基维利陨落之后更是如此。
E: In my time, the Cancer of All Worlds was spreading everywhere. The silver rail was blocked, and extreme climate alterations raged to no end... Trailblaze has never been an easy task, and after the fall of the Aeon Akivili, that was more true than ever.

C: 在这里，你会再次体会「探索」、「了解」、「建立」、「连结」…
E: You will experience the process of exploring, understanding, creating, and connecting once again here...

C: 我以为这个名字取得挺好的……
E: I think the name is pretty good...

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 趁我还走得动，咱们赶快到外面看看，这群叛徒都藏了些什么。
E: While I still can walk, let's hurry outside and see what else the traitors are hiding.

C: 你脑子进苏乐达了吗？
E: Did SoulGlad get into your brain?

C: 亲爱的朋友，你是来寻找宝藏的吧？
E: My dear friend, are you here for the treasure?

C: 还是朝露公馆更好玩。
E: Dewlight Pavilion is more fun.

C: …但我还是要提醒你一下，朝露公馆可不能随便进出。
E: ...Anyway, I must remind you that Dewlight Pavilion isn't somewhere you can come and go at will.

C: 真的，不骗你。
E: I'm telling the truth.

C: 宾客…不，导演，我在此代表克劳克影业，郑重邀请您加入《美梦往事》动画剧组！
E: Dear guest... I mean, director, I'd like to sincerely invite you on behalf of Clock Studios to join the production team of the Dreamjoy Memoir animation!

C: 这个嘛…现在无论是影评家还是普通影迷，都在期待最后一部影片——《美梦大机密》的上映。
E: Well... Both critics and fans are looking forward to the release of the last film — Dreamjoy Secrecy.

C: 嗯…你说得对，那家伙肯定不会抛下自己的作品不管。
E: Hmm... You're right. That guy surely wouldn't abandon his work.

C: 长大之后，我留在了流梦礁，而米莫萨选择前往美梦，追求她想要的生活。
E: When we got older, I chose to stay here in Dreamflux Reef while Mimosa pursued the life she desired in Penacony.

C: 皮斯和我说过，你参与了这部电影的制作。
E: Pisce told me you were involved in the production of this film series.

C: 咦？你们为什么会发生不愉快的事情？
E: Huh? What led to the argument?

C: 毕竟？
E: After all?

C: 好嘞，深入了解才能创造佳作，您尽管问，我知无不言！
E: Sure! An in-depth understanding of the subject is essential in creating a masterpiece. Just ask away! I'll tell you everything I know.

C: 稍等片刻，我正在计算此次合作拍摄的总成本。
E: Hold on a sec. I'm calculating the total expenses for this filming collab.

C: 「谢谢你，哈努兄弟！」
E: "Thank you, Brother Hanu!"

C: 还是带气泡绵密、口味新奇的「聚爆苏乐达」呢？啾啾？
E: Or is it the bubbly, uniquely flavored Explosion SoulGlad? Tweet tweet?

C: 「但他们愿意将魔法让给钟表小子，帮钟表小子回家。」
E: "But they are willing to gift this magic to Clockie, to help Clockie get home."

C: 太好了——这一镜<color=#dbc291ff>堪称完美</color>！
E: Great! This shot is <color=#dbc291ff>totally perfect</color>!

C: 我是要当导演的人。
E: I am someone who wants to become a director.

C: 没错！<color=#dbc291ff>就是这个味儿</color>！接下来就是最后一个镜头了。
E: That's right! <color=#dbc291ff>Just the vibe I want</color>! Next up is the last scene.

C: 我能不能找到一颗开朗的心呢？你看我现在，多么阴沉内向呀！
E: Will I be able to find a carefree heart? Just look at me right now: Wretched and socially inept!

C: 好呀，你想要聊点什么？
E: Sure. What would you like to talk about?

C: 宝贵的石头。
E: Precious stones.

C: 要不了多久，就能…
E: Just a little while longer, and then...

C: 仔细说说。
E: Tell me more details.

C: 「你放弃了诱惑，拿起了自己最熟悉的那只球棒。棍身已经磨损折旧，但却是手中最真实的力量。你没有成为银河第一的球棒侠。但每当他人落难时，都会有位使用球棒的好心人赶来助上一臂之力…」
E: "Giving up all temptation, you pick up the bat you're most familiar with. It's worn and dull, but it holds the truest powers when it rests in your hands. You have not become the ultimate baseballer in the cosmos, but whenever trouble befalls anyone, there will always be a kind-hearted individual arriving to help out with this bat in hand..."

C: 手里的钱现在只够买这些，一切结束之后我们再去吃大餐吧！
E: We can only afford these for now. Let's treat ourselves to a feast after everything is over!

C: 这不像要逗我笑，倒像是要抛下我了……
E: You look less like you want to make me laugh, and more like you want to abandon me.

C: 许多演员靠煽情感动他人，但你们却表演出了欲语泪先流的悲伤，甚至让我想起了从前……
E: Many actors depend on emotions to move people, but your performance depicted a grief so profound it brings tears to one's eyes... and even reminds me of my past...

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 哼？哼。
E: Hmph? Hmph.

C: 我说…这剧情和台词也太随便了吧……
E: Sheesh... The logic in this plot and dialogue is really being pushed to its limits...

C: 为了过个瘾？
E: Play along?

C: 几台公司的机甲应声出现在不夜侯附近，围观的仙舟路人也越来越多。
E: A few IPC mechs respond and appear near the Sleepless Earl, and more and more Xianzhou passers-by stop to watch.

C: 敬茶一事自然可以闲置不谈，不过彦卿想问一下三月小姐，刚才的赌约…有几分信心？
E: Sure, the tea can wait for now. However, I have a question, Miss March... How confident are you about the bet you just made?

C: 偶遇孤魂野鬼？
E: Bump into a lonely ghost?

C: 我其实很佩服你愿赌服输。
E: Actually, I respect that you're willing to honor the bet.

C: 我先去休息一下，告辞。
E: I am going to rest for a while, farewell.

C: 存、存档？这么一说确实很像是问某个高端玩家借了存档。不过嘛，等尾巴大爷一走，我这边还不是一无所获嘛。
E: S—Save file? When you put it this way, it does sound like asking to borrow a hardcore player's save file. But once Mr. Tail leaves, I'd still be left empty-handed.

C: …啊！刚刚寒鸦大人发来了一例「僵尸」的案情，看来休息时间结束了。三月小姐，我们下次再见吧！
E: ...Ah! Madam Hanya just sent over a zombie case, looks like break time's over. We'll talk again, Miss March!

C: 在受害者身上找共通点是误区。
E: It's a mistake to look for similarities on the victims.

C: 你就别费力一通分析了，让咱们把情况说全乎些。
E: You should give the analysis a rest first and let us finish talking.

C: 我想，只有用自己的脑子去思考、用自己的身体去体会，才能把「彦卿师父的剑」、「云璃师父的剑」最后变成「三月七的剑」。
E: I think that I have to put my own thought into it, and experience it myself to eventually turn "Master Yanqing's Sword" and "Master Yunli's Sword" into "March 7th's Sword."

C: 看来十五天确实太短了，很难练出些名堂。
E: Looks like fifteen days are too short to master swordplay.

C: 你不过是个只练过十五天剑术的外行罢了。能和他们战斗到这种地步，已经很了不起了。
E: Well, you've only been practicing swordplay for fifteen days. To even reach this point is already impressive.

C: 彦卿、{NICKNAME}，我们仨打到他们忘掉约定为止吧。
E: Hey, Yanqing and {NICKNAME}, what do you say we give them a harsh beating until they forget about that stupid bet?

C: 终于到我擅长的环节了。
E: Finally, something I'm good at.
Wait, what???

C: 《开拓豪侠传》写得靠不靠谱，难道你自己不知道吗？
E: Do you even realize how much those legends get exaggerated?

C: 呵，希望你们手上的功夫和嘴上的功夫一样强。
E: Heh, I hope your actions are as strong as that mouth of yours.

C: 我…我也不知道啊？
E: I... I don't know...?

C: 瞧瞧，这不是我们的女侠三月七吗？你身边的，这是……
E: Well, well, if it isn't our hero March 7th! And who do we have here with you...?

C: 三月小姐，鄙人选用的药材固然珍异，终究还是能随处买到的凡品，充其量是能强身健体、补充营养…换句话说，对你的剑术功力帮助不大。
E: Miss March, though the herbs I have selected are valuable beyond measure, they are still readily available for sale anywhere. At best, they can strengthen your constitution and replenish your nutrients... In other words, they won't help your swordplay much.

C: 实不相瞒，上次我俩来丹鼎司时，曜青的椒丘先生提到了丹鼎司中藏有一条「赤龙」。
E: Truth be told, when we came by the Alchemy Commission, Mr. Jiaoqiu of the Yaoqing mentioned that a Crimson Dragon was hidden in the Alchemy Commission.

C: 我真的…需要「赤龙血」吗？<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来丹鼎司时，也许我的心里会有答案吧。</color>
E: Do I really... need the Crimson Dragon Blood? <color=#dbc291ff>I may have an answer ready the next time I come to the Alchemy Commission.</color>

C: 真的真的不需要！
E: I really, really don't need it!

C: 我记住了。不过，我还有一个问题——椒丘先生只是想请我们吃药膳的话，为什么不让我告诉二位师父呢？
E: I will remember this. But Mr. Jiaoqiu, I have a question — if you simply wanted to treat us to a herbal feast, why couldn't I tell the two masters about it?

C: 换句话说，三月又上当受骗了…
E: So, March got tricked again...

C: 您就是那个仙舟老玩家？
E: Are you the Xianzhou veteran player?

C: 机械灵魂降临到了我的身边！
E: The Mechanical Soul shall bless me with its presence!

C: 真可惜，太卜大人去玉阙仙舟出差了。
E: What a shame. The Master Diviner is currently on a business trip to the Yuque Xianzhou.

C: 灵砂大人怎么也在这里？
E: What are you doing here, Master Lingsha?

C: 三月，你能改变书中人物命运？
E: March, can you change the destiny of the man in the book?

C: 总之，{NICKNAME}，后续如果你有空了，记得来找我啊。
E: Either way, {NICKNAME}. If you have time in the future, remember to come back and see me again.

C: 总之，今天的数据搜集就交给你了！
E: Anyway, I'm counting on you for data collection again today!

C: 如果可以的话，我也想…体验一下。请务必告诉我，怎样才能使出「友谊魔法」！
E: If it's possible, I would love the chance to... experience this for myself. Please tell me how I can use this Magic of Friendship!

C: 一个被冰雪覆盖的城市。
E: It's a snow-covered city.

C: 没听说过也没关系。接下来我会用自己的实力，让全银河都记住「贝洛伯格」的名字。
E: It's okay if you haven't heard of us. I'll make sure the whole cosmos remembers Belobog's name with my fists!

C: 红发兄台的这条镔铁胳膊，看上去实在威猛，绝对一拳一个小朋友。
E: The iron arm on this red-haired boy looks like it's got power, definitely capable of taking down a kid with one punch at a time.

C: 我准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 别放在心上。赛前互相人身攻击，不是格斗比赛的传统吗？
E: Don't take it to heart. Isn't it a tradition to trash-talk each other before a match starts?

C: 她那是保佑我吗！那冷冷的冰雨在我脸上胡乱地拍，可疼了！
E: How's that watching over me!? Raining down a hail of ice on my face, that really hurt!

C: 确实，不知道看病要花多久。还是先去太卜司和玲可汇合吧。
E: Actually, I'm not too sure how long it takes to see a doctor. Let's meet up with Lynx at the Divination Commission first.

C: 吓我一跳，你要干嘛……
E: Gosh you scared me. What do you want...

C: 司鼎大人，您看出什么了吗？我还有救吗？
E: Cauldron Master, what do you see? Is there any hope for me?

C: 听起来好神奇啊！那价格？
E: Sounds great! Er, how much?

C: 刚才在丹鼎司就应该给你也开点药。
E: Looks like the Alchemy Commission should've given you a prescription as well.

C: 我一定可以打败彦卿！
E: I WILL DEFEAT YANQING!

C: 我明白，你现在迫不及待想去参加贝城代表预选赛的决赛。不过，杰帕德可不好对付。
E: I know. You can't wait to join the finals of the Belobog Representative Qualifiers. But Gepard isn't a pushover either.

C: 说的没错。卢卡，就把你渴望胜利的决心，用拳头告诉我吧！
E: Well said, Luka. Let your determined desire for victory speak through your fists!

C: 我输了…杰帕德先生，是您技高一筹。
E: I've lost... Mr. Gepard, you were better than me.

C: 这就是你要自己想明白的问题了。
E: That's a question you need to ask yourself.

C: 嗯？你们看我干什么？
E: Huh? What are you lot looking at me for?

C: 嗯？这位…尾巴大爷？你怎么突然靠得这么近？
E: Uh? This... Mr. Tail? What are you doing so close to me?

C: 据说前几届演武仪典，复活赛就是让高人气的淘汰者彼此混战，决选出唯一一个胜利者重归叩关赛。
E: According to the previous Wardances, the repechage is a free-for-all among popular contestants that have been eliminated. There's only one winner, and only the winner can rejoin the knockout stage.

C: 银枝先生，让您看笑话了。但可别因此小瞧我啊！
E: Mr. Argenti, I'm sorry you had to see that spectacle, but please don't underestimate me because of that!

C: 唔…对不起嘛！史瓦罗说，如果告诉卢卡哥哥，会让你难过，所以虎克就没有告诉你……
E: Um... Sorry! Svarog said you would be sad if I told you the truth, so I kept it a secret...

C: 卢卡，准备好挑战彦卿了吗？
E: Luka, are you ready to challenge Yanqing?

C: 在我们的故乡，虽然许多人都听过伊戈尔•哈夫特的英雄故事，但我们从来不知道他旅行天外时到底经历了什么。请您务必告诉我！
E: In our hometown, many of us have heard of Igor Haft's heroic tale, but we don't know what he really went through during his journey beyond the sky. Please, you have to tell me his story!

C: 数日后。
E: Days later...

C: 护法僧毗梨的遗言播放结束。
E: The recording of Dharmic Monk Virya's last words ends here.

C: 皈依弟子<unbreak>0089</unbreak>，你虽业障未除，但仍有度化余地。
E: Converted Disciple <unbreak>0089</unbreak>, though your karmic hindrances have not been removed, there is yet room for your redemption.

C: 驭空很快派人清理了赛场，空寂的擂台上，只能听见一阵阵心跳声。
E: Yukong quickly sends people to clean up the stage. Amid the deafening silence, only the sound of heartbeats can be heard.

C: {NICKNAME}教练真是太厉害了！
E: Coach {NICKNAME} is amazing!

C: 哈哈！没什么啦！比武本就是开心的事，笑一笑也正常。
E: Haha! No biggie! Exchanging moves is a happy occasion. It's normal to have a laugh.

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 很遗憾，卢卡选手在本场比赛中惜败给巡海游侠波提欧。接下来的新闻发布会，将由卢卡的教练{NICKNAME}接受记者提问。
E: Very sadly, Luka has been defeated by the Galaxy Ranger Boothill in this match. In the next press conference, Luka's coach {NICKNAME} will be accepting journalist questions.

C: 你是在质疑我的专业能力吗？
E: Are you doubting my professionalism?

C: 原来「弃赛风波」真相是这样的……
E: So this is the truth behind the match-forfeiting drama...

C: 银枝作为纯美骑士团的骑士，不会做出有违骑士精神的事情。
E: As a member of the Knights of Beauty, Argenti will never violate the spirit of knighthood.

C: 那么接下来……
E: Next...

C: 你们说话不能超过<unbreak>800</unbreak>字？
E: Your dialogue can't exceed <unbreak>800</unbreak> words?

C: 发明这个游戏的人真是天才！
E: The inventor of this game must be a genius!

C: …这件事不能由投票决定！艺术是天才的特权，三占从二只会毁了宝贵的才华！
E: ...This matter cannot be decided by a vote! Art is a genius' special right — a two-thirds majority will only ruin precious talent!

C: 嘁，那就这样吧。继续争论也是浪费时间，有大腕儿愿意上台，观众肯定更愿意来看，我们自然不反对。
E: Tsk, so be it. It's just a waste of time to continue debating. If a big shot is willing to step on stage, the spectators will be more willing to watch. We naturally have no objections.

C: 在排练室，你与乱破观看了这几位乐队成员的练习场景。
E: In the rehearsal room, you and Rappa look over the band members practicing.

C: 我~的~花~美丽的小姐啊，可否将目光稍微停驻，让你有充分的时间来记住我~你记住了我，又忘记了我。就像你遇见了我，终有天会离开我~
E: Oh~ my~ flower~ Beautiful lady, may your glimpse linger, leaving ample time to remember me~ You remember me, yet forget me. Just like you met me, and one day you shall leave me~

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 按传统，音乐派对的演出曲目都是由谐乐学院决定。因此，我提议仍旧……
E: According to tradition, the music party's performance pieces are all decided by Charmony Academy. So, I propose that we still...

C: …？这是什么奇怪的爱好？虽然…但这个实在有点喜欢不动了。
E: ...? What kind of weird hobby is this? Although... but it's a little hard to like that.

C: （说点搞笑的）
E: (Say something funny)

C: 会不会是幻觉？
E: Could you have been hearing things?

C: 都准备好了吗，我要启动翻译功能了哦。
E: Are you ready? I'm running the interpretation program.

C: 佩佩提到了相同的声音，也就是说，这条线索很重要，和事情的真相有关。
E: Peppy mentions a similar sound, which also means that this clue is highly crucial — it could be related to the truth.

C: 原来…最近科员们是在沉迷游戏啊。所以才会白天没精神，夜晚发出奇怪的声响。
E: I see... Those researchers have been obsessed with a game lately. Which explains their listlessness in the day, and those weird sounds at night.

C: 有趣的小姐。充满迷人的魅力，我从未见过如此特别的学生。
E: A very interested young lady filled with charm. I've never met such a special student.

C: 还好吧。刚接触是挺有意思，练多了就觉得烦，热情总是难持久啊。
E: It's alright. It was interesting at first, but the more I practiced, the more annoying I found it. Passion is a hard thing to keep alive.

C: 故此，在下恳请你准许贝斯•忍徒即刻回归，继续音律•忍法的修行！
E: Therefore, I would ask that you permit Ninja Initiate Bass to immediately return to us and continue her training in Sound Release ninjutsu.

C: 乱破带领乐队完成了演出。
E: Rappa leads her band to complete the performance.

C: 你们好…呃，没认错的话，你们是「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」乐队的成员吧？
E: Hello... Err, if I'm not mistaken, you guys are from the Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party band?

C: 诸位——我等乃是「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」！如华丽流星般撕裂夜空的音律忍者流派是也！
E: Everyone — We are the Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party! A school of sound ninja that tears through the sky like magnificent shooting stars!

C: 大家好！我是「缭乱」的键盘手，名字叫做契波，也可以叫我——键盘•忍徒！
E: Hello everyone! I am the Dazzling Ninja's keyboardist. My name is Czipo, and you can also call me — Ninja Initiate Keyboard!

C: 芮克先生离开后不久……
