E: Not long after Mr. Reca leaves...

C: CUT。
E: CUT.

C: 咕咕，真有礼貌，就像镜子公主一样。
E: Hoot hoot, so polite, just like the Mirror Princess.

C: 你怎么不咕咕了……
E: Why aren't you hooting anymore...

C: 新同学，你带来的演出很好看，让老鸟想起了当年的钟表小子！他也曾带着自己的伙伴们在晚会上起舞哦！
E: New student, your performance was very good — it made this old bird think back on Clockie in the younger days! He also once roped in his buddies to dance the evening away in the festival!

C: 互相介绍下吧。
E: Let's introduce ourselves.

C: （艾尔菲打算和我一起出发…也不是不行吧。）
E: (Arfey intends to head out with me... Not that it's a problem.)

C: （很热情地打招呼）
E: (Warmly greet them)

C: 怎么找不到？你看…免费榜里的音游分类，再选动画题材的近期新作，按时间排序，是不是就有了。
E: Can't find it? Look... under the rhythm game category in the free games ranking, then choose recent new titles in the anime theme, sort by launch time, and there it is.

C: 拿着它，你就能顺理成章地在任意场合破冰——而一块冰也只有不断发笑，才能避免在这个浮躁的时代融化成一滩污水，哈哈。
E: With this thing, you can break the ice in any situation with ease, and an ice cube can only keep laughing to prevent itself from melting into a puddle of waste water in such a capricious age, haha.

C: 聊聊这单生意。
E: Let's talk about this deal.

C: 怎么突然送礼物？
E: What's with the sudden gift?

C: 成交！
E: Deal!

C: 要不要试试用云吟术清理积水？
E: How about using cloudhymn magic to clean up the water?

C: 「虚数之树呢，更是彻头彻尾的骗局。你见过树杈吗？你见过树叶吗？其实宇宙是平的，是张『虚数之饼』！」
E: "As for the Imaginary Tree, it's the biggest scam of them all, through and through. Have you seen its tree branch? Or leaf? In reality, the universe is flat — it's an Imaginary Pancake!"

C: 他只是自知理亏，诉诸情绪来精神胜利罢了。不必放在心上。
E: He just knows he's losing the debate, and is resorting to emotional arguments for a psychological victory. No need to take it to heart.

C: 不如这样吧…「线上交流难免失真，不如线下一起喝杯茶，我可以当面给你讲解『树海理论』。」
E: How about this... "Context in online communications might be lost in translation. How about meeting for a cup of tea — I can personally elaborate on the Sea of Trees Theory to you."

C: 看来破案了，真不愧是我名侦探三月七～
E: Looks like the case is solved! Just another day for the famous detective March 7th!

C: 这个老油条……
E: That old weasel...

C: 姬子小姐正准备接管部分系统，通过手动操作输入数据，以供拟真智能元件学习。
E: Miss Himeko is preparing to take over parts of the system, then manually input the data for the AI components to learn from.

C: 所以，艾丝妲站长命令防卫科对所有停靠的飞行器进行消防安全检查。
E: Which is why Lead Researcher Asta has ordered the Security Department to conduct fire safety inspections on all docked spacecraft.

C: 对不起，是我的手指太少，拖了后腿。我会争取再长出一个手指的！哦不，但那样我就有「五个手指」了，「五手指」与「无手指」谐音……
E: Apologies, it was the lack of my digits that caused a burden. I will try to grow another finger! Oh no, but that means I will have five digits — "five digits" rhymes with "zero tickets"...

C: …你们两个，忘了上次被风暴吹到接近<unbreak>0.4</unbreak>光秒以外，在「宇宙那广袤的寂静」中边哭边飘了5个系统时的事了？
E: ...Have you two forgotten the last time when you were blown to nearly beyond <unbreak>0.4</unbreak> light seconds in that storm, while crying and drifting for 5 system hours in that "fathomless silence of the cosmos"?

C: 你们去吧，这次列车长要是再来救你们，我就是兔子！
E: Go ahead then! Pom-Pom will be muddle-fudged if Pom-Pom has to rescue you two again this time!

C: 好的喵～检讨如下喵～「喵呜～敬爱的列车长：我怀着无比愧疚的心情，向您表达诚挚的歉意喵……」
E: Okay meow! The self-critique is as follows meowww: "Mrow my beloved Conductor: It is with a heavy heart of unprecedented guilt that I express my heartfelt apologies, meow..."

C: 你为什么能翻译它的话？
E: How are you able to translate its words?

C: 今天似乎要开始值日了，好懒，好想躺平…但要是再不参加值日，帕姆就要急眼了。还是乖乖参加值日吧。
E: Looks like today's my turn for duty. I'm feeling so lazy and just want to chill... But if I skip again, Pom-Pom's going to lose it. Better just suck it up and do my part.

C: {NICKNAME}，我已经有灵感了。咱们赶紧出发吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, I've got some inspiration already. Let's set off now!

C: 出发开拓前，先睡个回笼觉吧。
E: Let's have some more sleep before setting off on a trailblazing expedition.

C: 跟着雕像的指引找找看吧。
E: Follow the statue's directions and look around.

C: 代言费，打钱！
E: Our endorsement fee, cough it up!

C: 看你还往哪儿跑，束手就擒吧！{NICKNAME}，使用「全力擒拿」！
E: Let's see where you can run to now! Give it up! {NICKNAME}, use Mighty Grapple!

C: 这只小猴的眼神怎么看起来格外智慧呢……
E: Why do this monkey's eyes look oddly intelligent...

C: 呃，{NICKNAME}，应该不是我的错觉吧？这娃娃、这娃娃怎么自己动了？！
E: Uhh, {NICKNAME}, I'm not seeing things, am I? T—The d—doll, it's moving by itself!?

C: 滴~答！
E: Tick-tock!

C: 安可！安可！安可！
E: Encore! Encore! Encore!

C: 得令！
E: Command received!

C: 唔嗯，尝身的技炒拙劣，我的枣片拍得到不戳。
E: Mmmf, oor hidfing skillf ihf therrible, but my photo'f preffy deshent.

C: 芮克先生说完了闭幕词，正在颁发奖项呢！
E: Mr. Reca just finished his closing speech. They're giving out the awards now!

C: 不速之客，不请自来。
E: Uninvited visitors are not welcome here.

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
E: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

C: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
E: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

C: 「自定义小队1」
E: "Custom Team 1"

C: 其实，我有个问题……
E: Actually, I have a question...

C: 我靠！织网！
E: Woah! The interweb!

C: 结果还是在这儿测试。
E: At the end of the day, we're still doing tests at this very place.

C: 一年一度的法吉娜诞辰，千载难逢的水上狂欢盛宴！{NICKNAME}选手，「豹豹碰碰大作战」就要开始了，你做好准备了吗？
E: The annual Phagousa celebration, a once-in-a-lifetime water carnival! Contestant {NICKNAME}, the Seal Slammers is about to begin. Are you ready?

C: 这、这可是从来没人能通过的「超级变态关」啊，大哥这回真是撞到鬼…撞到宝了！
E: Th—This Super Insane Stage has never been cleared by anyone! Looks like I've really hit the jackpot this time!

C: 不得不承认，你已经通关了「豹豹碰碰大作战•究极进化版」的全部难度，大哥端不出来更变态的了。
E: I'll admit, you've cleared all the stages in the Seal Slammers: Ultimate Evolution, and I don't have any harder ones.

C: 虚拟的链接也能偷？该死的{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒！
E: Can virtual links be stolen? Those darned {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} followers!

C: 全靠泡泡大佬带飞了。
E: All thanks to Bubbles leading the way.

C: 看！这就是老戏骨！
E: Now that's some professional acting!

C: 这次…其实是缇宁自己提出的，想和缇宝分开来比赛。因为缇宁想做独当一面的缇宁。
E: This match... we chose to enter without Tribbie. We wanted to prove that Trinnon could be strong on our own.

C: 因为…墨镜一戴，谁也不爱？或者简单来说…眼不见，心不烦。
E: Well... shades of glory, end of story? Or simply... out of sight, out of mind.

C: {NICKNAME}，假如你有足够的实力，就快来击碎这份怨念吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, if you have what it takes, come put an end to this obsession.

C: 泡泡现在走到了强者的对面！为了挑战最强的对手拼尽全力，最后大汗淋漓地失败了…这样的心情，泡泡已经知道了——还不算糟糕，不足以击垮我。
E: I now stand toe-to-toe with a real powerhouse! I gave it my all against the strongest opponent and lost after an exhilarating battle... I know this feeling now. It's not bad enough to defeat me.

C: 偷走奖杯的怪盗？
E: The thief who stole the trophy?

C: 「赐我纯金的瓯盏，赐我比金子更珍贵的佳酿…」
E: "Grant me a golden wine cup, and a brew more precious than gold..."

C: …够了！
E: ...Enough!

C: 又是一堆小解谜？我不想玩啊！
E: Another bunch of puzzle minigames? I'm not in the mood for that!

C: 翁法罗斯可没有那么严谨的进化论。
E: Amphoreus doesn't care about such strict theories of evolution.

C: （其实已经没有退路了，但说出「考虑考虑」就有种深思熟虑的感觉。）
E: (There really is no way out of this, but at least saying that gives you some character depth.)

C: 我还得提醒一句，仅有一只小奇美拉和一只普通灰豹是不够的，正式比赛需要至少<color=#dbc291ff>三只海豹</color>。{NICKNAME}选手，你有那个吗？就是那个——
E: I must remind you that it's not enough to simply have a Little Chimera and a Common Gray Seal. You'll need at least <color=#dbc291ff>three seals</color> for the official competition. {NICKNAME}, do you have that? You know, that—

C: 也许我应该观察一番。
E: Maybe I should inspect closer.

C: 大哥不是拘泥于规则的人，既然你通过了前面的考验，拥有多少只小海豹已经不重要了。
E: I'm not so stubborn about the rules. Since you've already passed the previous challenges, it hardly matters how many baby seals you have.

C: 所以，这预言是真的吗？
E: So, is this prophecy real?

C: 我还在原地等赛飞儿阁下回来呢，结果、结果她再也没有回来了。
E: I stood there waiting for Lady Cipher to return, but in the end... she never came back.

C: 通关后有报酬吗？
E: Are there any rewards for finishing it?

C: 如果想体验最新的《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》，就认准这台；
E: If you want to experience the latest "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King," look for this one.

C: …瞧啊。威震全银河的球棒侠，来到了我的王座前，想要发起挑战！
E: ...Look, the baseballer who's famous throughout the cosmos has arrived before my throne and intends to challenge me!

C: 啊啊啊啊！我彻底破防了，作为代价，你将要承受失去心爱之物的魔王的怒火！
E: Aaaaaah! I've had enough. The price you must pay is to face the rage of the Demon King, who has lost his greatest love!

C: 也算是赶巧了，我见您名下没有赛车，刚刚还在为您要用什么赛车而发愁呢。
E: Well, that's quite a coincidence. I just noticed you didn't have a registered race car and was wondering what you'd be driving.

C: 这是根据您的试训数据与个人风格打造的，很好开的！
E: It was designed based on your trial data and personal style. Very easy to drive!

C: 差不多就在这里吧，这也没有别人。我本来打算和你见一面的，不过现在这样也挺好。
E: Let's stop here. There's no one else around anyway. I originally planned to meet you in person, but this way works just fine too.

C: 刚刚跟你一起玩还挺开心的，你这家伙车技真不错，有空一起开车？呃，我是说赛车游戏。
E: I had a lot of fun playing with you just now. Your driving skills are really impressive. Want to drive together again sometime? Uh, I mean in a racing game.

C: 难道不是你先说的吗？
E: Weren't you the one who mentioned these birds?

C: 不好意思，给两位添麻烦了……
E: I'm so sorry to drag you all into this...

C: 说起来，球棒•忍者只是新店开业便遇上此等厄运，阁下不愧是灾厄体质。
E: So, Baseball Bat Ninja, your shop has just opened and is immediately facing trouble. You really do attract bad luck, don't you?

C: 折纸鸟专家！我需要专家。
E: I need an Origami Bird expert! Stat!

C: 就靠你击败它了，乱破。
E: We're counting on you to take it down, Rappa!

C: 放心吧，我肯定死在你后头。
E: Oh, don't worry. I'll definitely only die after you do.

C: （愉快的叫声）
E: (Joyful Noises)

C: （递上调饮。）
E: (Hands over the drink.)

C: 不必担心，我一定能把你教会。第一课名为：阅读。我教你记忆宫殿、遗忘曲线、疑难杂字与高效速读，如何？
E: Don't worry, I'll make sure you learn it all. The first lesson: reading. I'll teach you the memory palace technique, the forgetting curve, rare characters, and effective speed reading. How does that sound?

C: 在黑塔的授意下，人偶抿了一口调饮。
E: At Herta's prompting, the puppet took a sip of the drink.

C: 你喝下调饮，突然间眼前一黑。
E: You take a sip... and everything goes black.

C: 第二回合。既然在酒吧，就问个有关调饮的问题吧，真正的{NICKNAME}最爱的饮品是……
E: Round two. Since we're in a bar, let's talk drinks. What's {NICKNAME}'s go-to beverage?

C: 我也喜欢，我也喜欢的！
E: I like it too! I really do!

C: 引力为什么会消退？
E: Why did the gravity recede?

C: 欢迎回来，亲爱的开拓者，调饮辛苦了。您需要来杯饮品、一些小食，还是一些新鲜的幽默？
E: Welcome back, dear Trailblazer. You've worked hard. Would you like a drink, some snacks, or a fresh bit of humor?

C: 去我的主场吧！
E: Let's head to my home turf.

C: 那么他成功了吗？
E: So did he succeed?

C: 不要害怕，是指商战啦～而且只是商战模拟器罢了。
E: Don't worry, I mean business warfare, and it's just a business simulator anyway.

C: 所以挑选合适的人，组建完美的团队，是成功的基石。
E: So choosing the right people and building the perfect team is the cornerstone of success.

C: 拿我之前处理的兰路思星域来说吧，他们曾长期接受公司投资，但是在一次反物质军团入侵后切断了贸易。等到公司击退军团，他们却拒绝了公司回收资产的要求。
E: Take the Lanlusian Segmentum I handled before as an example. They had long relied on IPC investment, but severed trade ties after an Antimatter Legion invasion. When the IPC drove back the Legion, they refused our demand to reclaim assets.

C: 那帮贪心的菜鸟寻宝者，根本不懂古代遗物的价值，都拿去便宜黑心商贩了。唉，真是浪费！
E: Those greedy rookies don't understand the true value of a relic. They just flog them off for cheap on the black market. *sigh* What a waste!

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: No more questions from me.

C: 旁听
E: Listen

C: 贵在真实啊！
E: But that's how it happened! It's a true story!

C: 「{NICKNAME}再度深入幻境，寻找初代司鼎的秘宝，却忽然嗅到一丝令人不安的气息。」
E: "{NICKNAME} returned to the fantasia, hunting for the secret treasure left by the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission. But suddenly, an unsettling aroma aroused the senses."

C: 医者仁心就是放恶兽咬人？
E: So, it's "soul-cleansing grace" to sic beasts onto people?

C: 唉…我也不过是一座雕像罢了，也没什么资格对你说教。
E: Sigh... But then again I'm nothing more than a statue. I can hardly lecture you.

C: 这边的丹士就没一个发觉吗？
E: Didn't any of the alchemists around here ever notice it?

C: 眼高于天！
E: And you end up a bummer!

C: 老板为何面露难色？
E: You look upset. What happened?

C: 我已经分析过了这款游戏的所有数据，制定出了胜率最高的战略，你是必败无疑的！
E: I have already analyzed all of the data in this game and created the strategy with the highest win percentage. Your defeat is inevitable!

C: 游戏推广？什么游戏？
E: A game ad...?

C: 来都来了…
E: Well, since I'm already here...

C: 你怎么知道我们的名字？
E: How did you know who we are?

C: 如果二位还愿意赏光叫我一声朋友，那可真是我莫大的荣幸了！
E: If you'd be willing to call me "friend," it would be a great honor to have you as such!

C: 让我想想…
E: Hmm... Let me think about it.

C: 欸，这个不错！我也挺喜欢的。
E: Ooh, that's a good one, I like it!

C: 就是这儿啦，<color=#dbc291ff>「残响回廊的决胜乐园」</color>入口！
E: This is it! The entrance to the <color=#dbc291ff>Corridor of Fading Echoes Victory Zone</color>!

C: 嘿，还是你会说话。也确实，多谢乔瓦尼先生啦。
E: Yikes, sweet talk alert... But it's true, thank you, Mr. Giovanni!

C: 哼哼哼，哼，哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 说到这个——你们听说了吗？那位神秘<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>的故事。
E: Speaking of champions — have you heard the story of the mysterious "<color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color>?"

C: 第二次了！我要教你们加倍奉还！
E: I'll teach you two twerps a lesson you'll never forget!

C: 咦，又是那个人吗？可乔瓦尼先生为什么不当面跟我们说呢？
E: Huh... him again? I wonder why Mr. Giovanni didn't tell us face to face when he had the chance?

C: 哈！我就知道，在这里一定能找到你们！
E: Ha! I knew it, I knew we'd run into you two here!

C: 可你这气色不是挺好的嘛…哼，别想糊弄我呀。
E: Hmph, you look ready enough to me. Hey... are you messing with me again?

C: 看来时间还多的是呢。那我就先去刷刷经验练练级好了——二位，慢走不送。
E: Looks like I've got plenty of time. Guess I'll go grind some levels for a bit. See ya, wouldn't wanna be ya.

C: 没有，但我想起来乔瓦尼要我给你们带个话：
E: Nope, but you just reminded me, Giovanni wanted me to pass on a message to you both:

C: 猜得不错，不过我并不是来挑战冠军候补的。
E: Hehe, correct, but I haven't come here to challenge a championship contender.

C: 「高手玩家」的真实身份是？
E: Can you reveal the true identity of the elite player?

C: 那么，加油——目标是见到那位神秘的「高手玩家」！
E: Let's do it! Time to end the mystery once and for all!

C: 总觉得…这次的谜题真的很微妙啊……
E: ...I've gotta say, this puzzle is pretty unorthodox...

C: 刚才那个呜呜伯，总觉得心情不太好的样子…黑塔女士到底对它们做了什么？
E: That Wubbaboo we just saw... It seemed a little upset. I wonder what Madam Herta did to the poor thing?

C: 形势竟然变得如此恶劣……
E: Okay, I wasn't expecting that...

C: 你们干脆直接认输吧，别浪费彼此的时间了。
E: Why not call it quits and save us all some time?

C: 好了，闲聊就到这儿吧。我也该继续去工作了…祝你们一路连胜。
E: Anyway, I should get back to work... Here's hoping you keep on winning.

C: 挑战似乎还没结束…
E: It's not over yet...

C: {NICKNAME}、三月小姐，我就知道你们一定会赴约！
E: {NICKNAME}, Miss March! I knew you'd make it!

C: 没错。不过具体事项，就劳烦艾丝妲小姐来传达吧。
E: That's right, but I'll let Miss Asta explain the specifics.

C: 那…艾丝妲小姐，这就是我们的决定。
E: Well... Miss Asta, we've made our decision.

C: 浮烟怎么会听我们的？
E: Why would Cirrus help us?

C: 你准备好了就摇铃开门吧，我们一起冲进去。
E: When you're ready, ring the chime — we'll all charge in together.

C: {NICKNAME}！我之前在西衍先生那儿听过你联名创作的评书，感觉你挺擅长胡编乱造的！
E: {NICKNAME} I heard that you helped Mr. Xiyan write stories before — you must be an expert wordsmith!

C: 要不你再考虑一下？现在后悔还来得及！
E: Sure you don't wanna reconsider? It's not too late to change your mind!

C: 好聪明…
E: Sounds pretty smart...

C: 大人真是卑鄙啊，连小朋友难得的快乐时光也要夺走！
E: Grown-ups are so mean! As soon as they see children having fun, they wanna ruin it!

C: 快醒醒，别被它激发了愧疚的情绪。
E: Careful! Don't let them manipulate you.

C: 好啦…白露小姐，时候不早了，该是回家的时候了。
E: Alright, alright. Lady Bailu, it's getting late — you need to go home now.

C: 为什么你的眼神和地衡司那些执事一样疲惫？
E: Yo, why the exhaustion? You look like the officers over at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 想你了。
E: We miss you.

C: 胜不胜利的，在战斗开始前可别那么笃定啊，小妹妹。没有尾巴帮你，收服岁阳的工作是不是有些力不从心了？
E: Don't be so sure of victory before the battle begins, young one. Without Tail to protect you, isn't subduing a heliobus a bit overwhelming for you?

C: 只要你敞开心接纳我…我可以代替尾巴，我可以帮你。
E: You know, if you can accept me with an open heart... I can take his place and help you.

C: 不过，据说犀焰曾预感到了失败的前兆，却不知为何，燎原还是无视了它的警告。
E: It is said that during that fateful battle, Keralum had a premonition of failure, but Ignamar ignored their warnings.

C: 哪怕是同样一天的工作，我可以躲在书库看闲书，也可以找人打牌。这就是自由。
E: Even if it's the same work every day, I can hide in the library and read a book or find someone to play Celestial Jade with... and that's freedom.

C: 解释起来实在费时费力，咱们先处理眼前的问题吧。
E: It's a very long story, so let's deal with the problem at hand first.

C: 那看看这一招如何！
E: See how you like this!

C: 此刻渡口浪急风涌，如有刀剑交错铮錝。
E: The waves ride on the howling wind, bashing the ford with great intensity.

C: 不过我心里确实是有一丝害怕的。怕万一寄宿在他身上的岁阳凶性大发，我保护不了你们几个。
E: ...but I am worried... If the heliobus possessing Yanqing is too strong, I'm afraid I might not be able to guarantee everyone's safety.

C: ……嘿嘿，说来有些不好意思。那时候，热血上头，就没考虑那么多。
E: ...Hehe, it's kinda embarassing but... I was caught up in the moment — I guess I never thought it through...

C: 全看你的啦，判官。
E: We're all counting on you, Judge Huohuo.

C: 总之，我一定尽力而为，不给大家拖后腿！
E: A—Anyway, I'll do my best to carry out my duties!

C: 十王司虽然无法彻底消灭岁阳，但我们有的是对付岁阳的手段……
E: The Ten-Lords Commission might not be able to completely eradicate the heliobi, but we have plenty of ways of dealing with them...

C: 嘿嘿，不珍惜本大爷这样的强力上级，等到失去时哭天抢地后悔莫及。老子只想听她哭。所以我一气之下，就让这女鬼…判官把老子给放进葫芦里。
E: Hehe, it was only after I vanished that she realized she'd taken my power for granted. I wanted to hear her cry about it, so in a fit of anger I had this demon— uh, judge imprison me in the gourd.

C: 我从未想过离开。我从洪炉中苏醒，来到绥园只为一件事情——与你罗浮的将军一战。
E: Leave? That was never my plan. I came to Fyxestroll Garden for one reason, and one reason alone — to fight the Luofu's formidable general.

C: 尾巴不想离开这里了吗？
E: I thought Mr. Tail wanted to leave...?

C: 那位寒鸦小姐同意了呀。我和她说，我打算利用捉岁阳涨粉，再利用粉丝捉岁阳，形成一个正向生态循环…她说没问题。
E: Madam Hanya has already given us the green light. We'll record our heliobi-hunting expeditions to get more followers, and then use the intel from our followers to find more heliobi. It's like a vicious cycle... W—Wait — a virtuous cycle!

C: 妈妈？
E: Mom?

C: 没错…我就是那个…那个…那个…「不爱睡觉」……
E: That's right... I am... I'm uh... My name's... I'm "Insomnophile"...

C: 我记得你，你们是十王司的人！为什么还来找我？
E: I remember you. You're from the Ten-Lords Commission! Why have you come back here?

C: 接下来无论发生什么事，都是我自己的决定，与你无关…你不必承担任何指责和愧疚。
E: Now whatever happens next is going to be my own decision, and has nothing to do with you... You don't have to bear any guilt or shame about this.

C: 保险起见，{NICKNAME}，咱们还是一起去现场看看吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't we go and take a look together, to be on the safe side?

C: 嘿嘿，那是。没想到她老人家也会有看破不说破的时候。
E: Hehe, it does. I never had her down as the kind of person that could leave these things unsaid.

C: 没想到太卜司里还有岁阳…这一次似乎是只擅长鼓动人贪欲，诱人挖空心思发财的家伙。

C: 我现在已经不是太卜了，请不要再这样叫我了。
E: I am no longer the master diviner, please do not call me that again.

C: 呸呸！你这个不争气的家伙！
E: Eurgh! You pathetic wimp!

C: 如果需要我们，就大声呼救。
E: If you need us, just call out for help.

C: （下一抽必出…）
E: (Next one has gotta win...)

C: 损坏的快递箱子。封箱胶带十分结实，有没有什么办法能打开箱子呢？
E: A broken courier package. The sealing tape seems very strong. Wonder if there's a way to open it?

C: （放弃）
E: (Give up)

C: …云骑军阵刀的碎片吗？可以用来做裁纸刀。
E: ...A fragment of the Cloud Knights' devastator glaive? That could be used as a paper cutter.

C: 那…我们见到的那个「雷诺」又是谁呢？
E: So... Who is that "Renault" that we met before?

C: 小桂子，你觉得呢？
E: Little Gui, what do you think?

C: …我以前不该这么凶你的，也不该擅自替你报名…是我当时一心想着能把你送走，才做出这种蠢事。
E: ...I shouldn't have been so mean to you before. And I shouldn't have signed you up without asking first... All I was thinking about then was sending you off, and that's why I did something so stupid.

C: 呼…总算解决这个难缠的家伙了。
E: Phew... We've finally settled this troublemaker.

C: 哎，这不是相信你嘛。再说了，你和她交情那么深，总比我们出面方便一些。
E: Hey, I put all my trust in you. Moreover, you know the requester well, so it's easier for you to handle it.

C: 藿藿准备了这么多东西…总觉得这次好像很简陋的样子。
E: Huohuo sure did a lot of prep-work... but things seem a little sketchy this time.

C: 你就知道吃…
E: All you know is to eat...

C: 如果照片上的鬼影，都是这么可爱无害的话就好了。哎……
E: If the ghostly figures on the photos are all as cute and as harmless as this one, it'll be great. But...

C: 呃，恋爱中。
E: Er, I'm taken.

C: 又来？
E: Again?

C: 你本来很有受欢迎的天赋…
E: You have a natural charisma that makes you popular...

C: 小桂子，有人盯着我们了。
E: Little Gui, someone's watching us.

C: 那么，专项测试的事就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}……
E: Alright then, I'll leave the test to you then, {NICKNAME}...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来得正好，艾丝妲站长前不久为造物们购置了一批睡眠用品，她把这称为「猫窝」。
E: {NICKNAME}, how timely! Lead Researcher Asta has bought some sleeping supplies for the creations. She calls this a "Kitty Cot."

C: 应该的，分内之事。
E: It's my duty.
Well...

C: 我在研究自己的身世——我的起源，我的种族，我的基因，诸如此类，有大量的领域目前尚处于空白状态。
E: I'm researching my origin story — my background, my race, my genes, all of that stuff. Most of it is still blank to me.

C: 不行我要站中间，不许抢我镜头，把我拍好看点！
E: No, I have to stand in the middle. Don't steal my best angle. Make sure I look good!

C: 你认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 我以为你正是为此而来的。
E: I thought that's why you came here.

C: 我做错事了吗？
E: Have I done something wrong?

C: 啊…抱歉…我只是有些吓到了。别担心，你没做错什么…应该是没做错什么吧……
E: Ah... Sorry... I just got a little freaked out there. Don't worry. You haven't done anything wrong... at least you probably haven't done anything wrong...

C: 唔…这蠢鸟，气死我了。
E: Hmph... This stupid bird. So frustrating.

C: 我不记得这段冒险。
E: I don't remember that adventure.

C: 银河中有个叫做「贝洛伯格」的末日孤城，风雪已经笼罩了它数个琥珀纪。据史料记载，那是某位筑城者为了战胜反物质军团的攻势，用禁忌手段召唤来的无尽冰霜。
E: Deep in the cosmos lies a doomed outpost city called Belobog, enveloped by a blizzard for several Amber Eras now. Historical records show this to be inexhaustible coldness summoned through unspeakable means by one of the Architects to repel an assault by the Antimatter Legion.

C: 当然，这样是最安全的。无论是丰饶令使还是绝灭大君，都不太可能精准找到这位影子将军的存在。
E: Naturally, this is the most secure option. Be it an Abundance Emanator or a Lord Ravager, it was impossible to accurately determine the identity of this shadow general.

C: 影子将军擅长卜算吉凶，但却不屑于以此趋吉避凶。在她看来，趋吉避凶乃是庸人所为，想要赢得大，就要赌得多、不怕输。
E: The shadow general was a skilled diviner, but would not stoop to using the art for personal gain. In her estimation, seeking luck and avoiding misfortune is what mediocre people do. If you want to win big, you have to bet big — and not be afraid of losing.

C: 中间是白色？
E: Is the middle layer white?

C: …「爱情」
E: ...Love.

C: 我们将重新过上遭人欺负的生活。没人会在乎工具的想法。
E: We'll lose our freedom and be at the mercy of others again. No one cares about what mere tools like us think.

C: 为什么还要问我？
E: Why are you asking me?

C: …家人。
E: ...Family.

C: 你曾经是「美梦剧团」的成员吧，被家族抛弃在梦境酒店里了吗？
E: You were part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, weren't you? Did The Family abandon you in the Dreamscape?

C: 你想过后续的计划吗？
E: Have you thought about our next steps?

C: ——叫你们这管事的人过来！
E: ...Call your administrator!

C: …咱们走着瞧！以后的日子还长，别以为舒翁能给你撑腰！等着！
E: ...Just you wait! We've got a lot of days ahead of us. Don't assume that Siobhan can protect you! Just you wait!

C: 你知道吗，明知故犯的错不是错，是选择。即使没有说出口，我已知晓你的心意。
E: A mistake you're aware of is not a mistake — it's a choice. You don't have to speak, because I already know your thoughts.

C: 我是不是…说过要教训教训你？
E: And did I say... I'd teach you a lesson?

C: 结束后来旁边找我！我在这里等着！
E: Meet me there when you're done! I'll be waiting!

C: 这是何等地不幸。世界以痛吻我，还要我付小费！
E: How unfortunate. The world kisses me with pain yet expects a tip in return!

C: 到底要不要把那位约出来，大胆表明自己的心意呢……
E: Should I ask him out and boldly express my feelings to him...

C: 确实是我想要的，味道也没变。看来你的记性还不错。
E: Well, this is exactly what I wanted, and its flavor remains the same. You do seem to have a good memory.

C: 直到…噩梦的侵袭，把它们变成了怪物。就是你现在看到的样子。疯疯癫癫，胡言乱语。
E: Until... the nightmare struck and turned them into monsters. The form that you now see, insane and babbling.

C: 当然没有。
E: Of course not.

C: 等你们更加熟悉后，相信它会向你透露真实的想法。
E: I'm sure they'll open up and show their true feelings once you two become more familiar with each other.

C: 美妙的夜晚，美妙的饮料与美妙的你，世间还有什么能抵得过此刻！
E: An enchanting night, an enchanting drink, and an enchanting person such as you — what in the world can be better than this?

C: 我信了。
E: I believe you.

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 汪  汪

E: Now try without any hints.

C: 肯定是这样！我就知道，舒翁看起来温声细语，待人温柔又好说话，走在街上都要被问有没有兴趣去当明星的那种，但背地里绝对是个魔鬼！
E: That must be it! I knew it. Siobhan looks soft-spoken and treats people so gently. She's quite the talker. Whenever she's on the street, people always ask if she wants to become a celebrity, but she's definitely a devil in disguise!

E: Hey, friend. You know, you've got me breaking out in a sweat. Did you get a position here cos you know someone?

C: 得加钱，兄弟。
E: To be honest, you'll have to pay more.

E: Alright then, when everything's settled, I'll take <unbreak>30%</unbreak>, and you take <unbreak>70%</unbreak>. Deal?

C: 义不容辞，这种事找我就对了。
E: Just part of the job. You've come to the right person.

C: 怎么样，您已经全部测完了吗？
E: How was it? Did you finish all the testing?

C: 嗯嗯，真的很感谢您！
E: Yes yes, thank you so much!

C: 这里信息流动速度和贝城不同。
E: The speed of information flow here is different from Belobog.

C: 如果你没去与托帕小姐见面，恐怕他们就会选择其他报道。
E: If you hadn't met with Miss Topaz, they probably would have opted for a different report.

C: 卢卡我们不想看你赢！
E: Luka, we don't want to see you win!

E: I have prepared the latest IPC armor for you. With your skills, plus the IPC's newly developed mechs, are you afraid of a one-armed boxer?

E: Yes, I must also do my best to fight harder. After all, having taken their money, I need to do my part in promoting their products.

C: 唉，也不能要求人家不计风险帮助我这样一个小人物啦……
E: Can't expect her to take risks for a nobody like me...

E: What are they hiding?

E: Madam Herta refuses to accept your refusal.

E: Then, our fifth collaborator is...

E: When filling out divorce papers for two adjacent buildings, we ought to adhere to the electrical cable foldback in the structural symbol set and align ourselves with their granularity before enabling the circuit breaker on ourselves.

E: Hey, March 7th! Don't ruin the moment!

E: Because he became a shut-in.

C: 用来打游戏。
E: To play games.

C: 需要我吃土吗？
E: Do you need me to eat some soil?

E: Remember this egg in the Dromas Workshop? My research suggests it contains Dromasilla's soul. When it hatches, we might witness the birth of a new <color=#dbc291ff>Super Dromas</color>.

C: 为什么是我？
E: Why did you pick me?

E: Staring contest, go!

E: Yep, that's the name!

E: Grumph? (Big brother, who are you?)

E: Stay calm.

E: My child! This is my one and only request in life—

E: Haha, no need to worry, my friend. Look at the dromases around us. They're thrilled to have fresh blood joining their ranks after so long. Look—

E: You don't have the materials with you? I'm tied up at the moment, so you'll need to go get them. Sorry for the inconvenience.

C: 材料没带着吗…我这会儿不太方便走开，要麻烦你去取过来了，真不好意思。
E: You don't have the materials with you? I'm tied up at the moment, so you'll need to go get them. Sorry for the inconvenience.

E: Problems that can be resolved with credits are never problems.

E: The fiercer the race, the more we need our supporters' backing. Hey friend! How about we make a deal?

C: 记住，无论胜败，零和都将达成。

E: Today's plan is...

E: I'm already in the story?

E: Heh. Welcome, dear guest. I sensed you would come.

E: "Ahem... this is one of the characters in the story, an ordinary girl born in Aedes Elysiae. She just so happens to have the same name as me... and is every bit as pure and adorable."

E: Let me lead the way. Come on, I'll take you to see it... The little restaurant in the maze has a certain charm all its own.

E: But before we open for the day, I need to confirm. What's your vision for the restaurant's future?

E: Best to think it over...

E: Now, who's still missing from the cast?

C: 好呀。两位都提出了自己的方案，现在开始投票！每人只有一票哦，得想清楚啦。

C:
在钟表小子的动画中，有许多可爱的折纸小鸟，是它们建造了华丽的美梦小镇。这次，就让我们来讲讲折纸小鸟们的故事……

在噩梦小镇赶走石头老板，成为美梦小镇之后，钟表小子和哈努兄弟就开始思考，如何让小镇成为美梦一般的地方。

幸运的是，钟表小子曾经在旅途中结识的筑巢天才——猫头鹰老师意外来到了小镇。在猫头鹰老师的号召下，世界各地的小鸟们都来到了美梦小镇。
曾为鳄鱼工作的黄金公子、来自聪明小镇的草绿经理、来自快乐小镇的妃色夫人、在噩梦小镇长大的赤红大哥——这几只小鸟是猫头鹰老师最信赖的学生，在他们的带领下，折纸小鸟们很快就在美梦小镇中建起了各种漂亮的房子……

后来，一只蓝色的小鸟也加入了他们的鸟群。
这只小鸟叫做「湛蓝爵士」，它不像其他几位带头的鸟儿那样成熟可靠，但猫头鹰老师很器重他的天分。作为最小的鸟儿，其他的大鸟们也把他当作弟弟，教会了他许多筑造小镇的方法…很快，湛蓝爵士就成为了最厉害的折纸小鸟，还跟钟表小子成为了好朋友。
他本以为自己会一直和大家筑造小镇，幸福地生活下去。但好景不长，漂亮的美梦小镇吸引了各种各样的镇民，其中也有许多坏人。坏人们让小镇变得不再美好，为了清除小镇中的坏蛋，木头老爷决定要接管整座小镇…但这却让许多小鸟很不开心，美梦小镇是大家的，不应该被木头老爷一个人独占。

折纸小鸟们和木头老爷渐行渐远，鸟群们也逐渐飞散…只剩湛蓝爵士一只鸟留守在钟表小子建立的「清醒村」，默默等待着伙伴们的归来。

它等了好多好多年，也没能再次听到其他小鸟的叫声。正当湛蓝爵士也想离开美梦小镇，飞向属于自己的巢穴时，许久未见的钟表小子出现了！
钟表小子得知了小鸟们的故事，他陪伴湛蓝爵士找到了其他的小鸟——五只折纸小鸟再度重逢了。

未来，他们会带领着更多的折纸小鸟，建设更美丽的美梦小镇……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: The Clockie's animation features a lot of lovely Origami Birds that built the magnificent Dreamville. Now, let us delve into their story... After ousting Boss Stone from Nightmareville and renaming the place Dreamville, Clockie and Brother Hanu racked their brains trying to transform the town into a truly dreamlike place. Luckily, Professor Owl, a nest-building genius whom Clockie met during his journey, made a surprise visit to the town. At Professor Owl's call, birds from all over the world flocked to Dreamville. Young Master Gold who once worked for the crocodiles, Verdant Manager from Smartville, Lady Vermilion from Happyville, and Boss Red who grew up in Nightmareville were Professor Owl's most trusted students. Under their guidance, it didn't take long for the Origami Birds to erect beautiful houses in Dreamville... A blue bird later joined the flock. Known as Dr. Blues, the bird was not as mature and reliable as the other bird leaders, but Professor Owl greatly valued its talent. Because it was the youngest in the flock, the other birds treated it as their junior and taught it various architectural methods... Dr. Blues soon became the most skilled Origami Bird and became best friends with Clockie. Dr. Blues thought he would spend the rest of his life sprucing up the town with other birds, living happily ever after. However, nothing good lasted forever. The beautiful town attracted residents from all walks of life, including baddies, who turned the town ugly. To get rid of the black sheep, Old Man Wood decided to take charge. The decision didn't sit well with many Origami Birds, who opined that Dreamville belonged to all, not just Old Man Wood. The Origami Birds distanced themselves from Old Man Wood, and the flock eventually dispersed... Dr. Blues was the only one that remained at Rouseville, a place established by Clockie, to wait for the return of its companion. After years of waiting, it never heard the chirp of another bird. Just as Dr. Blues thought of leaving Dreamville for its lair, the long-awaited Clockie showed up! Upon learning the Origami Birds' plight, Clockie helped Dr. Blues to reunite with the others — the five birds have reunited again! In the days to come, they will lead more Origami Birds in constructing an even more beautiful Dreamville... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
嘿，看看这只毛毛躁躁的小仓鼠，如果不是他胸前的奖牌，谁能想得到他就是在美梦小镇和匹诺康尼都赫赫有名的大明星——仓鼠球骑士呢？这次就让我们来讲讲他的故事吧，冲冲冲冲冲！

在仓鼠球骑士的仓鼠小镇，每个镇民都过得十分艰苦贫穷，这里吃不饱、穿不暖，还要担心被巨大的猫咪吃掉。仓鼠球骑士从小就立志要离开这里，开辟自己幸福的生活。
他听说在远方有一个叫做美梦小镇的地方，那里有吃不完的坚果和花不完的钞票。仓鼠球骑士二话不说，立马启程，冲向了美梦小镇。

但当他看到美梦小镇时就傻了眼，这里又狭小又寒酸，周边更是一片荒漠！仓鼠球骑士本想离开，但这里独特的交通工具——球笼，留住他了脚步。作为仓鼠，这个能滚动的玩意儿具有无与伦比的吸引力。

在之后的日子里，钟表小子经常能看到一颗名为「音速坚果」的球笼在荒漠中奔驰，冲在拓荒队伍的最前方，获取着最多的赏金。

后来，小镇在一番波折后回归宁静，越来越多的人聚集在美梦小镇。虽然小镇变大了，镇民变多了，但小镇中还是缺乏独特的创收手段。这时，感到无聊的钟表小子想起了那个在拓荒一线奔驰的仓鼠，还有它的球笼。

钟表小子筹办了一场球笼比赛，准备了许多许多的奖金，只要能成为最快的球笼驾驶员，就能一夜暴富！这让仓鼠球骑士起了兴致，他带着自己的音速坚果报名了比赛。在比赛中，所有选手都无法与仓鼠球骑士匹敌——他真的太*快*了！这个比赛简直是为他定制的！

仓鼠球骑士赢下了比赛，成为了大富翁，叶子店长也让他代言了各种各样的品牌。钟表小子和仓鼠球骑士成了好朋友，他们经常在深夜乘着球笼在街上驰骋，仓鼠球骑士的每场比赛钟表小子都不会缺席。

仓鼠球骑士的致富梦已经实现，接下来，他会夺得更多冠军，让自己的传奇更加辉煌……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: Hey, all eyes on this flustered little hamster! If it weren't for the medal on his chest, who would have thought he was the famous superstar in both Dreamville and Penacony — Hamster Ball Knight? This time, let us cover his story. Go, go, go, go! In Hamsterville where Hamster Ball Knight lived, everyone was struggling to make ends meet. Not only did they not have enough food and clothes, but they also had to worry about being eaten by the huge cat. Hamster Ball Knight was bent on leaving the place since young to carve out a happier life for himself. He heard of a faraway place called Dreamville, where it was rumored to be blessed with an endless supply of nuts and money to eat and spend. Without hesitation, he hit the road and made his way toward Dreamville. The moment he set his sights upon Dreamville, he was dumbfounded — the place turned out to be cramped, shabby, and desolate! Hamster Ball Knight thought of leaving, but he was drawn to Spheroid, a unique transportation tool there. As a hamster, he found the rolling contraption irresistibly appealing. In the days that followed, Clockie often spotted a Spheroid named "Velocinut" racing through the desert, leading the pioneer team, and winning the most bounties. As peace was restored in Dreamville after a series of events, more and more people gathered in the town. The town had indeed expanded, but it still lacked a unique means of generating income. Bored, Clockie thought of the pioneering hamster and his Spheroid. Clockie later organized a Spheroid race and prepared abundant prizes. Whoever finished the race quickest would get rich overnight! The race piqued the interest of Hamster Ball Knight, who signed up along with his Velocinut. Hamster Ball Knight had no match during the race because he was simply too fast! The race was tailor-made for him! Hamster Ball Knight won the race and became flushed with cash. Shopkeeper Leaf engaged him to be the ambassador for various products. Clockie and Hamster Ball Knight became friends and often indulged in street Spheroid races in the middle of the night. Clockie never missed a race in which Hamster Ball Knight participated. After achieving the goal of becoming rich, Hamster Ball Knight aimed to win more races, making his story more legendary... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

E: Encountering Sampo again has triggered a sense of... nostalgia... inside you.\nSeems like you're the nostalgic type... Indeed, what you experienced together on that snow-covered planet was enough to be regarded as "true comradeship."

C: ——这些遗物可以提供巨大的帮助，让你在对抗强敌时获得更多优势。
E: — These relics can provide great boons to you when you're faced with formidable foes.

E: — Be careful. Hidden formidable foes here will drain your Stamina by launching Surprise Attacks against you.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「安全屋」</color>本层探索中，不会遭遇敌人。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Safe House</color>: In this level, there will be no enemy encounters.

E: Normal: Surprise Attack Ability

E: DoT Boost

E: Immediately defeats Normal Enemies in one area

C: 治疗物资
E: Healing Supply

C: 招募具有<color=#f29e38ff>相同羁绊</color>的员工，可大幅提升团队作战能力。\n熟练使用<color=#f29e38ff>追踪羁绊</color>功能，可快速在商店中找到想要的羁绊内角色！
E: Recruiting staff members with the <color=#f29e38ff>same Bond</color> will greatly enhance your team's combat effectiveness.\nMaster the <color=#f29e38ff>Bond Tracking</color> function to quickly find characters with desired Bonds in the Store!

C: 每场比赛结束后会获得<color=#f29e38ff>观赛积分</color>，级别越高的赛场获得的积分越多，累计积分可领取观赛奖励。
E: After each match, you'll earn <color=#f29e38ff>Spectator Points</color>. Higher-tier matches award more points, and you can claim Spectator Rewards by accumulating points.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>能量</color>可以通过在战斗内<color=#f29e38ff>施放技能、消灭敌方目标或受到攻击</color>时恢复。<color=#f29e38ff>能量恢复效率</color>可以提高角色获取的能量值。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Energy</color> is regenerated in battle when <color=#f29e38ff>using abilities, defeating enemies, or receiving attacks</color>. <color=#f29e38ff>Energy Regeneration Rate</color> can boost the amount of energy a character gains.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>留声机</color>，可以更改车厢内的音乐。通过探索世界，可以获得新的<color=#f29e38ff>唱片</color>，从而解锁更多音乐。
E: Use the <color=#f29e38ff>Phonograph</color> to change the music when on the Express. By exploring various worlds, you can obtain new <color=#f29e38ff>records</color> to unlock new tracks.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>斥力桥</color>分为橙、蓝两种颜色，利用<color=#f29e38ff>配控装置</color>可以改变当前生效的路段，通往意想不到的地点。
E: A <color=#f29e38ff>repulsion bridge</color> can either be orange or blue. Using the <color=#f29e38ff>control device</color> to change the active bridge will lead you to unexpected destinations.

C: 与<color=#f29e38ff>控制装置</color>交互后，对应的<color=#f29e38ff>筑梦模块</color>和其<color=#f29e38ff>运行轨迹</color>将会高亮显示。
E: After interacting with the <color=#f29e38ff>Control Panel</color>, the corresponding <color=#f29e38ff>Dream Modules</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>their trajectory</color> will be highlighted.

C: 遇到上下夹击的障碍时，<color=#f29e38ff>长按翻转键</color>可以保持在球笼轨道中间安全通过。
E: When you face obstacles coming from both sides, <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} and hold the Flip button</color> to stay in the middle of the Spheroid lane and pass them safely.

C: 旋转屏幕，可以从各个方向观察装置。
E: Rotate the screen to observe the device from multiple angles.

C: 「灵液匣」的不同侧面可能各自覆盖有薄膜，破坏不同朝向的薄膜会得到不一样的结果。

C: 浮烟释放技能【棋快一着】会使敌方全体立即行动。
E: When Cirrus uses their ability "Rapid Gambit," all enemies will immediately take action.

C: 「虚构叙事」中的所有战斗有轮数限制，行动轮数结束或消灭全部敌人，则战斗结束。\n战斗结束前，敌人被消灭后会<color=#f29e38ff>不断补充</color>，消灭更多的敌人可获得<color=#f29e38ff>更高的积分</color>，以获得更多奖励。
E: All battles in Pure Fiction have a Cycle limit, and battles finish when action cycles end or all enemies are eliminated.\nUntil the battle finishes, enemies will be <color=#f29e38ff>continually replenished</color> once eliminated. Defeating more enemies will earn you <color=#f29e38ff>higher scores</color> and greater rewards.

C: 在本关内消灭<color=#f29e38ff>扑满</color>，可积累大量「战意值」。\n需要在扑满逃跑前尽快消灭扑满。
E: Defeat the <color=#f29e38ff>Trotters</color> in this stage to obtain a large amount of Grit Value.\nYou need to defeat the Trotter before it escapes.

C: 消除<color=#f29e38ff>特定水果</color>可为小鸟充能，<color=#f29e38ff>能量充满</color>后，小鸟将释放强力战技辅助消除。
E: Clear <color=#f29e38ff>specific fruits</color> to charge the bird. After <color=#f29e38ff>fully charging</color>, the bird will release a powerful skill to help eliminate fruits.

C: 最终以节点一和节点二的战斗<color=#f29e38ff>积分总和</color>进行结算。
E: The final points will be calculated based on the <color=#f29e38ff>sum of points scored</color> in the Node 1 and Node 2 battles.

C: 本场比赛的敌人拥有绩效点，击破敌人或消灭敌人，可<color=#f29e38ff>抢夺其绩效点</color>。\n抢夺绩效点会触发<color=#f29e38ff>「高光时刻」</color>，获得大量「气氛值」。
E: Enemies will have Performance Points in this match. Breaking or defeating enemies will allow you to <color=#f29e38ff>seize their Performance Points</color>.\nSeizing Performance Points will trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Highlights</color> and grant a massive amount of Vibes.

C: 开拓者和三月七需要根据影展的<color=#f29e38ff>每日课题</color>酝酿<color=#f29e38ff>拍摄灵感</color>，拍摄出对应的<color=#f29e38ff>摄影作品</color>，将命名后的作品上传，接受芮克先生和观展者的点评。
E: Trailblazer and March 7th need to gather <color=#f29e38ff>inspiration</color> based on the exhibition's <color=#f29e38ff>daily theme</color> and take corresponding <color=#f29e38ff>photos</color>. Then, they will name the photo, upload it, and receive feedback from Mr. Reca and the viewers.

C:
◆ 增益效果 ◆
● 增益效果会提高开拓券的获取数量。当前增益越高，获得的开拓券越多。（注意：土地收益和委托收益不受增益效果的影响）
● 增益效果分为<color=#f29e38ff>永久生效</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>限时生效</color>两种类型。
● 前进至雅利洛-Ⅵ / 仙舟「罗浮」/ 匹诺康尼时，获取开拓券时的基础收益将永久提升至<color=#f29e38ff>#1%</color>/<color=#f29e38ff>#2%</color>/<color=#f29e38ff>#3%</color>。
E:
◆ Buffs ◆
● Buffs will increase the amount of Trailblaze Funds you can obtain. The higher the current buffs, the more funds you'll get. (Note: Land and Assignment revenues will not be affected by buffs)
● Buffs are classified into two types: <color=#f29e38ff>permanently effective</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>temporarily effective</color>.
● When you advance to Jarilo-VI / The Xianzhou Luofu / Penacony, the base revenue you get when obtaining Trailblaze Funds will be permanently increased to <color=#f29e38ff>#1%</color>/<color=#f29e38ff>#2%</color>/<color=#f29e38ff>#3%</color>.

C:
◆ 星阶模式 ◆
● 「星阶模式」中，玩家可以挑战「阈值协议」，「阈值协议」中难度将大幅提高。
● 「星阶模式」包含「拓星模式」和「练习模式」。
● 「拓星模式」中，可以点亮智瞳，提升星阶。星阶越高，「拓星模式」的「阈值协议」等级也越高。
● 「拓星模式」中，星阶无法降低。同一星阶内，智瞳的数量可能会增减。部分星阶中存在保级机制。
● 「练习模式」中，可以自由选择「阈值协议」等级，最多不超过当前星阶对应的「阈值协议」等级。
● 「练习模式」不会影响星阶和智瞳。
E:
◆ Astronomical Division Mode ◆
● In Astronomical Division Mode, players can challenge Threshold Protocols. The difficulty of the game will be greatly increased while challenging Threshold Protocols.
● Astronomical Division Mode includes Star-Pioneer Mode and Practice Mode.
● In Star-Pioneer Mode, you can light Cognoculi to increase your Astronomical Division. The higher your Astronomical Division, the higher the Threshold Protocol in Star-Pioneer Mode will be.
● Astronomical Division cannot be lowered in Star-Pioneer Mode. Your number of Cognoculi may increase or decrease in the same Astronomical Division. Some Astronomical Divisions contain rank-retaining mechanisms.
● In Practice Mode, you can freely choose Threshold Protocol levels, up to the max level corresponding to your current Astronomical Division.
● Practice Mode will not affect your Astronomical Division or Cognoculi.

Unlike the vast majority of machines that lack intellect and can only act on command, "monitoring automaton" is capable of much more complex thinking.\nIn battle, "monitoring automaton" can summon various machines as well as a robot arm unit to grab and control enemies while unleashing devastating strikes.

C: 你好，{NICKNAME}。欢迎入职星穹列车，我是三月七，星穹列车的乘员，也是你的同事。现在，请先拍摄入职照…瞧把你吓的，咱是在开玩笑啦~
E: Ahem! Hello, {NICKNAME}. Welcome aboard the Astral Express. My name is March 7th, I'm one of the passengers. We'll be working together. First, we need to take your induction photo... Did that scare you! Just a joke~

C: 偶尔我也会幻想自己展露冷酷、神秘、优雅、厉害的模样，略微出手便能击退敌人…没想到真的会发生！下次，本姑娘要用自己的力量，守护大家！
E: Sometimes I imagine myself being all cool, mysterious, elegant, and powerful, making enemies go flying with just a flick of the wrist... But I never thought that'd come true! Next time, I'm gonna use my own power to protect everyone!

C: 击云从不离身，不仅是为了我的安全，也是为了其他人的。
E: Cloud-Piercer is always with me. For my safety, and the safety of everyone else.

C: 做得不错。
E: Nice work.

C: 不能开小号，艾利欧也不行。
E: Nobody gets to open an alt account, not even Elio.

C: 上次和托帕小姐聊起休假，约好包个飞行器，看看浩瀚星海，聊聊「公司」八卦啦…不过，我俩的时间什么时候才能凑一起呢……
E: The last time I spoke with Topaz, we agreed to take a holiday. We were going to charter a ship, go star-seeing, and catch up on all the IPC gossip... but we still haven't had the chance...

C: 我见过很多被复仇意志支撑起的人，他们的灵魂总会在复仇达成的那一刻崩塌。希望在复仇成功之后，他仍然能找到自己生存在世界上的理由。
E: I've seen many people fueled by vengeance, only to have their souls shatter the moment their revenge is complete. I hope that once his revenge is fulfilled, he can still find a reason to exist in this world.

C: 总有人问我机械屋停业怎么赚钱的问题，这答案难道不是显而易见——不赚钱啊。
E: I always get people asking me how my workshop makes money when it's not trading. Use your brain! It doesn't!

C: 贝洛伯格并非隐于雪幕之中，而是作为这颗星球最后的堡垒抵御着风雪的侵凌。
E: Belobog is far from buried in the snow curtain. This city is the planet's last bastion against the ferocity of the Eternal Freeze.

C: 今天我在…不过也别因为我在就乱来哦。
E: I'm in today. But that is not an excuse for misbehavior.

C: 嗯，大脑很健康。
E: Hm, that's a healthy brain.

C: 史瓦罗：躲起来。
E: Svarog: Hide.

C: 史瓦罗：前方出现，高威胁目标。
E: Svarog: High threat target ahead.

C: 一条情报经过不同的包装，就能大大方方卖给不同的人。这叫利益最大化。
E: If you package it right, you can sell the same piece of intel to different people! That, my friend, is called "maximizing your profit."

C: 让你瞧瞧「鼹鼠党」老大的厉害吧！
E: Watch out! The boss of The Moles is coming to get you!

C: 是给虎克的吗？
E: Is this for Hook?

C: 啊，被叮了个包…
E: Ugh, I think something bit me...

C: 比赛要开始了？好！我先热热身。
E: The tournament's starting? Great! Let me get warmed up.

C: 想歇一会儿？去吧！偷偷告诉你，冠军的秘诀就是趁着别人休息的时候刻苦训练。
E: Need a rest? Go! Tell you a secret though — a champion wins by training hard while others rest.

C: 听说过名字的天才少年，这么小就天天工作了？听着就累。
E: I've heard his name. A genius boy, and working every day at such a young age? Sounds exhausting.

C: 牌势无定势，越急越没戏~
E: Don't rush — the game is always changing~

C: 这星海间万千世界，我还远远未看够呢……
E: This vast universe has so many worlds I've yet to explore...

C: 可惜，你们选错了对手。
E: Pity. You chose the wrong enemy.

C: 喜欢便拿去吧。
E: Take it, if it's to your liking.

C: 你若当他是个孩子，他便会端起大人的架子来。你若当他是个大人，他又会露出小孩子的脾性来。
E: If you treat him as a child, he'll put on the airs of an adult. If you treat him as an adult, he'll show the temperament of a child.

C: 我渴望终结，而她渴望生存…我们都是命运的奴隶。
E: I yearn for the end, yet she yearns for survival... We are both destiny's slaves.

C: 「罗浮」云骑军骁卫彦卿，前来报到！{NICKNAME}老师有空的话，就来同彦卿切磋一下吧？放心，我可不会因为对手是老师您就手下留情。
E: Yanqing, lieutenant of the Luofu Cloud Knights, reporting in! If you have some free time, {NICKNAME}, would you mind sparring with me? Don't worry. I won't go easy on you.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}别担心，尽管上，要是你有个三长两短，我一定包你痊愈如初。
E: Don't worry — if anything happens, I'll just put you back together.

C: 有人声的地方，分外聒噪。
E: Where there are people, there is noise.

C: 吾在棺中沉眠时，总会梦见许多罪人的过去，醒来却毫无记忆…这就是十王司的梦兆推占之法吗？
E: When asleep in my coffin, I often experience the memories of criminals in my dreams. But when I awake, I don't remember anything... People say the Ten-Lords Commission can perform dream divination. I wonder if that's what I'm experiencing.

C: 魔阴，不赦。
E: No amnesty... for the Mara-struck.

C: 看来寒鸦大人昨晚也没睡…如果有我能分担的，请尽管说……
E: Madam Hanya, did you also have a restless night...? If there's anything I can help with, just let me know...

C: 藿藿：灵符…保命…
E: Huohuo: Give me... strength...

C: 藿藿：是我赢了吗？我吗？!\n尾巴：还不谢我？
E: Huohuo: Did I win? Did I win!?\nTail: Not even a thanks?

C: 还差点火候。
E: Needs a little more heat.

C: 太慢了！还能更快！
E: Too slow! I can go even faster!

C: 驭空姐姐，你我又要并肩作战了。
E: Madam Yukong, looks like we're fighting side by side again.

C: 三月算是我第一个徒弟，有天赋也肯吃苦，我挺满意的。如果能听到她说我教的比彦卿教的好，我肯定做梦都会笑醒……
E: March is my first apprentice. She's talented and willing to put in the work — I'm quite pleased with her. If I could just hear her say that my teaching is better than Yanqing's, I would be over the moon.

C: 十王司的判官？虽然感觉本人不是很能打的样子，但她身后的尾巴好像挺厉害。
E: That Judge from the Ten-Lords Commission? She doesn't seem like a warrior, but that tail of hers has some fight in it.

C: 挺有自信么？
E: I like that confidence.

C: 余音不绝。
E: Sound lingers.

C: 来吧，让我们以「愚者」之名，和大家打个招呼吧！
E: Shouldn't the "Fool" introduce himself to everyone?

C: 那些最为绚烂瑰丽的记忆，将被送往净土保存。在忆者间流传的传说中，「浮黎」会将这些记忆编织入善见天，在世界覆灭后，它们将成为重塑一切的模板。
E: The most luminous and lavish memories are to be sheltered in the Pure Land of Recollection. In the tales whispered among the Memokeepers, "Fuli" will blend these recollections into the Eden of Blessed Insight, and they shall serve to reshape the entirety of the world after its annihilation.

C: 我没有做梦的机能，需要的睡眠时间也远比常人更短。每个夜晚，我都会在屋顶静静看着星海，看着一盏盏灯火点亮又熄灭，一艘艘航船进出港湾…就这样，直到天亮。
E: I don't have the ability to dream, and I need much less sleep than normal people. Every night, I go up to the roof to gaze at the sea of stars and watch the lights turn on and go out, and the boats go in and out of the harbor... until the sun rises.

C: 再这样下去，工作要做不完了…
E: I'll never get the job done at this rate...

C: 请放心，你我有共同的目标。
E: Rest assured. We share the same goal.

C: 我不介意客人在完成心愿后赎回自己的抵押，只是我会告诉他们一个更好的提案，一个只需一点点代价，就能让他们走得更远、爬得更高的方法…猜猜看，他们最后都是怎么选的？
E: I don't mind if customers buy back their collateral after they accomplish what they want, but I'll propose an even better alternative to them. A way to make them go further and climb higher, at a small price... Guess what they choose in the end?

C: 来，动手，成全我。
E: Come on, let's do this.

C: 拔枪！
E: Draw!

C: 科学没有界限，我更没有。
E: Science knows no boundaries — and neither do I.

C: 你可以什么都不写，也可以一辈子只写一篇，只要你足够大胆——思想要是不够大胆，还配称之为思想？假面愚者都懂的道理。
E: You can write no thesis, or only one thesis in your lifetime — as long as you're brave enough, that is. Thoughts that aren't brave enough aren't fit to be called thoughts — Even Masked Fools know that.

C: 蝶，为战场带来安息吧。
E: Cas, please bring peace to the battlefield.

C: 你的微光，将带着我们冲破黑暗。
E: Your faint light will lead us through the darkness.

C: 丰盈的气息，值得嘉奖。
E: An abundant fragrance, worthy of recognition.

C: 看看吧，最后谁会留下。
E: Let's see who remains in the end.

C: 看，光照了进来。
E: Look, light is coming in.

C: 赛飞儿小姐，有计策还麻烦提前通个气。
E: Miss Cipher, if you've got a scheme in mind, a little early notice wouldn't hurt.

C: 正想去找你呢，走，一起练练手？
E: Perfect timing! I was just heading out to find you. How about we spar a bit?

C: 曾有人同我抱怨，阿格莱雅女士总是不可捉摸，难以信任…但当我握住她的手，那冰冷的指腹下依旧跳动着温热，我想，她只是用话语掩藏了心间的声音。
E: Someone once complained to me that Lady Aglaea is always so unreadable and untrustworthy... But I sensed a faint warmth still beating under her icy-cold skin when I took her hands. I believe she simply used her words to conceal her true intentions.

C: 与你们一起旅行的日子，早在他身上留下了不可磨灭的烙印。
E: The days spent traveling with you all have already left an indelible mark on him.

C: 杨叔果然十分靠谱。
E: Mr. Yang is indeed very reliable.

C: 带回列车，补充些物资吧。
E: I'll take this back to the Express. Time to restock.

C: 若需驭水，我也可从旁协助。
E: I can also assist with commanding the waters.

C: 这是命运的邂逅吗，还是…久别重逢呢？真让人心跳加速呀，那…就像初遇时那样，再一次呼唤我「昔涟」，好吗？
E: Is this a meeting ordained by fate, or... a long-overdue reunion? It's making my heart beat faster. Then... please once again call me "Cyrene," just like when we met the first time, okay?

C: 小小的前奏呢。
E: Just a small prelude.

C: 愿「诡计」皆为游戏。
E: May "Trickery" remain a game.

C: 好想你呀，遐蝶！交流作品前，先来个拥抱吧？
E: I missed you so much, Castorice! How about a hug before we share our work?

C: 轮到你了。
E: Batter up.

C: 枪尖已经点燃。
E: Lance ablaze.

C: 配合得不错。
E: Nice teamwork.

C: 保持步调一致。
E: Stay in step.

C: 空间站「黑塔」
E: Herta Space Station

C: 返航
E: Return

C: 上升
E: Ascend

C: 战斗胜利时，大丽花的【共舞者】队友与战斗开始时不为同一人
E: When winning a battle, the teammate who is The Dahlia's "Dance Partner" is different from who it was at the start of combat

C: 查看模式
E: Checking Mode

E: Synergy Duo

E: Fresh, Ethereal, and Beloved

E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge and defeat "Spirithief" on the enemy back row at least <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

E: Breached Nest (II)

C: 骑士（一）
E: Knight (I)

C: 爱蹭饭
E: Freeloader

C: 美味汉堡
E: Tasty Burger

C: 艾格勒的火种
E: Aquila's Coreflame

C: 纷争短剑
E: Strife Dirk

C: 穿戴者每次进入商店时：使我方<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>金币+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Each time the wearer enters the store: Allies gain <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Gold Coin(s)</color>.

C: 使穿戴者受到的伤害降低<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点，对战中首次受到的伤害额外降低<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点.至少受到1点伤害
E: Reduces the wearer's DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The first DMG taken in battle is additionally reduced by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. The minimum DMG taken is 1.

C: 使穿戴者<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>，并使其成为【风堇亲卫队】成员
E: Increases the wearer's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> and makes them a member of "Hyacine's Royal Guard."

C: 对战开始前：<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>金币-<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>

C: 穿戴者被击倒时：将1个拥有<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>初始攻击力，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>初始生命值的自己放入召唤队列，每场对战生效1次
E: When the wearer is knocked down: Places a copy of yourself with <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> initial ATK and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> initial HP into the summon queue, effective 1 time per battle.

C: 自身攻击时：对随机对手发动一次<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的追加攻击。自身追加攻击时：有<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的概率对随机对手发动<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>次额外的<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的追加攻击
E: When this unit attacks: Performs a Follow-Up ATK equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK against a random opponent. When this unit performs a Follow-Up ATK: Gains a(n) <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> chance to launch <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> additional Follow-Up ATK(s) equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK against a random opponent.

C: 回合开始时：我方奇美拉在本场对战每交换<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次位置，队伍中最强的苹果糖向对手发射<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>枚攻击随机目标的导弹，每枚导弹造成<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> position swaps ally chimeras make in this battle, the strongest Candied Apple in the team launches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> missile(s) targeting random opponents, each dealing <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> DMG.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的暖龙龙获得自身当前<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力。攻击时，额外对目标后方最近的奇美拉发动1次等同于<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的追加攻击
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Toasty Dragon in the team gains <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP. When attacking, additionally performs a Follow-Up ATK on the nearest chimera behind the target, dealing 1 instance of DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>ATK.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的奇兽爵召唤<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>级的咕噜鱼儿
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Dux Beast in the team summons <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> level-<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Gurgling Fish.

C: 喜欢小三月嗷呜~
E: I like March, awoo~

C: 好心态决定奇美拉一生。
E: A good attitude determines a chimera's whole life.

C: 我的成长已趋近完美。
E: My growth is approaching perfection.

C: 我也好想放假嗷呜…
E: I'm dying for a vacation too, awoo...

C: 点击空白处关闭
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap anywhere in the blank area}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press any button}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click anywhere in the blank area} to close

E: Current Honor

E: Take-Off!

C: 听歌
E: Listening to Music

C: 捕捉
E: Capture

C: 我等已收获完满！
E: We are made complete!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>虚无</color>命途专属的光锥，光锥技能仅对该命途生效。
E: Light Cone for the Path of <color=#f29e38ff>Nihility</color>. The Light Cone ability is only effective for characters of this Path.

C: 我将击败你们，证明自己是翁法罗斯第一训练家
E: I will defeat you all and prove that I'm the greatest trainer in Amphoreus

C: 匹诺康尼
E: Penacony

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量火属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to one designated target and any adjacent targets.

C: 从我方队伍右侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Starting from the rightmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Imaginary DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成大量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 快从坟墓中苏生
E: Rise from the Grave

C: 末路既定
E: Fated End

C: 知更鸟遇害，花火变作桑博模样，准备赶往下一场戏。一团神秘的黑雾出现在花火身后，花火与之对峙交谈，询问对方来意。
E: After Robin's demise, Sparkle donned Sampo's appearance, preparing to head to the next scene. A mysterious black mist appeared behind Sparkle, who confronted and conversed with it, questioning its intentions.

C: 在「余晖残卷」活动中，完成全部关卡简单难度挑战
E: Complete all stages in Easy mode in the Remnants of Twilight event

C: 在狮震八方「困难」难度中，达成3个挑战目标
E: Complete 3 challenge goals in the Earthshaker Leo challenge in Hard mode

C: 讨要盘缠，再到外面闯一闯。
E: Get some travel money and venture out into the world again.

C: 我已胜券在握。
E: Victory is in my grasp.

C: 具有变身功能的腕表，系《超忍法战队》的官方周边。这部《银河忍法帖》的联动作品中，夜刀战士们会大声喊出奇怪的忍术名称，在烟雾的掩护下变身…直到有愚者混进生产流水线，为变身器真的加上了变身功能，该产品便成了超级危险品。时至今日，该产品已被统一封存。
E: A watch with transformation function, originally an official merchandise from the Super Ninja Squad. In this collaboration with Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions where Night Blade warriors would shout bizarre ninjutsu names and transform under the cover of smoke... That was, until a Fool infiltrated the production line and imbued the device with genuine transformation function, turning it into an extremely dangerous item. To this day, all units have been sealed away in storage.

C: 进入战斗时，我方全体暴击伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，战斗胜利后该奇物损毁。每消耗<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点秘技点可以修复该奇物
E: When entering combat, increases all allies' CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This Curio is destroyed after winning a combat. Every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Technique Point(s) consumed repairs this Curio.

C: 共舞者
E: Dance Partner

C: 箩筐学派
E: Wicker School

C: 废墟行者
E: Ruin Strider

C: 梦主的意图已是昭然若揭…必须阻止他才行——可是，他究竟准备怎样做到那一切？
E: The Dreammaster's intentions are now painfully clear... I have to stop him. But how on earth does he plan to pull all this off?

C: 流萤竟然也来到了流梦礁，并且将矛头指向了梦主…这会是一个陷阱吗？还是她们的确发现了什么？
E: Firefly has made her way to Dreamflux Reef and is now targeting the Dreammaster... Could this be a trap? Or have they actually discovered something?

C: 在她们看来，梦主并未倒向「秩序」，可其他的命途又完全无法联想到一起。她们将要展示的证据，恐怕远远超出我的认知。
E: In their eyes, Dreammaster hasn't sided with the Order, yet the other Paths can't be connected in any way. The evidence they're about to present will likely far exceed my understanding.

C: 以黑天鹅将你唤醒作为分界，由于太一之梦的存在，你此后的记忆，都不能再以从前的视角看待。\n为你的记忆，亲自写下开场白吧。
E: Being woken up by Black Swan was a watershed moment. Due to the existence of Ena's Dream, your memories from that point onward can no longer be viewed from the same perspective as before.\nWrite a prologue for your memories.

C: 殊途同归，最终，人们仍是从梦中醒来，但那些失却的记忆，似乎仍然没有被完全寻获。
E: Different paths lead to the same end. Eventually, people still wake up from their dreams, yet those lost memories seem to remain not fully recovered.

C: 寻回遗失的一切，证明它们曾经存在过。
E: Find everything that was lost and prove they once existed.

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。据说赛事组推出了新的对决活动，完成定级赛后再回去看看吧。
E: The famous Chimera World Tournament in Okhema is in full swing. Word is that the organizers have launched new battle events, so check them out after completing your placement matches!

C: 寻找真相
E: Uncover the truth

C: 找到流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: …{NICKNAME}？三月七小姐在到处找你。
E: ...{NICKNAME}? Miss March 7th is looking for you everywhere.

C: 好的，来了。
E: Alright. Coming!

C: …许多事？
E: ...Things easier?

C: 无论如何，我必须帮你找回——有关「终末」的一切。
E: Either way, I must help you recover... everything about the Finality.

C: 「这…就是梦？」
E: "Is this... what dreams are?"

C: 手术…结束了吗？
E: Is the surgery... over?

C: 身份早就搞定了，但有件麻烦事。边走边讲吧，去准备好的房间。
E: ID's already taken care of, but there's a snag. Let's walk and talk. Head to the room I prepped.

C: 你总能在坏事堆里找出点好消息。
E: You always manage to find a silver lining in a pile of bad news.

C: 还有，其实绕开它们也可以的。
E: Also, you can actually just go around them.

C: 得小心些，不能被人发现。
E: Be careful. Can't let anyone find me.

C: 真是好久不见啊，亲爱的！
E: It's been such a long time, old friend!

C: 啊。
E: Oh.

C: 属于你的那一副，真的叫做「同谐」么？
E: As for that mask of yours... Is it really called the Harmony?

C: 嗯？「秩序」的双子？
E: Hm? The twin of the Order?

C: 我没事，继续吧。
E: I'm fine, let's continue.

C: 而花火也不是只为取乐而来，她是星核猎手的合作者。
E: And Sparkle wasn't just here for fun. She's in cahoots with the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 只是伪装成一个入口。那道裂痕并非通往别处，而是一把记忆之锁，钥匙，则是承载特定记忆的一枚光锥。
E: It only looks like an entrance. That crack doesn't lead anywhere. It's a lock of memories, and the key is a Light Cone carrying specific memories.

C: 完全没有其他办法？
E: Is there really no other way?

C: 现在还不清楚，但很明显，她身上有许多处足以致死的伤痕——她绝不是失熵而死。
E: It's not clear yet, but obviously, she had multiple fatal wounds on her body... she definitely didn't die from entropy loss.

C: 因此我和美梦逐渐无法相容。过去是「梦主」为我进行调和，在他无暇他顾之时，我才终于感到异常。
E: That's why I gradually became incompatible with the sweet dream. In the past, the Dreammaster would harmonize for me, but when he was too busy to tend to me, I finally noticed something was wrong.

C: 所谓的历史早已逝去，但人们的记忆却沉积在忆域之中……
E: History as we know it may be long gone, but people's memories remain preserved in the Memory Zone...

C: （在你度过最美好的时光之后，就尽力飞向天空吧，你会在橡木的顶端听见虫鸣…已经结束了呀。）
E: (After you've lived through the best of times, soar toward the sky with all your might. You'll hear insects chirping at the oak's crown... It's all over now.)

C: 然后就发生了暴乱？
E: And then there was a revolt?

C: 他曾是梦主的挚友，但出于对于美梦的分歧，最终仍是分道扬镳。米哈伊尔曾赠给梦主一只腕表，即便已经破碎，他仍珍藏至今。
E: He was once the Dreammaster's closest friend, but they ultimately parted ways due to their differences over the sweet dream. Mikhail once gave the Dreammaster a wristwatch, and even though it's broken now, he still treasures it to this day.

C: 可此后，{RUBY_B#太一}神主{RUBY_E#}却主动掀起神战，促成了自身的陨落——祂不希望「秩序」，踩上谎言的神阶。
E: But after that, {RUBY_B#Ena}the Great One{RUBY_E#} deliberately ignited a war among gods, leading to THEIR own downfall. THEY would rather fall than let the Order ascend upon a staircase of falsehoods.

C: 这是什么？
E: What is this?

C: 那么，我愿意奉上同情，猎手——就我所知，改写命运的方式只有一种。
E: Well then, I'll offer you my sympathy, Hunter. As far as I know, there's only one way to rewrite destiny.

C: 且先不说如何取胜，<color=#dbc291ff>只有依次将三重梦境全部跨越，我们才能再次直面星期日。</color>
E: Forget about winning. <color=#dbc291ff>We need to cross all three layers of the dreamscape before we can even face Sunday again.</color>

C: 我们已经沉寂了太久。是时候让全宇宙的懦夫、蛀虫和压迫者重新想起巡海游侠的名字了，就由我来打响第一枪。
E: We've stayed silent for far too long. Now, it's time to remind all the cowards, oppressors, and villains of the universe of our presence! I'll be the one to ignite the first spark.

C: 或许与令使的身份无关…这是迥然不同的「众愿」，我将倾尽所能——<color=#dbc291ff>为你们斩落恶神。</color>
E: Perhaps it's not about being an Emanator... This is a different "collective wish." I will do everything in my power... <color=#dbc291ff>to strike down that evil god for you all.</color>

C: 只剩一个「名字」…一个我「本是」，现在却渴望「成为」的人。
E: Only a "name" remains... A person that I "was," and now want to "become."

C: 绝不，我拼尽全力走到了今天，而这一切，还没有结束。即使一切烧绝烬尽，我也不会放弃！
E: Never. I've fought tooth and nail to get where I am today, and this isn't over yet. Even if everything burns to ashes, I won't give up!

C: 「群」演
E: "Extras"

C: 驾驶风帆穿越风暴的时候，醉鬼总会祈求命运的仁慈。
E: When sailing through storms, drunkards always beg for mercy from destiny.

C: 嗯，我想和你做一笔交易。然后…我们来谈谈吧——在公司面前，匹诺康尼将会处于何种位置。
E: Yes. I want to make a deal with you, and after that... we'll talk about what position Penacony will hold before the IPC.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>只有你能知道，只有你能决定。这片银河，的确不是只为你而存在，也不是只在你的注视下流淌…但它永远等待着你的{RUBY_B#超越}拯救{RUBY_E#}。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Only you can know it and only you can decide. This cosmos certainly doesn't exist solely for you, nor does it flow only under your gaze... But it's forever waiting for you {RUBY_B#to surpass}to save{RUBY_E#} it.</color>

C: …抱歉。
E: ...I'm sorry.

C: 你不许偷偷离开。
E: Don't you dare sneak away.

C: 别管我，不想让你因我受伤。
E: Don't worry about me. I don't want you getting hurt because of me.

C: 而在她逐渐忘记一切时，关于你的故事，是直到最后才消失的部分。
E: And as she gradually forgot everything, the story of you was the last to fade.

C: 这家伙在说什么呢？
E: What's this fellow on about?

C: 你掀开箱盖，拿上属于你的神赐珍宝。冥冥中似有目光从身后传来，又或是一阵温暖的风。
E: You lift the lid of the chest and take out the divine treasure that belongs to you. A gaze seems to linger from behind, or perhaps it's just a warm breeze.

C: 一阵微风抚平了巨浪，带着安提灵花的气息。手持巨镰的少女自冥河下游缓缓走来，长靴在水面点起涟漪。她的颜色好似薰衣草。
E: A gentle breeze calmed the towering waves, carrying the scent of Antila flowers. A young girl wielding a giant scythe approached slowly from downstream of the River of Souls, her boots creating ripples on the water's surface. Her color resembles that of lavender.

C: 泰坦所用之物往往能继承部分神力。那些失败者之所以会遇上巨浪，是因为它们没有找到正确的船——你如此相信着，带领水手们沿岸搜寻，终于找到了那艘无主的摆渡船。
E: Objects used by Titans often inherit a portion of their divine power. You firmly believe that those who failed met with giant waves because they hadn't found the right vessel. With this conviction, you led the sailors to search along the coast until finally discovering that ownerless ferry.

C: 这就是你的回答吗？呵呵，看来你也和我一样空虚。
E: Is that your answer? Heh, looks like you're just as empty inside as I am.

C: 谁辜负了垃圾，垃圾便会辜负他。不理解这一点的你，没有和我对谈的资格！
E: Those who betray trash will, in turn, be betrayed by trash. If you don't understand this, you don't have the right to talk to me!

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 车厘比斯能帮上不少的忙，灰宝要善加利用哦。
E: Krenabis can be a big help, make good use of it, Grayie!

C: 目标2：完成#1轮挑战
E: Objective 2: Complete #1 Challenge Cycles

C: 关于大丽花
E: About The Dahlia

C: 星核猎手明明是「剧本」的囚徒，可她一次次向命运发起反叛…那些埋葬在虫群中的过往，何时会被她燃烧殆尽呢？
E: The Stellaron Hunters are meant to be prisoners to the "script," yet she rebelled against fate time and time again... When will her blaze finally burn away the past which the Swarm has buried?
